-- params : ...

repeat
  repeat
    wait()
  until _G.ItemsReady
until game.Players.LocalPlayer
wait(3)
p = game.Players.LocalPlayer
p:WaitForChild("PlayerGui")
p.PlayerGui:WaitForChild("Main")
evolvescreen = p.PlayerGui.Main.BlackScreen.Evolution
local Math = require(game.ReplicatedStorage.Functions.Math)
local Moves = require(game.ReplicatedStorage.Information.Moves)
local ExpTables = require(game.ReplicatedStorage.Information.ExpTables)
local Pokedex = require(game.ReplicatedStorage.Functions.Pokedex)
local Battle = require(game.ReplicatedStorage.Functions.Battle)
local nStats = require(game.ReplicatedStorage.Information.NatureStats)
scrolltext = function(gui, text, thing)
  
  for i = 1, #text, 2 do
    gui.Text = string.sub(text, 1, i)
    gui.dropshadow.Text = gui.Text
    wait(0.05)
  end
  gui.Text = text
  gui.dropshadow.Text = gui.Text
  if thing == nil then
    wait(0.55)
  end
end

evolanim = function(pokecfg, pokeimage, evolution)
  
  for i = 0.6, 0.1, -0.1 do
    pokeimage:TweenSizeAndPosition(UDim2.new(0, 0, 0, 0), UDim2.new(0.5, 64, 0.5, 64), "Out", "Quad", i, true)
    wait(i)
    pokeimage:TweenSizeAndPosition(UDim2.new(0, 256, 0, 256), UDim2.new(0.5, -128, 0.5, -128), "Out", "Quad", i, true)
    wait(i)
  end
  pokeimage:TweenSizeAndPosition(UDim2.new(0, 0, 0, 0), UDim2.new(0.5, 64, 0.5, 64), "Out", "Quad", 0.1, true)
  wait(0.25)
  if pokecfg.Shiny.Value == true then
    pokeimage.Image = _G.Pokemon[evolution].Sprites.SF
  else
    pokeimage.Image = _G.Pokemon[evolution].Sprites.Front
  end
  pokeimage:TweenSizeAndPosition(UDim2.new(0, 128, 0, 128), UDim2.new(0.5, -64, 0.5, -64))
end

changevisible = function(thing, isa, bool)
  
  for i,v in ipairs(thing:GetChildren()) do
    if v:IsA(isa) then
      v.Visible = bool
    end
  end
end

hash = function(num)
  
  return (num + 4) * 8
end

dehash = function(num)
  
  return (num - 32) / 8
end

moveevolve = function(pokecfg)
  
  changevisible(evolvescreen.EvolveDialog.MovesBG, "TextButton", false)
  for _,dero in ipairs(pokecfg.Moves:GetChildren()) do
    for duh,moves in ipairs(evolvescreen.EvolveDialog.MovesBG:GetChildren()) do
      if tonumber(moves.Name:sub(5, 5)) == dero.Value then
        moves.MoveName.Text = dero.Name
        local color = _G.Tables.TypeColors[_G.Moves[dero.Name].Type]
        moves.BackgroundColor3 = color
        moves.Category.Text = _G.Moves[dero.Name].AttackType
        moves.Type.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.new(color.r - 0.16, color.g - 0.16, color.b - 0.16)
        moves.Type.Text = _G.Moves[dero.Name].Type
        moves.PP.Text = "PP: " .. pokecfg.Moves:FindFirstChild(dero.Name).PP.Value .. "/" .. _G.Moves[dero.Name].PP
        moves.Visible = true
      end
    end
  end
  evolvescreen.EvolveDialog.MovesBG.Visible = true
end

HPcalc = function(lvl, iv, ev, poke)
  
  return (iv + 2 * _G.Pokemon[poke].Stats.HP + ev / 4) * lvl / 100 + 10 + lvl
end

otherstatcalc = function(basestat, lvl, iv, ev, nature, poke)
  
  return ((iv + 2 * _G.Pokemon[poke].Stats[basestat] + ev / 4) * lvl / 100 + 5) * nature
end

local stats = {"HP", "Atk", "Def", "SpA", "SpD", "Speed"}
determinenature = function(stat, nature)
  
  if nStats[stat .. " Boost"][nature] then
    return 1.1
  else
    if nStats[stat .. " Down"][nature] then
      return 0.9
    else
      return 1
    end
  end
end

EvolvingTime = function(pokecfg, thing, item, part2)
  
  yourpokeout = pokecfg
  eaction = nil
  evolvescreen.Parent.Visible = true
  evolvescreen.EvolveDialog.Speak.Text = ""
  evolvescreen.EvolveDialog.Speak.dropshadow.Text = ""
  if pokecfg.Shiny.Value == true then
    evolvescreen.PokeImage.Image = _G.Pokemon[pokecfg.Name].Sprites.SF
  else
    evolvescreen.PokeImage.Image = _G.Pokemon[pokecfg.Name].Sprites.Front
  end
  evolvescreen.Visible = true
  scrolltext(evolvescreen.EvolveDialog.Speak, pokecfg.Name .. " is about to evolve. Proceed with this?")
  wait(0.5)
  evolvescreen.YesNoHolder.Yes.Visible = true
  evolvescreen.YesNoHolder.No.Visible = true
  yesevolution = evolvescreen.YesNoHolder.Yes.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
    
    evolvescreen.YesNoHolder.Yes.Visible = false
    evolvescreen.YesNoHolder.No.Visible = false
    if item ~= "Rare Candy" and item ~= "Shinyfier" and item ~= "Common Candy" then
      Math:Check(p.Bag.Evolution[item])
    end
    local prename = pokecfg.Name
    local evolin = nil
    if item ~= "Rare Candy" then
      evolin = Battle:EvolveCheck(pokecfg, item, part2)
    else
      evolin = Battle:EvolveCheck(pokecfg, pokecfg.Lvl.Value)
    end
    if evolin then
      scrolltext(evolvescreen.EvolveDialog.Speak, "Congrats! Your " .. prename .. " evolved...")
      evolanim(pokecfg, evolvescreen.PokeImage, evolin)
      scrolltext(evolvescreen.EvolveDialog.Speak, "...Into " .. evolin .. "!")
      Math:Change(pokecfg.Status, "")
      local hpbef = pokecfg.Stats.HPStat.Value
      for i,v in ipairs(stats) do
        do
          if v == "HP" then
            Math:Change(yourpokeout.Stats[v .. "Stat"], HPcalc(yourpokeout.Lvl.Value, yourpokeout.IV[v .. "IV"].Value, yourpokeout.EV[v .. "EV"].Value, evolin))
          else
            do
              Math:Change(yourpokeout.Stats[v .. "Stat"], otherstatcalc(v, yourpokeout.Lvl.Value, yourpokeout.IV[v .. "IV"].Value, yourpokeout.EV[v .. "EV"].Value, determinenature(v, yourpokeout.Nature.Value), evolin))
              -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC155: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_ELSE_STMT

              -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC155: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_STMT

            end
          end
        end
      end
      Math:Change(pokecfg.CurrentHP, pokecfg.CurrentHP.Value + (yourpokeout.Stats.HPStat.Value - hpbef))
      if pokecfg.CurrentHP.Value == 0 then
        Math:Change(pokecfg.Status, "Faint")
      end
      wait(0.6)
      if not Pokedex:Check(pokecfg.Name, p) then
        Pokedex:Create(pokecfg.Name, true)
      else
        Pokedex:Caught(pokecfg.Name)
      end
      if _G.Pokemon[pokecfg.Name].Moves.LevelUp[pokecfg.Lvl.Value] ~= nil then
        for _,newmove in pairs(_G.Pokemon[pokecfg.Name].Moves.LevelUp[pokecfg.Lvl.Value]) do
          if not pokecfg.Moves:FindFirstChild(newmove) then
            if #pokecfg.Moves:GetChildren() < 4 then
              scrolltext(evolvescreen.EvolveDialog.Speak, pokecfg.Name .. " learned " .. newmove .. "!")
              Battle:NewMove(pokecfg, newmove)
              eaction = true
            else
              if #pokecfg.Moves:GetChildren() == 4 then
                yesevolution:disconnect()
                noevolution:disconnect()
                scrolltext(evolvescreen.EvolveDialog.Speak, pokecfg.Name .. " is trying to learn " .. newmove .. ".")
                wait(0.5)
                scrolltext(evolvescreen.EvolveDialog.Speak, "But " .. pokecfg.Name .. " can\'t learn more than four moves.")
                wait(0.5)
                scrolltext(evolvescreen.EvolveDialog.Speak, "Delete a move to make room for " .. newmove .. "?")
                wait(0.5)
                evolvescreen.YesNoHolder.Yes.Visible = true
                evolvescreen.YesNoHolder.No.Visible = true
                yesmove = evolvescreen.YesNoHolder.Yes.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
      
      evolvescreen.YesNoHolder.Yes.Visible = false
      evolvescreen.YesNoHolder.No.Visible = false
      moveevolve(pokecfg)
      for _,v in ipairs(evolvescreen.EvolveDialog.MovesBG:GetChildren()) do
        do
          if v:IsA("TextButton") then
            do
              getfenv()["DeleteDerp" .. v.Name] = v.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
        
        changevisible(evolvescreen.EvolveDialog.MovesBG, "TextButton", false)
        scrolltext(evolvescreen.EvolveDialog.Speak, pokecfg.Name .. " forgot " .. v.MoveName.Text .. "...")
        scrolltext(evolvescreen.EvolveDialog.Speak, pokecfg.Name .. " learned " .. newmove .. "!")
        Math:PropChange(pokecfg.Moves[v.MoveName.Text], "Name", newmove)
        Math:Change(pokecfg.Moves[newmove].PP, _G.Moves[newmove].PP)
        eaction = true
        for i,v in ipairs(evolvescreen.EvolveDialog.MovesBG:GetChildren()) do
          if getfenv()["DeleteDerp" .. v.Name] then
            getfenv()["DeleteDerp" .. v.Name]:disconnect()
          end
        end
      end
)
              -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC38: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_THEN_STMT

              -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC38: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_STMT

            end
          end
        end
      end
    end
)
                nomove = evolvescreen.YesNoHolder.No.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
      
      evolvescreen.YesNoHolder.Yes.Visible = false
      evolvescreen.YesNoHolder.No.Visible = false
      scrolltext(evolvescreen.EvolveDialog.Speak, pokecfg.Name .. " did not learn " .. newmove .. ".")
      eaction = true
      evolvescreen.Visible = false
    end
)
              end
            end
          else
            eaction = true
          end
        end
      else
        do
          do
            eaction = true
            eaction = true
            evolvescreen.Visible = false
            evolvescreen.Parent.Visible = false
          end
        end
      end
    end
  end
)
  noevolution = evolvescreen.YesNoHolder.No.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
    
    evolvescreen.YesNoHolder.Yes.Visible = false
    evolvescreen.YesNoHolder.No.Visible = false
    scrolltext(evolvescreen.EvolveDialog.Speak, pokecfg.Name .. " didn\'t evolve.")
    evolvescreen.Visible = false
    eaction = true
  end
)
  repeat
    wait()
  until eaction ~= nil
  if yesevolution then
    yesevolution:disconnect()
  end
  if yesevolution then
    noevolution:disconnect()
  end
  if yesmove then
    yesmove:disconnect()
  end
  if nomove then
    nomove:disconnect()
  end
  evolvescreen.YesNoHolder.Yes.Visible = false
  evolvescreen.YesNoHolder.No.Visible = false
  evolvescreen.Parent.Visible = false
  evolvescreen.Visible = false
end

findNetBallType = function(pokemon)
  
  for i,v in ipairs(_G.Pokemon[pokemon.Name].Type) do
    if v == "Water" or v == "Bug" then
      return 3
    end
  end
  return 1
end

_G.UpdateBag = function(battle)
  
  p.PlayerGui.Main.Backpack.Bottom.Use.Visible = false
  p.PlayerGui.Main.Backpack.Bottom.Full.Visible = false
  p.PlayerGui.Main.Backpack.Bottom.Position = UDim2.new(0, 0, 0.75, 0)
  if close then
    close:disconnect()
  end
  close = p.PlayerGui.Main.Backpack.Close.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
    
    p.PlayerGui.Main.Backpack.Visible = false
    p.PlayerGui.Main.BlackScreen.Visible = p.InBattle.Value
    p.PlayerGui.Main.BattleScene.Visible = p.InBattle.Value
  end
)
end

_G.ItemFunctions = {CureStatus = function(item2, pokemon)
  
  _G.ShakeCheck = nil
  local item = _G.Items[item2]
  for i,v in pairs(item.Use.CureStatus) do
    if pokemon.Status.Value == v then
      Math:Change(pokemon.Status, "")
      Math:Check(p.Bag.Recover[item2], false)
      _G.PokemonCFG = pokemon
      _G.ItemCool = item2
      _G.UpdateBag()
    end
  end
  _G.UpdateBag()
end
, Revive = function(item2, pokemon)
  
  _G.ShakeCheck = nil
  local item = _G.Items[item2]
  if pokemon.Status.Value ~= "Faint" then
    _G.UpdateBag()
  else
    Math:Change(pokemon.CurrentHP, math.floor(pokemon.Stats.HPStat.Value / 2))
    Math:Change(pokemon.Status, "")
    Math:Check(p.Bag.Recover[item2], false)
    _G.PokemonCFG = pokemon
    _G.ItemCool = item2
    _G.UpdateBag()
  end
end
, Experience = function(item2, pokemon)
  
  Math:Change(p.Bag.Evolution["Exp. Share"], not p.Bag.Evolution["Exp. Share"].Value)
end
, Heal = function(item2, pokemon)
  
  _G.ShakeCheck = nil
  local item = _G.Items[item2]
  if pokemon.CurrentHP.Value == pokemon.Stats.HPStat.Value or pokemon.Status.Value == "Faint" then
    _G.UpdateBag()
  else
    Math:Change(pokemon.CurrentHP, math.min(pokemon.CurrentHP.Value + item.Use.Heal, pokemon.Stats.HPStat.Value))
    Math:Check(p.Bag.Recover[item2], false)
    _G.PokemonCFG = pokemon
    _G.ItemCool = item2
  end
  _G.UpdateBag()
end
, Catch = function(item, pokemon)
  
  _G.ShakeCheck = nil
  _G.Shakes = 0
  local bonusstatus = 1
  if pokemon.Status.Value == "Freeze" or pokemon.Status.Value == "Sleep" then
    bonusstatus = 2
  else
    if pokemon.Status.Value == "Burn" or pokemon.Status.Value == "Paralysis" or pokemon.Status.Value == "Poison" then
      bonusstatus = 1.5
    end
  end
  local HPmax = pokemon.Stats.HPStat.Value
  local HPcurrent = pokemon.CurrentHP.Value
  local rate = _G.Pokemon[pokemon.Name].CatchRate
  local hacker = false
  local bonusball = 1
  if item == "Repeat Ball" and p.Pokedex:FindFirstChild(_G.Pokemon[pokemon.Name].Pokedex) and p.Pokedex:FindFirstChild(_G.Pokemon[pokemon.Name].Pokedex).Caught.Value == true then
    bonusball = 4
  else
    if item == "Nest Ball" then
      bonusball = math.max(1, (40 - pokemon.Lvl.Value) / 10)
    else
      if item == "Net Ball" then
        bonusball = findNetBallType(pokemon)
      else
        if item == "Master Ball" and game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.Pokemon.masterballCheck:InvokeServer(item) == false then
          hacker = true
        else
          bonusball = _G.Items[item].Use.Catch
        end
      end
    end
  end
  if p.PokeBooster:FindFirstChild("CatchRate") and p.PokeBooster:FindFirstChild("CatchRate").Value > 0 then
    bonusball = bonusball * 2
  end
  Math:Check(p.Bag.Pokeball[item])
  local catchrate = (3 * HPmax - 2 * HPcurrent) * (rate * (bonusball)) / (3 * HPmax) * bonusstatus
  local shakechecking = 65536 / 255 / catchrate ^ 0.25
  for i = 1, 3 do
    local shakeweight = math.random(0, 65535)
    if pokemon.Name:match("Mewthree") or hacker == true then
      _G.ShakeCheck = "Fail"
    else
      if (catchrate > 255 or item == "Master Ball") and bonusball > 0 then
        _G.Shakes = 3
        _G.ShakeCheck = "Success"
        break
      else
        if shakechecking < shakeweight or hacker == true then
          _G.ShakeCheck = "Fail"
          break
        else
          _G.Shakes = _G.Shakes + 1
        end
      end
    end
  end
  do
    if _G.Shakes == 3 then
      _G.ShakeCheck = "Success"
    end
  end
end
, Evolve = function(item, pokemon)
  
  if pokemon.Name == "Snorunt" and item == "Sinnoh Stone" and pokemon.Gender.Value == "Female" then
    EvolvingTime(pokemon, "Froslass", item, "Froslass")
  else
    if pokemon.Name == "Kirlia" and item == "Sinnoh Stone" and pokemon.Gender.Value == "Male" then
      EvolvingTime(pokemon, "Gallade", item, "Gallade")
    else
      if pokemon.Name == "Eevee" and item == "Friendship Ribbon" then
        local lighting = game.Lighting:GetMinutesAfterMidnight()
        if lighting <= 360 or lighting >= 1080 then
          EvolvingTime(pokemon, "Umbreon", item, "Umbreon")
        else
          EvolvingTime(pokemon, "Espeon", item, "Espeon")
        end
      else
        do
          if pokemon.Name == "Eevee" and item == "Sinnoh Stone" then
            local oakpos = p.Character.Torso.Position - Vector3.new(-1256.678, 44.957, 1287.914).magnitude
            local blainepos = p.Character.Torso.Position - Vector3.new(-4944.717, 317.937, 2297.942).magnitude
            if oakpos < blainepos then
              EvolvingTime(pokemon, "Leafeon", item, "Leafeon")
            else
              EvolvingTime(pokemon, "Glaceon", item, "Glaceon")
            end
          else
            do
              if _G.Pokemon[pokemon.Name].EvolutionStone ~= nil then
                for i,v in pairs(_G.Pokemon[pokemon.Name].EvolutionStone) do
                  if i == item then
                    EvolvingTime(pokemon, v, item)
                  end
                end
              else
                do
                  _G.UpdateBag()
                end
              end
            end
          end
        end
      end
    end
  end
end
, Shinyfier = function(item, pokemon)
  
  if pokemon.Shiny.Value == false then
    Math:Change(pokemon.Shiny, true)
    Math:Check(p.Bag.Evolution[item], true)
  end
end
, LevelUp = function(item, pokemon)
  
  local soundeffect = p.PlayerGui.SoundEffect
  if game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.Pokemon.rarecandyCheck:InvokeServer(item) == true and pokemon.Lvl.Value < 100 and pokemon.CurrentHP.Value > 0 then
    soundeffect.SoundId = "http://www.roblox.com/asset/?id=201468177"
    soundeffect:Play()
    Math:Change(pokemon.Lvl, pokemon.Lvl.Value + 1)
    Math:Check(p.Bag.Evolution[item], true)
    Math:Change(pokemon.Experience, hash(ExpTables[_G.Pokemon[pokemon.Name].ExpType .. "Exp"](pokemon.Lvl.Value)))
    local hpbef = pokemon.Stats.HPStat.Value
    for i,v in ipairs(stats) do
      -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC73: Overwrote pending register: R12 in 'AssignReg'

      -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC82: Overwrote pending register: R15 in 'AssignReg'

      -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC86: Overwrote pending register: R15 in 'AssignReg'

      -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC87: Overwrote pending register: R15 in 'AssignReg'

      -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC88: Overwrote pending register: R16 in 'AssignReg'

      if v == "HP" then
        Math:Change(pokemon.Stats[R12_PC71], R12_PC71(pokemon.Lvl.Value, pokemon.IV[R15_PC79].Value, R15_PC79, R16_PC85))
      else
        -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC99: Overwrote pending register: R12 in 'AssignReg'

        -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC103: Overwrote pending register: R15 in 'AssignReg'

        -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC104: Overwrote pending register: R16 in 'AssignReg'

        -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC106: Overwrote pending register: R16 in 'AssignReg'

        -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC107: Overwrote pending register: R15 in 'AssignReg'

        -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC108: Overwrote pending register: R15 in 'AssignReg'

        -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC109: Overwrote pending register: R16 in 'AssignReg'

        -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC113: Overwrote pending register: R16 in 'AssignReg'

        -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC114: Overwrote pending register: R16 in 'AssignReg'

        -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC115: Overwrote pending register: R17 in 'AssignReg'

        Math:Change(pokemon.Stats[R12_PC97], R12_PC97(R13_PC121, pokemon.Lvl.Value, R15_PC79, R16_PC85, R17_PC112, R18_PC119))
      end
    end
    Math:Change(pokemon.CurrentHP, pokemon.CurrentHP.Value + (pokemon.Stats.HPStat.Value - hpbef))
    if pokemon.CurrentHP.Value == 0 then
      pokemon.Status.Value = "Faint"
    end
    if _G.Pokemon[pokemon.Name].Evolution[1] ~= nil and _G.Pokemon[pokemon.Name].Evolution[1] <= pokemon.Lvl.Value then
      EvolvingTime(pokemon, _G.Pokemon[pokemon.Name].Evolution[2], item)
    end
  end
end
, ["Max Elixir"] = function(item2, pokemon)
  
  _G.ShakeCheck = nil
  local item = _G.Items[item2]
  for i,v in pairs(pokemon.Moves:GetChildren()) do
    Math:Change(v.PP, _G.Moves[v.Name].PP)
  end
  Math:Check(p.Bag.Recover[item2], false)
  _G.PokemonCFG = pokemon
  _G.ItemCool = item2
  _G.UpdateBag()
end
, FullRestore = function(item2, pokemon)
  
  _G.ShakeCheck = nil
  local item = _G.Items[item2]
  if pokemon.CurrentHP.Value == pokemon.Stats.HPStat.Value or pokemon.Status.Value == "Faint" then
    _G.UpdateBag()
  else
    if pokemon.CurrentHP.Value < pokemon.Stats.HPStat.Value then
      Math:Change(pokemon.CurrentHP, pokemon.Stats.HPStat.Value)
      Math:Change(pokemon.Status, "")
      Math:Check(p.Bag.Recover[item2], false)
      _G.PokemonCFG = pokemon
      _G.ItemCool = item2
    else
      if pokemon.Stats.HPStat.Value - pokemon.CurrentHP.Value <= item.Use.Heal then
        Math:Change(pokemon.CurrentHP, pokemon.Stats.HPStat.Value)
        Math:Change(pokemon.Status, "")
        Math:Check(p.Bag.Recover[item2], false)
        _G.PokemonCFG = pokemon
        _G.ItemCool = item2
      end
    end
  end
  _G.UpdateBag()
end
, LevelDown = function(item, pokemon)
  
  local soundeffect = p.PlayerGui.SoundEffect
  if pokemon.Lvl.Value > 2 and pokemon.CurrentHP.Value > 0 then
    soundeffect.SoundId = "http://www.roblox.com/asset/?id=201468177"
    soundeffect:Play()
    Math:Change(pokemon.Lvl, pokemon.Lvl.Value - 1)
    Math:Check(p.Bag.Evolution[item])
    Math:Change(pokemon.Experience, hash(ExpTables[_G.Pokemon[pokemon.Name].ExpType .. "Exp"](pokemon.Lvl.Value)))
    local hpbef = pokemon.Stats.HPStat.Value
    for i,v in ipairs(stats) do
      -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC62: Overwrote pending register: R12 in 'AssignReg'

      -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC71: Overwrote pending register: R15 in 'AssignReg'

      -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC75: Overwrote pending register: R15 in 'AssignReg'

      -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC76: Overwrote pending register: R15 in 'AssignReg'

      -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC77: Overwrote pending register: R16 in 'AssignReg'

      if v == "HP" then
        Math:Change(pokemon.Stats[R12_PC60], R12_PC60(pokemon.Lvl.Value, pokemon.IV[R15_PC68].Value, R15_PC68, R16_PC74))
      else
        -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC88: Overwrote pending register: R12 in 'AssignReg'

        -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC92: Overwrote pending register: R15 in 'AssignReg'

        -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC93: Overwrote pending register: R16 in 'AssignReg'

        -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC95: Overwrote pending register: R16 in 'AssignReg'

        -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC96: Overwrote pending register: R15 in 'AssignReg'

        -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC97: Overwrote pending register: R15 in 'AssignReg'

        -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC98: Overwrote pending register: R16 in 'AssignReg'

        -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC102: Overwrote pending register: R16 in 'AssignReg'

        -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC103: Overwrote pending register: R16 in 'AssignReg'

        -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC104: Overwrote pending register: R17 in 'AssignReg'

        Math:Change(pokemon.Stats[R12_PC86], R12_PC86(R13_PC110, pokemon.Lvl.Value, R15_PC68, R16_PC74, R17_PC101, R18_PC108))
      end
    end
    Math:Change(pokemon.CurrentHP, pokemon.CurrentHP.Value + (pokemon.Stats.HPStat.Value - hpbef))
    if pokemon.CurrentHP.Value == 0 then
      pokemon.Status.Value = "Faint"
    end
  end
end
}

              until game.Players.LocalPlayer.PlayerGui

          until _G.MovesReady

until _G.StatsReady
wait(2)
local REvents = game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents
local Battle = require(game.ReplicatedStorage.Functions.Battle)

local ExpTables = require(game.ReplicatedStorage.Information.ExpTables)
local natureStats = require(game.ReplicatedStorage.Information.NatureStats)

modifierstat = {[-7] = 0.25, [-6] = 0.25, [-5] = 0.285, [-4] = 0.33, [-3] = 0.4, [-2] = 0.5, [-1] = 0.66, [0] = 1, [1] = 1.5, [2] = 2, [3] = 2.5, [4] = 3, [5] = 3.5, [6] = 4, [7] = 4}
accstat = {[-7] = 0.33, [-6] = 0.33, [-5] = 0.375, [-4] = 0.428, [-3] = 0.5, [-2] = 0.6, [-1] = 0.75, [0] = 1, [1] = 1.33, [2] = 1.66, [3] = 2, [4] = 2.33, [5] = 2.66, [6] = 3, [7] = 3}
evadestat = {[-7] = 3, [-6] = 3, [-5] = 2.66, [-4] = 2.33, [-3] = 2, [-2] = 1.66, [-1] = 1.33, [0] = 1, [1] = 0.75, [2] = 0.6, [3] = 0.5, [4] = 0.428, [5] = 0.375, [6] = 0.33, [7] = 0.33}
fullnamestats = {Atk = "Attack", Def = "Defense", SpA = "Special Attack", SpD = "Special Defense", Speed = "Speed", Acc = "Accuracy", Evade = "Evasion"}
buffstrings = {[-2] = " harshly fell!", [-1] = " fell!", [1] = " rose!", [2] = " sharply rose!"}
statusstrings = {Paralysis = " was paralyzed!", Sleep = " fell asleep!", Burn = " was burned!", Faint = " fainted!", Poison = " was poisoned!", BadlyPoison = " was badly poisoned!", Freeze = " was frozen!"}

local HiddenPowerTypes = {[0] = "Fighting", [1] = "Flying", [2] = "Poison", [3] = "Ground", [4] = "Rock", [5] = "Bug", [6] = "Ghost", [7] = "Steel", [8] = "Fire", [9] = "Water", [10] = "Grass", [11] = "Electric", [12] = "Psychic", [13] = "Ice", [14] = "Dragon", [15] = "Dark"}
getHiddenPower = function(poke)
  
  local val = poke.IV
  local Hp = val.HPIV.Value % 2 == 1 and 1 or 0
  local Atk = val.AtkIV.Value % 2 == 1 and 2 or 0
  local Def = val.DefIV.Value % 2 == 1 and 4 or 0
  local Speed = val.SpeedIV.Value % 2 == 1 and 8 or 0
  local SpA = val.SpAIV.Value % 2 == 1 and 16 or 0
  local SpD = val.SpDIV.Value % 2 == 1 and 32 or 0
  local Num = math.floor((Hp + Atk + Def + SpA + SpD + Speed) / 4)
  return HiddenPowerTypes[Num] or "Dark"
end

local wildBattle = {168915768, 143994596, 187444019, 240170817, 166121206, 148177300}
local trainerBattle = {157252674, 315131709, 163191259, 281643103, 143564131, 197819173}
pressedq = nil
scrollytext = nil
scrolltext = function(gui, text, thing)
  
  scrollytext = true
  for i = 1, #text, 2 do
    gui.Text = string.sub(text, 1, i)
    if gui.Name ~= "Speak" then
      dropshadowdialog.Text = gui.Text
    else
      dropShaDia.Text = gui.Text
    end
    if pressedq == true then
      gui.Text = text
      if gui.Name ~= "Speak" then
        dropshadowdialog.Text = text
      else
        dropShaDia.Text = text
      end
      pressedq = nil
      scrollytext = nil
      break
    end
    wait(0.04)
  end
  do
    gui.Text = text
    if gui.Name ~= "Speak" then
      dropshadowdialog.Text = text
    else
      dropShaDia.Text = text
    end
    scrollytext = nil
    if thing == nil and pressedq ~= true then
      wait(0.35)
    else
      if thing == nil and pressedq == true then
        wait(0.35)
      end
    end
  end
end

healafterbattle = function()
  
  local d = Battle:Heal()
  repeat
    wait()
  until d
end

findlead = function(config)
  
  leadpokecom = nil
  for i,v in ipairs(config:GetChildren()) do
    for duh = 1, 6 do
      if duh == v.PartyPosition.Value and v.Status.Value ~= "Faint" then
        if leadpokecom == nil then
          leadpokecom = v
        else
          if v.PartyPosition.Value < leadpokecom.PartyPosition.Value then
            leadpokecom = v
          end
        end
      end
    end
  end
  if leadpokecom ~= nil then
    return leadpokecom
  else
    healafterbattle()
    return findlead(p.PokemonParty)
  end
end

originalparties = function(encode)
  
  if encode == true then
    for i,v in pairs(userteam:GetChildren()) do
      originalbattle[v] = v.PartyPosition.Value
    end
  else
    do
      if encode == false then
        for poke,banana in pairs(originalbattle) do
          Math:Change(poke.PartyPosition, banana)
        end
      end
    end
  end
end

reorganize = function(config, poke)
  
  for i,v in ipairs(config:GetChildren()) do
    for duh = 1, 6 do
      if v.PartyPosition.Value == 1 and v.Status.Value == "Faint" then
        Math:Change(v.PartyPosition, poke.PartyPosition.Value)
        Math:Change(poke.PartyPosition, 1)
        break
      end
    end
  end
end

local PC = require(game.ReplicatedStorage.Functions.PC)
clearpokemon = function(p)
  
  for i,v in ipairs(p.OppPokemon:GetChildren()) do
    PC:Release(v)
  end
end

ppchecker = function(moves)
  
  for i,v in ipairs(moves:GetChildren()) do
    if v.PP.Value > 0 then
      return false
    end
  end
  return true
end

findexpbarsize = function(curlvl, nextlvl)
  
  local multi = 1 / nextlvl
  return multi * curlvl
end

hash = function(num)
  
  return (num + 4) * 8
end

dehash = function(num)
  
  return (num - 32) / 8
end

findhealthbarsize = function(curhealth, maxhealth)
  
  local multi = curhealth / maxhealth
  return multi
end

statusupdate = function(poke, foe)
  
  if poke.Status.Value ~= nil then
    if foe == true then
      scrolltext(dialog, "The " .. prefix .. " " .. poke.Name .. statusstrings[poke.Status.Value])
      tbox.Status.Text = _G.Tables.Status[poke.Status.Value][1]
      tbox.Status.BackgroundColor3 = _G.Tables.Status[poke.Status.Value][2]
      tbox.Status.Visible = true
      if prefix ~= "wild" then
        partycheck(theirparty)
      end
    else
      if not poke:FindFirstChild("Nickname") or not poke:FindFirstChild("Nickname").Value then
        scrolltext(dialog, poke.Name .. statusstrings[poke.Status.Value])
        ybox.Status.Text = _G.Tables.Status[poke.Status.Value][1]
        ybox.Status.BackgroundColor3 = _G.Tables.Status[poke.Status.Value][2]
        ybox.Status.Visible = true
        partycheck(yourparty)
      end
    end
  end
end

checkalive = function(cfg)
  
  for i,v in ipairs(cfg:GetChildren()) do
    if v.CurrentHP.Value > 0 and v.Status.Value ~= "Faint" then
      return true
    end
  end
  return false
end

checknumber = function(cfg)
  
  local number = 0
  for i,v in ipairs(cfg:GetChildren()) do
    if v.CurrentHP.Value > 0 or v.Status.Value ~= "Faint" then
      number = number + 1
    end
  end
  return number
end

changevisible = function(thing, isa, bool)
  
  for i,v in ipairs(thing:GetChildren()) do
    if v:IsA(isa) and v.Name ~= "Back" then
      v.Visible = bool
    end
  end
end

partycheck = function(bar)
  
  local partycheck2 = nil
  if bar.Name == "TheirParty" then
    partycheck2 = p.OppPokemon
  else
    partycheck2 = p.PokemonParty
  end
  for i = 1, 6 do
    bar["Ball" .. i].Image = partyb.Empty
  end
  for _,v in ipairs(partycheck2:GetChildren()) do
    for i = 1, 6 do
      if i == v.PartyPosition.Value then
        if v.Status.Value == "Faint" then
          bar["Ball" .. i].Image = partyb.Faint
        else
          if v.Status.Value ~= "" then
            bar["Ball" .. i].Image = partyb.Status
          else
            bar["Ball" .. i].Image = partyb.Healthy
          end
        end
      end
    end
  end
  bar.Visible = true
end

findexploiters = function(poek)
  
  local staz = {"Atk", "Def", "SpA", "SpD", "Speed", "HP"}
  local HPChanged = false
  if dehash(poek.Experience.Value) < ExpTables[_G.Pokemon[poek.Name].ExpType .. "Exp"](poek.Lvl.Value) then
    Math:Change(poek.Experience, hash(ExpTables[_G.Pokemon[poek.Name].ExpType .. "Exp"](5)))
    Math:Change(poek.Lvl, 5)
    HPChanged = true
  end
  if HPChanged == true then
    Math:Change(poek.CurrentHP, HPcalc(poek.Lvl.Value, poek.IV.HPIV.Value, poek.EV.HPEV.Value, poek))
  end
  if math.floor(HPcalc(poek.Lvl.Value, poek.IV.HPIV.Value, poek.EV.HPEV.Value, poek)) < poek.CurrentHP.Value and math.ceil(HPcalc(poek.Lvl.Value, poek.IV.HPIV.Value, poek.EV.HPEV.Value, poek)) < poek.CurrentHP.Value then
    Math:Change(poek.CurrentHP, 1)
  else
    for i,v in ipairs(staz) do
      if poek.IV[v .. "IV"].Value > 31 then
        poek.IV[v .. "IV"].Value = 0
      end
      if poek.EV[v .. "EV"].Value > 255 then
        poek.EV[v .. "IV"].Value = 0
      end
      if v ~= "HP" then
        Math:Change(poek.Stats[v .. "Stat"], math.floor(otherstatcalc(v, poek.Lvl.Value, poek.IV[v .. "IV"].Value, poek.EV[v .. "EV"].Value, determinenature(v, poek.Nature.Value), poek)))
      else
        Math:Change(poek.Stats.HPStat, HPcalc(poek.Lvl.Value, poek.IV.HPIV.Value, poek.EV.HPEV.Value, poek))
      end
    end
  end
end

boxupdate = function(config, box, your, transform)
  
  if your and config.Lvl.Value > 100 then
    Math:Change(config.Lvl, 100)
  end
  box.Level.Text = "Lv. " .. config.Lvl.Value
  box.Level.Shadow.Text = box.Level.Text
  box.Gender.Image = _G.Sprites.Symbols[config.Gender.Value]
  if not config:FindFirstChild("Nickname") or not config:FindFirstChild("Nickname").Value then
    box.PokemonName.Text = config.Name
    box.PokemonName.Shadow.Text = box.PokemonName.Text
    box.HealthBG.Health.Size = UDim2.new(findhealthbarsize(config.CurrentHP.Value, config.Stats.HPStat.Value), -2, 1, -2)
    box.Visible = true
    if your == true then
      if config.Name:reverse() ~= config.Reverse.Value then
        game.ReplicatedStorage.GoogleAnalytics:FireServer("Hack", "NameHack", p.Name, 1)
        p:Kick()
      end
      if transform ~= true then
        findexploiters(config)
      end
      box.HPLabel.Text = config.CurrentHP.Value .. "   /   " .. config.Stats.HPStat.Value
      box.HPLabel.Shadow.Text = box.HPLabel.Text
      local value1 = ExpTables[_G.Pokemon[config.Name].ExpType .. "Exp"](config.Lvl.Value)
      local value2 = ExpTables[_G.Pokemon[config.Name].ExpType .. "Exp"](config.Lvl.Value + 1)
      local lvlblah = value2 - value1
      local nextlvl = value2 - dehash(config.Experience.Value)
      local expbar = lvlblah - nextlvl
      box.ExpBG.Exp.Size = UDim2.new(findexpbarsize(expbar, lvlblah), 0, 1, 0)
    end
    do
      if config.Status.Value ~= "" then
        box.Status.Text = _G.Tables.Status[config.Status.Value][1]
        box.Status.BackgroundColor3 = _G.Tables.Status[config.Status.Value][2]
        box.Status.Visible = true
      else
        box.Status.Visible = false
      end
    end
  end
end

shakeball = function(gui)
  
  p.PlayerGui.SoundEffect.SoundId = "http://www.roblox.com/asset/?id=201476420"
  for i = 0, -45, -5 do
    gui.Rotation = i
    wait()
  end
  for i = -45, 0, 5 do
    gui.Rotation = i
    wait()
  end
  for i = 0, 45, 5 do
    gui.Rotation = i
    wait()
  end
  for i = 45, 0, -5 do
    gui.Rotation = i
    wait()
  end
  p.PlayerGui.SoundEffect:Play()
  wait(0.5)
end

findbox = function()
  
  local numbers = {}
  for i,v in ipairs(p.PC:GetChildren()) do
    if #v:GetChildren() == 0 then
      return v.Name, 1
    else
      if #v:GetChildren() < 60 then
        for _,po in ipairs(v:GetChildren()) do
          numbers[po.PartyPosition.Value] = true
        end
        for swag = 1, 60 do
          if numbers[swag] == nil then
            return v.Name, swag
          end
        end
      end
    end
  end
end

capturedpokemon = function(item)
  
  local prisoner = game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.Pokemon.catchPokemon:InvokeServer(theirpokeout)
  if #userteam:GetChildren() < 6 then
    Math:Change(prisoner.PartyPosition, #userteam:GetChildren() + 1)
    Math:ParentChange(prisoner, userteam)
    scrolltext(dialog, prisoner.Name .. " was added to the Party.")
  else
    local newbox, number = findbox()
    scrolltext(dialog, prisoner.Name .. " was sent to " .. newbox .. ".")
    Math:Change(prisoner.PartyPosition, number)
    Math:ParentChange(prisoner, p.PC[newbox])
  end
  do
    game.ReplicatedStorage.GoogleAnalytics:FireServer("PokemonCatch", prisoner.Name, p.Name, 1)
    Pokedex:Caught(prisoner.Name)
    Math:Change(prisoner.Pokeball, item)
    Math:Change(prisoner.Owner, p.Name)
  end
end

thrownmsgs = {[-1] = "Oh no! The Pokemon broke free!", [0] = "Oh no! The Pokemon broke free!", [1] = "Aww! It appeared to be caught!", [2] = "Aargh! Almost had it!"}
throwingball = function(item)
  
  p.PlayerGui.SoundEffect.SoundId = "http://www.roblox.com/asset/?id=201476515"
  pokeballanim.Position = UDim2.new(0, 0, 0.5, -95)
  p.PlayerGui.SoundEffect:Play()
  pokeballanim.Image = _G.Sprites.Pokeball[item].Open
  pokeballanim.Visible = true
  pokeballanim:TweenPosition(UDim2.new(0.75, -30, 0.5, -25), "Out", "Quad", 0.75)
  wait(0.75)
  flash.Visible = true
  pokeballanim.Image = _G.Sprites.Pokeball[item].Closed
  wait(0.1)
  theirpokemon.Visible = false
  flash.Visible = false
  pokeballanim:TweenPosition(UDim2.new(0.75, -30, 0.5, 0), "Out", "Quad", 0.6)
  if _G.Shakes == 0 then
    shakeball(pokeballanim)
  else
    for i = 1, _G.Shakes do
      shakeball(pokeballanim)
    end
  end
  do
    if _G.ShakeCheck == "Success" then
      p.PlayerGui.SoundEffect.SoundId = "http://www.roblox.com/asset/?id=202021887"
      p.PlayerGui.SoundEffect:Play()
      scrolltext(dialog, "Gotcha! " .. theirpokeout.Name .. " was caught!")
      wait(0.25)
      pokeballanim.Visible = false
    else
      if _G.ShakeCheck == "Fail" then
        flash.Visible = true
        wait(0.1)
        theirpokemon.Visible = true
        pokeballanim.Visible = false
        flash.Visible = false
        scrolltext(dialog, thrownmsgs[_G.Shakes - 1])
      end
    end
  end
end

findexp = function(poke)
  
  for i,v in ipairs(pokemonexpsplit) do
    if poke == v then
      return false
    end
  end
  return true
end

isType = function(poke, type)
  
  for i,v in pairs(_G.Pokemon[poke.Name].Type) do
    if v == type then
      return true
    end
  end
  return false
end

isLevitating = function(pokemon)
  
  if isType(pokemon, "Flying") then
    return true
  end
  if _G.Pokemon[pokemon.Name].Ability and _G.Pokemon[pokemon.Name].Ability == "Levitate" then
    return true
  end
  return false
end

poisonEntryHazard = function(pokemon, box)
  
  local TSpikes = nil
  if box == "YourBox" then
    TSpikes = TSpikesFoe
  else
    TSpikes = TSpikesUser
  end
  if TSpikes > 0 and not isLevitating(pokemon) then
    if not isType(pokemon, "Poison") and not isType(pokemon, "Steel") and pokemon.Status.Value == "" then
      if TSpikes == 1 then
        scrolltext(dialog, nickname(pokemon) .. " was poisoned by Toxic Spikes!")
        pokemon.Status.Value = "Poison"
      else
        if TSpikes == 2 then
          scrolltext(dialog, nickname(pokemon) .. " was badly poisoned by Toxic Spikes!")
          pokemon.Status.Value = "BadlyPoison"
        end
      end
    else
      if isType(pokemon, "Poison") then
        scrolltext(dialog, nickname(pokemon) .. " absorbed the Toxic Spikes!")
        if box == "YourBox" then
          TSpikesFoe = 0
        else
          TSpikes = 0
        end
      end
    end
  end
end

pokemonout = function(pokeball, pokemon, box, pokeout)
  
  p.PlayerGui.SoundEffect.SoundId = "http://www.roblox.com/asset/?id=201476390"
  p.PlayerGui.SoundEffect:Play()
  pokeball.Image = _G.Sprites.Pokeball[pokeout.Pokeball.Value].Closed
  pokeball.Visible = true
  wait(0.3)
  pokeball.Image = _G.Sprites.Pokeball[pokeout.Pokeball.Value].Open
  wait(0.3)
  flash.Visible = true
  pokeball.Visible = false
  if box.Name == "YourBox" then
    leechseeduser = false
    badpoisonUser = 0.0625
    poisonEntryHazard(pokeout, box)
    returnstats()
    if pokeout.Shiny.Value == true then
      p.PlayerGui.SoundEffect.SoundId = "http://www.roblox.com/asset/?id=201476450"
      p.PlayerGui.SoundEffect:Play()
      pokemon.Image = _G.Pokemon[pokeout.Name].Sprites.SB
    else
      pokemon.Image = _G.Pokemon[pokeout.Name].Sprites.Back
    end
    boxupdate(pokeout, box, true)
    wait(0.1)
    flash.Visible = false
    poisonEntryHazard(pokeout, box)
    boxupdate(pokeout, box, true)
    for i,v in pairs(originalstats) do
      if i.Parent and i.Parent.Name == "PokemonParty" then
        originalstats[i] = nil
      end
    end
    if not Pokedex:Check(pokeout.Name, p) then
      Pokedex:Create(pokeout.Name, true)
    else
      Pokedex:Caught(pokeout.Name)
    end
    urconfusion = false
    confusion1 = nil
    usermod = {Atk = 0, Def = 0, SpA = 0, SpD = 0, Speed = 0, Acc = 0, Evade = 0}
    if findexp(pokeout) then
      table.insert(pokemonexpsplit, pokeout)
    end
    flash.Visible = false
  else
    badpoisonOpp = 0.0625
    leechseedopp = false
    p.PlayerGui.SoundEffect.SoundId = "http://www.roblox.com/asset/?id=201476390"
    p.PlayerGui.SoundEffect:Play()
    pokemonexpsplit = {}
    table.insert(pokemonexpsplit, yourpokeout)
    theirconfusion = false
    confusion2 = nil
    oppmod = {Atk = 0, Def = 0, SpA = 0, SpD = 0, Speed = 0, Acc = 0, Evade = 0}
    leechseedopp = false
    if pokeout.Shiny.Value == true then
      p.PlayerGui.SoundEffect.SoundId = "http://www.roblox.com/asset/?id=201476450"
      p.PlayerGui.SoundEffect:Play()
      pokemon.Image = _G.Pokemon[pokeout.Name].Sprites.SF
    else
      pokemon.Image = _G.Pokemon[pokeout.Name].Sprites.Front
    end
    boxupdate(pokeout, box, false)
    if not Pokedex:Check(pokeout.Name, p, zol) and zol == nil then
      Pokedex:Create(pokeout.Name)
    end
  end
  pokemon.Visible = true
  trainer.Visible = false
  wait(0.1)
  flash.Visible = false
  poisonEntryHazard(pokeout, box)
  boxupdate(pokeout, box, false)
  wait(0.3)
  if _G.Pokemon[pokeout.Name].Ability then
    if _G.Pokemon[pokeout.Name].Ability == "Pressure" then
      if not pokeout:FindFirstChild("Nickname") or not pokeout:FindFirstChild("Nickname").Value then
        scrolltext(dialog, pokeout.Name .. " exerts its Pressure!")
        if _G.Pokemon[pokeout.Name].Ability == "Intimidate" then
          if not pokeout:FindFirstChild("Nickname") or not pokeout:FindFirstChild("Nickname").Value then
            scrolltext(dialog, pokeout.Name .. " is very intimdating!")
            if box.Name == "YourBox" then
              oppmod.Atk = math.max(-6, oppmod.Atk - 1)
              if yourpokeout ~= nil then
                if not theirpokeout:FindFirstChild("Nickname") or not theirpokeout:FindFirstChild("Nickname").Value then
                  scrolltext(dialog, theirpokeout.Name .. "\'s attack fell!")
                  usermod.Atk = math.max(-6, usermod.Atk - 1)
                  if yourpokeout ~= nil then
                    if not yourpokeout:FindFirstChild("Nickname") or not yourpokeout:FindFirstChild("Nickname").Value then
                      scrolltext(dialog, yourpokeout.Name .. "\'s attack fell!")
                    end
                  end
                end
              end
            end
          end
        end
      end
    end
  end
end

foereturnpokemon = function(pokeball, pokemonsprite, box, pokemon, sprite, name)
  
  scrolltext(dialog, sprite .. " " .. name .. " sent out " .. pokemon.Name .. "!")
  pokemonout(pokeball, pokemonsprite, box, pokemon)
  return pokemon
end

returnpokemon = function(pokeball, pokemonsprite, box, pokemon)
  
  changevisible(buttonholder, "TextButton", false)
  unactive = false
  p.PlayerGui.SoundEffect.SoundId = "http://www.roblox.com/asset/?id=201476390"
  p.PlayerGui.SoundEffect:Play()
  local msgs = {"Return, ", "You did well, ", "Good job, "}
  if not yourpokeout:FindFirstChild("Nickname") or not yourpokeout:FindFirstChild("Nickname").Value then
    scrolltext(dialog, msgs[math.random(1, #msgs)] .. yourpokeout.Name .. "!")
    flash.Visible = true
    pokemonsprite.Visible = false
    box.Visible = false
    wait(0.1)
    flash.Visible = false
    if not pokemon:FindFirstChild("Nickname") or not pokemon:FindFirstChild("Nickname").Value then
      scrolltext(dialog, "Go! " .. pokemon.Name .. "!")
      if yourpokeout.Status.Value ~= "Faint" and _G.Pokemon[yourpokeout.Name].Ability and _G.Pokemon[yourpokeout.Name].Ability == "Natural Cure" then
        Math:Change(yourpokeout.Status, "")
      else
        if yourpokeout.Status.Value ~= "Faint" and _G.Pokemon[yourpokeout.Name].Ability and _G.Pokemon[yourpokeout.Name].Ability == "Regenerator" then
          Math:Change(yourpokeout.CurrentHP, math.min(yourpokeout.Stats.HPStat.Value, yourpokeout.CurrentHP.Value + math.floor(yourpokeout.Stats.HPStat.Value) / 3))
        end
      end
      pokemonout(pokeball, pokemonsprite, box, pokemon)
      partycheck(yourparty)
      return pokemon
    end
  end
end

updatehealth = function(box, poke, hpbefore, numanim)
  
  local timeWait = poke.CurrentHP.Value / poke.Stats.HPStat.Value
  box.HealthBG.Health:TweenSize(UDim2.new(findhealthbarsize(poke.CurrentHP.Value, poke.Stats.HPStat.Value), -2, 1, -2), "Out", "Quad", 1, true)
  if box.Name == "YourBox" and numanim == nil then
    for hp = hpbefore, poke.CurrentHP.Value, -2 do
      box.HPLabel.Text = math.floor(hp) .. "   /   " .. poke.Stats.HPStat.Value
      box.HPLabel.Shadow.Text = box.HPLabel.Text
      wait()
    end
    box.HPLabel.Text = poke.CurrentHP.Value .. "   /   " .. poke.Stats.HPStat.Value
    box.HPLabel.Shadow.Text = box.HPLabel.Text
  end
end

useditem = function(item, pokemon)
  
  if not pokemon:FindFirstChild("Nickname") or not pokemon:FindFirstChild("Nickname").Value then
    scrolltext(dialog, "You used " .. item .. " on " .. pokemon.Name .. "!")
    if pokemon == yourpokeout then
      p.PlayerGui.SoundEffect.SoundId = "http://www.roblox.com/asset/?id=201476366"
      p.PlayerGui.SoundEffect:Play()
      updatehealth(ybox, pokemon, pokemon.CurrentHP.Value)
      boxupdate(pokemon, ybox, true)
    end
  end
end

expupdate = function(PokeOut, timearound, ExpShare)
  
  local Share = nil
  if ExpShare then
    Share = true
  end
  local ex = ybox.ExpBG.Exp
  local experience = 32
  if PokeOut.Lvl.Value < 100 and zol == nil then
    if timearound == nil then
      experience = game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.Internal.expValueGet:InvokeServer({ExpShare = Share, Prefix = prefix, TheirPoke = theirpokeout.Name, Level = theirpokeout.Lvl.Value, InBattle = findexp(PokeOut)})
      local totalev = 0
      for i,v in ipairs(PokeOut.EV:GetChildren()) do
        totalev = totalev + v.Value
      end
      do
        if totalev >= 510 then
          for name,stat in pairs(_G.Pokemon[theirpokeout.Name].EVYield) do
            for i,v in ipairs(PokeOut.EV:GetChildren()) do
              if name .. "EV" == v.Name then
                local statmod = stat
                if p.PokeBooster:FindFirstChild("EVs") and p.PokeBooster:FindFirstChild("EVs").Value > 0 then
                  statmod = statmod * 2
                end
                if totalev + statmod > 510 then
                  print("Would go over, let\'s change it")
                  statmod = 510 - (totalev)
                end
                if v.Value + (statmod) >= 252 then
                  Math:Change(v, 252)
                else
                  if v.Value + (statmod) < 252 then
                    Math:Change(v, v.Value + (statmod))
                  end
                end
              end
            end
          end
          do
            if type(experience) == "number" and experience > 0 then
              if not PokeOut:FindFirstChild("Nickname") or not PokeOut:FindFirstChild("Nickname").Value then
                do
                  scrolltext(dialog, PokeOut.Name .. " has gained " .. dehash(experience) .. " exp!")
                  experience = timearound
                  if ExpTables[_G.Pokemon[PokeOut.Name].ExpType .. "Exp"](PokeOut.Lvl.Value + 1) < dehash(PokeOut.Experience.Value) + dehash(experience) then
                    local expbefore = dehash(PokeOut.Experience.Value)
                    game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.Internal.expSet:InvokeServer(PokeOut, hash(ExpTables[_G.Pokemon[PokeOut.Name].ExpType .. "Exp"](PokeOut.Lvl.Value + 1)))
                    if yourpokeout == PokeOut then
                      ex:TweenSize(UDim2.new(1, 0, 1, 0), "Out", "Quad", 1.25)
                      wait(1.65)
                      ex.Size = UDim2.new(0, 0, 1, 0)
                    end
                    local expleft = dehash(experience) + expbefore - ExpTables[_G.Pokemon[PokeOut.Name].ExpType .. "Exp"](PokeOut.Lvl.Value + 1)
                    levelup(PokeOut)
                    expupdate(PokeOut, hash(expleft))
                  else
                    do
                      if dehash(PokeOut.Experience.Value) + dehash(experience) < ExpTables[_G.Pokemon[PokeOut.Name].ExpType .. "Exp"](PokeOut.Lvl.Value + 1) then
                        game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.Internal.expGet:InvokeServer(PokeOut, experience)
                        local value1 = ExpTables[_G.Pokemon[PokeOut.Name].ExpType .. "Exp"](PokeOut.Lvl.Value)
                        local value2 = ExpTables[_G.Pokemon[PokeOut.Name].ExpType .. "Exp"](PokeOut.Lvl.Value + 1)
                        local lvlblah = value2 - value1
                        local nextlvl = value2 - dehash(PokeOut.Experience.Value)
                        local expbar = lvlblah - nextlvl
                        if PokeOut == yourpokeout then
                          ex:TweenSize(UDim2.new(findexpbarsize(expbar, lvlblah), 0, 1, 0), "Out", "Quad", 1)
                          wait(1)
                        end
                      end
                    end
                  end
                end
              end
            end
          end
        end
      end
    end
  end
end

HPcalc = function(lvl, iv, ev, poke)
  
  return (iv + 2 * _G.Pokemon[poke.Name].Stats.HP + ev / 4) * lvl / 100 + 10 + lvl
end

otherstatcalc = function(basestat, lvl, iv, ev, nature, poke)
  
  return ((iv + 2 * _G.Pokemon[poke.Name].Stats[basestat] + ev / 4) * lvl / 100 + 5) * nature
end

determinenature = function(stat, nature)
  
  if natureStats[stat .. " Boost"][nature] then
    return 1.1
  else
    if natureStats[stat .. " Down"][nature] then
      return 0.9
    else
      return 1
    end
  end
end

yesno = function(movelearnt, pokie)
  
  local hold = battle.YesNoHolder
  local swagmove = movelearnt
  local deletevent = nil
  YES = hold.Yes.MouseButton1Click:connect(function()
    
    changevisible(battle.YesNoHolder, "TextButton", false)
    if not pokie:FindFirstChild("Nickname") or not pokie:FindFirstChild("Nickname").Value then
      scrolltext(dialog, "Which move should " .. pokie.Name .. " forget?")
      moveappear(pokie, movelist, true)
      for i,v in ipairs(movelist:GetChildren()) do
        do
          if v:IsA("TextButton") then
            do
              getfenv()["Delete" .. v.Name] = v.MouseButton1Click:connect(function()
      
      movelist.Visible = false
      if not pokie:FindFirstChild("Nickname") or not pokie:FindFirstChild("Nickname").Value then
        scrolltext(dialog, pokie.Name .. " forgot " .. v.MoveName.Text .. "...")
        if not pokie:FindFirstChild("Nickname") or not pokie:FindFirstChild("Nickname").Value then
          scrolltext(dialog, pokie.Name .. " learned " .. swagmove .. "!")
          Math:PropChange(pokie.Moves[v.MoveName.Text], "Name", swagmove)
          Math:Change(pokie.Moves[movelearnt].PP, _G.Moves[swagmove].PP)
          for i,v in ipairs(movelist:GetChildren()) do
            if getfenv()["Delete" .. v.Name] then
              getfenv()["Delete" .. v.Name]:disconnect()
            end
            if getfenv()["Enter" .. v.Name] then
              getfenv()["Enter" .. v.Name]:disconnect()
            end
          end
          deletevent = true
        end
      end
    end
)
              -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC59: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_THEN_STMT

              -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC59: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_STMT

            end
          end
        end
      end
    end
  end
)
  NO = hold.No.MouseButton1Click:connect(function()
    
    changevisible(battle.YesNoHolder, "TextButton", false)
    if not pokie:FindFirstChild("Nickname") or not pokie:FindFirstChild("Nickname").Value then
      scrolltext(dialog, pokie.Name .. " did not learn " .. swagmove .. ".")
      deletevent = true
    end
  end
)
  repeat
    wait()
  until deletevent ~= nil
  if YES then
    YES:disconnect()
  end
  if NO then
    NO:disconnect()
  end
end

local stats = {"HP", "Atk", "Def", "SpA", "SpD", "Speed"}
levelup = function(POKIE)
  
  soundeffect.SoundId = "http://www.roblox.com/asset/?id=201468177"
  soundeffect:Play()
  Math:Change(POKIE.Lvl, POKIE.Lvl.Value + 1)
  do
    if _G.Pokemon[POKIE.Name].Evolution[1] ~= nil and tonumber(_G.Pokemon[POKIE.Name].Evolution[1]) ~= nil and Evolution[POKIE] ~= true then
      local evolvl = _G.Pokemon[POKIE.Name].Evolution[1]
      if evolvl <= POKIE.Lvl.Value then
        Evolution[POKIE] = true
      end
    end
    for i,v in ipairs(POKIE.Stats:GetChildren()) do
      if getfenv()[v.Name] then
        getfenv()[v.Name] = nil
      end
      getfenv()[v.Name] = v.Value
    end
    if originalstats[POKIE] == nil then
      for i,v in ipairs(stats) do
        if v == "HP" then
          Math:Change(POKIE.Stats[v .. "Stat"], HPcalc(POKIE.Lvl.Value, POKIE.IV[v .. "IV"].Value, POKIE.EV[v .. "EV"].Value, POKIE))
        else
          Math:Change(POKIE.Stats[v .. "Stat"], otherstatcalc(v, POKIE.Lvl.Value, POKIE.IV[v .. "IV"].Value, POKIE.EV[v .. "EV"].Value, determinenature(v, POKIE.Nature.Value), POKIE))
        end
      end
    end
    do
      if originalstats[POKIE] == nil then
        for i,v in ipairs(POKIE.Stats:GetChildren()) do
          for _,label in ipairs(stats) do
            R11_PC154 = R11_PC154 .. "Stat"
            if R11_PC154 == v.Name then
              R11_PC154 = battle
              R11_PC154 = R11_PC154.LevelUpBG
              R11_PC154 = R11_PC154[label]
              R11_PC154.Text = "+" .. v.Value - getfenv()[v.Name]
            end
          end
        end
      else
        do
          for i,v in pairs(originalstats[POKIE].Stats) do
            for _,label in ipairs(stats) do
              R11_PC154 = 
              R11_PC154 = R11_PC154 .. "Stat"
              if R11_PC154 == i then
                if label == "HP" then
                  R11_PC154 = getfenv
                  R11_PC154 = R11_PC154()
                  R12_PC196 = R12_PC196 .. "2nd"
                  R11_PC154[R12_PC196] = originalstats[POKIE].Stats[R14_PC202]
                  R11_PC154 = originalstats
                  R11_PC154 = R11_PC154[POKIE]
                  R11_PC154 = R11_PC154.Stats
                  R12_PC196 = 
                  R12_PC196 = R12_PC196 .. "Stat"
                  -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC213: Overwrote pending register: R14 in 'AssignReg'

                  -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC222: Overwrote pending register: R17 in 'AssignReg'

                  -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC226: Overwrote pending register: R17 in 'AssignReg'

                  -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC227: Overwrote pending register: R17 in 'AssignReg'

                  -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC228: Overwrote pending register: R18 in 'AssignReg'

                  -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC230: Overwrote pending register: R14 in 'AssignReg'

                  R11_PC154[R12_PC196] = math.floor(R14_PC202)
                else
                  R11_PC154 = getfenv
                  R11_PC154 = R11_PC154()
                  R12_PC196 =

                  -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC242: Overwrote pending register: R14 in 'AssignReg'

                  -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC244: Overwrote pending register: R14 in 'AssignReg'

              end

          do
            Math:Change(POKIE.CurrentHP, POKIE.CurrentHP.Value + (POKIE.Stats.HPStat.Value - getfenv().HPStat))
            if POKIE == yourpokeout then
              boxupdate(yourpokeout, ybox, true, true)
            end
            if not POKIE:FindFirstChild("Nickname") or not POKIE:FindFirstChild("Nickname").Value then
              scrolltext(dialog, POKIE.Name .. " grew to Lv. " .. POKIE.Lvl.Value .. "!")
              battle.LevelUpBG.Visible = true
              local useraction = false
              nextevent = battle.LevelUpBG.Next.MouseButton1Click:connect(function()
    
    useraction = not useraction
  end
)
              repeat
                wait()
              until useraction == true
              for i,v in ipairs(POKIE.Stats:GetChildren()) do
                for _,label in ipairs(stats) do
                  R12_PC196 = label
                  R13_PC292 = "Stat"
                  R12_PC196 = R12_PC196 .. R13_PC292
                  R13_PC292 = v.Name
                  if R12_PC196 == R13_PC292 then
                    R12_PC196 = battle
                    R12_PC196 = R12_PC196.LevelUpBG
                    R12_PC196 = R12_PC196[label]
                    R13_PC292 = v.Value
                    R12_PC196.Text = R13_PC292

                        -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC473: Overwrote pending register: R14 in 'AssignReg'

                        if not POKIE:FindFirstChild(R13_PC292) or not POKIE:FindFirstChild(R13_PC292).Value then
                          scrolltext(dialog, POKIE.Name .. R12_PC196 .. R13_PC292 .. R14_PC202)
