  savefailure = string
end
)
greatOlTable = {Pokedex = function()
  
  _G.Pokedex()
end
, Party = function()
  
  if p:FindFirstChild("PokemonParty") then
    if #p:FindFirstChild("PokemonParty"):GetChildren() > 0 then
      p.PlayerGui.Main.BlackScreen.Visible = true
      for i,v in ipairs(p.PlayerGui.Main.BlackScreen:GetChildren()) do
        v.Visible = false
      end
      _G.PartyOverworld()
    else
      if speech.Text == "" or speech.Visible == false then
        script.Parent.Main.Menu.Visible = false
        scrolltext("You don\'t have any Pokemon! Go to Prof. Oak!")
        script.Parent.Main.Menu.Visible = true
      end
    end
  end
end
, Trainer = function()
  
  _G.TrainerCard(p)
end
, Bag = function()
  
  _G.UpdateBag()
  p.PlayerGui.Main.BlackScreen.Visible = true
  p.PlayerGui.Main.Backpack.Visible = true
end
, Powers = function()
  
  p.PlayerGui.Main.BlackScreen.Visible = true
  _G.PokeBoosters()
end
, Save = function()
  
  script.Parent.Main.Menu.Save.Visible = false
  script.Parent.Main.Menu.Visible = false
  scrolltext("Saving... Do not close the game, or your save might become corrupted.")
  scrolltext("Saving... Do not close the game until it says \"Save successful\".")
  speech.Parent.Next.Visible = false
  speech.Text = "Currently saving... this may take some time..."
  speech.DropShadow.Text = speech.Text
  speech.Visible = true
  speech.Parent.Visible = true
  p.Character.Humanoid.WalkSpeed = 0
  local savesuccessful = game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.Internal.Save:InvokeServer()
  if savesuccessful == "Worked" then
    scrolltext("Save successful.", true)
    scrolltext("You can save again in 240 seconds.", true)
    script.Parent.Main.Menu.Visible = true
    p.Character.Humanoid.WalkSpeed = 0
    speech.Parent.Next.Visible = true
    coroutine.resume(coroutine.create(function()
    
    wait(250)
    script.Parent.Main.Menu.Save.Visible = true
  end
))
  else
    scrolltext("Error. Your save did not save correctly. This is probably due to ROBLOX errors.")
    scrolltext("Error: " .. savesuccessful)
    scrolltext("Wait 10 seconds and try to save again.")
    scrolltext("You must do this to ensure that your data is saved without any problems.")
    wait(10)
    script.Parent.Main.Menu.Save.Visible = true
  end
end
}
local colors = {}
char = p.Character
gui = p.PlayerGui
main = gui.Main
battle = gui.Main.BlackScreen
menu = gui.Main.Menu
button = menu.Scroll
local Sound = Instance.new("Sound", script)
Sound.SoundId = "http://www.roblox.com/asset/?id=325340000"
battle.Changed:connect(function(property)
  
  if property == "Visible" then
    if button.Title.Text == "Menu <" then
      button.Title.Text = "Menu >"
      button.Title.DropShadow.Text = button.Title.Text
      menu.Position = UDim2.new(-0.1, 0, 0.2, 0)
    end
    menu.Visible = not battle.Visible
  end
end
)
button.MouseButton1Click:connect(function()
  
  if battle.Parent == nil then
    menu.Position = UDim2.new(0, 0, 0.2, 0)
  else
    if battle.Visible == false then
      Sound.Pitch = 1
      Sound:Play()
      if button.Title.Text == "Menu >" then
        button.Title.Text = "Menu <"
        button.Title.DropShadow.Text = button.Title.Text
        char.Humanoid.WalkSpeed = 0
        menu:TweenPosition(UDim2.new(0, 0, 0.2, 0), "Out", "Quad", 0.25, true)
      else
        if button.Title.Text == "Menu <" then
          Sound.Pitch = 1
          Sound:Play()
          char.Humanoid.WalkSpeed = 16
          button.Title.Text = "Menu >"
          button.Title.DropShadow.Text = button.Title.Text
          menu:TweenPosition(UDim2.new(-0.1, 0, 0.2, 0), "Out", "Quad", 0.25, true)
        end
      end
    end
  end
end
)

  button.Title.TextColor3 = Color3.new(0.5, 0.5, 0)
end
)
button.MouseLeave:connect(function()
  
  button.Title.TextColor3 = Color3.new(1, 1, 0)
end
)
for i,v in ipairs(menu:GetChildren()) do
  do
    if v:IsA("TextButton") and v.Name ~= "Scroll" then
      do
        colors[v] = v.Title.TextColor3
        v.MouseButton1Click:connect(function()
  
  Sound.Pitch = 1
  Sound:Play()
  greatOlTable[v.Name]()
end
)
        v.MouseEnter:connect(function()
  
  v.Title.TextColor3 = Color3.new(colors[v].r - 0.5, colors[v].g - 0.5, colors[v].b - 0.5)
end
)
        v.MouseLeave:connect(function()
  
  v.Title.TextColor3 = colors[v]
end
)
        -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC155: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_THEN_STMT

      end

repeat

    wait()
  until game.Players.LocalPlayer
until _G.BattleReady
pokegui = script.Parent.Main.PokeMoveSelecter
movelist = script.Parent.Main.MoveRelearner
movealreadylearned = script.Parent.Main.MoveReplacer
p = game.Players.LocalPlayer
local pokeselected = nil
moveselected = nil
hash = function(num)
  
  return (num + 4) * 8
end

dehash = function(num)
  
  return (num - 32) / 8
end

local Math = require(game.ReplicatedStorage.Functions.Math)
local tb = Instance.new("TextButton")
tb.TextColor3 = Color3.new(1, 1, 1)
tb.TextStrokeTransparency = 0
tb.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 0, 25)
tb.Font = "ArialBold"
tb.FontSize = "Size24"
tb.BorderColor3 = Color3.new(0, 0, 0)
tb.Modal = true
dc = function(var)
  
  for i = 1, 6 do
    if getfenv()[var .. i] then
      getfenv()[var .. i]:disconnect()
    end
  end
end

checker = function(move)
  
  for i,v in ipairs(moveslearned) do
    if v == move then
      return true
    end
  end
  return false
end

setupmoveselecter = function()
  
  for i,v in ipairs(movealreadylearned:GetChildren()) do
    do
      if v:IsA("TextButton") then
        do
          v.Visible = false
          -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC12: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_THEN_STMT

          -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC12: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_STMT

        end
      end
    end
  end
  for i,v in ipairs(pokeselected.Moves:GetChildren()) do
    local button = movealreadylearned["Move" .. v.Value]
    button.Text = v.Name
    button.TextColor3 = _G.Tables.TypeColors[_G.Moves[v.Name].Type]
    button.Visible = true
    getfenv()["MoveL" .. v.Value] = button.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
    
    moveselected = v
    movealreadylearned.Visible = false
    for level,movelist in pairs(_G.Pokemon[pokeselected.Name].Moves.LevelUp) do
      for _,move in ipairs(movelist) do
        if not pokeselected.Moves:FindFirstChild(move) and not checker(move) then
          table.insert(moveslearned, move)
        end
      end
    end
    creategui()
  end
)
  end
  movealreadylearned.Visible = true
end

setupparty = function()
  
  for i,v in ipairs(pokegui:GetChildren()) do
    do
      if v:IsA("ImageButton") then
        do
          v.Visible = false
          -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC12: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_THEN_STMT

          -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC12: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_STMT

        end
      end
    end
  end
  for i,v in ipairs(p.PokemonParty:GetChildren()) do
    if v.PartyPosition.Value <= 6 then
      local button = pokegui["Pokemon" .. v.PartyPosition.Value]
      button.Level.Text = "Lvl. " .. v.Lvl.Value
      if v.Shiny.Value ~= true or not _G.Pokemon[v.Name].Sprites.SF then
        button.Image = _G.Pokemon[v.Name].Sprites.Front
        if not v:FindFirstChild("Nickname") or not v:FindFirstChild("Nickname").Value then
          do
            button.PokeName.Text = v.Name
            button.Visible = true
            getfenv()["Party" .. v.PartyPosition.Value] = button.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
    
    pokeselected = v
    print(pokeselected.Name)
    pokegui.Visible = false
    setupmoveselecter()
  end
)
            -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC85: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_THEN_STMT

            -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC85: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_STMT

            -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC85: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_THEN_STMT

            -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC85: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_STMT

            -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC85: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_THEN_STMT

            -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC85: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_STMT

          end
        end
      end
    end
  end
  pokegui.Visible = true
end

creategui = function()
  
  for i,v in ipairs(script.Parent.Main.MoveRelearner:GetChildren()) do
    do
      if v:IsA("TextButton") then
        do
          v:Destroy()
          -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC16: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_THEN_STMT

          -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC16: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_STMT

        end
      end
    end
  end
  script.Parent.Main.MoveRelearner.CanvasSize = UDim2.new(0, 0, 0, math.max(25 + 25 * #moveslearned + 50, 250))
  local beginning = 0
  for i,v in ipairs(moveslearned) do
    local newtb = tb:Clone()
    newtb.Name = v
    newtb.Text = v
    newtb.Position = UDim2.new(0, 0, 0, beginning)
    beginning = beginning + 25
    newtb.BackgroundColor3 = _G.Tables.TypeColors[_G.Moves[v].Type]
    newtb.Parent = script.Parent.Main.MoveRelearner
    newtb.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
    
    movelist.Visible = false
    game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.Pokemon.moveCheck:InvokeServer(pokeselected, v)
    Math:Change(p.Money, -10000)
    Math:PropChange(moveselected, "Name", v)
    Math:Change(moveselected.PP, _G.Moves[v].PP)
    script.Parent.Main.BlackScreen.Visible = false
  end
)
  end
  local close = tb:Clone()
  close.Name = "Close"
  close.Text = "Close"
  close.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.new(1, 0, 0)
  close.Position = UDim2.new(0, 0, 0, beginning)
  close.Parent = movelist
  close.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
    
    script.Parent.Main.BlackScreen.Visible = false
    movelist.Visible = false
  end
)
  movelist.Visible = true
end

_G.MoveRelearner = function()
  
  dc("Party")
  dc("MoveL")
  pokeselected = nil
  moveselected = nil
  moveslearned = {}
  script.Parent.Main.BlackScreen.Visible = true
  setupparty()
end

-- params : ...

repeat
  wait()
until game.Players.LocalPlayer.PlayerGui:WaitForChild("Main")
p = game.Players.LocalPlayer
local gui = script.Parent.Main
fadeytext = function(text)
  
  gui.NicknameFrame.NicknameBox.Visible = false
  gui.MessageThing.Text = text
  for i = 1, 0, -0.05 do
    gui.MessageThing.TextTransparency = i
    gui.MessageThing.TextStrokeTransparency = i
    wait(0.05)
  end
  wait(0.5)
  for i = 0, 1, 0.05 do
    gui.MessageThing.TextTransparency = i
    gui.MessageThing.TextStrokeTransparency = i
    wait(0.05)
  end
  gui.MessageThing.TextTransparency = 1
  gui.MessageThing.TextStrokeTransparency = 1
  gui.NicknameFrame.NicknameBox.Visible = true
end

filter = function(string)
  
  local low = game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.Internal.FilterString:InvokeServer(string)
  gui.NicknameFrame.NicknameBox.Text = low
  if #string <= 12 and #string > 1 then
    if low:sub(1, 1) == " " then
      fadeytext("Do not have a space as the first character.")
      return false
    else
      if not low:match("[^%w ]") then
        fadeytext(low .. " is an allowed name. Renaming now!")
        return true
      else
        fadeytext("Only letters, numbers, and spaces allowed.")
        return false
      end
    end
  else
    fadeytext("The nickname must be between 2 and 12 characters.")
    return false
  end
end

dcstuff = function()
  
  for i = 1, 6 do
    if getfenv()[i] then
      getfenv()[i]:disconnect()
    end
  end
end

local Functions = require(game.ReplicatedStorage.Functions.Battle)
_G.Nickname = function()
  
  dcstuff()
  gui.BlackScreen.Visible = true
  gui.NicknameFrame.NicknameBox.Visible = false
  for i,v in ipairs(gui.NicknameFrame:GetChildren()) do
    do
      if v:IsA("ImageButton") then
        do
          v.Visible = false
          -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC22: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_THEN_STMT

          -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC22: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_STMT

        end
      end
    end
  end
  do
    for i,v in ipairs(p.PokemonParty:GetChildren()) do
      local button = gui.NicknameFrame["Poke" .. v.PartyPosition.Value]
      if v.Owner.Value:lower() ~= p.Name:lower() or not Color3.new(1, 1, 1) then
        button.ImageColor3 = Color3.new(0, 0, 0)
        if v.Shiny.Value ~= true or not _G.Pokemon[v.Name].Sprites.SF then
          button.Image = _G.Pokemon[v.Name].Sprites.Front
          if not v:FindFirstChild("Nickname") or not v:FindFirstChild("Nickname").Value then
            do
              button.Nickname.Text = v.Name
              if button.ImageColor3 == Color3.new(1, 1, 1) then
                getfenv()[v.PartyPosition.Value] = gui.NicknameFrame["Poke" .. v.PartyPosition.Value].MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
    
    if gui.MessageThing.TextTransparency == 1 then
      if nicknameevent then
        nicknameevent:disconnect()
      end
      gui.NicknameFrame.NicknameBox.Text = "Enter a nickname for your " .. v.Name
      nicknameevent = gui.NicknameFrame.NicknameBox.FocusLost:connect(function(prop)
      
      if filter(gui.NicknameFrame.NicknameBox.Text) then
        gui.NicknameFrame.NicknameBox.Visible = false
        Functions:Nickname(v, gui.NicknameFrame.NicknameBox.Text)
        button.Nickname.Text = gui.NicknameFrame.NicknameBox.Text
        gui.NicknameFrame.NicknameBox.Text = "Enter Nickname Here"
      else
        gui.NicknameFrame.NicknameBox.Text = "Type a different name, please."
      end
    end
)
      gui.NicknameFrame.NicknameBox.Visible = true
    end
  end
)
              end
              button.Visible = true
              -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC128: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_THEN_STMT

              -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC128: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_STMT

              -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC128: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_THEN_STMT

              -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC128: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_STMT

              -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC128: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_STMT

            end
          end
        end
      end
    end
  end
  gui.NicknameFrame.Visible = true
end

changevisible = function(bool, parent, instance)
  
  for i,v in ipairs(parent:GetChildren()) do
    if v:IsA(instance) then
      v.Visible = bool
    end
  end
end

informative = function(str)
  
  spawn(function()
    
    p.PlayerGui.Main.MessageThing.Text = str
    for i = 1, 0, -0.1 do
      p.PlayerGui.Main.MessageThing.TextTransparency = i
      p.PlayerGui.Main.MessageThing.TextStrokeTransparency = i
      wait()
    end
    wait(0.45)
    for i = 0, 1, 0.1 do
      p.PlayerGui.Main.MessageThing.TextTransparency = i
      p.PlayerGui.Main.MessageThing.TextStrokeTransparency = i
      wait()
    end
  end
)
end

eraseImage = function(parent)
  
  for i,v in ipairs(parent:GetChildren()) do
    if v:IsA("ImageButton") then
      v.Image = "rbxassetid://51039388"
      v.ImageColor3 = Color3.new(1, 1, 1)
    end
  end
end

partyvisible = function()
  
  if #party:GetChildren() < 6 then
    for i = 1, 6 do
      if #party:GetChildren() + 1 < i then
        partygui[tostring(i)].Visible = false
      else
        partygui[tostring(i)].Image = ""
        partygui[tostring(i)].Shiny.Visible = false
        partygui[tostring(i)].Lvl.Text = ""
      end
    end
  end
end

fixParty = function()
  
  local glitchCheck = false
  for i,v in ipairs(game.Players.LocalPlayer.PokemonParty:GetChildren()) do
    if v.PartyPosition.Value == 0 or v.PartyPosition.Value > 6 and #game.Players.LocalPlayer.PokemonParty:GetChildren() > 6 then
      glitchCheck = true
    end
  end
  if glitchCheck == true then
    game.ReplicatedStorage.GoogleAnalytics:FireServer("Fixing", game.Players.LocalPlayer.Name, "none", 1)
    for i,v in ipairs(game.Players.LocalPlayer.PokemonParty:GetChildren()) do
      Math:Change(v.PartyPosition, i)
    end
  end
end

partypokemon = function()
  
  fixParty()
  partyvisible()
  for i = 1, 6 do
    getfenv()["Party" .. i] = nil
  end
  for i,v in ipairs(party:GetChildren()) do
    if partygui:FindFirstChild(v.PartyPosition.Value) then
      partygui[v.PartyPosition.Value].Image = _G.Pokemon[v.Name].Sprites.Mini
      if v.Shiny.Value == true then
        partygui[v.PartyPosition.Value].Shiny.Visible = true
      else
        partygui[v.PartyPosition.Value].Shiny.Visible = false
      end
      partygui[v.PartyPosition.Value].Lvl.Text = "Lv." .. v.Lvl.Value
      getfenv()["Party" .. v.PartyPosition.Value] = v
      partygui[v.PartyPosition.Value].Visible = true
    end
  end
end

DCInfo = function()
  
  if infoMove then
    infoMove:disconnect()
  end
  if infoRelease then
    infoRelease:disconnect()
  end
  if infoClose then
    infoClose:disconnect()
  end
  if infoStats then
    infoStats:disconnect()
  end
  makeEverythingWhite(infoBox)
  makeEverythingWhite(infoParty)
end

makeEverythingWhite = function(thing)
  
  for i,v in ipairs(thing:GetChildren()) do
    if v:IsA("TextButton") then
      v.TextColor3 = Color3.new(1, 1, 1)
    end
  end
end

updatehud = function(bnumber)
  
  pcupdate(bnumber)
  partypokemon()
  selectedpokemon = nil
  action = false
  newpos = nil
  newpar = nil
  selpar = nil
  selpos = nil
end

local Sound2 = Instance.new("Sound", script.Parent)
Sound2.SoundId = "http://www.roblox.com/asset/?id=318763788"

do
  Sound4.SoundId = "http://www.roblox.com/asset/?id=290841329"
  Sound4.Name = "Beep"
  pc.Top.Right.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
  
  Sound2.Pitch = 0.8
  Sound2:Play()
  local str = pc.Top.BoxName.Text
  local bnumber = str:sub(4)
  if #boxes:GetChildren() <= tonumber(bnumber) then
    pcupdate(1)
  else
    pcupdate(tonumber(bnumber) + 1)
  end
end
)
  pc.Top.Left.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
  
  Sound2.Pitch = 1
  Sound2:Play()
  local str = pc.Top.BoxName.Text
  local bnumber = str:sub(4)
  if tonumber(bnumber) == 1 then
    pcupdate(#boxes:GetChildren())
  else
    pcupdate(tonumber(bnumber) - 1)
  end
end
)
  domath = function(number)
  
  for i,v in ipairs(p.PokemonParty:GetChildren()) do
    if number < v.PartyPosition.Value then
      PC:Change(v, v.PartyPosition.Value - 1)
    end
  end
end

  everythingvisible = function(thing)
  
  for i,v in ipairs(thing:GetChildren()) do
    if v:IsA("ImageButton") then
      v.Image = ""
      v.Shiny.Visible = false
      v.Lvl.Text = ""
    end
  end
end

  applyBorder = function(gui)
  
  for i,v in ipairs(pc.Border:GetChildren()) do
    local dv = v:Clone()
    dv.Visible = true
    dv.Parent = gui
  end
end

  clearSearch = function()
  
  for i,v in ipairs(pc.Background:GetChildren()) do
    if v:IsA("ImageButton") then
      if v:FindFirstChild("Line1") then
        v.Line1:Destroy()
      end
      if v:FindFirstChild("Line2") then
        v.Line2:Destroy()
      end
      if v:FindFirstChild("Line3") then
        v.Line3:Destroy()
      end
      if v:FindFirstChild("Line4") then
        v.Line4:Destroy()
      end
    end
  end
end

  Search = function(str, box)
  
  local modstr = str:lower()
  clearSearch()
  for i,v in ipairs(p.PC["Box " .. box]:GetChildren()) do
    -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC71: Unhandled construct in 'MakeBoolean' P3

    if v.Name:lower():match(modstr) or ((v:FindFirstChild("Nickname") and v.Nickname.Value:lower():match(modstr)) or not _G.Pokemon[v.Name].Type[2] or _G.Pokemon[v.Name].Type[2]:lower() == modstr) then
      applyBorder(pc.Background[v.PartyPosition.Value])
    end
  end
end

  pcmove = function(v)
  
  newpar = nil
  newpos = nil
  if action == true then
    local str = pc.Top.BoxName.Text
    local bnumber = tonumber(str:sub(4))
    selpar = selectedpokemon.Parent
    selpos = selectedpokemon.PartyPosition.Value
    Math:Change(selectedpokemon.CurrentHP, selectedpokemon.Stats.HPStat.Value)
    Math:Change(selectedpokemon.Status, "")
    if getfenv()["PC" .. v.Name] ~= nil then
      newpar = getfenv()["PC" .. v.Name].Parent
      newpos = getfenv()["PC" .. v.Name].PartyPosition.Value
    else
      newpar = nil
      newpos = nil
    end
    if getfenv()["PC" .. v.Name] ~= selectedpokemon then
      moving = true
      if selpar == newpar and newpar ~= nil then
        getfenv()["PCevent" .. v.Name]:disconnect()
        PC:Change(selectedpokemon, newpos)
        PC:Change(getfenv()["PC" .. v.Name], selpos)
        getfenv()["PCevent" .. v.Name] = v.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
    
    PCbutton(v)
  end
)
        updatehud(bnumber)
      else
        if selpar ~= newpar and getfenv()["PC" .. v.Name] and selectedpokemon and newpar ~= nil then
          getfenv()["PCevent" .. v.Name]:disconnect()
          PC:Change(selectedpokemon, newpos)
          PC:ParentChange(selectedpokemon, newpar)
          PC:ParentChange(getfenv()["PC" .. v.Name], selpar)
          PC:Change(getfenv()["PC" .. v.Name], selpos)
          getfenv()["PCevent" .. v.Name] = v.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
    
    PCbutton(v)
  end
)
          updatehud(bnumber)
        else
          if newpar == nil and (#p.PokemonParty:GetChildren() > 1 or selectedpokemon.Parent.Name == "PokemonParty" or #p.PokemonParty:GetChildren() == 1) then
            getfenv()["PCevent" .. v.Name]:disconnect()
            PC:Change(selectedpokemon, tonumber(v.Name))
            PC:ParentChange(selectedpokemon, p.PC[pc.Top.BoxName.Text])
            if selpar.Name == "PokemonParty" then
              domath(selpos)
            end
            getfenv()["PCevent" .. v.Name] = v.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
    
    PCbutton(v)
  end
)
            updatehud(bnumber)
          end
        end
      end
      moving = false
    end
  else
    do
      if getfenv()["PC" .. v.Name] ~= nil then
        selectedpokemon = getfenv()["PC" .. v.Name]
        action = true
      end
      moving = false
    end
  end
end

  partymove = function(v)
  
  newpar = nil
  newpos = nil
  if action == true then
    local str = pc.Top.BoxName.Text

      newpar = nil
      newpos = nil

    if getfenv()["Party" .. v.Name] ~= selectedpokemon then
      moving = true

        getfenv()["Partyevent" .. v.Name] = v.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
    
    Partybutton(v)
  end
)
        updatehud(bnumber)
      else

          getfenv()["Partyevent" .. v.Name]:disconnect()

          PC:ParentChange(selectedpokemon, newpar)
          PC:Change(getfenv()["Party" .. v.Name], selpos)
          PC:ParentChange(getfenv()["Party" .. v.Name], selpar)
          getfenv()["Partyevent" .. v.Name] = v.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
    
    Partybutton(v)
  end
)
          updatehud(bnumber)

            getfenv()["Partyevent" .. v.Name]:disconnect()

    Partybutton(v)
  end
)
            updatehud(bnumber)
          end
        end
      end
      moving = false
    end
  else
    do
      if getfenv()["Party" .. v.Name] ~= nil then
        selectedpokemon = getfenv()["Party" .. v.Name]
        action = true
      end
      moving = false
    end
  end
end

  pcupdate = function(box)
  
  changevisible(false, quickboxes, "TextButton")
  partypokemon()
  DCInfo()
  infoBox.Visible = false
  infoParty.Visible = false
  if pc.Search.SearchBox.Text ~= "Search" then
    Search(pc.Search.SearchBox.Text, box)
  end
  everythingvisible(pc.Background)
  pc.ImageColor3 = colorT[tonumber(box)].Color
  pc.Top.BoxName.Text = "Box " .. box
  pc.Top.BoxName.DropShadow.Text = pc.Top.BoxName.Text
  for i,v in ipairs(quickboxes:GetChildren()) do
    if boxes:FindFirstChild("Box " .. v.Name) then
      v.Visible = true
    end
  end
  for i = 1, 60 do
    getfenv()["PC" .. i] = nil
  end
  for i,v in ipairs(p.PC["Box " .. box]:GetChildren()) do
    if pc.Background:FindFirstChild(v.PartyPosition.Value) then
      pc.Background[v.PartyPosition.Value].Image = _G.Pokemon[v.Name].Sprites.Mini
      if v.Shiny.Value == true then
        pc.Background[v.PartyPosition.Value].Shiny.Visible = true
      else
        pc.Background[v.PartyPosition.Value].Shiny.Visible = false
      end
      pc.Background[v.PartyPosition.Value].Lvl.Text = "Lv." .. v.Lvl.Value
      getfenv()["PC" .. v.PartyPosition.Value] = v
    else
      getfenv()["PC" .. v.PartyPosition.Value] = nil
    end
  end
end

  PCbutton = function(v)
  
  if getfenv()["PC" .. v.Name] and selectedpokemon == nil and moving == false and main.Release.Visible == false then
    Sound2.Pitch = 0.8
    Sound2:Play()
    DCInfo()
    infoParty.Visible = false
    infoBox.Position = v.Position + UDim2.new(0.1, 0, 0, 0)
    infoBox.Visible = true
    if yes then
      yes:disconnect()
    end
    if no then
      no:disconnect()
    end
    infoMove = infoBox.Move.MouseButton1Click:connect(function()
    
    Sound4.Pitch = 0.8
    Sound4:Play()
    DCInfo()
    infoBox.Visible = false
    infoParty.Visible = false
    pcmove(v)
  end
)
    infoRelease = infoBox.Release.MouseButton1Click:connect(function()
    
    DCInfo()
    infoBox.Visible = false
    infoParty.Visible = false
    release(getfenv()["PC" .. v.Name])
  end
)
    infoClose = infoBox.Close.MouseButton1Click:connect(function()
    
    Sound4.Pitch = 0.7
    Sound4:Play()
    DCInfo()
    infoBox.Visible = false
    infoParty.Visible = false
  end
)
    infoStats = infoBox.Stats.MouseButton1Click:connect(function()
    
    Sound4.Pitch = 1
    Sound4:Play()
    pc.Visible = false
    _G.StatScreen(getfenv()["PC" .. v.Name], "PC")
  end
)
  else
    if selectedpokemon and action == true and moving == false then
      Sound2.Pitch = 1.2
      Sound2:Play()
      DCInfo()
      pcmove(v)
    end
  end
end

  release = function(pokecfg)
  
  if not pokecfg:FindFirstChild("Nickname") or not pokecfg:FindFirstChild("Nickname").Value then
    pc.Parent.Release.Prompt.Text = "Do you want to release your Lv. " .. pokecfg.Lvl.Value .. " " .. pokecfg.Name .. " in " .. pokecfg.Parent.Name .. "?"
    pc.Parent.Release.Visible = true
    pc.Visible = false
    if yes then
      yes:disconnect()
    end
    if no then
      no:disconnect()
    end
    yes = pc.Parent.Release.Yes.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
    
    local mommy = pokecfg.Parent
    PC:Release(pokecfg)
    pc.Parent.Release.Visible = false
    pcupdate(tonumber(mommy.Name:sub(4)))
    pc.Visible = true
  end
)
    no = pc.Parent.Release.No.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
    
    pc.Parent.Release.Visible = false
    pcupdate(tonumber(pokecfg.Parent.Name:sub(4)))
    pc.Visible = true
  end
)
  end
end

  pc.Close.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
  
  if moving == false then
    clearSearch()
    pc.Search.SearchBox.Text = "Search"
    p.PlayerGui.SoundEffect.SoundId = "http://www.roblox.com/asset/?id=201476337"
    p.PlayerGui.SoundEffect:Play()
    DCInfo()
    pc.Visible = false
    main.Menu.Visible = true
    main.BlackScreen.Visible = false
    main.Leaderboard.Visible = true
    p.Character.Humanoid.WalkSpeed = 16
  end
end
)
  pc.Search.SearchBox.FocusLost:connect(function()
  
  local str = pc.Top.BoxName.Text
  local bnumber = str:sub(4)
  if pc.Search.SearchBox.Text ~= "Search" and pc.Search.SearchBox.Text ~= "" then
    Search(pc.Search.SearchBox.Text, tonumber(bnumber))
  end
end
)
  pc.Reset.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
  
  pc.Search.SearchBox.Text = "Search"
  clearSearch()
end
)
  Partybutton = function(v)
  
  if getfenv()["Party" .. v.Name] and selectedpokemon == nil and moving == false and main.Release.Visible == false then
    Sound2.Pitch = 0.8
    Sound2:Play()
    DCInfo()
    infoBox.Visible = false
    if yes then
      yes:disconnect()
    end
    if no then
      no:disconnect()
    end
    infoParty.Position = v.Position + UDim2.new(0.45, 0, 0, 0)
    infoParty.Visible = true
    infoMove = infoParty.Move.MouseButton1Click:connect(function()
    
    Sound4.Pitch = 0.8
    Sound4:Play()
    DCInfo()
    infoBox.Visible = false
    infoParty.Visible = false
    partymove(v)
  end
)
    infoRelease = infoParty.Release.MouseButton1Click:connect(function()
    
    informative("You cannot release Pokemon that are currently in your party.")
  end
)
    infoClose = infoParty.Close.MouseButton1Click:connect(function()
    
    Sound4.Pitch = 0.7
    Sound4:Play()
    DCInfo()
    infoBox.Visible = false
    infoParty.Visible = false
  end
)
    infoStats = infoParty.Stats.MouseButton1Click:connect(function()
    
    Sound4.Pitch = 1
    Sound4:Play()
    pc.Visible = false
    _G.StatScreen(getfenv()["Party" .. v.Name], "PC")
  end
)
  else
    if selectedpokemon and action == true and moving == false then
      Sound2.Pitch = 1.2
      Sound2:Play()
      partymove(v)
    end
  end
end

  for i,v in ipairs(pc.Background:GetChildren()) do
    do
      if v:IsA("ImageButton") then
        if getfenv()["PCevent" .. v.Name] then
          getfenv()["PCevent" .. v.Name]:disconnect()
        end
        getfenv()["PCevent" .. v.Name] = v.MouseButton1Click:connect(function()
  
  PCbutton(v)
end
)
      end
      for i,v in ipairs(partygui:GetChildren()) do
        if v:IsA("ImageButton") then
          getfenv()["Partyevent" .. v.Name] = v.MouseButton1Click:connect(function()
  
  Partybutton(v)
end
)
        end
      end
    end
  end
  for i,v in ipairs(quickboxes:GetChildren()) do
    if v:IsA("TextButton") then
      v.MouseButton1Click:connect(function()
  
  Sound2.Pitch = 1
  Sound2:Play()
  if p.PC:FindFirstChild("Box " .. v.Name) then
    pcupdate(v.Name)
  end
end
)
    end
  end
  for i,v in ipairs(pc.Background:GetChildren()) do
    if v:IsA("ImageButton") then
      v.MouseEnter:connect(function()
  
  v.ImageColor3 = Color3.new(0.50980392156863, 0.50980392156863, 0.50980392156863)
end
)
      v.MouseLeave:connect(function()
  
  v.ImageColor3 = Color3.new(1, 1, 1)
end
)
    end
  end
  fixParty = function()
  
  local glitchCheck = false
  for i,v in ipairs(game.Players.LocalPlayer.PokemonParty:GetChildren()) do
    if v.PartyPosition.Value == 0 or v.PartyPosition.Value > 6 and #game.Players.LocalPlayer.PokemonParty:GetChildren() > 6 then
      glitchCheck = true
    end
  end
  if glitchCheck == true then
    game.ReplicatedStorage.GoogleAnalytics:FireServer("Fixing", game.Players.LocalPlayer.Name, "none", 1)
    for i,v in ipairs(game.Players.LocalPlayer.PokemonParty:GetChildren()) do
      Math:Change(v.PartyPosition, i)
    end
  end
end

  _G.PCSystem = function()
  
  moving = false
  if yes then
    yes:disconnect()
  end
  if no then
    no:disconnect()
  end
  action = false
  newpos = nil
  newpar = nil
  selpar = nil
  selpos = nil
  eraseImage(partygui)
  eraseImage(pc.Background)
  selectedpokemon = nil
  infoBox.Visible = false
  infoParty.Visible = false
  main.Menu.Visible = false
  main.Leaderboard.Visible = false
  main.BlackScreen.Visible = true
  pcupdate(1)
  pc.Visible = true
end

end

================================================================================
-- FILE: StarterGuiScripts/_G.PVPParty.local.lua
================================================================================

-- params : ...

local Sprites = {Inactive = "http://www.roblox.com/asset/?id=125060098", Active = "http://www.roblox.com/asset/?id=125060039"}
turninactive = function(party)
  
  for i,v in ipairs(party:GetChildren()) do
    if v:FindFirstChild("active") then
      v:FindFirstChild("active").Image = Sprites.Inactive
      if v.Status.Text ~= "FNT" then
        v.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.new(0.60392156862745, 0.73725490196078, 0.85098039215686)
      else
        v.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.new(0.35294117647059, 0, 0)
      end
    end
  end
end

findhealthbarsize = function(curhealth, maxhealth)
  
  local multi = curhealth / maxhealth
  return 0.8 * multi
end

changevisible = function(thing, isa, bool)
  
  for i,v in ipairs(thing:GetChildren()) do
    if v:IsA(isa) then
      v.Visible = bool
    end
  end
end

dcfenv = function(str)
  
  for i = 1, 6 do
    if getfenv()[str .. i] ~= nil then
      getfenv()[str .. i]:disconnect()
    end
  end
end

bigC = function(bool, partys)
  
  if bool == true then
    partys.Bottom.Line1.Visible = false
    partys.Bottom.Line2.Visible = false
    partys.Bottom.Stats.Visible = false
    partys.Bottom.Switch.Visible = false
    partys.Bottom.Cancel.Visible = false
    partys.Bottom.BigCancel.Visible = true
  else
    if bool == false then
      partys.Bottom.Line1.Visible = true
      partys.Bottom.Line2.Visible = true
      partys.Bottom.Stats.Visible = true
      partys.Bottom.Switch.Visible = true
      partys.Bottom.Cancel.Visible = true
      partys.Bottom.BigCancel.Visible = false
    end
  end
end

local Math = require(game.ReplicatedStorage.Functions.Math)
boxupdate = function(pokemon, box, Party, pokeout, battle, var)
  
  dcfenv("Stat")
  dcfenv("Switch")
  pokemonderp = pokemon
  local poke = _G.Pokemon[pokemon.Name]
  if pokemon.Status.Value ~= "Faint" then
    box.ImageColor3 = Color3.new(0.60392156862745, 0.73725490196078, 0.85098039215686)
  else
    box.ImageColor3 = Color3.new(0.35294117647059, 0, 0)
  end
  if not pokemon:FindFirstChild("Nickname") or not pokemon:FindFirstChild("Nickname").Value then
    box.PokeName.Text = pokemon.Name
    box.PokeName.DropShadow.Text = box.PokeName.Text
    box.PokemonSprite.Image = poke.Sprites.Mini
    box.Gender.Image = _G.Sprites.Symbols[pokemon.Gender.Value]
    box.Level.Text = "Lv: " .. pokemon.Lvl.Value
    box.Level.DropShadow.Text = box.Level.Text
    box.HPLabel.Text = pokemon.CurrentHP.Value .. "/     " .. pokemon.Stats.HPStat.Value
    box.HPLabel.DropShadow.Text = box.HPLabel.Text
    box.Health.Size = UDim2.new(findhealthbarsize(pokemon.CurrentHP.Value, pokemon.Stats.HPStat.Value), 0, 0.1, 0)
    if box.Health.Size.X.Scale > 0.4 then
      box.Health.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.new(0.66666666666667, 1, 0.49803921568627)
    else
      if box.Health.Size.X.Scale <= 0.4 and box.Health.Size.X.Scale >= 0.2 then
        box.Health.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.new(0.8, 0.8, 0)
      else
        if box.Health.Size.X.Scale < 0.2 and box.Health.Size.X.Scale > 0 then
          box.Health.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.new(0.66666666666667, 0, 0)
        end
      end
    end
    if pokemon.Status.Value ~= "" then
      box.Status.Text = _G.Tables.Status[pokemon.Status.Value][1]
      box.Status.BackgroundColor3 = _G.Tables.Status[pokemon.Status.Value][2]
      box.Status.Visible = true
    else
      box.Status.Text = ""
      box.Status.Visible = false
    end
    if pokemon.Status.Value == "Faint" then
      box.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.new(0.35294117647059, 0, 0)
    end
    getfenv()["Event" .. pokemon.PartyPosition.Value] = box.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
    
    pokemonderp = pokemon
    turninactive(partyscreen)
    box.active.Image = Sprites.Active
    if pokemonderp.Status.Value ~= "Faint" then
      box.ImageColor3 = Color3.new(0.41176470588235, 0.50588235294118, 0.58039215686275)
    else
      box.ImageColor3 = Color3.new(0.19607843137255, 0, 0)
    end
    bigC(false, box.Parent)
    if not pokemonderp:FindFirstChild("Nickname") or not pokemonderp:FindFirstChild("Nickname").Value then
      box.Parent.Bottom.dialog.Text = "Currently Selected: " .. pokemonderp.Name
      partyscreen.Bottom.dialog.DropShadow.Text = partyscreen.Bottom.dialog.Text
      if var == "Cancel" then
        box.Parent.Bottom.Cancel.Visible = false
      end
      dcfenv("Stat")
      dcfenv("Switch")
      getfenv()["Stat" .. pokemonderp.PartyPosition.Value] = box.Parent.Bottom.Stats.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
      
      local blah = nil
      box.Parent.Visible = false
      blah = _G.StatScreen(pokemonderp, "PVP", pokeout, var)
      repeat
        wait()
      until blah ~= nil
      pokemonderp = blah
      if not pokemonderp:FindFirstChild("Nickname") or not pokemonderp:FindFirstChild("Nickname").Value then
        box.Parent.Bottom.dialog.Text = "Currently Selected:" .. pokemonderp.Name
        partyscreen.Bottom.dialog.DropShadow.Text = partyscreen.Bottom.dialog.Text
        turninactive(partyscreen)
        if pokemonderp.Status.Value ~= "Faint" then
          partyscreen["Pokemon" .. pokemonderp.PartyPosition.Value].BackgroundColor3 = Color3.new(0.41176470588235, 0.50588235294118, 0.58039215686275)
        else
          partyscreen["Pokemon" .. pokemonderp.PartyPosition.Value].BackgroundColor3 = Color3.new(0.19607843137255, 0, 0)
        end
        partyscreen["Pokemon" .. pokemonderp.PartyPosition.Value].active.Image = Sprites.Active
      end
    end
)
      getfenv()["Switch" .. pokemonderp.PartyPosition.Value] = box.Parent.Bottom.Switch.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
      
      if pokemonderp == pokeout then
        box.Parent.Bottom.dialog.Text = pokeout.Name .. " is already out!"
        partyscreen.Bottom.dialog.DropShadow.Text = partyscreen.Bottom.dialog.Text
      else
        if pokemonderp.Status.Value == "Faint" or pokemonderp.CurrentHP.Value == 0 then
          box.Parent.Bottom.dialog.Text = "You can\'t send out a fainted Pokemon!"
          partyscreen.Bottom.dialog.DropShadow.Text = partyscreen.Bottom.dialog.Text
        else
          dcfenv("Stat")
          dcfenv("Switch")
          dcfenv("Event")
          pokemonswitch = pokemonderp
        end
      end
    end
)
    end
  end
)
    box.Visible = true
  end
end

_G.PVPParty = function(pokeout, party, var)
  
  local battle = game.Players.LocalPlayer.PlayerGui.Main.PvPBattle
  battle.Visible = false
  derp = true
  dcfenv("Event")
  dcfenv("Stat")
  dcfenv("Switch")
  pokemonswitch = nil
  if bigcancel ~= nil then
    bigcancel:disconnect()
  end
  if smallcancel ~= nil then
    smallcancel:disconnect()
  end
  partyscreen = game.Players.LocalPlayer.PlayerGui.Main.PVPParty
  turninactive(partyscreen)
  for i,v in ipairs(partyscreen:GetChildren()) do
    if v:IsA("ImageButton") then
      v.Visible = false
    end
  end
  for i,v in pairs(party:GetChildren()) do
    boxupdate(v, partyscreen["Pokemon" .. v.PartyPosition.Value], party, pokeout, battle, var)
  end
  if var ~= "Cancel" then
    smallcancel = partyscreen.Bottom.Cancel.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
    
    dcfenv("Event")
    dcfenv("Stat")
    dcfenv("Switch")
    partyscreen.Visible = false
    derp = false
    battle.Visible = true
  end
)
    bigcancel = partyscreen.Bottom.BigCancel.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
    
    dcfenv("Event")
    dcfenv("Stat")
    dcfenv("Switch")
    partyscreen.Visible = false
    derp = false
    battle.Visible = true
  end
)
    bigC(true, partyscreen)
  else
    partyscreen.Bottom.BigCancel.Visible = false
    partyscreen.Bottom.Cancel.Visible = false
  end
  partyscreen.Title.Visible = true
  partyscreen.Bottom.dialog.Text = ""
  partyscreen.Bottom.Visible = true
  partyscreen.Visible = true
  partyscreen.Bottom.dialog.Text = "Select a Pokemon to switch with " .. pokeout.Name .. "."
  partyscreen.Bottom.dialog.DropShadow.Text = partyscreen.Bottom.dialog.Text
  repeat
    wait()
  until pokemonswitch ~= nil or derp == false
  partyscreen.Visible = false
  battle.Visible = true
  if pokemonswitch ~= nil then
    return pokemonswitch
  end
end


================================================================================
-- FILE: StarterGuiScripts/_G.PartyBattle.local.lua
================================================================================

-- params : ...

local Sprites = {Inactive = "http://www.roblox.com/asset/?id=125060098", Active = "http://www.roblox.com/asset/?id=125060039"}
turninactive = function(party)
  
  for i,v in ipairs(party:GetChildren()) do
    if v:FindFirstChild("active") then
      v:FindFirstChild("active").Image = Sprites.Inactive
      if v.Status.Text ~= "FNT" then
        v.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.new(0.60392156862745, 0.73725490196078, 0.85098039215686)
      else
        v.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.new(0.35294117647059, 0, 0)
      end
    end
  end
end

findhealthbarsize = function(curhealth, maxhealth)
  
  local multi = curhealth / maxhealth
  return 0.8 * multi
end

changevisible = function(thing, isa, bool)
  
  for i,v in ipairs(thing:GetChildren()) do
    if v:IsA(isa) then
      v.Visible = bool
    end
  end
end

dcfenv = function(str)
  
  for i = 1, 6 do
    if getfenv()[str .. i] ~= nil then
      getfenv()[str .. i]:disconnect()
    end
  end
end

bigC = function(bool, partys)
  
  if bool == true then
    partys.Bottom.Line1.Visible = false
    partys.Bottom.Line2.Visible = false
    partys.Bottom.Stats.Visible = false
    partys.Bottom.Switch.Visible = false
    partys.Bottom.Cancel.Visible = false
    partys.Bottom.BigCancel.Visible = true
  else
    if bool == false then
      partys.Bottom.Line1.Visible = true
      partys.Bottom.Line2.Visible = true
      partys.Bottom.Stats.Visible = true
      partys.Bottom.Switch.Visible = true
      partys.Bottom.Cancel.Visible = true
      partys.Bottom.BigCancel.Visible = false
    end
  end
end

local Sound1 = Instance.new("Sound", script.Parent)
Sound1.SoundId = "http://www.roblox.com/asset/?id=290841329"
local Sound2 = Instance.new("Sound", script.Parent)
Sound2.SoundId = "http://www.roblox.com/asset/?id=318763788"
local Math = require(game.ReplicatedStorage.Functions.Math)
boxupdate = function(pokemon, box, Party, pokeout, battle, var)
  
  dcfenv("Stat")
  dcfenv("Switch")
  pokemonderp = pokemon
  local poke = _G.Pokemon[pokemon.Name]
  if pokemon.Status.Value ~= "Faint" then
    box.ImageColor3 = Color3.new(0.60392156862745, 0.73725490196078, 0.85098039215686)
  else
    box.ImageColor3 = Color3.new(0.35294117647059, 0, 0)
  end
  if not pokemon:FindFirstChild("Nickname") or not pokemon:FindFirstChild("Nickname").Value then
    box.PokeName.Text = pokemon.Name
    box.PokeName.DropShadow.Text = box.PokeName.Text
    box.PokemonSprite.Image = poke.Sprites.Mini
    box.Gender.Image = _G.Sprites.Symbols[pokemon.Gender.Value]
    box.Level.Text = "Lv: " .. pokemon.Lvl.Value
    box.Level.DropShadow.Text = box.Level.Text
    box.HPLabel.Text = pokemon.CurrentHP.Value .. "/     " .. pokemon.Stats.HPStat.Value
    box.HPLabel.DropShadow.Text = box.HPLabel.Text
    box.Health.Size = UDim2.new(findhealthbarsize(pokemon.CurrentHP.Value, pokemon.Stats.HPStat.Value), 0, 0.1, 0)
    if box.Health.Size.X.Scale > 0.4 then
      box.Health.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.new(0.66666666666667, 1, 0.49803921568627)
    else
      if box.Health.Size.X.Scale <= 0.4 and box.Health.Size.X.Scale >= 0.2 then
        box.Health.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.new(0.8, 0.8, 0)
      else
        if box.Health.Size.X.Scale < 0.2 and box.Health.Size.X.Scale > 0 then
          box.Health.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.new(0.66666666666667, 0, 0)
          box.active.Image = Sprites.Active
        end
      end
    end
    if pokemon.Status.Value ~= "" then
      box.Status.Text = _G.Tables.Status[pokemon.Status.Value][1]
      box.Status.BackgroundColor3 = _G.Tables.Status[pokemon.Status.Value][2]
      box.Status.Visible = true
    else
      box.Status.Text = ""
      box.Status.Visible = false
    end
    if pokemon.Status.Value == "Faint" then
      box.ImageColor3 = Color3.new(0.35294117647059, 0, 0)
    end
    getfenv()["Event" .. pokemon.PartyPosition.Value] = box.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
    
    Sound1:Play()
    pokemonderp = pokemon
    turninactive(partyscreen)
    if pokemonderp.Status.Value ~= "Faint" then
      box.ImageColor3 = Color3.new(0.41176470588235, 0.50588235294118, 0.58039215686275)
    else
      box.ImageColor3 = Color3.new(0.19607843137255, 0, 0)
    end
    bigC(false, box.Parent)
    if not pokemonderp:FindFirstChild("Nickname") or not pokemonderp:FindFirstChild("Nickname").Value then
      box.Parent.Bottom.dialog.Text = "Currently Selected: " .. pokemonderp.Name
      box.Parent.Bottom.dialog.DropShadow.Text = box.Parent.Bottom.dialog.Text
      if var == "Cancel" then
        box.Parent.Bottom.Cancel.Visible = false
      end
      dcfenv("Stat")
      dcfenv("Switch")
      getfenv()["Stat" .. pokemonderp.PartyPosition.Value] = box.Parent.Bottom.Stats.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
      
      local blah = nil
      Sound2:Play()
      box.Parent.Visible = false
      blah = _G.StatScreen(pokemonderp, true, pokeout, var)
      repeat
        wait()
      until blah ~= nil
      pokemonderp = blah
      if not pokemonderp:FindFirstChild("Nickname") or not pokemonderp:FindFirstChild("Nickname").Value then
        box.Parent.Bottom.dialog.Text = "Currently Selected: " .. pokemonderp.Name
        box.Parent.Bottom.dialog.DropShadow.Text = box.Parent.Bottom.dialog.Text
        turninactive(partyscreen)
        if pokemonderp.Status.Value ~= "Faint" then
          partyscreen["Pokemon" .. pokemonderp.PartyPosition.Value].ImageColor3 = Color3.new(0.41176470588235, 0.50588235294118, 0.58039215686275)
        else
          partyscreen["Pokemon" .. pokemonderp.PartyPosition.Value].ImageColor3 = Color3.new(0.19607843137255, 0, 0)
        end
        partyscreen["Pokemon" .. pokemonderp.PartyPosition.Value].active.Image = Sprites.Active
      end
    end
)
      getfenv()["Switch" .. pokemonderp.PartyPosition.Value] = box.Parent.Bottom.Switch.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
      
      Sound2:Play()
      if pokemonderp == pokeout then
        box.Parent.Bottom.dialog.Text = pokeout.Name .. " is already out!"
        box.Parent.Bottom.dialog.DropShadow.Text = box.Parent.Bottom.dialog.Text
      else
        if pokemonderp.Status.Value == "Faint" or pokemonderp.CurrentHP.Value == 0 then
          box.Parent.Bottom.dialog.Text = "You can\'t send out a fainted Pokemon!"
          box.Parent.Bottom.dialog.DropShadow.Text = box.Parent.Bottom.dialog.Text
        else
          dcfenv("Stat")
          dcfenv("Switch")
          dcfenv("Event")
          pokeout.PartyPosition.Value = pokemonderp.PartyPosition.Value
          pokemonderp.PartyPosition.Value = 1
          pokemonswitch = pokemonderp
        end
      end
    end
)
    end
  end
)
    box.Visible = true
  end
end

_G.PartyBattle = function(pokeout, battle, var)
  
  battle.Visible = false
  derp = true
  dcfenv("Event")
  dcfenv("Stat")
  dcfenv("Switch")
  pokemonswitch = nil
  if bigcancel ~= nil then
    bigcancel:disconnect()
  end
  if smallcancel ~= nil then
    smallcancel:disconnect()
  end
  partyscreen = game.Players.LocalPlayer.PlayerGui.Main.BlackScreen.Party
  party = game.Players.LocalPlayer.PokemonParty
  turninactive(partyscreen)
  for i,v in ipairs(partyscreen:GetChildren()) do
    if v:IsA("ImageButton") then
      v.Visible = false
    end
  end
  for i,v in pairs(party:GetChildren()) do
    boxupdate(v, partyscreen["Pokemon" .. v.PartyPosition.Value], party, pokeout, battle, var)
  end
  if var ~= "Cancel" then
    smallcancel = partyscreen.Bottom.Cancel.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
    
    dcfenv("Event")
    dcfenv("Stat")
    dcfenv("Switch")
    partyscreen.Visible = false
    derp = false
    battle.Visible = true
  end
)
    bigcancel = partyscreen.Bottom.BigCancel.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
    
    dcfenv("Event")
    dcfenv("Stat")
    dcfenv("Switch")
    partyscreen.Visible = false
    derp = false
    battle.Visible = true
  end
)
    bigC(true, partyscreen)
  else
    partyscreen.Bottom.BigCancel.Visible = false
    partyscreen.Bottom.Cancel.Visible = false
  end
  partyscreen.Title.Visible = true
  partyscreen.Bottom.dialog.Text = ""
  partyscreen.Bottom.dialog.DropShadow.Text = partyscreen.Bottom.dialog.Text
  partyscreen.Bottom.Visible = true
  partyscreen.Visible = true
  partyscreen.Bottom.dialog.Text = "Select a Pokemon to switch with " .. pokeout.Name .. "."
  partyscreen.Bottom.dialog.DropShadow.Text = partyscreen.Bottom.dialog.Text
  repeat
    wait()
  until pokemonswitch ~= nil or derp == false
  partyscreen.Visible = false
  battle.Visible = true
  if pokemonswitch ~= nil then
    return "Switch", pokemonswitch
  end
end

-- params : ...

local Sprites = {Inactive = "http://www.roblox.com/asset/?id=125060098", Active = "http://www.roblox.com/asset/?id=125060039"}
Math = require(game.ReplicatedStorage.Functions.Math)
hooligans = flase
notprocess = false
turninactive = function(party)
  
  for i,v in ipairs(party:GetChildren()) do
    if v:FindFirstChild("active") then
      v:FindFirstChild("active").Image = Sprites.Inactive
      if v.Status.Text ~= "FNT" then
        v.ImageColor3 = Color3.new(0.60392156862745, 0.73725490196078, 0.85098039215686)
      else
        v.ImageColor3 = Color3.new(0.35294117647059, 0, 0)
      end
    end
  end
end

findhealthbarsize = function(curhealth, maxhealth)
  
  local multi = curhealth / maxhealth
  return 0.8 * multi
end

changevisible = function(thing, isa, bool)
  
  for i,v in ipairs(thing:GetChildren()) do
    if v:IsA(isa) then
      v.Visible = bool
    end
  end
end

dcfenv = function(str)
  
  for i = 1, 6 do
    if getfenv()[str .. i] ~= nil then
      getfenv()[str .. i]:disconnect()
    end
  end
end

bigC = function(bool, partys)
  
  if bool == true then
    partys.Bottom.Line1.Visible = false
    partys.Bottom.Line2.Visible = false
    partys.Bottom.Stats.Visible = false
    partys.Bottom.Switch.Visible = false
    partys.Bottom.Cancel.Visible = false
    partys.Bottom.BigCancel.Visible = true
  else
    if bool == false then
      partys.Bottom.Line1.Visible = true
      partys.Bottom.Line2.Visible = true
      partys.Bottom.Stats.Visible = true
      partys.Bottom.Switch.Visible = true
      partys.Bottom.Cancel.Visible = true
      partys.Bottom.BigCancel.Visible = false
    end
  end
end

local Sound1 = Instance.new("Sound", script.Parent)
Sound1.SoundId = "http://www.roblox.com/asset/?id=290841329"
local Sound2 = Instance.new("Sound", script.Parent)
Sound2.SoundId = "http://www.roblox.com/asset/?id=318763788"
local Sound3 = Instance.new("Sound", script.Parent)
Sound3.SoundId = "rbxassetid://138097048"
local Math = require(game.ReplicatedStorage.Functions.Math)
boxupdate = function(pokemon, box, Party, pokeout, battle, var)
  
  dcfenv("Stat")
  dcfenv("Switch")
  pokemonderp = pokemon
  local poke = _G.Pokemon[pokemon.Name]
  if pokemon.Status.Value ~= "Faint" then
    box.ImageColor3 = Color3.new(0.60392156862745, 0.73725490196078, 0.85098039215686)
  else
    box.ImageColor3 = Color3.new(0.35294117647059, 0, 0)
  end
  if not pokemon:FindFirstChild("Nickname") or not pokemon:FindFirstChild("Nickname").Value then
    box.PokeName.Text = pokemon.Name
    box.PokeName.DropShadow.Text = box.PokeName.Text
    box.PokemonSprite.Image = poke.Sprites.Mini
    box.Gender.Image = _G.Sprites.Symbols[pokemon.Gender.Value]
    box.Level.Text = "Lv: " .. pokemon.Lvl.Value
    box.Level.DropShadow.Text = box.Level.Text
    box.HPLabel.Text = pokemon.CurrentHP.Value .. "/     " .. pokemon.Stats.HPStat.Value
    box.HPLabel.DropShadow.Text = box.HPLabel.Text
    box.Health.Size = UDim2.new(findhealthbarsize(pokemon.CurrentHP.Value, pokemon.Stats.HPStat.Value), 0, 0.1, 0)
    if box.Health.Size.X.Scale > 0.4 then
      box.Health.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.new(0.66666666666667, 1, 0.49803921568627)
    else
      if box.Health.Size.X.Scale <= 0.4 and box.Health.Size.X.Scale >= 0.2 then
        box.Health.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.new(0.8, 0.8, 0)
      else
        if box.Health.Size.X.Scale < 0.2 and box.Health.Size.X.Scale > 0 then
          box.Health.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.new(0.66666666666667, 0, 0)
        end
      end
    end
    if pokemon.Status.Value ~= "" then
      box.Status.Text = _G.Tables.Status[pokemon.Status.Value][1]
      box.Status.BackgroundColor3 = _G.Tables.Status[pokemon.Status.Value][2]
      box.Status.Visible = true
    else
      box.Status.Text = ""
      box.Status.Visible = false
    end
    if pokemon.Status.Value == "Faint" then
      box.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.new(0.35294117647059, 0, 0)
    end
    getfenv()["Event" .. pokemon.PartyPosition.Value] = box.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
    
    Sound1:Play()
    pokemonderp = pokemon
    turninactive(partyscreen)
    box.active.Image = Sprites.Active
    if pokemonderp.Status.Value ~= "Faint" then
      box.ImageColor3 = Color3.new(0.41176470588235, 0.50588235294118, 0.58039215686275)
    else
      box.ImageColor3 = Color3.new(0.19607843137255, 0, 0)
    end
    if not pokemonderp:FindFirstChild("Nickname") or not pokemonderp:FindFirstChild("Nickname").Value then
      box.Parent.Bottom.dialog.Text = "Currently Selected: " .. pokemonderp.Name
      box.Parent.Bottom.dialog.DropShadow.Text = box.Parent.Bottom.dialog.Text
      bigC(false, box.Parent)
      dcfenv("Stat")
      dcfenv("Switch")
      getfenv()["Stat" .. pokemonderp.PartyPosition.Value] = box.Parent.Bottom.Stats.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
      
      Sound2:Play()
      local blah = nil
      box.Parent.Visible = false
      blah = _G.StatScreen(pokemonderp, false)
      repeat
        wait()
      until blah ~= nil
      pokemonderp = blah
      if not pokemonderp:FindFirstChild("Nickname") or not pokemonderp:FindFirstChild("Nickname").Value then
        box.Parent.Bottom.dialog.Text = "Currently Selected: " .. pokemonderp.Name
        box.Parent.Bottom.dialog.DropShadow.Text = box.Parent.Bottom.dialog.Text
        turninactive(partyscreen)
        if pokemonderp.Status.Value ~= "Faint" then
          partyscreen["Pokemon" .. pokemonderp.PartyPosition.Value].BackgroundColor3 = Color3.new(0.41176470588235, 0.50588235294118, 0.58039215686275)
        else
          partyscreen["Pokemon" .. pokemonderp.PartyPosition.Value].BackgroundColor3 = Color3.new(0.19607843137255, 0, 0)
        end
        partyscreen["Pokemon" .. pokemonderp.PartyPosition.Value].active.Image = Sprites.Active
      end
    end
)
      getfenv()["Switch" .. pokemonderp.PartyPosition.Value] = box.Parent.Bottom.Switch.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
      
      Sound2:Play()
      box.Parent.Bottom.dialog.Text = "Who should switch with " .. pokemon.Name .. "?"
      box.Parent.Bottom.dialog.DropShadow.Text = box.Parent.Bottom.dialog.Text
      bigC(true, box.Parent)
      dcfenv("Event")
      for i,v in ipairs(box.Parent:GetChildren()) do
        do
          if v == box then
            hooligans = true
          else
            if v ~= box and v:IsA("ImageButton") then
              do
                getfenv()["SwitchBox" .. v.Name] = v.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
        
        if notprocess == false then
          Sound3:Play()
          notprocess = true
          local pos = v.Position
          local tupos = box.Position
          local number = tonumber(string.sub(box.Name, 8))
          local vnumber = (tonumber(string.sub(v.Name, 8)))
          local partypos, vpartypos = nil, nil
          dcfenv("SwitchBox")
          for _,buttons in ipairs(box.Parent:GetChildren()) do
            dcfenv("SwitchBox")
          end
          box:TweenPosition(pos, "Out", "Quad", 0.35)
          v:TweenPosition(tupos, "Out", "Quad", 0.35)
          for _,poke in ipairs(Party:GetChildren()) do
            if poke.PartyPosition.Value == number then
              partypos = poke.PartyPosition
            else
              if poke.PartyPosition.Value == vnumber then
                vpartypos = poke.PartyPosition
              end
            end
          end
          Math:Change(partypos, vnumber)
          Math:Change(vpartypos, number)
          box.Name = "Pokemon" .. vnumber
          v.Name = "Pokemon" .. number
          box.Parent.Bottom.dialog.Text = "Choose a Pokemon."
          box.Parent.Bottom.dialog.DropShadow.Text = box.Parent.Bottom.dialog.Text
          wait(0.4)
          hooligans = false
          notprocess = false
          dcfenv("Stat")
          dcfenv("Switch")
          for i = 1, 6 do
            if getfenv()["SwitchBox" .. "Pokemon" .. i] ~= nil then
              getfenv()["SwitchBox" .. "Pokemon" .. i]:disconnect()
            end
          end
          for i,v in pairs(party:GetChildren()) do
            boxupdate(v, partyscreen["Pokemon" .. v.PartyPosition.Value], party, pokeout, battle)
          end
        end
      end
)
                -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC70: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_THEN_STMT

                -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC70: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_STMT

                -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC70: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_ELSE_STMT

                -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC70: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_STMT

              end
            end
          end
        end
      end
    end
)
    end
  end
)
    box.Visible = true
  end
end

recurring = function(lazytable)
  
  for val = 1, 6 do
    if lazytable[val] == nil and lazytable[val + 1] ~= nil then
      lazytable[val] = lazytable[val + 1]
      lazytable[val + 1] = nil
      Math:Change(lazytable[val].PartyPosition, val)
      recurring(lazytable)
    end
  end
end

fixParty = function()
  
  local glitchCheck = false
  for i,v in ipairs(game.Players.LocalPlayer.PokemonParty:GetChildren()) do
    if v.PartyPosition.Value == 0 or v.PartyPosition.Value > 6 and #game.Players.LocalPlayer.PokemonParty:GetChildren() > 6 then
      glitchCheck = true
    end
  end
  if glitchCheck == true then
    game.ReplicatedStorage.GoogleAnalytics:FireServer("Fixing", game.Players.LocalPlayer.Name, "none", 1)
    for i,v in ipairs(game.Players.LocalPlayer.PokemonParty:GetChildren()) do
      Math:Change(v.PartyPosition, i)
    end
  end
end

local PC = require(game.ReplicatedStorage.Functions.PC)
_G.PartyOverworld = function(pokeout, battle)
  
  local lazytable = {}
  fixParty()
  for i,v in ipairs(game.Players.LocalPlayer.PokemonParty:GetChildren()) do
    if v.PartyPosition.Value == 0 then
      for num,poke in ipairs(game.Players.LocalPlayer.PokemonParty:GetChildren()) do
        PC:Change(poke, num)
      end
    end
  end
  for i,v in ipairs(game.Players.LocalPlayer.PokemonParty:GetChildren()) do
    if v.PartyPosition.Value > 6 then
      PC:Release(v)
    else
      lazytable[v.PartyPosition.Value] = v
    end
  end
  recurring(lazytable)
  for i,v in ipairs(game.Players.LocalPlayer.PokemonParty:GetChildren()) do
    if lazytable[v.PartyPosition.Value] ~= v then
      for val = 1, 6 do
        if lazytable[val] == nil then
          lazytable[val] = v
          Math:Change(v.PartyPosition, val)
          break
        end
      end
    end
  end
  partyscreen = game.Players.LocalPlayer.PlayerGui.Main.Party
  game.Players.LocalPlayer.PlayerGui.Main.Leaderboard.Visible = false
  partyscreen.Bottom.dialog.Text = "Choose a Pokemon."
  partyscreen.Bottom.dialog.DropShadow.Text = partyscreen.Bottom.dialog.Text
  derp = true
  dcfenv("Event")
  dcfenv("Stat")
  dcfenv("Switch")
  pokemonswitch = nil
  if bigcancel ~= nil then
    bigcancel:disconnect()
  end
  if smallcancel ~= nil then
    smallcancel:disconnect()
  end
  blck = game.Players.LocalPlayer.PlayerGui.Main.BlackScreen
  party = game.Players.LocalPlayer.PokemonParty
  turninactive(partyscreen)
  for i,v in ipairs(partyscreen:GetChildren()) do
    if v:IsA("ImageButton") then
      v.Visible = false
    end
  end
  for i,v in pairs(party:GetChildren()) do
    boxupdate(v, partyscreen["Pokemon" .. v.PartyPosition.Value], party, pokeout, battle)
  end
  smallcancel = partyscreen.Bottom.Cancel.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
    
    dcfenv("Event")
    dcfenv("Stat")
    dcfenv("Switch")
    derp = false
    bigC(true, partyscreen)
  end
)
  bigcancel = partyscreen.Bottom.BigCancel.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
    
    dcfenv("Event")
    dcfenv("Stat")
    dcfenv("Switch")
    partyscreen.Visible = false
    derp = false
    blck.Visible = false
    for i = 1, 6 do
      if getfenv()["SwitchBox" .. "Pokemon" .. i] ~= nil then
        getfenv()["SwitchBox" .. "Pokemon" .. i]:disconnect()
      end
    end
    game.Players.LocalPlayer.PlayerGui.Main.Leaderboard.Visible = true
  end
)
  bigC(true, partyscreen)
  partyscreen.Title.Visible = true
  partyscreen.Bottom.dialog.Visible = true
  partyscreen.Visible = true
end


================================================================================
-- FILE: StarterGuiScripts/_G.PokeShop.local.lua
================================================================================

-- params : ...

repeat
  repeat
    repeat
      wait()
    until _G.ItemsReady
  until game.Players.LocalPlayer
until game.Players.LocalPlayer:FindFirstChild("Bag")
p = game.Players.LocalPlayer
local pokemonprices = {Dratini = 15000, Electabuzz = 35000, Magmar = 35000, Snorlax = 70000, Aerodactyl = 90000, Porygon = 150000, Duskull = 200000, Feebas = 300000}
local Math = require(game.ReplicatedStorage.Functions.Math)
hash = function(num)
  
  return (num + 4) * 8
end

dehash = function(num)
  
  return num / 8 - 4
end

Pokedex = require(game.ReplicatedStorage.Functions.Pokedex)
for i,v in pairs(pokemonprices) do
  do
    script.Parent.Pokemon[i].Text = i .. ": $" .. v
  end
end
updatecash = function()
  
  script.Parent.Money.Text = "$" .. dehash(p.Money.Value)
end

local debounce = false
bp = script.Parent
for i,cool in ipairs(script.Parent.Pokemon:GetChildren()) do
  if cool:IsA("TextButton") then
    cool.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
  
  updatecash()
  if buyevent then
    buyevent:disconnect()
  end
  bp.ItemImg.Image = _G.Pokemon[cool.Name].Sprites.Mini
  script.Parent.Parent.BuyButton.Visible = true
  buyevent = script.Parent.Parent.BuyButton.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
    
    local money = p.Money.Value
    local check, moneyLeft = Math:PokeBuy(cool.Name, dehash(p.Money.Value))
    if check == true and debounce == false then
      debounce = true
      repeat
        wait()
      until p.Money.Value ~= money
      updatecash()
      if not Pokedex:Check(cool.Name, p) then
        Pokedex:Create(cool.Name, true)
      else
        Pokedex:Caught(cool.Name)
      end
      _G.Create(cool.Name, p.PokemonParty, 35, true)
      debounce = false
      if #p.PokemonParty:GetChildren() >= 6 then
        script.Parent.Parent.Visible = false
        script.Parent.Parent.Parent.BlackScreen.Visible = false
      end
    end
  end
)
end
)
  end
end
script.Parent.Parent.Close.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
  
  script.Parent.Parent.Visible = false
  script.Parent.Parent.Parent.BlackScreen.Visible = false
  p.Character.Humanoid.WalkSpeed = 16
end
)
_G.PokemonShop = function()
  
  updatecash()
  bp.ItemImg.Image = ""
  script.Parent.Parent.BuyButton.Visible = false
  script.Parent.Parent.Parent.PokemonShop.Visible = true
  script.Parent.Parent.Parent.BlackScreen.Visible = true
  p.Character.Humanoid.WalkSpeed = 0
end

repeat
  wait()
until game.Players.LocalPlayer
local p = game.Players.LocalPlayer
local Main = game.Players.LocalPlayer:WaitForChild("PlayerGui"):WaitForChild("Main")
local BattleRGui = (Main:WaitForChild("BattleRequest"))
local leaveevent = nil
local soundtable = {195437646, 142369569, 143472869, 187426555, 150384923, 183251549}
local gui = Main
local FightAction, bagAction, switchAction, BackButton, runAction = nil, nil, nil, nil, nil
local turnGoingOn = false
local currentStatus = nil
local associateBattle = {}
local StatusCond = {
Burn = {"BRN", Color3.new(0.77254901960784, 0, 0)}
, 
Poison = {"PSN", Color3.new(0.47058823529412, 0, 0.47058823529412)}
, 
BadlyPoison = {"PSN", Color3.new(0.47058823529412, 0, 0.47058823529412)}
, 
Paralysis = {"PAR", Color3.new(0.86274509803922, 0.86274509803922, 0)}
, 
Freeze = {"FRZ", Color3.new(0.66666666666667, 1, 1)}
, 
Sleep = {"SLP", Color3.new(0.56470588235294, 0.56470588235294, 0.56470588235294)}
, 
Faint = {"FNT", Color3.new(0.53333333333333, 0, 0)}

fadeytext = function(text)
  
  gui.MessageThing.Text = text
  for i = 1, 0, -0.05 do
    gui.MessageThing.TextTransparency = i
    gui.MessageThing.TextStrokeTransparency = i
    wait(0.05)
  end
  wait(0.5)
  for i = 0, 1, 0.05 do
    gui.MessageThing.TextTransparency = i
    gui.MessageThing.TextStrokeTransparency = i
    wait(0.05)
  end
  gui.MessageThing.TextTransparency = 1
  gui.MessageThing.TextStrokeTransparency = 1
end

game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.PVP.AnswerRequest.OnClientEvent:connect(function(action1)
  
  if action1 == "Cancel" then
    BattleRGui.Visible = false
    Main.MessageThing.Text = "The other person canceled the battle."
    Main.MessageThing.Transparency = 0
    wait(1)
    Main.MessageThing.Transparency = 1
    Main.BlackScreen.Visible = false
  end
end
)
game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.PVP.BattleRequest.OnClientEvent:connect(function(playerAgainst, argument2, gamemode)
  
  if argument2 ~= nil then
    BattleRGui.Visible = false
    Main.BlackScreen.Visible = false
    Main.Cancel.Visible = false
    Main.PVPCancel.Visible = false
  end
  if Main.BlackScreen.Visible == false and p.PlayerGui.DialogTalk.TalkB.Talk.Visible == false and argument2 == nil then
    if accept then
      accept:disconnect()
    end
    if decline then
      decline:disconnect()
    end
    Main.InteractBG.Visible = false
    Main.BlackScreen.Visible = true
    for i,v in ipairs(Main.BlackScreen:GetChildren()) do
      v.Visible = false
    end
    Main.Pokedex.Visible = false
    Main.Backpack.Visible = false
    Main.Party.Visible = false
    Main.PCSystem.Visible = false
    BattleRGui.Frame.ImageLabel.Image = "http://www.roblox.com/Thumbs/Avatar.ashx?x=100&y=100&username=" .. playerAgainst.Name
    BattleRGui.Message.Text = playerAgainst.Name .. " wants to battle you! Game mode: " .. gamemode
    BattleRGui.Visible = true
    accept = BattleRGui.Accept.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
    
    BattleRGui.Visible = false
    if playerAgainst ~= nil and game.Players:FindFirstChild(playerAgainst.Name) then
      game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.PVP.AnswerRequest:FireServer("Accept", playerAgainst, gamemode)
    else
      Main.BlackScreen.Visible = false
    end
  end
)
    decline = BattleRGui.Decline.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
    
    BattleRGui.Visible = false
    Main.BlackScreen.Visible = p.InBattle.Value
    if playerAgainst ~= nil then
      game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.PVP.AnswerRequest:FireServer("Decline", playerAgainst)
    end
  end
)
  end
end
)
local PvP = Main.PvPSelector
toggleall = function(bool)
  
  for i,v in ipairs(PvP.OppFrame:GetChildren()) do
    v.Visible = bool
  end
  for i,v in ipairs(PvP.UserFrame:GetChildren()) do
    v.Visible = bool
  end
  PvP.Visible = bool
end

game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.PVP.LeadSelection.OnClientEvent:connect(function(playerAgainst, Folder, ticket)
  
  toggleall(false)
  local deb = false
  Main.BlackScreen.Visible = true
  Main.Cancel.Visible = false
  Main.MessageThing.TextTransparency = 1
  Main.MessageThing.TextStrokeTransparency = 1
  PvP.OppFrame.User.Image = "http://www.roblox.com/Thumbs/Avatar.ashx?x=200&y=200&Format=Png&username=" .. playerAgainst.Name
  PvP.OppFrame.User.Visible = true
  PvP.UserFrame.User.Image = "http://www.roblox.com/Thumbs/Avatar.ashx?x=200&y=200&Format=Png&username=" .. p.Name
  PvP.UserFrame.User.Visible = true
  for i,v in ipairs(Folder[playerAgainst.Name]:GetChildren()) do

      if v.PartyPosition.Value <= 6 then

local showdown = gui.PvPPlayers
playerLeft = false
game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.PVP.Showdown.OnClientEvent:connect(function(ticket, canceller, action, opp, folderO)
  
  playerLeft = false
  if action == "Begin" then
    PvP.Visible = false
    local Sound = p.PlayerGui.BattleSound
    Sound.SoundId = "http://www.roblox.com/asset/?id=" .. soundtable[math.random(1, #soundtable)]
    Sound:Play()
    showdown.Player1.Position = UDim2.new(0, 0, -2, 0)
    showdown.Player1.PlayerName.Text = p.Name
    showdown.Player1.PlayerName.DropShadow.Text = p.Name
    showdown.Player1.Image = "http://www.roblox.com/Thumbs/Avatar.ashx?x=200&y=200&Format=Png&username=" .. p.Name
    showdown.Player1.ImageColor3 = Color3.new(1, 1, 1)
    showdown.Player1.Winner.Visible = false
    showdown.Player2.Position = UDim2.new(1, 0, 4, 0)
    showdown.Player2.PlayerName.Text = opp.Name
    showdown.Player2.PlayerName.DropShadow.Text = opp.Name
    showdown.Player2.Image = "http://www.roblox.com/Thumbs/Avatar.ashx?x=200&y=200&Format=Png&username=" .. opp.Name
    showdown.Player2.ImageColor3 = Color3.new(1, 1, 1)
    showdown.Player2.Winner.Visible = false
    showdown.Versus.Visible = false
    showdown.Visible = true
    showdown.Player1:TweenPosition(UDim2.new(0, 0, 0, 0), "Out", "Bounce", 1.5, false, function()
    
    showdown.Versus.Text = ""
    showdown.Versus.Visible = true
    wait(0.5)
    showdown.Versus.Text = "V"
    wait(0.5)
    showdown.Versus.Text = "Vs."
    showdown.Player2:TweenPosition(UDim2.new(1, -250, 0, 0), "Out", "Bounce", 1.5, false, function()
      
      wait(2)
      if playerLeft == true then
        PvP.Visible = false
        fadeytext("Other player left the server.")
        Main.BlackScreen.Visible = false
        showdown.Visible = false
        p.PlayerGui.BattleSound:Stop()
      else
        battleFunc(opp, folderO)
      end
    end
)
  end
)
  else
    do
      PvP.Visible = false
      PvP.Cancel.Visible = false
      if canceller then
        fadeytext("The battle was canceled by " .. canceller.Name .. ".")
      end
      Main.BlackScreen.Visible = false
    end
  end
end
)
