if not p.Character then
  local c = p.CharacterAdded:wait()
end
local h = yieldfor(c, "Humanoid")
hash = function(num)
  
  return (num + 4) * 8
end

dehash = function(num)
  
  return (num - 32) / 8
end

healafterbattle = function()
  
  Battle:Heal()
end

findaveragelevel = function()
  
  local totallvl = 0
  local party = p.PokemonParty:GetChildren()
  for i,v in ipairs(party) do
    totallvl = totallvl + v.Lvl.Value
  end
  return math.floor((totallvl) / #party)
end

lowestlevel = function()
  
  local lowestlvl = 100
  local party = p.PokemonParty:GetChildren()
  for i,v in ipairs(party) do
    if v.Lvl.Value < lowestlvl then
      lowestlvl = v.Lvl.Value
    end
  end
  return lowestlvl
end

local main = script.Parent:WaitForChild("Main")
fadeytext = function(text)
  
  main.MessageThing.Text = text
  for i = 1, 0, -0.05 do
    main.MessageThing.TextTransparency = i
    main.MessageThing.TextStrokeTransparency = i
    wait(0.05)
  end
  wait(0.5)
  for i = 0, 1, 0.05 do
    main.MessageThing.TextTransparency = i
    main.MessageThing.TextStrokeTransparency = i
    wait(0.05)
  end
  main.MessageThing.TextTransparency = 1
  main.MessageThing.TextStrokeTransparency = 1
end

checkParty = function(Pokemon)
  
  for i,v in ipairs(p.PokemonParty:GetChildren()) do
    if v.Name == Pokemon then
      return true
    end
  end
  return false
end

victiniallowed = {Chansey = true, Blissey = true, Exeggcute = true, Buneary = true, Exeggutor = true, Lopunny = true, Togepi = true, Togetic = true, Togekiss = true}
checkPokemon = function(t)
  
  for i,v in ipairs(p.PokemonParty:GetChildren()) do
    if victiniallowed[v.Name] then
      return true
    end
  end
  return false
end

local victiniareas = {["Route 1"] = true, ["Seafoam Cave"] = true, ["Route 5"] = true}
local rotomareas = {["Viridian Forest"] = true, ["Mount Cinnabar"] = true, ["Route 11"] = true}
rotomtype = function()
  
  local ele = false
  local gost = false
  for i,v in ipairs(p.PokemonParty:GetChildren()) do
    for _,typez in pairs(_G.Pokemon[v.Name].Type) do
      if typez == "Electric" then
        ele = true
      else
        if typez == "Ghost" then
          gost = true
        end
      end
    end
  end
  print(ele, gost)
  if ele and gost then
    return true
  else
    return false
  end
end

findpokemon = function(area)
  
  Instance.new("Folder", script.Parent.Main.animHold)
  local PowerEnabled = false
  if p.PokeBooster:FindFirstChild("Legendary") and p.PokeBooster:FindFirstChild("Legendary").Value > 0 then
    PowerEnabled = true
  end
  local legend = 800
  if PowerEnabled == true then
    legend = 400
  end
  if p.LegendaryVIP.Value == true then
    legend = 80
    if PowerEnabled == true then
      legend = 40
    end
  end
  legendchance = math.random(1, legend)
  local calc = math.random(1, 7)
  local whichstarter = math.random(1, 3)
  local mewchance = math.random(1, 130)
  local mewtwoevent = math.random(1, 1300)
  local gerbilchance = math.random(1, 800)
  local coollegendaries = math.random(1, 1800)
  if p.OtherLegendary.Value == true then
    coollegendaries = math.random(1, 200)
    gerbilchance = math.random(1, 80)
  end
  local latitwins = math.random(1, 1800)
  if p.OtherLegendary.Value == true then
    latitwins = math.random(1, 130)
  end
  local dayt = math.random(1, 2000)
  if p.OtherLegendary.Value == true then
    dayt = math.random(1, 200)
  end
  if p.LegendaryVIP.Value == true then

                        end

                    end
                  end
                end
              end
            end
          end
        end
      end
    end
  end
end

local i = 0
local speed = 0
h.Running:connect(function(s)
  
  speed = math.floor(s)
end
)
while 1 do
  if wait(0.33) and speed > 6 then
    local ray = Ray.new(c.Torso.Position, Vector3.new(0, -1, 0).unit * 5)
    local hit, pos = workspace:FindPartOnRay(ray, c)
    if not hit or speed <= 6 or hit.Parent.Parent ~= game.Workspace.WildAreas or not game.Players.LocalPlayer:FindFirstChild("PokemonParty") or #p.PokemonParty:GetChildren() <= 0 or script.Parent.Main.BlackScreen.Visible ~= false or script.Parent.Main.Menu.Scroll.Title.Text ~= "Menu >" or #p.OppPokemon:GetChildren() ~= 0 or math.random(1, 1300) >= 1200 then
      findpokemon(hit)
    end
  end
end

================================================================================
-- FILE: StarterGuiScripts/newShop.local.lua

-- params : ...

p = game.Players.LocalPlayer
bp = script.Parent.Parent
_G.shopon = "Recover"
_G.buyItemSelected = ""
hash = function(num)
  
  return (num + 4) * 8
end

dehash = function(num)
  
  return num / 8 - 4
end

local listOfItems = {
Recover = {"Antidote", "Awakening", "Burn Heal", "Full Restore", "Hyper Potion", "Max Elixir", "Paralyze Heal", "Revive", "Potion", "Ice Heal"}
, 
Pokeball = {"Great Ball", "Premier Ball", "Ultra Ball", "Pokeball", "Repeat Ball", "Nest Ball", "Net Ball"}
, 
Competitive = {"Calcium", "Carbos", "HP Up", "Iron", "Mini Stat Reset", "Nature Stone", "PokeImprove", "Protein", "Stat Reset", "Zinc"}
, 
Evolution = {"Common Candy", "Dragon Scale", "Fire Stone", "Friendship Ribbon", "Leaf Stone", "Link Cable Stone", "Metal Coat", "Moon Stone", "Sinnoh Stone", "Thunder Stone", "Water Stone"}
}
local Math = require(game.ReplicatedStorage.Functions.Math)
local Moves = require(game.ReplicatedStorage.Information.Moves)
local Items = (require(game.ReplicatedStorage.Information.Items))
local up, down = nil, nil
repeat
  wait()
until game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character
alphabetize = function(t)
  
  local leng = 30
  local h = function(n)
    
    return n .. string.rep(" ", leng - #n):gsub(".", function(c)
      
      return c:byte()
    end
)
  end

  table.sort(t, function(a, b)
    
    do return h(a) < h(b) end
    -- DECOMPILER ERROR: 1 unprocessed JMP targets
  end
)
  return t
end

getListOfItems = function(Directory)
  
  local alphabeticalTable = {}
  local num = 1
  for _,strin in pairs(alphabetize(listOfItems[Directory])) do
    if strin ~= "Shinyfier" and strin ~= "Shinifier" then
      alphabeticalTable[num] = strin
      num = num + 1
    end
  end
  return alphabeticalTable
end

moneyUpdate = function(money)
  
  script.Parent.Parent.MoneyAmount.Text = "Money: $" .. dehash(money)
  script.Parent.Parent.MoneyAmount.DropShadow.Text = script.Parent.Parent.MoneyAmount.Text
end

moveUp = function(Table, Number, Directory)
  
  local safety = {}
  for i,v in ipairs(script.Parent:GetChildren()) do
    if v:IsA("TextButton") and v.Name ~= "Item8" then
      safety[string.sub(v.Name, 5, 5) + 1] = {v.ItemName.Text, v.ItemNumber.Text, v.ItemImage.Image, v.ItemImage.ImageColor3}
    end
  end
  for button,v in pairs(safety) do
    script.Parent:FindFirstChild("Item" .. button).ItemName.Text = v[1]
    script.Parent:FindFirstChild("Item" .. button).ItemName.DropShadow.Text = v[1]
    script.Parent:FindFirstChild("Item" .. button).ItemNumber.Text = v[2]
    script.Parent:FindFirstChild("Item" .. button).ItemNumber.DropShadow.Text = v[2]
    script.Parent:FindFirstChild("Item" .. button).ItemImage.Image = v[3]
    script.Parent:FindFirstChild("Item" .. button).ItemImage.ImageColor3 = v[4]
  end
  script.Parent.Item1.ItemName.Text = Table[Number - 1]
  script.Parent.Item1.ItemName.DropShadow.Text = Table[Number - 1]
  script.Parent.Item1.ItemNumber.Text = "$ " .. Items[Table[Number - 1]].Price
  script.Parent.Item1.ItemNumber.DropShadow.Text = script.Parent.Item1.ItemNumber.Text
  if _G.shopon ~= "TM" then
    script.Parent.Item1.ItemImage.Image = Items[script.Parent.Item1.ItemName.Text].Sprite
    script.Parent.Item1.ItemImage.ImageColor3 = Color3.new(1, 1, 1)
  else
    script.Parent.Item1.ItemImage.ImageColor3 = _G.Tables.TypeColors[Moves[script.Parent.Item1.ItemName.Text].Type]
    script.Parent.Item1.ItemImage.Image = "rbxgameasset://Images/Bag_TM_Normal_Sprite"
  end
  script.Parent.Item1.Visible = true
end

moveDown = function(Table, Number, Directory)
  
  local safety = {}
  for i,v in ipairs(script.Parent:GetChildren()) do
    if v:IsA("TextButton") and v.Name ~= "Item1" then
      safety[tonumber(string.sub(v.Name, 5, 5)) - 1] = {v.ItemName.Text, v.ItemNumber.Text, v.ItemImage.Image, v.ItemImage.ImageColor3}
    end
  end
  for button,v in pairs(safety) do
    script.Parent:FindFirstChild("Item" .. button).ItemName.Text = v[1]
    script.Parent:FindFirstChild("Item" .. button).ItemName.DropShadow.Text = v[1]
    script.Parent:FindFirstChild("Item" .. button).ItemNumber.Text = v[2]
    script.Parent:FindFirstChild("Item" .. button).ItemNumber.DropShadow.Text = v[2]
    script.Parent:FindFirstChild("Item" .. button).ItemImage.Image = v[3]
    script.Parent:FindFirstChild("Item" .. button).ItemImage.ImageColor3 = v[4]
  end
  script.Parent.Item8.ItemName.Text = Table[Number + 1]
  script.Parent.Item8.ItemName.DropShadow.Text = Table[Number + 1]
  script.Parent.Item8.ItemNumber.Text = "$ " .. Items[Table[Number + 1]].Price
  script.Parent.Item8.ItemNumber.DropShadow.Text = script.Parent.Item8.ItemNumber.Text
  if _G.shopon ~= "TM" then
    script.Parent.Item8.ItemImage.Image = Items[script.Parent.Item8.ItemName.Text].Sprite
    script.Parent.Item8.ItemImage.ImageColor3 = Color3.new(1, 1, 1)
  else
    script.Parent.Item8.ItemImage.ImageColor3 = _G.Tables.TypeColors[Moves[script.Parent.Item8.ItemName.Text].Type]
    script.Parent.Item8.ItemImage.Image = "rbxgameasset://Images/Bag_TM_Normal_Sprite"
  end
  script.Parent.Item8.Visible = true
end

local Sound = Instance.new("Sound", script.Parent)
Sound.SoundId = "http://www.roblox.com/asset/?id=287339370"
local Sound2 = Instance.new("Sound", script.Parent)
Sound2.SoundId = "http://www.roblox.com/asset/?id=318763788"
local Sound3 = Instance.new("Sound", script.Parent)
Sound3.SoundId = "http://www.roblox.com/asset/?id=142766373"
local Sound4 = Instance.new("Sound", script.Parent)
Sound4.SoundId = "http://www.roblox.com/asset/?id=134732869"
local buyEvent, textInput, yesButton, noButton = nil, nil, nil, nil
inputAmount = 1
local prompt = script.Parent.Parent.Prompt
for i,v in pairs(script.Parent:GetChildren()) do
  do
    if v:IsA("TextButton") then
      do
        v.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
  
  if buyEvent then
    buyEvent:disconnect()
  end
  if textInput then
    buyEvent:disconnect()
  end
  if yesButton then
    yesButton:disconnect()
  end
  if noButton then
    noButton:disconnect()
  end
  inputAmount = 1
  Sound2:Play()
  script.Parent.Parent.Bottom.ItemName.Text = v.ItemName.Text
  script.Parent.Parent.Bottom.ItemName.DropShadow.Text = v.ItemName.Text
  _G.buyItemSelected = v.ItemName.Text
  if _G.shopon ~= "TM" then
    script.Parent.Parent.Bottom.ItemDescription.DropShadow.Text = Items[_G.buyItemSelected].Description
    script.Parent.Parent.Bottom.ItemDescription.Text = Items[_G.buyItemSelected].Description
  else
    script.Parent.Parent.Bottom.ItemDescription.DropShadow.Text = Moves[_G.buyItemSelected].Desc
    script.Parent.Parent.Bottom.ItemDescription.Text = Moves[_G.buyItemSelected].Desc
  end
  script.Parent.Parent.Bottom:TweenPosition(UDim2.new(0, 0, 1, 0), "Out", "Bounce", 0.75, true)
  buyEvent = script.Parent.Parent.Bottom.Buy.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
    
    moneyUpdate(p.Money.Value)
    Sound2:Play()
    script.Parent.Parent.Bottom.Buy.Visible = false
    local itemString = _G.buyItemSelected
    if string.sub(#itemString, #itemString) ~= "s" then
      itemString = itemString .. "s"
    end
    prompt.Question.Text = "How many " .. itemString .. " do you want to purchase?"
    prompt.Question.DropShadow.Text = prompt.Question.Text
    prompt.Input.Text = "1"
    prompt.CurrentCost.Text = "Cost: $" .. Items[_G.buyItemSelected].Price
    prompt.CurrentCost.DropShadow.Text = "Cost: $" .. Items[_G.buyItemSelected].Price
    prompt.Yes.Visible = true
    prompt.No.Visible = true
    prompt.Input.FocusLost:connect(function()
      
      if type(tonumber(prompt.Input.Text)) == "number" and tonumber(prompt.Input.Text) > 0 then
        if string.len(tonumber(prompt.Input.Text)) < 4 then
          inputAmount = math.floor(tonumber(prompt.Input.Text) + 0.5)
          prompt.Input.Text = inputAmount
          prompt.CurrentCost.Text = "Cost: $" .. Items[_G.buyItemSelected].Price * inputAmount
          prompt.CurrentCost.DropShadow.Text = "Cost: $" .. Items[_G.buyItemSelected].Price * inputAmount
        else
          inputAmount = 999
          prompt.Input.Text = inputAmount
          prompt.CurrentCost.Text = "Cost: $" .. Items[_G.buyItemSelected].Price * inputAmount
          prompt.CurrentCost.DropShadow.Text = "Cost: $" .. Items[_G.buyItemSelected].Price * inputAmount
        end
      else
        prompt.Input.Text = inputAmount
      end
    end
)
    yesButton = prompt.Yes.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
      
      if Items[_G.buyItemSelected].Price * inputAmount <= dehash(p.Money.Value) then
        local done = nil
        do
          Sound2:Play()
          script.Parent.Parent.Close.Visible = false
          script.Parent.Parent.Loading.Picture.Rotation = 0
          script.Parent.Parent.Loading.Question.Text = "Buying " .. inputAmount .. " " .. _G.buyItemSelected .. " for $" .. Items[_G.buyItemSelected].Price * inputAmount .. ", please wait..."
          script.Parent.Parent.Loading:TweenPosition(UDim2.new(0, 0, 0, 0), "Out", "Quad", 0.5, true, function()
        
        prompt.Position = UDim2.new(0, 0, -2, 0)
      end
)
          spawn(function()
        
        while wait(0.04) and done == nil do
          script.Parent.Parent.Loading.Picture.Rotation = script.Parent.Parent.Loading.Picture.Rotation + 5
        end
      end
)
          wait(1)
          local check, moneyLeft = Math:ShopBuy(_G.buyItemSelected, inputAmount)
          repeat
            wait()
          until check ~= nil
          if check == true then
            print("Buying success")
            if p.Bag[_G.shopon]:FindFirstChild(_G.buyItemSelected) then
              Sound4:Play()
              local buying = Math:BuyItem(p.Bag[_G.shopon][_G.buyItemSelected], inputAmount)
              script.Parent.Parent.Loading:TweenPosition(UDim2.new(0, 0, -2, 0), "Out", "Quad", 0.5, true)
              done = true
              script.Parent.Parent.Close.Visible = true
              moneyUpdate(p.Money.Value)
            else
              do
                do
                  Sound4:Play()
                  do
                    local buying = Math:FuncAddItem(_G.buyItemSelected, p.Bag[_G.shopon], inputAmount)
                    script.Parent.Parent.Loading:TweenPosition(UDim2.new(0, 0, -2, 0), "Out", "Quad", 0.5, true)
                    script.Parent.Parent.Close.Visible = true
                    done = true
                    moneyUpdate(p.Money.Value)
                    script.Parent.Parent.Loading:TweenPosition(UDim2.new(0, 0, -2, 0), "Out", "Quad", 0.5, true)
                    script.Parent.Parent.Close.Visible = true
                    done = false
                  end
                  Sound3:Play()
                  script.Parent.Parent.Loading:TweenPosition(UDim2.new(0, 0, -2, 0), "Out", "Quad", 0.5, true)
                  script.Parent.Parent.Close.Visible = true
                end
              end
            end
          end
        end
      end
    end
)
    noButton = prompt.No.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
      
      Sound3:Play()
      prompt.Yes.Visible = false
      prompt.No.Visible = false
      prompt:TweenPosition(UDim2.new(0, 0, -2, 0), "Out", "Quad", 1, true, function()
        
        script.Parent.Parent.Bottom.Buy.Visible = true
      end
)
    end
)
    prompt:TweenPosition(UDim2.new(0, 0, 0, 0), "Out", "Bounce", 1, true)
  end
)
  script.Parent.Parent.Bottom.Buy.Visible = true
end
)
        v.MouseEnter:connect(function()
  
  v.ItemName.TextColor3 = Color3.new(1, 0, 0)
end
)
        v.MouseLeave:connect(function()
  
  v.ItemName.TextColor3 = Color3.new(0, 0.33333333333333, 1)
end
)
        -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC182: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_THEN_STMT

        -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC182: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_STMT

      end
    end
  end
end
hash = function(num)
  
  return (num + 4) * 8
end

dehash = function(num)
  
  return (num - 32) / 8
end

setUpGui = function(Directory)
  
  moneyUpdate(p.Money.Value)
  local Table = getListOfItems(Directory)
  local Amount = 0
  local downNumber = 8
  local upNumber = 1
  local Clicks = 0
  script.Parent.Parent.Bottom.Position = UDim2.new(0, 0, 0.75, 0)
  if up then
    up:disconnect()
  end
  if down then
    down:disconnect()
  end
  for i,v in ipairs(script.Parent:GetChildren()) do
    if v:IsA("TextButton") then
      v.Visible = false
    end
  end
  for i,v in pairs(Table) do
    Amount = Amount + 1
  end
  if Amount > 8 then
    Clicks = Amount - 8
    script.Parent.Scroller.Rectangle.Size = UDim2.new(0, 42, 0.25, 0)
    script.Parent.Scroller.Rectangle.Position = UDim2.new(0, 0, 0.15, 0)
  else
    Clicks = 0
    script.Parent.Scroller.Rectangle.Size = UDim2.new(0, 42, 0.25, 0)
    script.Parent.Scroller.Rectangle.Position = UDim2.new(0, 0, 0.15, 0)
  end
  for i,v in pairs(script.Parent:GetChildren()) do
    if v:IsA("TextButton") and Directory ~= "TM" and Table[tonumber(string.sub(v.Name, 5, 5))] ~= nil then
      v.ItemName.Text = Table[tonumber(string.sub(v.Name, 5, 5))]
      v.ItemName.TextColor3 = Color3.new(0, 0.33333333333333, 1)
      v.ItemNumber.Text = "$ " .. Items[Table[tonumber(string.sub(v.Name, 5, 5))]].Price
      v.ItemNumber.DropShadow.Text = v.ItemNumber.Text
      v.ItemName.DropShadow.Text = v.ItemName.Text
      v.ItemImage.ImageColor3 = Color3.new(1, 1, 1)
      v.ItemImage.Image = Items[Table[tonumber(string.sub(v.Name, 5, 5))]] and Items[Table[tonumber(string.sub(v.Name, 5, 5))]].Sprite or "rbxgameasset://Images/Bag_TM_Normal_Sprite"
      if _G.shopon == "TM" then
        v.ItemImage.ImageColor3 = _G.Tables.TypeColors[Moves[Table[tonumber(string.sub(v.Name, 5, 5))].Name].Type]
      end
      v.Visible = true
    end
  end
  down = script.Parent.Scroller.DownArrow.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
    
    if Table[downNumber + 1] ~= nil then
      Sound.Pitch = 1
      Sound:Play()
      moveDown(Table, downNumber, Directory)
      script.Parent.Scroller.Rectangle.Position = UDim2.new(0, 0, script.Parent.Scroller.Rectangle.Position.Y.Scale + 0.45 / Clicks, script.Parent.Scroller.Rectangle.Position.Y.Offset)
      upNumber = upNumber + 1
      downNumber = downNumber + 1
    end
  end
)
  up = script.Parent.Scroller.UpArrow.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
    
    if Table[upNumber - 1] ~= nil then
      Sound.Pitch = 0.8
      Sound:Play()
      moveUp(Table, upNumber, Directory)
      script.Parent.Scroller.Rectangle.Position = UDim2.new(0, 0, script.Parent.Scroller.Rectangle.Position.Y.Scale - 0.45 / Clicks, script.Parent.Scroller.Rectangle.Position.Y.Offset)
      upNumber = upNumber - 1
      downNumber = downNumber - 1
    end
  end
)
end

repeat
  wait()
until game.Players.LocalPlayer:WaitForChild("Bag"):WaitForChild("Recover")
for i,v in ipairs(script.Parent.Parent.Side:GetChildren()) do
  if v:IsA("TextButton") then
    v.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
  
  _G.shopon = v.Name
  script.Parent.Parent.SpecialShop:TweenPosition(UDim2.new(0, 0, -2, 0), "Out", "Quad", 0.5, true)
  script.Parent.Parent.Special.Title.Text = "Open Special Shop"
  script.Parent.Parent.Special.Title.DropShadow.Text = script.Parent.Parent.Special.Title.Text
  prompt:TweenPosition(UDim2.new(0, 0, -2, 0), "Out", "Bounce", 1.25, true)
  script.Parent.Parent.Side.Slider.Beep.Pitch = 1.1
  script.Parent.Parent.Side.Slider.Beep:Play()
  bp.Bottom.Buy.Visible = false
  setUpGui(v.Name)
end
)
  end
end
_G.Shop = function()
  
  moneyUpdate(p.Money.Value)
  setUpGui(_G.shopon)
  script.Parent.Parent.Position = UDim2.new(0.3, 0, -0.5, 0)
  script.Parent.Parent.Bottom.Buy.Visible = false
  script.Parent.Parent.SpecialShop.Position = UDim2.new(0, 0, -2, 0)
  script.Parent.Parent.Special.Title.Text = "Open Special Shop"
  script.Parent.Parent.Special.Title.DropShadow.Text = script.Parent.Parent.Special.Title.Text
  _G.buyItemSelected = ""
  script.Parent.Parent.Visible = true
  script.Parent.Parent.Parent.BlackScreen.Visible = true
  script.Parent.Parent:TweenPosition(UDim2.new(0.3, 0, 0.25, 0), "Out", "Bounce", 1, true)
end

repeat
  wait()
until game.Players.LocalPlayer
game.Players.LocalPlayer.PlayerGui:SetTopbarTransparency(0)
repeat
  repeat
    repeat
      repeat
        repeat
          wait()
        until game.Players.LocalPlayer.PlayerGui
      until _G.ready
    until _G.MovesReady
  until _G.SpritesReady
until _G.TablesReady

  wait()
until game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character
game.StarterGui:SetCoreGuiEnabled("Backpack", false)
game.StarterGui:SetCoreGuiEnabled("Health", false)
game.StarterGui:SetCoreGuiEnabled("PlayerList", false)
repeat
  wait()
until game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild("Humanoid")
human = game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.Humanoid
human.Changed:connect(function(prop)
  
  human.Jump = false
  human.Health = 100
  if prop == "Sit" and human.Sit == true then
    human.Sit = false
  end
end
)

================================================================================
-- FILE: StarterGui/GoogleAnalyticsHelper.local.lua
================================================================================

-- params : ...

local evt = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage"):WaitForChild("ReportGoogleAnalyticsEvent")
local category = "PlaceId-" .. tostring(game.PlaceId)
convertNewlinesToVertLine = function(stack)
  
  local rebuiltStack = ""
  local first = true
  for line in stack:gmatch("[^\r\n]+") do
    if first then
      rebuiltStack = line
      first = false
    else
      rebuiltStack = rebuiltStack .. " | " .. line
    end
  end
  return rebuiltStack
end

removePlayerNameFromStack = function(stack)
  
  stack = string.gsub(stack, "Players%.[^.]+%.", "Players.<Player>.")
  return stack
end

game:GetService("ScriptContext").Error:connect(function(message, stack)
  
  evt:FireServer(category, removePlayerNameFromStack(message) .. " | " .. removePlayerNameFromStack(stack), "none", 1)
end
)

-- params : ...

p = game.Players.LocalPlayer
bp = script.Parent.Parent
shopon = "Recover"
buyItemSelected = ""
hash = function(num)
  
  return (num + 4) * 8
end

dehash = function(num)
  
  return num / 8 - 4
end

local listOfItems = {Calcium = 1, Carbos = 1, ["HP Up"] = 1, Iron = 1, Protein = 1, Zinc = 1}
local Math = require(game.ReplicatedStorage.Functions.Math)
local Moves = require(game.ReplicatedStorage.Information.Moves)
local Items = (require(game.ReplicatedStorage.Information.Items))
local up, down = nil, nil
repeat
  wait()
until game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character
alphabetize = function(t)
  
  local leng = 30
  local h = function(n)
    
    return n .. string.rep(" ", leng - #n):gsub(".", function(c)
      
      return c:byte()
    end
)
  end

  table.sort(t, function(a, b)
    
    do return h(a) < h(b) end
    -- DECOMPILER ERROR: 1 unprocessed JMP targets
  end
)
  return t
end

getListOfItems = function(Directory)
  
  local alphabeticalTable = {}
  local num = 1
  local stuff = {}
  for i,v in pairs(listOfItems) do
    table.insert(stuff, i)
  end
  for item,strin in pairs(alphabetize(stuff)) do
    if strin ~= "Shinyfier" and strin ~= "Shinifier" then
      alphabeticalTable[num] = strin
      num = num + 1
    end
  end
  return alphabeticalTable
end

moneyUpdate = function(money)
  
  script.Parent.Parent.MoneyAmount.Text = "BP: " .. dehash(money)
  script.Parent.Parent.MoneyAmount.DropShadow.Text = script.Parent.Parent.MoneyAmount.Text
end

moveUp = function(Table, Number, Directory)
  
  local safety = {}
  for i,v in ipairs(script.Parent:GetChildren()) do
    if v:IsA("TextButton") and v.Name ~= "Item8" then
      safety[string.sub(v.Name, 5, 5) + 1] = {v.ItemName.Text, v.ItemNumber.Text, v.ItemImage.Image, v.ItemImage.ImageColor3}
    end
  end
  for button,v in pairs(safety) do
    script.Parent:FindFirstChild("Item" .. button).ItemName.Text = v[1]
    script.Parent:FindFirstChild("Item" .. button).ItemName.DropShadow.Text = v[1]
    script.Parent:FindFirstChild("Item" .. button).ItemNumber.Text = v[2]
    script.Parent:FindFirstChild("Item" .. button).ItemNumber.DropShadow.Text = v[2]
    script.Parent:FindFirstChild("Item" .. button).ItemImage.Image = v[3]
    script.Parent:FindFirstChild("Item" .. button).ItemImage.ImageColor3 = v[4]
  end
  script.Parent.Item1.ItemName.Text = Table[Number - 1]
  script.Parent.Item1.ItemName.DropShadow.Text = Table[Number - 1]
  script.Parent.Item1.ItemNumber.Text = listOfItems[Table[Number - 1]] .. " BP"
  script.Parent.Item1.ItemNumber.DropShadow.Text = script.Parent.Item1.ItemNumber.Text
  if shopon ~= "TM" then
    script.Parent.Item1.ItemImage.Image = Items[script.Parent.Item1.ItemName.Text].Sprite
    script.Parent.Item1.ItemImage.ImageColor3 = Color3.new(1, 1, 1)
  else
    script.Parent.Item1.ItemImage.ImageColor3 = _G.Tables.TypeColors[Moves[script.Parent.Item1.ItemName.Text].Type]
    script.Parent.Item1.ItemImage.Image = "rbxgameasset://Images/Bag_TM_Normal_Sprite"
  end
  script.Parent.Item1.Visible = true
end

moveDown = function(Table, Number, Directory)
  
  local safety = {}
  for i,v in ipairs(script.Parent:GetChildren()) do
    if v:IsA("TextButton") and v.Name ~= "Item1" then
      safety[tonumber(string.sub(v.Name, 5, 5)) - 1] = {v.ItemName.Text, v.ItemNumber.Text, v.ItemImage.Image, v.ItemImage.ImageColor3}
    end
  end
  for button,v in pairs(safety) do
    script.Parent:FindFirstChild("Item" .. button).ItemName.Text = v[1]
    script.Parent:FindFirstChild("Item" .. button).ItemName.DropShadow.Text = v[1]
    script.Parent:FindFirstChild("Item" .. button).ItemNumber.Text = v[2]
    script.Parent:FindFirstChild("Item" .. button).ItemNumber.DropShadow.Text = v[2]
    script.Parent:FindFirstChild("Item" .. button).ItemImage.Image = v[3]
    script.Parent:FindFirstChild("Item" .. button).ItemImage.ImageColor3 = v[4]
  end
  script.Parent.Item8.ItemName.Text = Table[Number + 1]
  script.Parent.Item8.ItemName.DropShadow.Text = Table[Number + 1]
  script.Parent.Item8.ItemNumber.Text = listOfItems[Table[Number + 1]] .. " BP"
  script.Parent.Item8.ItemNumber.DropShadow.Text = script.Parent.Item8.ItemNumber.Text
  if shopon ~= "TM" then
    script.Parent.Item8.ItemImage.Image = Items[script.Parent.Item8.ItemName.Text].Sprite
    script.Parent.Item8.ItemImage.ImageColor3 = Color3.new(1, 1, 1)
  else
    script.Parent.Item8.ItemImage.ImageColor3 = _G.Tables.TypeColors[Moves[script.Parent.Item8.ItemName.Text].Type]
    script.Parent.Item8.ItemImage.Image = "rbxgameasset://Images/Bag_TM_Normal_Sprite"
  end
  script.Parent.Item8.Visible = true
end

local Sound3 = Instance.new("Sound", script.Parent)
Sound3.SoundId = "http://www.roblox.com/asset/?id=142766373"
local Sound4 = Instance.new("Sound", script.Parent)
Sound4.SoundId = "http://www.roblox.com/asset/?id=134732869"
local buyEvent, textInput, yesButton, noButton = nil, nil, nil, nil
inputAmount = 1
local prompt = script.Parent.Parent.Prompt
for i,v in pairs(script.Parent:GetChildren()) do
  do
    if v:IsA("TextButton") then
      do
        v.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
  
  if buyEvent then
    buyEvent:disconnect()
  end
  if textInput then
    buyEvent:disconnect()
  end
  if yesButton then
    yesButton:disconnect()
  end
  if noButton then
    noButton:disconnect()
  end
  inputAmount = 1
  Sound2:Play()
  script.Parent.Parent.Bottom.ItemName.Text = v.ItemName.Text
  script.Parent.Parent.Bottom.ItemName.DropShadow.Text = v.ItemName.Text
  buyItemSelected = v.ItemName.Text
  if shopon ~= "TM" then
    script.Parent.Parent.Bottom.ItemDescription.DropShadow.Text = Items[buyItemSelected].Description
    script.Parent.Parent.Bottom.ItemDescription.Text = Items[buyItemSelected].Description
  else
    script.Parent.Parent.Bottom.ItemDescription.DropShadow.Text = Moves[buyItemSelected].Desc
    script.Parent.Parent.Bottom.ItemDescription.Text = Moves[buyItemSelected].Desc
  end
  script.Parent.Parent.Bottom:TweenPosition(UDim2.new(0, 0, 1, 0), "Out", "Quad", 0.15, true)
  buyEvent = script.Parent.Parent.Bottom.Buy.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
    
    moneyUpdate(p.BP.Value)
    Sound2:Play()
    script.Parent.Parent.Bottom.Buy.Visible = false
    local itemString = buyItemSelected
    if string.sub(#itemString, #itemString) ~= "s" then
      itemString = itemString .. "s"
    end
    prompt.Question.Text = "How many " .. itemString .. " do you want to purchase?"
    prompt.Question.DropShadow.Text = prompt.Question.Text
    prompt.Input.Text = "1"
    prompt.CurrentCost.Text = "Cost: " .. listOfItems[buyItemSelected] .. " BP"
    prompt.CurrentCost.DropShadow.Text = prompt.CurrentCost.Text
    prompt.Yes.Visible = true
    prompt.No.Visible = true
    prompt.Input.FocusLost:connect(function()
      
      if type(tonumber(prompt.Input.Text)) == "number" and tonumber(prompt.Input.Text) > 0 then
        if string.len(tonumber(prompt.Input.Text)) < 4 then
          inputAmount = math.floor(tonumber(prompt.Input.Text) + 0.5)
          prompt.Input.Text = inputAmount
          prompt.CurrentCost.Text = "Cost: " .. listOfItems[buyItemSelected] * inputAmount .. " BP"
          prompt.CurrentCost.DropShadow.Text = prompt.CurrentCost.Text
        else
          inputAmount = 999
          prompt.Input.Text = inputAmount
          prompt.CurrentCost.Text = "Cost: " .. listOfItems[buyItemSelected] * inputAmount .. " BP"
          prompt.CurrentCost.DropShadow.Text = prompt.CurrentCost.Text
        end
      else
        prompt.Input.Text = inputAmount
      end
    end
)
    yesButton = prompt.Yes.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
      
      if listOfItems[buyItemSelected] * inputAmount <= dehash(p.BP.Value) then
        local done = nil
        do
          Sound2:Play()
          script.Parent.Parent.Close.Visible = false
          script.Parent.Parent.Loading.Picture.Rotation = 0
          script.Parent.Parent.Loading.Question.Text = "Buying " .. inputAmount .. " " .. buyItemSelected .. " for " .. listOfItems[buyItemSelected] * inputAmount .. "BP, please wait..."
          script.Parent.Parent.Loading:TweenPosition(UDim2.new(0, 0, 0, 0), "Out", "Quad", 0.5, true, function()
        
        prompt.Position = UDim2.new(0, 0, -2, 0)
      end
)
          spawn(function()
        
        while wait(0.04) and done == nil do
          script.Parent.Parent.Loading.Picture.Rotation = script.Parent.Parent.Loading.Picture.Rotation + 5
        end
      end
)
          wait(1)
          local check, moneyLeft = Math:BPCheck(buyItemSelected, inputAmount)
          repeat
            wait()
          until check ~= nil
          if check == true then
            print("Buying success")
            if p.Bag.Competitive:FindFirstChild(buyItemSelected) then
              Sound4:Play()
              local buying = Math:BuyItem(p.Bag.Competitive[buyItemSelected], inputAmount)
              script.Parent.Parent.Loading:TweenPosition(UDim2.new(0, 0, -2, 0), "Out", "Quad", 0.5, true)
              done = true
              script.Parent.Parent.Close.Visible = true
              moneyUpdate(p.BP.Value)
            else
              do
                do
                  Sound4:Play()
                  do
                    local buying = Math:FuncAddItem(buyItemSelected, p.Bag.Competitive, inputAmount)
                    script.Parent.Parent.Loading:TweenPosition(UDim2.new(0, 0, -2, 0), "Out", "Quad", 0.5, true)
                    script.Parent.Parent.Close.Visible = true
                    done = true
                    moneyUpdate(p.BP.Value)
                    script.Parent.Parent.Loading:TweenPosition(UDim2.new(0, 0, -2, 0), "Out", "Quad", 0.5, true)
                    script.Parent.Parent.Close.Visible = true
                    done = false
                  end
                  Sound3:Play()
                  script.Parent.Parent.Loading:TweenPosition(UDim2.new(0, 0, -2, 0), "Out", "Quad", 0.5, true)
                  script.Parent.Parent.Close.Visible = true
                end
              end
            end
          end
        end
      end
    end
)
    noButton = prompt.No.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
      
      Sound3:Play()
      prompt.Yes.Visible = false
      prompt.No.Visible = false
      prompt:TweenPosition(UDim2.new(0, 0, -2, 0), "Out", "Quad", 1, true, function()
        
        script.Parent.Parent.Bottom.Buy.Visible = true

  script.Parent.Parent.Bottom.Buy.Visible = true

  return (num + 4) * 8

  for i,v in pairs(script.Parent:GetChildren()) do
    if v:IsA("TextButton") and Directory ~= "TM" and Table[tonumber(string.sub(v.Name, 5, 5))] ~= nil then
      v.ItemName.Text = Table[tonumber(string.sub(v.Name, 5, 5))]
      v.ItemName.TextColor3 = Color3.new(0, 0.33333333333333, 1)
      v.ItemNumber.Text = listOfItems[Table[tonumber(string.sub(v.Name, 5, 5))]] .. " BP"
      v.ItemNumber.DropShadow.Text = v.ItemNumber.Text
      v.ItemName.DropShadow.Text = v.ItemName.Text
      v.ItemImage.ImageColor3 = Color3.new(1, 1, 1)
      v.ItemImage.Image = Items[Table[tonumber(string.sub(v.Name, 5, 5))]] and Items[Table[tonumber(string.sub(v.Name, 5, 5))]].Sprite or "rbxgameasset://Images/Bag_TM_Normal_Sprite"
      if shopon == "TM" then
        v.ItemImage.ImageColor3 = _G.Tables.TypeColors[Moves[Table[tonumber(string.sub(v.Name, 5, 5))].Name].Type]
      end
      v.Visible = true
    end
  end
  down = script.Parent.Scroller.DownArrow.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
    
    if Table[downNumber + 1] ~= nil then
      Sound.Pitch = 1
      Sound:Play()
      moveDown(Table, downNumber, Directory)
      script.Parent.Scroller.Rectangle.Position = UDim2.new(0, 0, script.Parent.Scroller.Rectangle.Position.Y.Scale + 0.45 / Clicks, script.Parent.Scroller.Rectangle.Position.Y.Offset)
      upNumber = upNumber + 1
      downNumber = downNumber + 1
    end
  end
)
  up = script.Parent.Scroller.UpArrow.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
    
    if Table[upNumber - 1] ~= nil then
      Sound.Pitch = 0.8
      Sound:Play()
      moveUp(Table, upNumber, Directory)
      script.Parent.Scroller.Rectangle.Position = UDim2.new(0, 0, script.Parent.Scroller.Rectangle.Position.Y.Scale - 0.45 / Clicks, script.Parent.Scroller.Rectangle.Position.Y.Offset)
      upNumber = upNumber - 1
      downNumber = downNumber - 1
    end
  end
)
end

repeat
  wait()
until game.Players.LocalPlayer:WaitForChild("Bag"):WaitForChild("Recover")
for i,v in ipairs(script.Parent.Parent.Side:GetChildren()) do
  if v:IsA("TextButton") then
    v.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
  
  shopon = v.Name
  prompt:TweenPosition(UDim2.new(0, 0, -2, 0), "Out", "Bounce", 1.25, true)
  script.Parent.Parent.Side.Slider.Beep.Pitch = 1.1
  script.Parent.Parent.Side.Slider.Beep:Play()
  bp.Bottom.Buy.Visible = false
  setUpGui(v.Name)
end
)
  end
end
_G.BPItemShop = function()
  
  moneyUpdate(p.BP.Value)
  prompt.Position = UDim2.new(0, 0, -2, 0)
  setUpGui(shopon)
  script.Parent.Parent.Position = UDim2.new(0.3, 0, -0.5, 0)
  script.Parent.Parent.Bottom.Buy.Visible = false
  buyItemSelected = ""
  script.Parent.Parent.Visible = true
  script.Parent.Parent.Parent.BlackScreen.Visible = true
  script.Parent.Parent:TweenPosition(UDim2.new(0.3, 0, 0.25, 0), "Out", "Bounce", 1, true)
end

repeat
  wait()
until game.Players.LocalPlayer
local Sound = Instance.new("Sound", script.Parent)
Sound.SoundId = "http://www.roblox.com/asset/?id=290841329"
Sound.Name = "Beep"
script.Parent.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
  
  if script.Parent.Title.Text == "OPEN" then
    Sound:Play()
    Sound.Pitch = 0.75
    script.Parent.Title.Text = "CLOSE"
    script.Parent.Title.Title.Text = "CLOSE"
    script.Parent.ImageColor3 = Color3.new(1, 0, 0)
    script.Parent.Parent:TweenPosition(UDim2.new(-0.2, 0, 0, 0), "Out", "Bounce", 0.75, true)
  else
    if script.Parent.Title.Text == "CLOSE" then
      Sound:Play()
      Sound.Pitch = 1
      script.Parent.Title.Text = "OPEN"
      script.Parent.Title.Title.Text = "OPEN"
      script.Parent.ImageColor3 = Color3.new(0, 0.66666666666667, 0)
      script.Parent.Parent:TweenPosition(UDim2.new(0, 0, 0, 0), "Out", "Bounce", 0.75, true)
    end
  end
end
)

-- FILE: StarterGui/Main/BPTMShop/Background/BPShop.local.lua

-- params : ...

p = game.Players.LocalPlayer
bp = script.Parent.Parent
shopon = "TM"
buyItemSelected = ""
hash = function(num)
  
  return (num + 4) * 8
end

dehash = function(num)
  
  return num / 8 - 4
end

local listOfItems = {["Rock Polish"] = 16, Explosion = 48, ["Signal Beam"] = 16, ["Fire Punch"] = 32, ["Thunder Punch"] = 32, ["Ice Punch"] = 32, ["Zen Headbutt"] = 16, ["Drain Punch"] = 32, Superpower = 48, ["Dragon Claw"] = 48, ["Dream Eater"] = 16, ["Power-Up Punch"] = 16, Swagger = 16, ["Energy Ball"] = 48}
local Math = require(game.ReplicatedStorage.Functions.Math)
local Moves = require(game.ReplicatedStorage.Information.Moves)
local Items = (require(game.ReplicatedStorage.Information.Items))
local up, down = nil, nil
repeat
  wait()
until game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character
alphabetize = function(t)
  
  local leng = 30
  local h = function(n)
    
    return n .. string.rep(" ", leng - #n):gsub(".", function(c)
      
      return c:byte()
    end
)
  end

  table.sort(t, function(a, b)
    
    do return h(a) < h(b) end
    -- DECOMPILER ERROR: 1 unprocessed JMP targets
  end
)
  return t
end

getListOfItems = function(Directory)
  
  local alphabeticalTable = {}
  local num = 1
  local stuff = {}
  for i,v in pairs(listOfItems) do
    table.insert(stuff, i)
  end
  for item,strin in pairs(alphabetize(stuff)) do
    if p.Bag.TMs:FindFirstChild(strin) == nil then
      alphabeticalTable[num] = strin
      num = num + 1
    end
  end
  return alphabeticalTable
end

moneyUpdate = function(money)
  
  script.Parent.Parent.MoneyAmount.Text = "BP: " .. dehash(money)
  script.Parent.Parent.MoneyAmount.DropShadow.Text = script.Parent.Parent.MoneyAmount.Text
end

moveUp = function(Table, Number, Directory)
  
  local safety = {}
  for i,v in ipairs(script.Parent:GetChildren()) do
    if v:IsA("TextButton") and v.Name ~= "Item8" then
      safety[string.sub(v.Name, 5, 5) + 1] = {v.ItemName.Text, v.ItemNumber.Text, v.ItemImage.Image, v.ItemImage.ImageColor3}
    end
  end
  for button,v in pairs(safety) do
    script.Parent:FindFirstChild("Item" .. button).ItemName.Text = v[1]
    script.Parent:FindFirstChild("Item" .. button).ItemName.DropShadow.Text = v[1]
    script.Parent:FindFirstChild("Item" .. button).ItemNumber.Text = v[2]
    script.Parent:FindFirstChild("Item" .. button).ItemNumber.DropShadow.Text = v[2]
    script.Parent:FindFirstChild("Item" .. button).ItemImage.Image = v[3]
    script.Parent:FindFirstChild("Item" .. button).ItemImage.ImageColor3 = v[4]
  end
  script.Parent.Item1.ItemName.Text = Table[Number - 1]
  script.Parent.Item1.ItemName.DropShadow.Text = Table[Number - 1]
  script.Parent.Item1.ItemNumber.Text = listOfItems[Table[Number - 1]] .. " BP"
  script.Parent.Item1.ItemNumber.DropShadow.Text = script.Parent.Item1.ItemNumber.Text
  if shopon ~= "TM" then
    script.Parent.Item1.ItemImage.Image = Items[script.Parent.Item1.ItemName.Text].Sprite
    script.Parent.Item1.ItemImage.ImageColor3 = Color3.new(1, 1, 1)
  else
    script.Parent.Item1.ItemImage.ImageColor3 = _G.Tables.TypeColors[Moves[script.Parent.Item1.ItemName.Text].Type]
    script.Parent.Item1.ItemImage.Image = "rbxgameasset://Images/Bag_TM_Normal_Sprite"
  end
  script.Parent.Item1.Visible = true
end

moveDown = function(Table, Number, Directory)
  
  local safety = {}
  for i,v in ipairs(script.Parent:GetChildren()) do
    if v:IsA("TextButton") and v.Name ~= "Item1" then
      safety[tonumber(string.sub(v.Name, 5, 5)) - 1] = {v.ItemName.Text, v.ItemNumber.Text, v.ItemImage.Image, v.ItemImage.ImageColor3}
    end
  end
  for button,v in pairs(safety) do
    script.Parent:FindFirstChild("Item" .. button).ItemName.Text = v[1]
    script.Parent:FindFirstChild("Item" .. button).ItemName.DropShadow.Text = v[1]
    script.Parent:FindFirstChild("Item" .. button).ItemNumber.Text = v[2]
    script.Parent:FindFirstChild("Item" .. button).ItemNumber.DropShadow.Text = v[2]
    script.Parent:FindFirstChild("Item" .. button).ItemImage.Image = v[3]
    script.Parent:FindFirstChild("Item" .. button).ItemImage.ImageColor3 = v[4]
  end
  script.Parent.Item8.ItemName.Text = Table[Number + 1]
  script.Parent.Item8.ItemName.DropShadow.Text = Table[Number + 1]
  script.Parent.Item8.ItemNumber.Text = listOfItems[Table[Number + 1]] .. " BP"
  script.Parent.Item8.ItemNumber.DropShadow.Text = script.Parent.Item8.ItemNumber.Text
  if shopon ~= "TM" then
    script.Parent.Item8.ItemImage.Image = Items[script.Parent.Item8.ItemName.Text].Sprite
    script.Parent.Item8.ItemImage.ImageColor3 = Color3.new(1, 1, 1)
  else
    script.Parent.Item8.ItemImage.ImageColor3 = _G.Tables.TypeColors[Moves[script.Parent.Item8.ItemName.Text].Type]
    script.Parent.Item8.ItemImage.Image = "rbxgameasset://Images/Bag_TM_Normal_Sprite"
  end
  script.Parent.Item8.Visible = true
end

local Sound = Instance.new("Sound", script.Parent)
Sound.SoundId = "http://www.roblox.com/asset/?id=287339370"
local Sound2 = Instance.new("Sound", script.Parent)
Sound2.SoundId = "http://www.roblox.com/asset/?id=318763788"
local Sound3 = Instance.new("Sound", script.Parent)
Sound3.SoundId = "http://www.roblox.com/asset/?id=142766373"
local Sound4 = Instance.new("Sound", script.Parent)
Sound4.SoundId = "http://www.roblox.com/asset/?id=134732869"
local buyEvent, textInput, yesButton, noButton = nil, nil, nil, nil
inputAmount = 1
local prompt = script.Parent.Parent.Prompt
for i,v in pairs(script.Parent:GetChildren()) do
  do
    if v:IsA("TextButton") then
      do
        v.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
  
  if buyEvent then
    buyEvent:disconnect()
  end
  if yesButton then
    yesButton:disconnect()
  end
  if noButton then
    noButton:disconnect()
  end
  inputAmount = 1
  Sound2:Play()
  script.Parent.Parent.Bottom.ItemName.Text = v.ItemName.Text
  script.Parent.Parent.Bottom.ItemName.DropShadow.Text = v.ItemName.Text
  buyItemSelected = v.ItemName.Text
  if shopon ~= "TM" then
    script.Parent.Parent.Bottom.ItemDescription.DropShadow.Text = Items[buyItemSelected].Description
    script.Parent.Parent.Bottom.ItemDescription.Text = Items[buyItemSelected].Description
  else
    script.Parent.Parent.Bottom.ItemDescription.DropShadow.Text = Moves[buyItemSelected].Desc
    script.Parent.Parent.Bottom.ItemDescription.Text = Moves[buyItemSelected].Desc
  end
  script.Parent.Parent.Bottom:TweenPosition(UDim2.new(0, 0, 1, 0), "Out", "Quad", 0.15, true)
  buyEvent = script.Parent.Parent.Bottom.Buy.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
    
    moneyUpdate(p.BP.Value)
    Sound2:Play()
    script.Parent.Parent.Bottom.Buy.Visible = false
    local itemString = buyItemSelected
    prompt.Question.Text = "Do you want to buy " .. itemString .. "?"
    prompt.Question.DropShadow.Text = prompt.Question.Text
    prompt.CurrentCost.Text = "Cost: " .. listOfItems[buyItemSelected] .. " BP"
    prompt.CurrentCost.DropShadow.Text = prompt.CurrentCost.Text
    prompt.Yes.Visible = true
    prompt.No.Visible = true
    yesButton = prompt.Yes.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
      
      if listOfItems[buyItemSelected] * inputAmount <= dehash(p.BP.Value) then
        local done = nil
        do
          Sound2:Play()
          script.Parent.Parent.Close.Visible = false
          script.Parent.Parent.Loading.Picture.Rotation = 0
          script.Parent.Parent.Loading.Question.Text = "Buying " .. inputAmount .. " " .. buyItemSelected .. " for " .. listOfItems[buyItemSelected] * inputAmount .. "BP, please wait..."
          script.Parent.Parent.Loading:TweenPosition(UDim2.new(0, 0, 0, 0), "Out", "Quad", 0.5, true, function()
        
        prompt.Position = UDim2.new(0, 0, -2, 0)
      end
)
          spawn(function()
        
        while wait(0.04) and done == nil do
          script.Parent.Parent.Loading.Picture.Rotation = script.Parent.Parent.Loading.Picture.Rotation + 5
        end
      end
)
          wait(1)
          local check, moneyLeft = Math:BPTM(buyItemSelected, inputAmount)
          repeat
            wait()
          until check ~= nil
          if check == true then
            print("Buying success")
            if p.Bag.TMs:FindFirstChild(buyItemSelected) then
              Sound4:Play()
              local buying = Math:BuyItem(p.Bag.TMs[buyItemSelected], inputAmount)
              script.Parent.Parent.Loading:TweenPosition(UDim2.new(0, 0, -2, 0), "Out", "Quad", 0.5, true)
              done = true
              script.Parent.Parent.Close.Visible = true
              moneyUpdate(p.BP.Value)
            else
              do
                do
                  Sound4:Play()
                  do
                    local buying = Math:FuncAddItem(buyItemSelected, p.Bag.TMs, 1)
                    script.Parent.Parent.Loading:TweenPosition(UDim2.new(0, 0, -2, 0), "Out", "Quad", 0.5, true)
                    script.Parent.Parent.Close.Visible = true
                    done = true
                    moneyUpdate(p.BP.Value)
                    setUpGui(shopon)
                    script.Parent.Parent.Loading:TweenPosition(UDim2.new(0, 0, -2, 0), "Out", "Quad", 0.5, true)
                    script.Parent.Parent.Close.Visible = true
                    done = false
                  end
                  Sound3:Play()
                  script.Parent.Parent.Loading:TweenPosition(UDim2.new(0, 0, -2, 0), "Out", "Quad", 0.5, true)
                  script.Parent.Parent.Close.Visible = true
                end
              end
            end
          end
        end
      end
    end
)
    noButton = prompt.No.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
      
      Sound3:Play()
      prompt.Yes.Visible = false
      prompt.No.Visible = false
      prompt:TweenPosition(UDim2.new(0, 0, -2, 0), "Out", "Quad", 1, true, function()
        
        script.Parent.Parent.Bottom.Buy.Visible = true
      end
)
    end
)
    prompt:TweenPosition(UDim2.new(0, 0, 0, 0), "Out", "Bounce", 1, true)
  end
)
  script.Parent.Parent.Bottom.Buy.Visible = true
end
)
        v.MouseEnter:connect(function()
  
  v.ItemName.TextColor3 = Color3.new(1, 0, 0)
end
)
        v.MouseLeave:connect(function()
  
  v.ItemName.TextColor3 = Color3.new(0, 0.33333333333333, 1)
end
)
        -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC148: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_THEN_STMT

        -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC148: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_STMT

      end
    end
  end
end
hash = function(num)
  
  return (num + 4) * 8
end

dehash = function(num)
  
  return (num - 32) / 8
end

setUpGui = function(Directory)
  
  moneyUpdate(p.BP.Value)
  local Table = getListOfItems()
  local Amount = 0
  local downNumber = 8
  local upNumber = 1
  local Clicks = 0
  script.Parent.Parent.Bottom.Position = UDim2.new(0, 0, 0.75, 0)
  if up then
    up:disconnect()
  end
  if down then
    down:disconnect()
  end
  for i,v in ipairs(script.Parent:GetChildren()) do
    if v:IsA("TextButton") then
      v.Visible = false
    end
  end
  for i,v in pairs(Table) do
    Amount = Amount + 1
  end
  if Amount > 8 then
    Clicks = Amount - 8
    script.Parent.Scroller.Rectangle.Size = UDim2.new(0, 42, 0.25, 0)
    script.Parent.Scroller.Rectangle.Position = UDim2.new(0, 0, 0.15, 0)
  else
    Clicks = 0
    script.Parent.Scroller.Rectangle.Size = UDim2.new(0, 42, 0.25, 0)
    script.Parent.Scroller.Rectangle.Position = UDim2.new(0, 0, 0.15, 0)
  end
  for i,v in pairs(script.Parent:GetChildren()) do
    if v:IsA("TextButton") and Table[tonumber(string.sub(v.Name, 5, 5))] ~= nil then
      v.ItemName.Text = Table[tonumber(string.sub(v.Name, 5, 5))]
      v.ItemName.TextColor3 = Color3.new(0, 0.33333333333333, 1)
      v.ItemNumber.Text = listOfItems[Table[tonumber(string.sub(v.Name, 5, 5))]] .. " BP"
      v.ItemNumber.DropShadow.Text = v.ItemNumber.Text
      v.ItemName.DropShadow.Text = v.ItemName.Text
      v.ItemImage.ImageColor3 = Color3.new(1, 1, 1)
      v.ItemImage.Image = Items[Table[tonumber(string.sub(v.Name, 5, 5))]] and Items[Table[tonumber(string.sub(v.Name, 5, 5))]].Sprite or "rbxgameasset://Images/Bag_TM_Normal_Sprite"
      if shopon == "TM" then
        v.ItemImage.ImageColor3 = _G.Tables.TypeColors[Moves[Table[tonumber(string.sub(v.Name, 5, 5))]].Type]
      end
      v.Visible = true
    end
  end
  down = script.Parent.Scroller.DownArrow.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
    
    if Table[downNumber + 1] ~= nil then
      Sound.Pitch = 1
      Sound:Play()
      moveDown(Table, downNumber, Directory)
      script.Parent.Scroller.Rectangle.Position = UDim2.new(0, 0, script.Parent.Scroller.Rectangle.Position.Y.Scale + 0.45 / Clicks, script.Parent.Scroller.Rectangle.Position.Y.Offset)
      upNumber = upNumber + 1
      downNumber = downNumber + 1
    end
  end
)
  up = script.Parent.Scroller.UpArrow.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
    
    if Table[upNumber - 1] ~= nil then
      Sound.Pitch = 0.8
      Sound:Play()
      moveUp(Table, upNumber, Directory)
      script.Parent.Scroller.Rectangle.Position = UDim2.new(0, 0, script.Parent.Scroller.Rectangle.Position.Y.Scale - 0.45 / Clicks, script.Parent.Scroller.Rectangle.Position.Y.Offset)
      upNumber = upNumber - 1
      downNumber = downNumber - 1
    end
  end
)
end

repeat
  wait()
until game.Players.LocalPlayer:WaitForChild("Bag"):WaitForChild("Recover")
for i,v in ipairs(script.Parent.Parent.Side:GetChildren()) do
  if v:IsA("TextButton") then
    v.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
  
  shopon = v.Name
  prompt:TweenPosition(UDim2.new(0, 0, -2, 0), "Out", "Bounce", 1.25, true)
  script.Parent.Parent.Side.Slider.Beep.Pitch = 1.1

  bp.Bottom.Buy.Visible = false
  setUpGui(v.Name)
end
)
  end
end

end

-- FILE: StarterGui/Main/Backpack/Background/ItemsScript.local.lua

-- params : ...

p = game.Players.LocalPlayer
bp = script.Parent.Parent
_G.backpackon = "Recover"
_G.ItemSelected = ""
local stats = {"HP", "Atk", "Def", "SpA", "SpD", "Speed"}
local Math = require(game.ReplicatedStorage.Functions.Math)
local nStats = require(game.ReplicatedStorage.Information.NatureStats)
local Moves = require(game.ReplicatedStorage.Information.Moves)
local Items = require(game.ReplicatedStorage.Information.Items)
local Battle = require(game.ReplicatedStorage.Functions.Battle)
local TMList = require(game.ReplicatedStorage.Information.PokemonTMs)
local Sprites = {Inactive = "http://www.roblox.com/asset/?id=125060098", Active = "http://www.roblox.com/asset/?id=125060039"}
local up, down = nil, nil
Natures = {"Hardy", "Lonely", "Brave", "Adamant", "Naughty", "Bold", "Docile", "Relaxed", "Impish", "Lax", "Timid", "Hasty", "Serious", "Jolly", "Naive", "Modest", "Mild", "Quiet", "Bashful", "Rash", "Calm", "Gentle", "Sassy", "Careful", "Quirky"}
HPcalc = function(poke)
  
  return (poke.IV.HPIV.Value + 2 * _G.Pokemon[poke.Name].Stats.HP + poke.EV.HPEV.Value / 4) * poke.Lvl.Value / 100 + 10 + poke.Lvl.Value
end

otherstatcalc = function(poke, basestat)
  
  return ((poke.IV[basestat .. "IV"].Value + 2 * _G.Pokemon[poke.Name].Stats[basestat] + poke.EV[basestat .. "EV"].Value / 4) * poke.Lvl.Value / 100 + 5) * determinenature(basestat, poke.Nature.Value)
end

getTMNumber = function(move)
  
  for i,v in pairs(TMList) do
    if v == move then
      return i
    end
  end
  return false
end

repeat
  wait()
until game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character
turninactive = function(party)
  
  for i,v in ipairs(party:GetChildren()) do
    if v:FindFirstChild("active") then
      v:FindFirstChild("active").Image = Sprites.Inactive
      if v.Status.Text ~= "FNT" then
        v.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.new(0.60392156862745, 0.73725490196078, 0.85098039215686)
      else
        v.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.new(0.35294117647059, 0, 0)
      end
    end
  end
end

statredo = function(poke)
  
  local chp = poke.CurrentHP.Value
  for i,v in ipairs(stats) do
    if v == "HP" then
      do
        do
          if poke.Stats.HPStat.Value ~= math.floor(HPcalc(poke) + 0.5) then
            local subtract = poke.Stats.HPStat.Value - chp
            Math:Change(poke.CurrentHP, math.max(1, poke.CurrentHP.Value - subtract))
            Math:Change(poke.Status, "")
          end
          Math:Change(poke.Stats.HPStat, HPcalc(poke))
          Math:Change(poke.Stats[v .. "Stat"], otherstatcalc(poke, v))
          -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC61: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out DO_STMT

          -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC61: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_THEN_STMT

          -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC61: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_STMT

        end
      end
    end
  end
end

determinenature = function(stat, nature)
  
  if nStats[stat .. " Boost"][nature] then
    return 1.1
  else
    if nStats[stat .. " Down"][nature] then
      return 0.9
    else
      return 1
    end
  end
end

informative = function(str)
  
  spawn(function()
    
    p.PlayerGui.Main.MessageThing.Text = str
    for i = 1, 0, -0.1 do
      p.PlayerGui.Main.MessageThing.TextTransparency = i
      p.PlayerGui.Main.MessageThing.TextStrokeTransparency = i
      wait()
    end
    wait(0.45)
    for i = 0, 1, 0.1 do
      p.PlayerGui.Main.MessageThing.TextTransparency = i
      p.PlayerGui.Main.MessageThing.TextStrokeTransparency = i
      wait()
    end
  end
)
end

findhealthbarsize = function(curhealth, maxhealth)
  
  local multi = curhealth / maxhealth
  return 0.8 * multi
end

naturechange = function(poke)
  
  local currentnature = poke.Nature.Value
  local newnature = function()
    
    return Natures[math.random(1, #Natures)]
  end

  local natooooor = newnature()
  repeat
    wait()
    natooooor = newnature()
  until natooooor ~= currentnature
  Math:Change(poke.Nature, natooooor)
  return poke.Nature.Value
end

checkevs = function(poke)
  
  local num = 0
  for i,v in ipairs(poke.EV:GetChildren()) do
    num = num + v.Value
  end
  return num
end

changevisible = function(thing, isa, bool)
  
  for i,v in ipairs(thing:GetChildren()) do
    if v:IsA(isa) then
      v.Visible = bool
    end
  end
end

dcfenv = function(str)
  
  for i = 1, 6 do
    if getfenv()[str .. i] ~= nil then
      getfenv()[str .. i]:disconnect()
    end
  end
end

local click = Instance.new("Sound", script.Parent)
click.SoundId = "http://www.roblox.com/asset/?id=290841329"
local beep = Instance.new("Sound", script.Parent)
beep.SoundId = "http://www.roblox.com/asset/?id=318763788"
boxupdate = function(pokemon, box, Party, pokeout, battle, var)
  
  blck = game.Players.LocalPlayer.PlayerGui.Main.BlackScreen
  pokemonderp = pokemon
  local poke = _G.Pokemon[pokemon.Name]
  if pokemon.Status.Value ~= "Faint" then
    box.ImageColor3 = Color3.new(0.60392156862745, 0.73725490196078, 0.85098039215686)
  else
    box.ImageColor3 = Color3.new(0.35294117647059, 0, 0)
  end
  if not pokemon:FindFirstChild("Nickname") or not pokemon:FindFirstChild("Nickname").Value then
    box.PokeName.Text = pokemon.Name
    box.PokeName.DropShadow.Text = box.PokeName.Text
    box.PokemonSprite.Image = poke.Sprites.Mini
    box.Gender.Image = _G.Sprites.Symbols[pokemon.Gender.Value]
    box.Level.Text = "Lv: " .. pokemon.Lvl.Value
    box.Level.DropShadow.Text = box.Level.Text
    box.HPLabel.Text = pokemon.CurrentHP.Value .. "/     " .. pokemon.Stats.HPStat.Value
    box.HPLabel.DropShadow.Text = box.HPLabel.Text
    box.Health.Size = UDim2.new(findhealthbarsize(pokemon.CurrentHP.Value, pokemon.Stats.HPStat.Value), 0, 0.1, 0)
    if box.Health.Size.X.Scale > 0.4 then
      box.Health.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.new(0.66666666666667, 1, 0.49803921568627)
    else
      if box.Health.Size.X.Scale <= 0.4 and box.Health.Size.X.Scale >= 0.2 then
        box.Health.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.new(0.8, 0.8, 0)
      else
        if box.Health.Size.X.Scale < 0.2 and box.Health.Size.X.Scale > 0 then
          box.Health.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.new(0.66666666666667, 0, 0)
        end
      end
    end
    if pokemon.Status.Value ~= "" then
      box.Status.Text = _G.Tables.Status[pokemon.Status.Value][1]
      box.Status.BackgroundColor3 = _G.Tables.Status[pokemon.Status.Value][2]
      box.Status.Visible = true
    else
      box.Status.Text = ""
      box.Status.Visible = false
    end
    if pokemon.Status.Value == "Faint" then
      box.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.new(0.35294117647059, 0, 0)
    end
    getfenv()["Event" .. pokemon.PartyPosition.Value] = box.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
    
    beep:Play()
    pokemonderp = pokemon
    turninactive(partyscreen)
    box.active.Image = Sprites.Active
    blck.Visible = p.InBattle.Value
    blck.Visible = true
    p.PlayerGui.Main.Party.Visible = false
    chosenpokemon = pokemon
  end
)
    box.Visible = true
  end
end

TMboxupdate = function(pokemon, box, Party, pokeout, battle, item)
  
  blck = game.Players.LocalPlayer.PlayerGui.Main.BlackScreen
  pokemonderp = pokemon
  local poke = _G.Pokemon[pokemon.Name]
  if pokemon.Status.Value ~= "Faint" then
    box.ImageColor3 = Color3.new(0.60392156862745, 0.73725490196078, 0.85098039215686)
  else
    box.ImageColor3 = Color3.new(0.35294117647059, 0, 0)
  end
  box.PokeName.Text = learnablecheck(pokemon, item)
  box.PokeName.DropShadow.Text = box.PokeName.Text
  box.PokemonSprite.Image = poke.Sprites.Mini
  box.Gender.Image = _G.Sprites.Symbols[pokemon.Gender.Value]
  box.Level.Text = "Lv: " .. pokemon.Lvl.Value
  box.Level.DropShadow.Text = box.Level.Text
  box.HPLabel.Text = pokemon.CurrentHP.Value .. "/     " .. pokemon.Stats.HPStat.Value
  box.HPLabel.DropShadow.Text = box.HPLabel.Text
  box.Health.Size = UDim2.new(findhealthbarsize(pokemon.CurrentHP.Value, pokemon.Stats.HPStat.Value), 0, 0.1, 0)
  if box.Health.Size.X.Scale > 0.4 then
    box.Health.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.new(0.66666666666667, 1, 0.49803921568627)
  else
    if box.Health.Size.X.Scale <= 0.4 and box.Health.Size.X.Scale >= 0.2 then
      box.Health.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.new(0.8, 0.8, 0)
    else
      if box.Health.Size.X.Scale < 0.2 and box.Health.Size.X.Scale > 0 then
        box.Health.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.new(0.66666666666667, 0, 0)
      end
    end
  end
  if pokemon.Status.Value ~= "" then
    box.Status.Text = _G.Tables.Status[pokemon.Status.Value][1]
    box.Status.BackgroundColor3 = _G.Tables.Status[pokemon.Status.Value][2]
    box.Status.Visible = true
  else
    box.Status.Text = ""
    box.Status.Visible = false
  end
  if pokemon.Status.Value == "Faint" then
    box.ImageColor3 = Color3.new(0.35294117647059, 0, 0)
  end
  getfenv()["Event" .. pokemon.PartyPosition.Value] = box.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
    
    if box.PokeName.Text == "Able" then
      beep:Play()
      pokemonderp = pokemon
      turninactive(partyscreen)
      dcfenv("Event")
      chosenpokemon = pokemon
    end
  end
)
  box.Visible = true
end

EvolvePartyItem = function(item)
  
  chosenpokemon = nil
  partyscreen = game.Players.LocalPlayer.PlayerGui.Main.ItemParty
  if item == "Rare Candy" then
    partyscreen.Bottom.dialog.Text = "Choose a Pokemon to level up with " .. item .. "."
    partyscreen.Bottom.dialog.DropShadow.Text = partyscreen.Bottom.dialog.Text
  else
    if item == "Shinifer" then
      partyscreen.Bottom.dialog.Text = "Choose a Pokemon to convert into a Shiny"
      partyscreen.Bottom.dialog.DropShadow.Text = partyscreen.Bottom.dialog.Text
    else
      if item == "Common Candy" then
        partyscreen.Bottom.dialog.Text = "Choose a Pokemon to level down"
        partyscreen.Bottom.dialog.DropShadow.Text = partyscreen.Bottom.dialog.Text
      else
        partyscreen.Bottom.dialog.Text = "Choose a Pokemon to evolve with " .. item .. "."
        partyscreen.Bottom.dialog.DropShadow.Text = partyscreen.Bottom.dialog.Text
      end
    end
  end
  derp = true
  dcfenv("Event")
  if bigcancel ~= nil then
    bigcancel:disconnect()
  end
  blck = game.Players.LocalPlayer.PlayerGui.Main.BlackScreen
  party = game.Players.LocalPlayer.PokemonParty
  turninactive(partyscreen)
  for i,v in ipairs(partyscreen:GetChildren()) do
    if v:IsA("ImageButton") then
      v.Visible = false
    end
  end
  for i,v in pairs(party:GetChildren()) do
    boxupdate(v, partyscreen["Pokemon" .. v.PartyPosition.Value], party, pokeout, battle)
  end
  bigcancel = partyscreen.Bottom.BigCancel.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
    
    dcfenv("Event")
    partyscreen.Visible = false
    derp = false
    val = true
    chosenpokemon = "Cancel"
  end
)
  partyscreen.Bottom.BigCancel.Visible = true
  partyscreen.Title.Visible = true
  partyscreen.Bottom.Visible = true
  partyscreen.Visible = true
  coroutine.resume(coroutine.create(function()
    
    repeat
      wait()
    until chosenpokemon ~= nil
    blck.Visible = p.InBattle.Value
    game.Players.LocalPlayer.PlayerGui.Main.BattleScene.Visible = p.InBattle.Value
    partyscreen.Visible = false
    if p.InBattle.Value == false then
      p.Character.Humanoid.WalkSpeed = 16
    end
  end
))
end

PartyItem = function(item)
  
  chosenpokemon = nil
  partyscreen = game.Players.LocalPlayer.PlayerGui.Main.ItemParty
  partyscreen.Bottom.dialog.Text = "Choose a Pokemon to heal with " .. item .. "."
  partyscreen.Bottom.dialog.DropShadow.Text = partyscreen.Bottom.dialog.Text
  derp = true
  dcfenv("Event")
  if bigcancel ~= nil then
    bigcancel:disconnect()
  end
  blck = game.Players.LocalPlayer.PlayerGui.Main.BlackScreen
  party = game.Players.LocalPlayer.PokemonParty
  turninactive(partyscreen)
  for i,v in ipairs(partyscreen:GetChildren()) do
    if v:IsA("ImageButton") then
      v.Visible = false
    end
  end
  for i,v in pairs(party:GetChildren()) do
    boxupdate(v, partyscreen["Pokemon" .. v.PartyPosition.Value], party, pokeout, battle)
  end
  bigcancel = partyscreen.Bottom.BigCancel.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
    
    dcfenv("Event")
    partyscreen.Visible = false
    derp = false
    val = true
    chosenpokemon = "Cancel"
  end
)
  partyscreen.Bottom.BigCancel.Visible = true
  partyscreen.Title.Visible = true
  partyscreen.Bottom.Visible = true
  partyscreen.Visible = true
  coroutine.resume(coroutine.create(function()
    
    repeat
      wait()
    until chosenpokemon ~= nil
    if chosenpokemon == "Cancel" then
      blck.Visible = false
    end
    partyscreen.Visible = false
    if p.InBattle.Value == false then
      p.Character.Humanoid.WalkSpeed = 16
    end
  end
))
end

      p.Character.Humanoid.WalkSpeed = 16
    end
  end
))
end

alphabetize = function(t)
  
  local leng = 30
  local h = function(n)
    
    return n .. string.rep(" ", leng - #n):gsub(".", function(c)
      
      return c:byte()
    end
)
  end

  table.sort(t, function(a, b)
    
    do return h(a.Name) < h(b.Name) end
    -- DECOMPILER ERROR: 1 unprocessed JMP targets
  end
)
  return t
end

getListOfItems = function(Directory)
  
  local alphabeticalTable = {}
  local num = 1
  for _,strin in pairs(alphabetize(Directory:GetChildren())) do
    if strin.Name ~= "Shinyfier" and strin.Name ~= "Shinifier" then
      alphabeticalTable[num] = strin
      num = num + 1
    end
  end
  return alphabeticalTable
end

moveUp = function(Table, Number, Directory)
  
  local safety = {}
  for i,v in ipairs(script.Parent:GetChildren()) do
    if v:IsA("TextButton") and v.Name ~= "Item8" then
      safety[string.sub(v.Name, 5, 5) + 1] = {v.ItemName.Text, v.ItemNumber.Text, v.ItemImage.Image, v.ItemImage.ImageColor3}
    end
  end
  for button,v in pairs(safety) do
    script.Parent:FindFirstChild("Item" .. button).ItemName.Text = v[1]
    script.Parent:FindFirstChild("Item" .. button).ItemName.DropShadow.Text = v[1]
    if Directory ~= "TMs" then
      script.Parent:FindFirstChild("Item" .. button).ItemNumber.Text = v[2]
    else
      script.Parent:FindFirstChild("Item" .. button).ItemNumber.Text = ""
    end
    script.Parent:FindFirstChild("Item" .. button).ItemImage.Image = v[3]
    script.Parent:FindFirstChild("Item" .. button).ItemImage.ImageColor3 = v[4]
  end
  script.Parent.Item1.ItemName.Text = Table[Number - 1].Name
  script.Parent.Item1.ItemName.DropShadow.Text = Table[Number - 1].Name
  if script.Parent.Item1.ItemName.Text == "Rare Candy" then
    script.Parent.Item1.ItemNumber.Text = "x " .. dehash(Directory:FindFirstChild(Table[Number - 1].Name).Value)
  else
    if script.Parent.Item1.ItemName.Text == "Exp. Share" then
      if p.Bag.Evolution["Exp. Share"].Value == false then
        script.Parent.Item1.ItemNumber.Text = "Of"
      else
        script.Parent.Item1.ItemNumber.Text = "On"
      end
    else
      if _G.backpackon ~= "TMs" then
        script.Parent.Item1.ItemNumber.Text = "x " .. Directory:FindFirstChild(Table[Number - 1].Name).Value
      else
        script.Parent.Item1.ItemNumber.Text = ""
      end
    end
  end
  if _G.backpackon ~= "TMs" then
    script.Parent.Item1.ItemImage.Image = Items[script.Parent.Item1.ItemName.Text].Sprite
    script.Parent.Item1.ItemImage.ImageColor3 = Color3.new(1, 1, 1)
  else
    script.Parent.Item1.ItemImage.ImageColor3 = _G.Tables.TypeColors[Moves[script.Parent.Item1.ItemName.Text].Type]
    script.Parent.Item1.ItemImage.Image = "rbxgameasset://Images/Bag_TM_Normal_Sprite"
  end
  script.Parent.Item1.Visible = true
end

moveDown = function(Table, Number, Directory)
  
  local safety = {}
  for i,v in ipairs(script.Parent:GetChildren()) do
    if v:IsA("TextButton") and v.Name ~= "Item1" then
      safety[tonumber(string.sub(v.Name, 5, 5)) - 1] = {v.ItemName.Text, v.ItemNumber.Text, v.ItemImage.Image, v.ItemImage.ImageColor3}
    end
  end
  for button,v in pairs(safety) do
    script.Parent:FindFirstChild("Item" .. button).ItemName.Text = v[1]
    script.Parent:FindFirstChild("Item" .. button).ItemName.DropShadow.Text = v[1]
    if Directory ~= "TMs" then
      script.Parent:FindFirstChild("Item" .. button).ItemNumber.Text = v[2]
    else
      script.Parent:FindFirstChild("Item" .. button).ItemNumber.Text = ""
    end
    script.Parent:FindFirstChild("Item" .. button).ItemImage.Image = v[3]
    script.Parent:FindFirstChild("Item" .. button).ItemImage.ImageColor3 = v[4]
  end
  script.Parent.Item8.ItemName.Text = Table[Number + 1].Name
  script.Parent.Item8.ItemName.DropShadow.Text = Table[Number + 1].Name
  if script.Parent.Item8.ItemName.Text == "Rare Candy" then
    script.Parent.Item8.ItemNumber.Text = "x " .. dehash(Directory:FindFirstChild(Table[Number + 1].Name).Value)
  else
    if script.Parent.Item8.ItemName.Text == "Exp. Share" then
      if p.Bag.Evolution["Exp. Share"].Value == false then
        script.Parent.Item8.ItemNumber.Text = "Off"
      else
        script.Parent.Item8.ItemNumber.Text = "On"
      end
    else
      if _G.backpackon ~= "TMs" then
        script.Parent.Item1.ItemImage.Image = Items[script.Parent.Item1.ItemName.Text].Sprite
        script.Parent.Item1.ItemImage.ImageColor3 = Color3.new(1, 1, 1)
      else
        script.Parent.Item1.ItemImage.ImageColor3 = _G.Tables.TypeColors[Moves[script.Parent.Item1.ItemName.Text].Type]
        script.Parent.Item1.ItemImage.Image = "rbxgameasset://Images/Bag_TM_Normal_Sprite"
      end
    end
  end
  if _G.backpackon ~= "TMs" then
    script.Parent.Item8.ItemImage.Image = Items[script.Parent.Item8.ItemName.Text].Sprite
    script.Parent.Item8.ItemImage.ImageColor3 = Color3.new(1, 1, 1)
  else
    script.Parent.Item8.ItemImage.ImageColor3 = _G.Tables.TypeColors[Moves[script.Parent.Item8.ItemName.Text].Type]
    script.Parent.Item8.ItemImage.Image = "rbxgameasset://Images/Bag_TM_Normal_Sprite"
  end
  script.Parent.Item8.Visible = true
end

findboxnumber = function()
  
  for i,v in ipairs(p.PC:GetChildren()) do
    if #v:GetChildren() < 60 then
      return true
    end
  end
  return false
end

scrolltext = function(gui, text, thing)
  
  scrollytext = true
  for i = 1, #text do
    gui.Text = string.sub(text, 1, i)
    gui.DropShadow.Text = gui.Text
    wait(0.03)
  end
  wait(1)
  scrollytext = false
end

scrollytext = false
learnablecheck = function(cfg, move)
  
  if cfg.Moves:FindFirstChild(move) then
    return "Already Learned"
  end
  for i,v in pairs(TMList[cfg.Name].TM) do
    if v == move then
      return "Able"
    end
  end
  return "Not Able"
end

TMPartyItem = function(item)
  
  chosenpokemon = nil
  partyscreen.Bottom.dialog.Text = "Choose a Pokemon to learn " .. item .. "."
  partyscreen.Bottom.dialog.DropShadow.Text = partyscreen.Bottom.dialog.Text
  derp = true
  dcfenv("Event")
  if bigcancel ~= nil then
    bigcancel:disconnect()
  end
  blck = game.Players.LocalPlayer.PlayerGui.Main.BlackScreen
  party = game.Players.LocalPlayer.PokemonParty
  turninactive(partyscreen)
  for i,v in ipairs(partyscreen:GetChildren()) do
    if v:IsA("ImageButton") then
      v.Visible = false
    end
  end
  for i,v in pairs(party:GetChildren()) do
    TMboxupdate(v, partyscreen["Pokemon" .. v.PartyPosition.Value], party, pokeout, battle, item)
  end
  bigcancel = partyscreen.Bottom.BigCancel.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
    
    dcfenv("Event")
    partyscreen.Bottom.Move1.Visible = false
    partyscreen.Bottom.Move2.Visible = false
    partyscreen.Bottom.Move3.Visible = false
    partyscreen.Bottom.Move4.Visible = false
    partyscreen.Visible = false
    derp = false
    val = true
    blck.Visible = false
    for wow,zzz in ipairs(partyscreen.Bottom:GetChildren()) do
      if getfenv()["DeleteDerp" .. zzz.Name] then
        getfenv()["DeleteDerp" .. zzz.Name]:disconnect()
      end
    end
    chosenpokemon = "Cancel"
  end
)
  blck.Visible = true
  partyscreen.Bottom.BigCancel.Visible = true
  partyscreen.Title.Visible = true
  partyscreen.Bottom.Visible = true
  partyscreen.Visible = true
end

for i,v in pairs(script.Parent:GetChildren()) do
  do
    if v:IsA("TextButton") then
      do
        v.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
  
  bp.Bottom.Use.Visible = false
  chosenpokemon = nil
  val = false
  if _G.useevent then
    _G.useevent:disconnect()
  end
  -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC70: Unhandled construct in 'MakeBoolean' P1

  if _G.backpackon == "Pokeball" and p.Bag.Pokeball:FindFirstChild(v.ItemName.Text) and #p.PokemonParty:GetChildren() > 0 and p.Bag.Pokeball[v.ItemName.Text].Value > 0 then
    if _G.InWild == true and p.InBattle.Value == true and (#p.PokemonParty:GetChildren() < 6 or findboxnumber() == true) then
      bp.Bottom.Use.Visible = true
      bp.Bottom.Full.Visible = false
      _G.useevent = bp.Bottom.Use.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
    
    bp.Visible = false
    p.PlayerGui.Main.BattleScene.Visible = true
    _G.ItemFunctions.Catch(v.ItemName.Text, _G.WildPokemon)
    _G.ItemCool = v.ItemName.Text
    _G.useevent:disconnect()
  end
)
    else
      if _G.InWild == true then
        bp.Bottom.Full.Visible = true
        bp.Bottom.Parent.Use.Visible = false
      end
    end
  end
  bp.Bottom.Full.Visible = false
  bp.Bottom.Use.Visible = false
  if _G.backpackon == "Recover" then
    if _G.useevent then
      _G.useevent:disconnect()
    end
    -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC151: Unhandled construct in 'MakeBoolean' P1

    if p.Bag.Recover:FindFirstChild(v.ItemName.Text) and #p.PokemonParty:GetChildren() > 0 and p.Bag.Recover[v.ItemName.Text].Value > 0 then
      bp.Bottom.Use.Visible = true
      _G.useevent = bp.Bottom.Use.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
    
    bp.Visible = false
    chosenpokemon = nil
    PartyItem(v.ItemName.Text)
    repeat
      wait()
    until (chosenpokemon ~= nil and chosenpokemon ~= "Cancel") or val == true
    if val == true then
      for index,coolkat in pairs(_G.Items[v.ItemName.Text].Use) do
        _G.ItemFunctions[index](v.ItemName.Text, chosenpokemon)
      end
      do
        blck.Visible = true
        game.Players.LocalPlayer.PlayerGui.Main.BattleScene.Visible = p.InBattle.Value
        bp.Visible = not p.InBattle.Value
        _G.useevent:disconnect()
      end
    end
  end
)
    end
    bp.Bottom.Use.Visible = false
  else
    -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC210: Unhandled construct in 'MakeBoolean' P1

    -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC210: Unhandled construct in 'MakeBoolean' P1

    if _G.backpackon == "Competitive" and p.Bag.Competitive:FindFirstChild(v.ItemName.Text) and #p.PokemonParty:GetChildren() > 0 and chosenpokemon == nil and p.Bag.Competitive[v.ItemName.Text].Value > 0 and p.InBattle.Value == false then
      bp.Bottom.Use.Visible = true
      _G.useevent = bp.Bottom.Use.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
    
    bp.Visible = false
    chosenpokemon = nil
    CompetitivePartyItem(v.ItemName.Text)
    repeat
      wait()
    until (chosenpokemon ~= nil and chosenpokemon ~= "Cancel") or val == true
    if val ~= true or v.ItemName.Text == "Stat Reset" then
      for i,v in ipairs(chosenpokemon.EV:GetChildren()) do
        Math:Change(v, 0)
      end
      statredo(chosenpokemon)
      informative("You reset " .. chosenpokemon.Name .. "\'s stats.")
      Math:Check(p.Bag.Competitive:FindFirstChild(v.ItemName.Text), false)
    else
      if v.ItemName.Text == "Mini Stat Reset" then
        for i,v in ipairs(chosenpokemon.EV:GetChildren()) do
          Math:Change(v, math.max(v.Value - 10, 0))
        end
        statredo(chosenpokemon)
        informative("You subtracted 10 EVs from all of " .. chosenpokemon.Name .. "\'s stats.")
        Math:Check(p.Bag.Competitive:FindFirstChild(v.ItemName.Text), false)
      else
        if v.ItemName.Text == "PokeImprove" then
          local stats = {}
          for i,v in ipairs(chosenpokemon.IV:GetChildren()) do
            if v.Value ~= 31 then
              table.insert(stats, v)
            end
          end
          if #stats > 0 then
            local converter = {HP = "HP", Atk = "Attack", Def = "Defense", SpA = "Special Attack", SpD = "Special Defense", Speed = "Speed"}
            local chosen = stats[math.random(1, #stats)]
            Math:Change(chosen, 31)
            local stringstat = string.sub(chosen.Name, 1, #chosen.Name - 2)
            statredo(chosenpokemon)
            informative("You have maxed " .. chosenpokemon.Name .. "\'s " .. converter[stringstat] .. ".")
            Math:Check(p.Bag.Competitive:FindFirstChild(v.ItemName.Text), false)
          else
            do
              do
                informative("This Pokemon already has max stats.")
                if v.ItemName.Text == "Nature Stone" then
                  naturechange(chosenpokemon)
                  statredo(chosenpokemon)
                  informative(chosenpokemon.Name .. "\'s nature was changed to " .. chosenpokemon.Nature.Value .. ".")
                  Math:Check(p.Bag.Competitive:FindFirstChild(v.ItemName.Text), false)
                else
                  if _G.Items[v.ItemName.Text].Use == "Vitamin" then
                    local stat = _G.Items[v.ItemName.Text].EV
                    if chosenpokemon.EV[stat .. "EV"].Value >= 200 or checkevs(chosenpokemon) >= 510 then
                      informative(chosenpokemon.Name .. " refused to take the " .. v.ItemName.Text .. "!")
                    else
                      Math:Change(chosenpokemon.EV[stat .. "EV"], math.min(200, chosenpokemon.EV[stat .. "EV"].Value + 10))
                      informative(chosenpokemon.Name .. " took the " .. v.ItemName.Text .. "!")
                      if stat == "HP" then
                        Math:Change(chosenpokemon.Stats.HPStat, HPcalc(chosenpokemon))
                        if chosenpokemon.Status.Value == "Faint" then
                          Math:Change(chosenpokemon.CurrentHP, 0)
                        end
                      else
                        Math:Change(chosenpokemon.Stats[stat .. "Stat"], otherstatcalc(chosenpokemon, stat))
                      end
                      Math:Check(p.Bag.Competitive:FindFirstChild(v.ItemName.Text), false)
                    end
                  end
                end
                do
                  bp.Visible = true
                  chosenpokemon = nil
                  _G.useevent:disconnect()
                end
              end
            end
          end
        end
      end
    end
  end
)
    end
  end
  bp.Bottom.Use.Visible = false
  if _G.backpackon == "Evolution" then
    if _G.useevent then
      _G.useevent:disconnect()
    end
    if p.Bag.Evolution:FindFirstChild(v.ItemName.Text) and #p.PokemonParty:GetChildren() > 0 then
      if p.Bag.Evolution[v.ItemName.Text]:IsA("BoolValue") or p.Bag.Evolution[v.ItemName.Text].Value > 0 then
        if p.InBattle.Value == false then
          bp.Bottom.Use.Visible = true
          _G.useevent = bp.Bottom.Use.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
    
    chosenpokemon = nil
    if v.ItemName.Text == "Exp. Share" then
      if p.Bag.Evolution["Exp. Share"].Value == false then
        v.ItemNumber.Text = "On"
      else
        v.ItemNumber.Text = "Off"
      end
      _G.ItemFunctions.Experience()
      val = true
    else
      bp.Visible = false
      EvolvePartyItem(v.ItemName.Text)
    end
    repeat
      wait()
    until (chosenpokemon ~= nil and chosenpokemon ~= "Cancel") or val == true
    if val ~= true or v.ItemName.Text == "Rare Candy" then
      _G.ItemFunctions.LevelUp(v.ItemName.Text, chosenpokemon)
    else
      if v.ItemName.Text == "Common Candy" then
        _G.ItemFunctions.LevelDown(v.ItemName.Text, chosenpokemon)
      else
        if v.ItemName.Text == "Shinifier" then
          _G.ItemFunctions.Shinifier(v.ItemName.Text, chosenpokemon)
        else
          _G.ItemFunctions.Evolve(v.ItemName.Text, chosenpokemon)
        end
      end
    end
    _G.useevent:disconnect()
  end
)
        end
        if v.ItemName.Text == "Exp Share" then
          bp.Visible = true
        end
      else
        bp.Bottom.Use.Visible = false
      end
    end
  else
    if _G.backpackon == "TMs" then
      globalmove = v.ItemName.Text
      val = false
      partyscreen = game.Players.LocalPlayer.PlayerGui.Main.ItemParty
      for wow,zzz in ipairs(partyscreen.Bottom:GetChildren()) do
        if getfenv()["DeleteDerp" .. zzz.Name] then
          getfenv()["DeleteDerp" .. zzz.Name]:disconnect()
        end
      end
      bp.Bottom.Use.Visible = false
      if _G.useevent then
        _G.useevent:disconnect()
      end
      -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC388: Unhandled construct in 'MakeBoolean' P1

      if p.Bag.TMs:FindFirstChild(globalmove) and #p.PokemonParty:GetChildren() > 0 and p.InBattle.Value == false then
        bp.Bottom.Use.Visible = true
        _G.useevent = bp.Bottom.Use.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
    
    partyscreen = game.Players.LocalPlayer.PlayerGui.Main.ItemParty
    for wow,zzz in ipairs(partyscreen.Bottom:GetChildren()) do
      do
        if getfenv()["DeleteDerp" .. zzz.Name] then
          do
            getfenv()["DeleteDerp" .. zzz.Name]:disconnect()
            -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC30: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_THEN_STMT

            -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC30: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_STMT
