        end
      end
    end
    bp.Visible = false
    chosenpokemon = nil
    TMPartyItem(globalmove)
    repeat
      wait()
    until (chosenpokemon ~= nil and chosenpokemon ~= "Cancel") or val == true
    if chosenpokemon ~= "Cancel" and val == false then
      if #chosenpokemon.Moves:GetChildren() < 4 then
        scrolltext(partyscreen.Bottom.dialog, chosenpokemon.Name .. " learned " .. globalmove .. "!")
        Battle:NewMove(chosenpokemon, globalmove)
        bp.Visible = true
        partyscreen.Visible = false
        Math:Check(p.Bag.TMs[globalmove].Value, false)
      else
        if #chosenpokemon.Moves:GetChildren() == 4 then
          partyscreen.Bottom.BigCancel.Visible = false
          if scrollytext == false then
            scrolltext(partyscreen.Bottom.dialog, chosenpokemon.Name .. " has 4 moves.")
            wait(0.5)
            scrolltext(partyscreen.Bottom.dialog, "What move should be replaced with " .. globalmove .. "?")
            wait(0.5)
            partyscreen.Bottom.dialog.Text = ""
            partyscreen.Bottom.dialog.DropShadow.Text = ""
            partyscreen.Bottom.BigCancel.Visible = true
            for _,blerp in ipairs(chosenpokemon.Moves:GetChildren()) do

              partyscreen.Bottom["Move" .. blerp.Value].TextColor3 = _G.Tables.TypeColors[_G.Moves[blerp.Name].Type]
              partyscreen.Bottom["Move" .. blerp.Value].Visible = true

      Math:Change(chosenpokemon.Moves[button.Text].PP, math.min(_G.Moves[v.ItemName.Text].PP, chosenpokemon.Moves[button.Text].PP.Value))

  bp.Bottom.Use.Visible = false
  Sound2:Play()

hash = function(num)
  
  return (num + 4) * 8
end

dehash = function(num)
  
  return (num - 32) / 8
end

setUpGui = function(Directory)
  
  local Table = getListOfItems(Directory)
  local Amount = 0
  local downNumber = 8
  local upNumber = 1
  local Clicks = 0
  script.Parent.Parent.Bottom.Position = UDim2.new(0, 0, 0.75, 0)
  if up then
    up:disconnect()
  end
  if down then
    down:disconnect()
  end
  for i,v in ipairs(script.Parent:GetChildren()) do
    if v:IsA("TextButton") then
      v.Visible = false
    end
  end
  for i,v in pairs(Table) do
    Amount = Amount + 1
  end
  if Amount > 8 then
    Clicks = Amount - 8
    script.Parent.Scroller.Rectangle.Size = UDim2.new(0, 42, 0.25, 0)
    script.Parent.Scroller.Rectangle.Position = UDim2.new(0, 0, 0.15, 0)
  else
    Clicks = 0
    script.Parent.Scroller.Rectangle.Size = UDim2.new(0, 42, 0.25, 0)
    script.Parent.Scroller.Rectangle.Position = UDim2.new(0, 0, 0.15, 0)
  end
  for i,v in pairs(script.Parent:GetChildren()) do
    if v:IsA("TextButton") and Directory ~= "TMs" and Table[tonumber(string.sub(v.Name, 5, 5))] ~= nil then
      v.ItemName.Text = Table[tonumber(string.sub(v.Name, 5, 5))].Name
      v.ItemName.TextColor3 = Color3.new(0, 0.33333333333333, 1)
      if _G.backpackon == "TMs" then
        v.ItemNumber.Text = ""
      else
        if Table[tonumber(string.sub(v.Name, 5, 5))].Name ~= "Rare Candy" and Table[tonumber(string.sub(v.Name, 5, 5))].Name ~= "Exp. Share" then
          v.ItemNumber.Text = "x " .. Directory:FindFirstChild(Table[tonumber(string.sub(v.Name, 5, 5))].Name).Value
        else
          if Table[tonumber(string.sub(v.Name, 5, 5))].Name == "Exp. Share" then
            if Directory:FindFirstChild(Table[tonumber(string.sub(v.Name, 5, 5))].Name).Value then
              v.ItemNumber.Text = "On"
            else
              v.ItemNumber.Text = "Off"
            end
          else
            v.ItemNumber.Text = "x " .. dehash(Directory:FindFirstChild(Table[tonumber(string.sub(v.Name, 5, 5))].Name).Value)
          end
        end
      end
      v.ItemName.DropShadow.Text = v.ItemName.Text
      v.ItemImage.ImageColor3 = Color3.new(1, 1, 1)
      v.ItemImage.Image = Items[Table[tonumber(string.sub(v.Name, 5, 5))].Name] and Items[Table[tonumber(string.sub(v.Name, 5, 5))].Name].Sprite or "rbxgameasset://Images/Bag_TM_Normal_Sprite"
      if _G.backpackon == "TMs" then
        v.ItemImage.ImageColor3 = _G.Tables.TypeColors[Moves[Table[tonumber(string.sub(v.Name, 5, 5))].Name].Type]
      end
      v.Visible = true
    end
  end
  down = script.Parent.Scroller.DownArrow.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
    
    if Table[downNumber + 1] ~= nil then
      Sound.Pitch = 1
      Sound:Play()
      moveDown(Table, downNumber, Directory)
      script.Parent.Scroller.Rectangle.Position = UDim2.new(0, 0, script.Parent.Scroller.Rectangle.Position.Y.Scale + 0.45 / Clicks, script.Parent.Scroller.Rectangle.Position.Y.Offset)
      upNumber = upNumber + 1
      downNumber = downNumber + 1
    end
  end
)
  up = script.Parent.Scroller.UpArrow.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
    
    if Table[upNumber - 1] ~= nil then
      Sound.Pitch = 0.8
      Sound:Play()
      moveUp(Table, upNumber, Directory)
      script.Parent.Scroller.Rectangle.Position = UDim2.new(0, 0, script.Parent.Scroller.Rectangle.Position.Y.Scale - 0.45 / Clicks, script.Parent.Scroller.Rectangle.Position.Y.Offset)
      upNumber = upNumber - 1
      downNumber = downNumber - 1
    end
  end
)
end

repeat
  wait()
until game.Players.LocalPlayer:WaitForChild("Bag"):WaitForChild("Recover")
for i,v in ipairs(script.Parent.Parent.Side:GetChildren()) do
  if v:IsA("TextButton") then
    v.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
  
  _G.backpackon = v.Name
  script.Parent.Parent.Side.Slider.Beep.Pitch = 1.1
  script.Parent.Parent.Side.Slider.Beep:Play()
  bp.Bottom.Use.Visible = false
  setUpGui(game.Players.LocalPlayer.Bag[v.Name])
end
)
  end
end
bp.Changed:connect(function(prop)
  
  if prop == "Visible" and bp.Visible == true then
    setUpGui(game.Players.LocalPlayer.Bag:FindFirstChild(_G.backpackon))
  end
end
)

================================================================================
-- FILE: StarterGui/Main/Backpack/Side/Slider/LocalScript.local.lua
================================================================================

-- params : ...

repeat
  wait()
until game.Players.LocalPlayer
local Sound = Instance.new("Sound", script.Parent)
Sound.SoundId = "http://www.roblox.com/asset/?id=290841329"
Sound.Name = "Beep"
script.Parent.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
  
  if script.Parent.Title.Text == "OPEN" then
    Sound:Play()
    Sound.Pitch = 0.75
    script.Parent.Title.Text = "CLOSE"
    script.Parent.Title.Title.Text = "CLOSE"
    script.Parent.ImageColor3 = Color3.new(1, 0, 0)
    script.Parent.Parent:TweenPosition(UDim2.new(-0.2, 0, 0, 0), "Out", "Bounce", 0.75, true)
  else
    if script.Parent.Title.Text == "CLOSE" then
      Sound:Play()
      Sound.Pitch = 1
      script.Parent.Title.Text = "OPEN"
      script.Parent.Title.Title.Text = "OPEN"
      script.Parent.ImageColor3 = Color3.new(0, 0.66666666666667, 0)
      script.Parent.Parent:TweenPosition(UDim2.new(0, 0, 0, 0), "Out", "Bounce", 0.75, true)
    end
  end
end
)

local playing = false

  _G.InButtonVariable = true
  while _G.InButtonVariable == true and playing == false do
    playing = true
    wait(0.05)
    for i = 0, -5, -1 do
      script.Parent.Title.Position = UDim2.new(0, 0, 0, i)
      wait(0.05)
    end
    for i = -5, 0 do
      script.Parent.Title.Position = UDim2.new(0, 0, 0, i)
      wait(0.05)
    end
    playing = false
  end
end
)

  _G.InButtonVariable = false
end
)

  _G.InButtonVariable = false
end
)

================================================================================
-- FILE: StarterGui/Main/BattleScene/MuteButton/LocalScript.local.lua
================================================================================

-- params : ...

script.Parent.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
  
  if game.Players.LocalPlayer.PlayerGui:FindFirstChild("BattleSound") then
    local sound = game.Players.LocalPlayer.PlayerGui:FindFirstChild("BattleSound")
    local sound2 = game.Players.LocalPlayer.PlayerGui:FindFirstChild("SoundEffect")
    if sound.Volume > 0.2 then
      sound.Volume = 0
      sound2.Volume = 0
      script.Parent.Text = "Unmute"
    else
      if sound.Volume < 0.2 then
        sound.Volume = 0.25
        sound2.Volume = 0.75
        script.Parent.Text = "Mute"
      end
    end
  end
end
)

================================================================================
-- FILE: StarterGui/Main/BattleScene/TheirBox/HealthBG/Health/ColorChange.local.lua
================================================================================

-- params : ...

repeat
  wait()
until game.Players.LocalPlayer.PlayerGui
script.Parent.Changed:connect(function(prop)
  
  if prop == "Size" then
    if script.Parent.Size.X.Scale > 0.5 then
      script.Parent.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.new(0.3921568627451, 0.62745098039216, 0.4078431372549)
    else
      if script.Parent.Size.X.Scale <= 0.5 and script.Parent.Size.X.Scale >= 0.25 then
        script.Parent.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.new(0.8, 0.61176470588235, 0.4078431372549)
      else
        if script.Parent.Size.X.Scale < 0.25 and script.Parent.Size.X.Scale > 0 then
          script.Parent.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.new(0.7843137254902, 0.36078431372549, 0.32941176470588)
        else
          if script.Parent.Size.X.Scale == 0 then
            script.Parent.Size = UDim2.new(0, 0, 1, 0)
          end
        end
      end
    end
  end
end
)

local playing = false
script.Parent.MouseEnter:connect(function()
  
  _G.InButtonVariable = true
  while _G.InButtonVariable == true and playing == false do
    playing = true
    wait(0.05)
    for i = 0, -5, -1 do
      script.Parent.Title.Position = UDim2.new(0, 0, 0, i)
      wait(0.05)

      wait(0.05)
    end
    playing = false
  end
end
)

repeat
  wait()
until game.Players.LocalPlayer.PlayerGui
script.Parent.Changed:connect(function(prop)
  
  if prop == "Size" then
    if script.Parent.Size.X.Scale > 0.5 then
      script.Parent.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.new(0.3921568627451, 0.62745098039216, 0.4078431372549)
    else
      if script.Parent.Size.X.Scale <= 0.5 and script.Parent.Size.X.Scale >= 0.25 then
        script.Parent.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.new(0.8, 0.61176470588235, 0.4078431372549)
      else
        if script.Parent.Size.X.Scale < 0.25 and script.Parent.Size.X.Scale > 0 then
          script.Parent.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.new(0.7843137254902, 0.36078431372549, 0.32941176470588)
        else
          if script.Parent.Size.X.Scale == 0 then
            script.Parent.Size = UDim2.new(0, 0, 1, 0)
          end
        end
      end
    end
  end
end
)

-- FILE: StarterGui/Main/BattleTowerPokes/_G.BattleTowerSelectPokes.local.lua
================================================================================

-- params : ...

repeat
  wait()
until game.Players.LocalPlayer
p = game.Players.LocalPlayer
pokegui = script.Parent
dc = function(var)
  
  for i = 1, 6 do
    if getfenv()[var .. i] then
      getfenv()[var .. i]:disconnect()
    end
  end
end

PokeTab = {[1] = nil, [2] = nil, [3] = nil}
variables = function(isIn)
  
  if PokeTab[1] == nil and PokeTab[1] ~= isIn then
    return 1
  else
    if PokeTab[1] == isIn then
      return "Delete1"
    end
  end
  if PokeTab[2] == nil and PokeTab[2] ~= isIn then
    return 2
  else
    if PokeTab[2] == isIn then
      return "Delete2"
    end
  end
  if PokeTab[3] == nil and PokeTab[3] ~= isIn then
    return 3
  else
    if PokeTab[3] == isIn then
      return "Delete3"
    end
  end
  return nil
end

list = function(num)
  
  for i,v in ipairs(pokegui:GetChildren()) do
    if v:IsA("ImageButton") then
      if v.SelectedGui.Text == "1" and num == 1 then
        v.SelectedGui.Text = " "
        v.SelectedGui.Visible = false
      else
        if v.SelectedGui.Text == "2" then
          if num == 1 then
            v.SelectedGui.Text = "1"
          else
            if num == 2 then
              v.SelectedGui.Text = " "
              v.SelectedGui.Visible = false
            end
          end
        else
          if v.SelectedGui.Text == "3" then
            if num ~= 3 then
              v.SelectedGui.Text = "2"
            else
              v.SelectedGui.Text = " "
              v.SelectedGui.Visible = false
            end
          end
        end
      end
    end
  end
end

backtrack = function(tab, number)
  
  script.Parent.Start.Visible = false
  if number == 1 then
    tab[1] = tab[2]
    tab[2] = tab[3]
    tab[3] = nil
  else
    if number == 2 then
      tab[2] = tab[3]
      tab[3] = nil
    else
      if number == 3 then
        tab[3] = nil
      end
    end
  end
  list(number)
end

local banlist = {Mewtwo = true, ["Ho-Oh"] = true, Lugia = true, Slaking = true, Kyogre = true, Groudon = true, Rayquaza = true, Palkia = true, Dialga = true, Giratina = true, ["Giratina-O"] = true, Manaphy = true, Darkrai = true, Arceus = true, Kyurem = true, ["Mewthree, Swag Prince"] = true, Deoxys = true, ["Deoxys-A"] = true, ["Deoxys-D"] = true, ["Deoxys-S"] = true}
setupparty = function()
  
  for i,v in ipairs(pokegui:GetChildren()) do
    do
      if v:IsA("ImageButton") then
        do
          v.Visible = false
          v.SelectedGui.Text = ""
          v.SelectedGui.Visible = false
          v.Legality.Visible = false
          -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC18: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_THEN_STMT

          -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC18: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_STMT

        end
      end
    end
  end
  do
    for i,v in ipairs(p.PokemonParty:GetChildren()) do
      if v.PartyPosition.Value <= 6 then
        local button = pokegui["Pokemon" .. v.PartyPosition.Value]
        button.Level.Text = "Lvl. " .. v.Lvl.Value
        if v.Shiny.Value ~= true or not _G.Pokemon[v.Name].Sprites.SF then
          button.Image = _G.Pokemon[v.Name].Sprites.Front
          if not v:FindFirstChild("Nickname") or not v:FindFirstChild("Nickname").Value then
            do
              button.PokeName.Text = v.Name
              if banlist[v.Name] == true then
                button.Legality.Visible = true
              end
              button.Visible = true
              getfenv()["Party" .. v.PartyPosition.Value] = button.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
    
    local result = variables(v)
    if button.Legality.Visible == false then
      if result ~= nil and not tostring(result):match("Delete") and button.SelectedGui.Visible == false then
        PokeTab[variables(PokeTab)] = v
        button.SelectedGui.Text = result
        button.SelectedGui.Visible = true
        if result == 3 then
          script.Parent.Start.Visible = true
        end
      else
        if tostring(result):match("Delete") then
          backtrack(PokeTab, tonumber(result:sub(7, 7)))
        end
      end
    end
  end
)
              -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC99: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_THEN_STMT

              -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC99: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_STMT

              -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC99: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_THEN_STMT

              -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC99: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_STMT

              -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC99: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_THEN_STMT

              -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC99: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_STMT

            end
          end
        end
      end
    end
  end
  pokegui.Visible = true
end

local Start, Close = nil, nil
_G.BattleTowerSelectPoke = function()
  
  dc("Party")
  local Done = nil
  PokeTab = {[1] = nil, [2] = nil, [3] = nil}
  if Close then
    Close:disconnect()
  end
  Close = script.Parent.Close.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
    
    pokegui.Visible = false
    game.Players.LocalPlayer.PlayerGui.Main.BlackScreen.Visible = false
    Done = "Close"
  end
)
  script.Parent.Start.Visible = false
  Start = script.Parent.Start.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
    
    pokegui.Visible = false
    game.Players.LocalPlayer.PlayerGui.Main.BlackScreen.Visible = false
    Done = "Start"
  end
)
  game.Players.LocalPlayer.PlayerGui.Main.BlackScreen.Visible = true
  setupparty(PokeTab)
  repeat
    wait()
  until Done ~= nil
  return Done, PokeTab[1], PokeTab[2], PokeTab[3]
end

  wait()
until script.Parent.Parent.Parent.Parent:FindFirstChild("PokemonParty")

end

for i = 5, 1, -1 do
  script.Parent.TextLabel.Text = "Checking save data info... (" .. i .. ")"
  wait(1)
end
script.Parent.TextLabel.Visible = false
script.Parent.Load.Visible = true
local loaded = false
swag = nil
script.Parent.Load.MouseButton1Click:connect(function()
  
  script.Parent.Load.Visible = false
  script.Parent.New.Visible = false
  game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Anchored = true
  if loaded == false then
    loaded = true
    script.Parent.TextLabel.Text = "Loading save data, please wait..."
    script.Parent.TextLabel.Visible = true
    local poop = 1
    do
      spawn(function()
    
    while swag == nil do
      for i = 0, 3 do
        script.Parent.TextLabel.Text = "Loading, this may take a while" .. string.rep(".", i)
        wait(0.25)
        poop = poop + 1
        if swag == nil then
          do
            if poop >= 40 then
              break
            end
            -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC31: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_THEN_STMT

            -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC31: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_STMT

          end
        end
      end
    end
  end
)
      swag = game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.Internal.Load:InvokeServer()
      print(swag)
      if swag == "Successful" then
        script.Parent.TextLabel.Visible = false
        if script.Parent.Parent.Parent:FindFirstChild("TouchGui") then
          script.Parent.Parent.Parent:FindFirstChild("TouchGui").TouchControlFrame.Visible = true
        end
        local hit, pos = nil, nil
        repeat
          local ray = Ray.new(game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.Torso.Position, Vector3.new(0, -1, 0).unit * 100)
          local hit, pos = workspace:FindPartOnRay(ray, game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character)
          wait()
        until hit
        game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Anchored = false
        wait(1)
        for i = 0, 1, 0.02 do
          script.Parent.BackgroundTransparency = i
          wait()
        end
        if script.Parent.Parent:FindFirstChild("ContinueScreen") then
          script.Parent.Parent.ContinueScreen.Visible = false
        end
        coroutine.resume(coroutine.create(function()
    
    script.Parent.Parent.Menu.Save.Visible = false
    script.Parent.Parent.Menu.Visible = true
    wait(90)
    script.Parent.Parent.Menu.Save.Visible = true
    if script.Parent.Parent:FindFirstChild("ContinueScreen") then
      script.Parent.Parent.ContinueScreen:Destroy()
    end
  end
))
      else
        do
          script.Parent.TextLabel.Text = swag .. ". Try again later. Try again in (6) seconds."
          script.Parent.TextLabel.Visible = true
          wait(1)
          for why = 5, 1, -1 do
            script.Parent.TextLabel.Text = swag .. ". Try again in (" .. why .. ") seconds."
            wait(1)
          end
          loaded = false
          script.Parent.TextLabel.Visible = false
          script.Parent.Load.Visible = true
          script.Parent.New.Visible = true
        end
      end
    end
  end
end
)

-- FILE: StarterGui/Main/ContinueScreen/New/NewGame.local.lua

-- params : ...

repeat
  wait()
until game.Players.LocalPlayer
script.Parent.Parent:WaitForChild("Confirmation")
script.Parent.Parent.Confirmation:WaitForChild("Yes")
script.Parent.Parent.Confirmation:WaitForChild("No")
script.Parent.MouseButton1Click:connect(function()
  
  script.Parent.Parent.New.Visible = false
  script.Parent.Parent.Load.Visible = false
  script.Parent.Parent.Confirmation.Visible = true
end
)
game.Players.LocalPlayer:WaitForChild("PlayerGui")
p = game.Players.LocalPlayer
local speech = p.PlayerGui.DialogTalk.TalkB.Talk
local talkinfo = speech.Parent.Parent.info
local mouse = (p:GetMouse())
pressedq = nil
gui = p.PlayerGui
main = gui.Main
battle = gui.Main.BlackScreen
menu = gui.Main.Menu
scrolling = function()
  
  local effect = Instance.new("Sound", script)
  effect.SoundId = "rbxassetid://325182533"
  effect.Pitch = math.random(75, 100) / 100
  effect:Play()
  effect:Destroy()
end

scrolltext = function(text, choice)
  
  speech.Text = ""
  if nxtButton then
    nxtButton:disconnect()
  end
  local skip = false
  nxtButton = speech.Parent.Next.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
    
    if skip == false then
      skip = true
    end
  end
)
  local pressedq = game:GetService("UserInputService").InputBegan:connect(function(inputObj)
    
    if inputObj.KeyCode == Enum.KeyCode.Q and skip == false then
      skip = true
    end
  end
)
  p.PlayerGui.DialogTalk.info.Visible = false
  menu.Visible = false
  speech.Parent.Visible = true
  speech.Visible = true
  local l_0_2_4 = false
  speech.Parent.popup.Yes.Visible = false
  speech.Parent.popup.Visible = false
  speech.Parent.popup.No.Visible = false
  if choice then
    speech.Parent.Next.Visible = false
    speech.Parent.popup.Yes.Visible = true
    speech.Parent.popup.Visible = true
    speech.Parent.popup.No.Visible = true
  end
  for i = 1, #text do
    scrolling()
    speech.Text = string.sub(text, 1, i)
    speech.DropShadow.Text = speech.Text
    wait(0.04)
    if skip == true then
      speech.Text = text
      speech.DropShadow.Text = text
      break
    end
  end
  do
    if pressedq then
      pressedq:disconnect()
    end
    if nxtButton then
      nxtButton:disconnect()
    end
    nxtButton = speech.Parent.Next.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
    
    l_0_2_4 = true
    if pressedq then
      pressedq:disconnect()
    end
  end
)
    local pressedq = game:GetService("UserInputService").InputBegan:connect(function(inputObj)
    
    if inputObj.KeyCode == Enum.KeyCode.Q then
      l_0_2_4 = true
      if pressedq then
        pressedq:disconnect()
      end
    end
  end
)
    repeat
      wait()
    until l_0_2_4 == true or choice == true
    if choice == nil then
      speech.Parent.Visible = false
      speech.Visible = false
      menu.Visible = true
    end
  end
end

local song = Instance.new("Sound", script)
song.SoundId = "rbxassetid://168967324"
song.Looped = true
local soundeffect = Instance.new("Sound", script)
soundeffect.SoundId = "http://www.roblox.com/asset/?id=201476390"
script.Parent.Parent.Confirmation.Yes.MouseButton1Click:connect(function()
  
  main.BeginnerScreen.Visible = true
  song:Play()
  script.Parent.Parent.Visible = false
  scrolltext("Hello there! Welcome to the world of Project: Pokemon!")
  scrolltext("My name is Oak. But people call me the Pokemon Professor!")
  main.BeginnerScreen.Oak.Pokeball.Visible = true
  main.BeginnerScreen.Oak.Pokeball.Image = "http://www.roblox.com/asset/?id=124179585"
  wait(0.1)
  main.BeginnerScreen.Flash.Visible = true
  wait(0.08)
  soundeffect:Play()
  main.BeginnerScreen.Oak.Pokeball.Visible = false
  main.BeginnerScreen.Oak.Nido.Visible = true
  main.BeginnerScreen.Flash.Visible = false
  scrolltext("This world is inhabitated by creatures called \"Pokemon\".")
  scrolltext("For some people, Pokemon are pets. Other use them for fights. Myself... I study Pokemon as a profession.")
  scrolltext("I\'m not very forgetful, so I already know your name is " .. p.Name .. "!")
  scrolltext("Come meet and talk with me in my lab to get your very first Pokemon!")
  scrolltext("Your very own Pokemon adventure is about to unfold! A world of dreams and adventures with Pokemon awaits!")
  song:Stop()
  main.BeginnerScreen.Oak.Visible = false
  script.Parent.Parent.Parent.Menu.Visible = true
  game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Anchored = false
  if script.Parent.Parent.Parent.Parent:FindFirstChild("TouchGui") then
    script.Parent.Parent.Parent.Parent:FindFirstChild("TouchGui").TouchControlFrame.Visible = true
  end
  for i = 0, 1, 0.05 do
    main.BeginnerScreen.BackgroundTransparency = i
    wait(0.05)
  end
  main.BeginnerScreen.BackgroundTransparency = 1
  wait(0.05)
  main.BeginnerScreen:Destroy()
  script.Parent.Parent:Destroy()
end
)
script.Parent.Parent.Confirmation.No.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
  
  script.Parent.Parent.New.Visible = true
  if script.Parent.Parent:FindFirstChild("TextLabel").Visible == false then
    script.Parent.Parent.Load.Visible = true

-- FILE: StarterGui/Main/EVResults/LocalScript.local.lua

-- params : ...

repeat
  wait()
until game.Players.LocalPlayer
local currentOn = "Base"
local comparative = {Base = script.Parent.Base, IVs = script.Parent.IVs, EVs = script.Parent.EVs}
local longer = {HP = "HP", Atk = "Atk", Def = "Def", SpA = "Sp. Attack", SpD = "Sp. Defense", Speed = "Speed"}
local Pokemon = require(game.ReplicatedStorage.Information.Pokemon)
local stats = script.Parent
local base, ivs, evs = nil, nil, nil
local Sound4 = Instance.new("Sound", script.Parent)
Sound4.SoundId = "http://www.roblox.com/asset/?id=290841329"
Sound4.Name = "Beep"
genericstats = function(cfg)
  
  local poke = _G.Pokemon[cfg.Name]
  if not cfg.Shiny.Value or not poke.Sprites.SF then
    stats.PokemonBG.PokemonSprite.Image = poke.Sprites.Front
    stats.PokemonBG.Shiny.Visible = cfg.Shiny.Value
    stats.Type.Visible = false
    stats.Type1.Visible = false
    stats.Type2.Visible = false
    if #poke.Type == 1 then
      stats.Type.Title.Text = poke.Type[1]
      stats.Type.Title.DropShadow.Text = poke.Type[1]
      stats.Type.ImageColor3 = _G.Tables.TypeColors[poke.Type[1]]
      stats.Type.Visible = true
    else
      if #poke.Type == 2 then
        stats.Type1.Title.Text = poke.Type[1]
        stats.Type1.Title.DropShadow.Text = poke.Type[1]
        stats.Type1.ImageColor3 = _G.Tables.TypeColors[poke.Type[1]]
        stats.Type2.Title.Text = poke.Type[2]
        stats.Type2.Title.DropShadow.Text = poke.Type[2]
        stats.Type2.ImageColor3 = _G.Tables.TypeColors[poke.Type[2]]
        stats.Type1.Visible = true
        stats.Type2.Visible = true
      end
    end
    stats.MiniSprite.Image = poke.Sprites.Mini
    stats.PokeballSprite.Image = _G.Sprites.Pokeball[cfg.Pokeball.Value].Closed
    stats.PokeName.Gender.Image = _G.Sprites.Symbols[cfg.Gender.Value]
    if not cfg:FindFirstChild("Nickname") or not cfg:FindFirstChild("Nickname").Value then
      stats.PokeName.Title.Text = cfg.Name
      if not cfg:FindFirstChild("Nickname") or not cfg:FindFirstChild("Nickname").Value then
        stats.PokeName.Title.DropShadow.Text = cfg.Name
        if poke.Pokedex < 10 then
          stats.Pokedex.Title.Text = "Pokedex: #00" .. poke.Pokedex
          stats.Pokedex.Title.DropShadow.Text = "Pokedex: #00" .. poke.Pokedex
        else
          if poke.Pokedex >= 10 and poke.Pokedex < 100 then
            stats.Pokedex.Title.Text = "Pokedex: #0" .. poke.Pokedex
            stats.Pokedex.Title.DropShadow.Text = "Pokedex: #0" .. poke.Pokedex
          else
            if poke.Pokedex >= 100 then
              stats.Pokedex.Title.Text = "Pokedex: #" .. poke.Pokedex
              stats.Pokedex.Title.DropShadow.Text = "Pokedex: #" .. poke.Pokedex
            end
          end
        end
      end
    end
  end
end

baseStats = function(cfg)
  
  local s = _G.Pokemon[cfg.Name].Stats
  local b = script.Parent.Base
  for i,v in pairs(s) do
    b[i].Text = longer[i] .. ":" .. string.rep(" ", 18 - #longer[i]) .. v
  end
  script.Parent.Background.ImageColor3 = script.Parent.Background.Base.ImageColor3
  script.Parent.IVs.Visible = false
  script.Parent.EVs.Visible = false
  script.Parent.Base.Visible = true
end

evStats = function(cfg)
  
  local s = cfg.EV:GetChildren()
  local b = script.Parent.EVs
  for i,v in ipairs(s) do
    b[string.sub(v.Name, 1, #v.Name - 2)].Text = longer[string.sub(v.Name, 1, #v.Name - 2)] .. ":" .. string.rep(" ", 18 - #longer[string.sub(v.Name, 1, #v.Name - 2)]) .. v.Value
  end
  script.Parent.Background.ImageColor3 = script.Parent.Background.EVs.ImageColor3
  script.Parent.IVs.Visible = false
  script.Parent.Base.Visible = false
  script.Parent.EVs.Visible = true
end

ivStats = function(cfg)
  
  local s = cfg.IV:GetChildren()
  local b = script.Parent.IVs
  for i,v in ipairs(s) do
    b[string.sub(v.Name, 1, #v.Name - 2)].Text = longer[string.sub(v.Name, 1, #v.Name - 2)] .. ":" .. string.rep(" ", 18 - #longer[string.sub(v.Name, 1, #v.Name - 2)]) .. v.Value
  end
  script.Parent.Background.ImageColor3 = script.Parent.Background.IVs.ImageColor3
  script.Parent.EVs.Visible = false
  script.Parent.Base.Visible = false
  script.Parent.IVs.Visible = true
end

_G.ShowStats = function(poke)
  
  genericstats(poke)
  if base then
    base:disconnect()
  end
  if evs then
    evs:disconnect()
  end
  if ivs then
    ivs:disconnect()
  end
  script.Parent.IVs.Visible = false
  script.Parent.EVs.Visible = false
  script.Parent.Base.Visible = false
  baseStats(poke)
  base = script.Parent.Background.Base.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
    
    Sound4:Play()
    baseStats(poke)
  end
)
  ivs = script.Parent.Background.IVs.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
    
    Sound4:Play()
    ivStats(poke)
  end
)
  evs = script.Parent.Background.EVs.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
    
    Sound4:Play()
    evStats(poke)
  end
)
  stats.Parent.BlackScreen.Visible = true
  stats.Visible = true
end

  script.Parent.Parent.Parent.BlackScreen.Visible = false
end
)

until game.Players.LocalPlayer
for i,v in ipairs(script.Parent:GetChildren()) do

      do
        v.MouseEnter:connect(function()
  
  if v.Status.Text == "FNT" then
    Color3.new(0.60392156862745, 0.73725490196078, 0.85098039215686)
  else
    v.ImageColor3 = Color3.new(0.55294117647059, 0.71764705882353, 0.84313725490196)
  end
end
)
        v.MouseLeave:connect(function()
  
  if v.Status.Text == "FNT" then
    Color3.new(0.44705882352941, 0.58039215686275, 0.73333333333333)
  else
    v.ImageColor3 = Color3.new(0.70980392156863, 0.87450980392157, 1)
  end
end
)
        -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC30: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_THEN_STMT

        -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC30: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_STMT

      end
    end
  end
end
local t = {}
for i,v in ipairs(script.Parent.Bottom:GetChildren()) do
  if v:IsA("TextButton") and not v.Name:match("Move") then
    t[v] = v.TextColor3
    v.MouseEnter:connect(function()
  
  v.TextColor3 = Color3.new(t[v].r - 0.4, t[v].g - 0.4, t[v].b - 0.4)
end
)
    v.MouseLeave:connect(function()
  
  v.TextColor3 = t[v]
end
)
  end
end

  script.Parent.On.TextColor3 = Color3.new(0, 1, 0)
  script.Parent.Off.TextColor3 = Color3.new(1, 0, 0)
  Math:Change(p.BattleValue, true)
end
)
script.Parent.Off.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
  
  script.Parent.Off.TextColor3 = Color3.new(0, 1, 0)
  script.Parent.On.TextColor3 = Color3.new(1, 0, 0)
  Math:Change(p.BattleValue, false)
end
)

-- params : ...

repeat
  wait()
until game.Players.LocalPlayer
local p = game.Players.LocalPlayer
local playerSelected = nil
local ypos = 0
local colors = {Guest = Color3.new(1, 1, 1), Member = Color3.new(1, 1, 1), Timeout = Color3.new(0.34117647058824, 0.15686274509804, 0), ["Pokemon Trainers"] = Color3.new(0.33333333333333, 0.66666666666667, 0), ["Pokemon Experts"] = Color3.new(0.66666666666667, 1, 1), ["Pokemon Champions"] = Color3.new(0.3843137254902, 37, 0.81960784313725), ["Pokemon Masters"] = Color3.new(1, 1, 0), ["Helpful Stars"] = Color3.new(1, 0.33333333333333, 1), Trusted = Color3.new(0.66666666666667, 0.66666666666667, 1), ["Rank Manager"] = Color3.new(1, 0.33333333333333, 0), Enforcer = Color3.new(1, 0, 0), Moderator = Color3.new(0.4, 0.2, 0.6), Developer = Color3.new(0, 0.66666666666667, 1)}
local tab = {}
checkHack = function(player)
  
  for i,v in ipairs(player.PokemonParty:GetChildren()) do
    if v.Reverse.Value ~= v.Name:reverse() then
      return false
    end
  end
  return true
end

pokeinfo = function(player)
  
  local num = 0
  if player:FindFirstChild("Pokedex") then
    for i,v in ipairs(player.Pokedex:GetChildren()) do
      if v:FindFirstChild("Caught") and v.Caught.Value == true then
        num = num + 1
      end
    end
  end
  do
    return num
  end
end

findlead = function(player)
  
  if player:FindFirstChild("PokemonParty") then
    for i,v in ipairs(player.PokemonParty:GetChildren()) do
      if v.PartyPosition.Value == 1 then
        return v.Name
      end
    end
  end
  do
    return nil
  end
end

fadeytext = function(text)
  
  if gui.MessageThing.TextTransparency == 1 then
    gui.MessageThing.Text = text
    for i = 1, 0, -0.05 do
      gui.MessageThing.TextTransparency = i
      gui.MessageThing.TextStrokeTransparency = i
      wait(0.05)
    end
    wait(0.5)
    for i = 0, 1, 0.05 do
      gui.MessageThing.TextTransparency = i
      gui.MessageThing.TextStrokeTransparency = i
      wait(0.05)
    end
    gui.MessageThing.TextTransparency = 1
    gui.MessageThing.TextStrokeTransparency = 1
  end
end

local Badges = {["1"] = "http://www.roblox.com/asset/?id=327242876", ["2"] = "http://www.roblox.com/asset/?id=327252153", ["3"] = "http://www.roblox.com/asset/?id=327252272", ["4"] = "http://www.roblox.com/asset/?id=327252325", ["5"] = "http://www.roblox.com/asset/?id=327252179", ["6"] = "http://www.roblox.com/asset/?id=180668510", ["7"] = "http://www.roblox.com/asset/?id=327252201", ["8"] = "http://www.roblox.com/asset/?id=327252235", Champ = "http://www.roblox.com/asset/?id=38464948"}
local Order = {"1", "2", "3", "4", "5", "6", "7", "8", "Champ"}
badgeFind = function(player)
  
  local bdgimg = ""
  for i = 1, #Order do
    if player.Badges:FindFirstChild(Order[i]) then
      bdgimg = Badges[Order[i]]
    end
  end
  return bdgimg
end

local Sound = Instance.new("Sound", script.Parent)
Sound.SoundId = "http://www.roblox.com/asset/?id=287339370"
local Sound2 = Instance.new("Sound", script.Parent)
Sound2.SoundId = "http://www.roblox.com/asset/?id=318763788"
local Sound3 = Instance.new("Sound", script.Parent)
Sound3.SoundId = "rbxassetid://138097048"
local Sound4 = Instance.new("Sound", script.Parent)
Sound4.SoundId = "http://www.roblox.com/asset/?id=290841329"
Sound4.Name = "Beep"
makeGui = function(nameplate, player, position)
  
  pcall(function()
    
    player:WaitForChild("Badges")
    nameplate.Badge.Image = badgeFind(player)
    nameplate.Name = player.Name
    nameplate.NameTag.Text = player.Name
    nameplate.NameTag.DropShadow.Text = player.Name
    if not colors[player:GetRoleInGroup(1161496)] then
      nameplate.NameTag.TextColor3 = Color3.new(1, 1, 1)
      nameplate.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
      
      if player ~= p then
        if playerSelected ~= player then
          playerSelected = player
          Sound3:Play()
          script.Parent.Actions:TweenPosition(UDim2.new(0, 0, script.Parent.Actions.Position.Y.Scale, 0), "Out", "Quad", 0.5, true)
          script.Parent.Actions.Position = UDim2.new(0, 0, position.Y.Scale, 0)
          script.Parent.Actions:TweenPosition(UDim2.new(-0.25, -1, position.Y.Scale, 0), "Out", "Quad", 0.5, true)
        else
          playerSelected = nil
          script.Parent.Actions:TweenPosition(UDim2.new(0, 0, script.Parent.Actions.Position.Y.Scale, 0), "Out", "Quad", 0.5, true)
        end
      end
    end
)
      if string.sub(string.lower(player.Name), 1, 6) == "guest " or player.Name == "Player1" then
        nameplate.UserPicture.Image = "http://www.roblox.com/Thumbs/Avatar.ashx?x=200&y=200&Format=Png&username=ROBLOX"
      else
        nameplate.UserPicture.Image = "http://www.roblox.com/Thumbs/Avatar.ashx?x=200&y=200&Format=Png&username=" .. player.Name
      end
      spawn(function()
      
      repeat
        wait()
      until player:FindFirstChild("Badges")
      player.Badges.ChildAdded:connect(function()
        
        nameplate.Badge.Image = badgeFind(player)
      end
)
    end
)
      nameplate.Position = position
      nameplate.Parent = script.Parent
    end
  end
)
end

checkBattle = function(player)
  
  if game.Players:FindFirstChild(player.Name) then
    if p.PlayerGui.DialogTalk.TalkB.Talk.Visible == true then
      fadeytext("You\'re currently busy.")
    else
      if not p:FindFirstChild("PokemonParty") or #p:FindFirstChild("PokemonParty"):GetChildren() == 0 then
        fadeytext("You have no Pokemon! What are you going to battle with?")
      else
        if workspace.Remotes.AntiDupe:InvokeServer(game.Players:FindFirstChild(player.Name)) == true then
          fadeytext(player.Name .. " is currently busy.")
        else
          if not game.Players:FindFirstChild(player.Name):FindFirstChild("TradeValue") or game.Players:FindFirstChild(player.Name).BattleValue.Value == false then
            fadeytext(player.Name .. " has player battles off.")
          else
            if not game.Players:FindFirstChild(player.Name):FindFirstChild("PokemonParty") or #game.Players:FindFirstChild(player.Name):FindFirstChild("PokemonParty"):GetChildren() == 0 then
              fadeytext(player.Name .. " has no Pokemon! You can\'t battle someone with no Pokemon!")
            else
              if not checkHack(p) then
                fadeytext("You have a hacked Pokemon.")
              else
                if not checkHack(game.Players:FindFirstChild(player.Name)) then
                  fadeytext("You can\'t trade people who have hacked Pokemon!")
                else
                  return true
                end
              end
            end
          end
        end
      end
    end
  end
  return false
end

Battle = function(player)
  
  local success, error = pcall(function()
    
    if checkBattle(player) then
      if cancel then
        cancel:disconnect()
      end
      if waitforaction then
        waitforaction:disconnect()
      end
      if battlestart then
        battlestart:disconnect()
      end
      p.PlayerGui.Main.PVPGameModes.Banlist.Position = UDim2.new(1, -180, 0, 0)
      p.PlayerGui.Main.PVPGameModes.Rated.Rating.Text = "Your Rating: " .. game.ReplicatedStorage.RatedRankings:InvokeServer(p.userId)
      gui.BlackScreen.Visible = true
      p.PlayerGui.Main.PVPGameModes.Visible = true
      waitforaction = game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.PVP.BattleRequest.OnClientEvent:connect(function(...)
      
      local tuple = {...}
      waiting = false
      wait(0.3)
      if tuple[1] == "Decline" then
        gui.Cancel.Visible = false
        gui.BlackScreen.Visible = false
        gui.MessageThing.Text = playerSelected.Name .. " doesn\'t want to battle you at this time."
      end
      wait(1)
      gui.MessageThing.TextTransparency = 1
    end
)
      cancel = gui.Cancel.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
      
      waiting = false
      if cancel:disconnect() then
        cancel:disconnect()
      end
      gui.BlackScreen.Visible = false
      game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.PVP.AnswerRequest:FireServer("Cancel", game.Players:FindFirstChild(playerSelected.Name))
      gui.MessageThing.TextTransparency = 1
      gui.Cancel.Visible = false
    end
)
      battlestart = game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.PVP.LeadSelection.OnClientEvent:connect(function()
      
      waiting = false
      gui.MessageThing.Transparency = 1
      gui.Cancel.Visible = false
    end
)
      while waiting and game.Players:FindFirstChild(playerSelected.Name) do
        for i = 1, 3 do
          if waiting then
            wait(0.2)
            gui.MessageThing.Text = "Waiting" .. string.rep(".", i)
          end
        end
      end
      do
        if not game.Players:FindFirstChild(playerSelected.Name) then
          fadeytext(playerSelected.Name .. " has left the server.")
          gui.BlackScreen.Visible = false
        end
      end
    end
  end
)
  if error then
    print("Error:", error)
    gui.BlackScreen.Visible = false
    waiting = false
    gui.Cancel.Visible = false
  end
end

script.Parent.Actions.Position = UDim2.new(0, 0, 0, 0)
if not game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character then
  local char = game.Players.LocalPlayer.CharacterAdded:wait()
end
gui = p.PlayerGui:WaitForChild("Main")
local NamePlate = script.Parent.NamePlate:Clone()
script.Parent.NamePlate:Destroy()
deleteButtons = function()
  
  for i,v in ipairs(script.Parent:GetChildren()) do
    if v:IsA("TextButton") then
      v:Destroy()
    end
  end
end

refresh = function()
  
  makeGui(NamePlate:Clone(), p, UDim2.new(0, 0, 0, 0))
  for i,v in ipairs(game.Players:GetPlayers()) do
    if v ~= p then
      ypos = ypos + 0.1
      makeGui(NamePlate:Clone(), R7_PC38, UDim2.new(0, 0, ypos, 0))
    end
  end
end

refresh()
p.PlayerGui.Main.PVPGameModes.AnGoes.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
  
  p.PlayerGui.Main.PVPGameModes.Visible = false
  if checkBattle(playerSelected) then
    game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.PVP.BattleRequest:FireServer(game.Players:FindFirstChild(playerSelected.Name), "Anything Goes")
    waiting = true
    gui.MessageThing.Text = "Waiting"
    gui.MessageThing.TextTransparency = 0
    gui.MessageThing.TextStrokeTransparency = 0
    gui.Cancel.Visible = true
  else
    gui.BlackScreen.Visible = false
  end
end
)
p.PlayerGui.Main.PVPGameModes.Rated.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
  
  p.PlayerGui.Main.PVPGameModes.Visible = false
  if checkBattle(playerSelected) then
    local accept = game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.PVP.RatedRequest:InvokeServer(game.Players:FindFirstChild(playerSelected.Name), "Rated")
    if accept == true then
      waiting = true
      gui.MessageThing.Text = "Waiting"
      gui.MessageThing.TextTransparency = 0
      gui.MessageThing.TextStrokeTransparency = 0
      gui.Cancel.Visible = true
    else
      fadeytext(accept)
      gui.BlackScreen.Visible = false
    end
  else
    do
      gui.BlackScreen.Visible = false
    end
  end
end
)
p.PlayerGui.Main.PVPGameModes.Random.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
  
  p.PlayerGui.Main.PVPGameModes.Visible = false
  if checkBattle(playerSelected) then
    game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.PVP.BattleRequest:FireServer(game.Players:FindFirstChild(playerSelected.Name), "Random")
    waiting = true
    gui.MessageThing.Text = "Waiting"
    gui.MessageThing.TextTransparency = 0
    gui.MessageThing.TextStrokeTransparency = 0
    gui.Cancel.Visible = true
  else
    gui.BlackScreen.Visible = false
  end
end
)
script.Parent.Actions.Battle.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
  
  if playerSelected then
    Battle(playerSelected)
  end
end
)
script.Parent.Actions.Trade.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
  
  if playerSelected then
    local success, error = pcall(function()
    
    if game.Players:FindFirstChild(playerSelected.Name) then
      if gui.BlackScreen.Visible == true or p.PlayerGui.DialogTalk.TalkB.Talk.Visible == true then
        fadeytext("You\'re currently busy.")
      else
        if p.Name:sub(1, 6) == "Guest " then
          fadeytext("I am sorry, but trading is locked for Guests! Make an account!")
        else
          if not p:FindFirstChild("PokemonParty") or #p:FindFirstChild("PokemonParty"):GetChildren() == 0 then
            fadeytext("You have no Pokemon! What are you going to trade?")
          else
            if workspace.Remotes.AntiDupe:InvokeServer(game.Players:FindFirstChild(playerSelected.Name)) == true then
              fadeytext(playerSelected.Name .. " is currently busy.")
            else
              if (playerSelected and not game.Players:FindFirstChild(playerSelected.Name):FindFirstChild("TradeValue")) or game.Players:FindFirstChild(playerSelected.Name).TradeValue.Value == false then
                fadeytext(playerSelected.Name .. " has trades off.")
              else
                if playerSelected.Name:sub(1, 6) == "Guest " then
                  fadeytext("Guests cannot trade!")
                else
                  if not game.Players:FindFirstChild(playerSelected.Name):FindFirstChild("PokemonParty") or #game.Players:FindFirstChild(playerSelected.Name):FindFirstChild("PokemonParty"):GetChildren() == 0 then
                    fadeytext(playerSelected.Name .. " has no Pokemon! You can\'t trade someone with no Pokemon!")
                  else
                    if not checkHack(p) then
                      fadeytext("You have a hacked Pokemon.")
                    else
                      if p:GetRoleInGroup(1161496) == "Guest" then
                        fadeytext("You have to be in the Project Pokemon Community group to trade.")
                      else
                        if p:GetRoleInGroup(1161496) == "Timeout" then
                          fadeytext("You are prohibited from trading.")
                        else
                          if playerSelected and game.Players:FindFirstChild(playerSelected.Name):GetRoleInGroup(1161496) == "Guest" then
                            fadeytext("The other person is not in the Project Pokemon Community group. They cannot trade.")
                          else
                            if playerSelected and game.Players:FindFirstChild(playerSelected.Name):GetRoleInGroup(1161496) == "Timeout" then
                              fadeytext("The other person is prohibited to trade.")
                            else
                              if playerSelected and not game.Players:FindFirstChild(playerSelected.Name).Badges:FindFirstChild("1") then
                                fadeytext("The other person does not have the first gym badge, they cannot trade.")
                              else
                                if not p.Badges:FindFirstChild("1") then
                                  fadeytext("You do not have the first gym Badges, you cannot trade.")
                                else
                                  if playerSelected and not checkHack(game.Players:FindFirstChild(playerSelected.Name)) then
                                    fadeytext("You can\'t trade people who have hacked Pokemon!")
                                  else
                                    if cancel then
                                      cancel:disconnect()
                                    end
                                    if waitforaction then
                                      waitforaction:disconnect()
                                    end
                                    waiting = true
                                    workspace.Remotes.InitiateTrade:FireServer(game.Players:FindFirstChild(playerSelected.Name))
                                    gui.BlackScreen.Visible = true
                                    gui.MessageThing.Text = "Waiting"
                                    gui.MessageThing.TextTransparency = 0
                                    gui.MessageThing.TextStrokeTransparency = 0
                                    waitforaction = workspace.Remotes.Action.OnClientEvent:connect(function(...)
      
      local tuple = {...}
      waiting = false
      wait(0.3)
      if tuple[1] == "Decline" then
        gui.Cancel.Visible = false
        gui.BlackScreen.Visible = false
        gui.MessageThing.Text = playerSelected.Name .. " has declined your trade request."
      end
      wait(1)
      gui.MessageThing.TextTransparency = 1
    end
)
                                    cancel = gui.Cancel.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
      
      waiting = false
      gui.BlackScreen.Visible = false
      game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.Internal.CancelTrade:FireServer(game.Players:FindFirstChild(playerSelected.Name))
      gui.MessageThing.TextTransparency = 1
      gui.Cancel.Visible = false
      if cancel:disconnect() then
        cancel:disconnect()
      end
    end
)
                                    gui.Cancel.Visible = true
                                    while waiting and playerSelected and game.Players:FindFirstChild(playerSelected.Name) do
                                      for i = 1, 3 do
                                        if waiting then
                                          wait(0.2)
                                          gui.MessageThing.Text = "Waiting" .. string.rep(".", R8_PC351)
                                        end
                                      end
                                    end
                                    do
                                      if playerSelected and not game.Players:FindFirstChild(playerSelected.Name) then
                                        fadeytext(playerSelected.Name .. " has left the server.")
                                        gui.BlackScreen.Visible = false
                                      end
                                    end
                                  end
                                end
                              end
                            end
                          end
                        end
                      end
                    end
                  end
                end
              end
            end
          end
        end
      end
    end
  end
)
    if error then
      print("Error:", error)
      gui.BlackScreen.Visible = false
      waiting = false
      gui.Cancel.Visible = false
    end
  end
end
)
script.Parent.Actions.Info.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
  
  if playerSelected and game.Players:FindFirstChild(playerSelected.Name) then
    if (gui.BlackScreen.Visible == true and gui.BlackScreen.TrainerCard.Visible == false) or p.PlayerGui.DialogTalk.TalkB.Talk.Visible == true then
      fadeytext("You\'re currently busy.")
    else
      _G.TrainerCard(playerSelected)
    end
  end
end
)
checkGuis = function()
  
  local num = 0.1
  for i,v in ipairs(script.Parent:GetChildren()) do
    for _,blah in ipairs(script.Parent:GetChildren()) do
      if v:IsA("TextButton") and blah:IsA("TextButton") and v ~= blah and v.Position == blah.Position then
        for _,guis in ipairs(script.Parent:GetChildren()) do
          if guis:IsA("TextButton") and guis.Name ~= p.Name then
            guis.Position = UDim2.new(0, 0, num, 0)
            num = num + 0.1
          end
        end
      end
    end
  end
  num = ypos
end

creating = nil
game.Players.PlayerAdded:connect(function(player)
  
  repeat
    wait()
  until creating ~= true
  creating = true
  ypos = ypos + 0.1
  makeGui(NamePlate:Clone(), player, UDim2.new(0, 0, ypos, 0))
  creating = false
  checkGuis()
end
)
rechangeGuisPos = function(poschange)
  
  for i,v in ipairs(script.Parent:GetChildren()) do
    if v:IsA("TextButton") and poschange.Position.Y.Scale < v.Position.Y.Scale then
      v.Position = UDim2.new(0, 0, v.Position.Y.Scale - 0.1, 0)
    end
  end
end

game.Players.ChildRemoved:connect(function(player)
  
  if player:IsA("Player") and script.Parent:FindFirstChild(player.Name) then
    ypos = ypos - 0.1
    rechangeGuisPos(script.Parent:FindFirstChild(player.Name))
    script.Parent:FindFirstChild(player.Name):Destroy()
    if playerSelected == player then
      playerSelected = nil
      script.Parent.Actions.Position = UDim2.new(0, 0, 0, 0)
    end
  end
end
)
script.Parent.BattleRequests.CloseLeaderboard.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
  
  if script.Parent.BattleRequests.CloseLeaderboard.Text == "Close Leaderboard" then
    script.Parent.BattleRequests.CloseLeaderboard.Text = "Open Leaderboard"
    script.Parent.BattleRequests.CloseLeaderboard.DropShadow.Text = "Open Leaderboard"
    script.Parent.BattleRequests.CloseLeaderboard.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.new(0, 0.66666666666667, 0)
    script.Parent:TweenPosition(UDim2.new(0.8, -5, -0.25, 0), "Out", "Quad", 0.75, true)
    script.Parent.Actions:TweenPosition(UDim2.new(0, 0, 0, 0), "Out", "Quad", 0.5, true)
  else
    script.Parent.BattleRequests.CloseLeaderboard.Text = "Close Leaderboard"
    script.Parent.BattleRequests.CloseLeaderboard.DropShadow.Text = "Close Leaderboard"
    script.Parent.BattleRequests.CloseLeaderboard.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.new(0.66666666666667, 0, 0)
    script.Parent:TweenPosition(UDim2.new(0.8, -5, 0, 5), "Out", "Bounce", 0.75, true)
  end
end
)
script.Parent.BattleRequests.Refresh.MouseButton1Click:connect(function()
  
  ypos = 0
  script.Parent.BattleRequests.Refresh.Visible = false
  deleteButtons()
  refresh()
  wait(10)
  script.Parent.BattleRequests.Refresh.Visible = true
end
)

  wait()
until game.Players.LocalPlayer
p = game.Players.LocalPlayer
repeat
  wait()
until p:FindFirstChild("TradeValue")
local Math = require(game.ReplicatedStorage.Functions.Math)
script.Parent.On.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
  
  script.Parent.On.TextColor3 = Color3.new(0, 1, 0)
  script.Parent.Off.TextColor3 = Color3.new(1, 0, 0)
  Math:Change(p.TradeValue, true)
end
)
script.Parent.Off.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
  
  script.Parent.Off.TextColor3 = Color3.new(0, 1, 0)
  script.Parent.On.TextColor3 = Color3.new(1, 0, 0)
  Math:Change(p.TradeValue, false)
end
)

================================================================================
-- FILE: StarterGui/Main/LocalScript.local.lua

-- params : ...

walkspeeds = {[false] = 16, [true] = 0}
repeat
  wait()
until game.Players.LocalPlayer
p = game.Players.LocalPlayer
VisibleFunc = function(obj, prop)
  
  for i,v in ipairs(obj:GetChildren()) do
    v.Visible = prop
  end
end

script.Parent.BlackScreen.Changed:connect(function(prop)
  
  if prop == "Visible" then
    if script.Parent.BlackScreen.Visible == false then
      game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.Humanoid.WalkSpeed = 16
      p.PlayerGui.Main.Menu.Visible = true
      if p.PlayerGui:FindFirstChild("TouchGui") then
        p.PlayerGui.TouchGui:FindFirstChild("TouchControlFrame").Visible = true
      end
    else
      if script.Parent.BlackScreen.Visible == true then
        game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.Humanoid.WalkSpeed = 0
        p.PlayerGui.Main.Menu.Visible = false
        if p.PlayerGui:FindFirstChild("TouchGui") then
          p.PlayerGui.TouchGui:FindFirstChild("TouchControlFrame").Visible = false
        end
      end
    end
    if script.Parent.PvPBattle.Visible == true then
      script.Parent.BlackScreen.Visible = true
    end
  end
end
)
repeat
  wait()
until script.Parent.Parent:FindFirstChild("DialogTalk")
script.Parent.Parent.DialogTalk.TalkB.Talk.Changed:connect(function(prop)
  
  if prop == "Visible" then
    if script.Parent.Parent.DialogTalk.TalkB.Talk.Visible == false then
      p.PlayerGui.Main.Menu.Visible = true
      game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.Humanoid.WalkSpeed = 16
      if p.PlayerGui:FindFirstChild("TouchGui") then
        p.PlayerGui.TouchGui:FindFirstChild("TouchControlFrame").Visible = true
      end
    else
      if script.Parent.Parent.DialogTalk.TalkB.Talk.Visible == true then
        game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.Humanoid.WalkSpeed = 0
        p.PlayerGui.Main.Menu.Visible = false
        if p.PlayerGui:FindFirstChild("TouchGui") then
          p.PlayerGui.TouchGui:FindFirstChild("TouchControlFrame").Visible = false
        end
      end
    end
  end
end
)

repeat
  repeat
    wait()
  until game.Players.LocalPlayer
until _G.BattleReady
local banlist = {"Mewtwo", "Ho-Oh", "Lugia", "Slaking", "Kyogre", "Groudon", "Rayquaza", "Deoxys", "Palkia", "Dialga", "Giratina", "Darkrai", "Manaphy", "Arceus", "Kyurem", "Mewthree, Swag Prince"}
local num = 1
for i,v in ipairs(banlist) do
  if v ~= "Mewthree, Swag Prince" then
    script.Parent[tostring(num)].Image = _G.Pokemon[v].Sprites.Mini
    script.Parent[tostring(num)].Visible = true
    num = num + 1
  end
end
print("Banlist initialized")

repeat
  wait()
until game.Players.LocalPlayer
for i,v in ipairs(script.Parent:GetChildren()) do
  do
    if v.Name:match("Pokemon") then
      do
        v.MouseEnter:connect(function()
  
  if v.Status.Text == "FNT" then
    Color3.new(0.60392156862745, 0.73725490196078, 0.85098039215686)
  else
    v.ImageColor3 = Color3.new(0.55294117647059, 0.71764705882353, 0.84313725490196)
  end
end
)
        v.MouseLeave:connect(function()
  
  if v.Status.Text == "FNT" then
    Color3.new(0.44705882352941, 0.58039215686275, 0.73333333333333)
  else
    v.ImageColor3 = Color3.new(0.70980392156863, 0.87450980392157, 1)
  end
end
)
        -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC30: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_THEN_STMT

      end
    end

end

    t[v] = v.TextColor3
    v.MouseEnter:connect(function()
  
  v.TextColor3 = Color3.new(t[v].r - 0.4, t[v].g - 0.4, t[v].b - 0.4)
end
)
    v.MouseLeave:connect(function()
  
  v.TextColor3 = t[v]
end
)
  end
end

-- FILE: StarterGui/Main/PokeBooster/PokeBoosterShop.local.lua

-- params : ...

local Sound = Instance.new("Sound", script.Parent)
Sound.SoundId = "http://www.roblox.com/asset/?id=290841329"
local Sound2 = Instance.new("Sound", script.Parent)
Sound2.SoundId = "http://www.roblox.com/asset/?id=287339370"
local current = nil
getTime = function(tyme)
  
  local first = math.floor(tyme / 60)
  local second = tyme % 60
  if tostring(second):len() == 1 then
    second = "0" .. second
  end
  return first .. ":" .. second
end

local Info = require(game.ReplicatedStorage.Information.Boosters)
local Math = (require(game.ReplicatedStorage.Functions.Math))
local Change = nil
for i,v in ipairs(script.Parent:GetChildren()) do
  do
    if v:IsA("ImageButton") and v.Name ~= "Close" and v.Name ~= "Shop" and v.Name ~= "Loading" and v.Name ~= "Prompt" then
      do
        v.MouseEnter:connect(function()
  
  v.ImageColor3 = Color3.new(0.70196078431373, 0.70196078431373, 0.70196078431373)
end
)
        v.MouseLeave:connect(function()
  
  v.ImageColor3 = Color3.new(1, 1, 1)
end
)
        v.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
  
  current = v.Name
  local stuff = current
  if Change then
    Change:disconnect()
  end
  script.Parent.Shop.Title.Text = Info[v.Name].Title
  script.Parent.Shop.Title.TextLabel.Text = script.Parent.Shop.Title.Text
  script.Parent.Shop.SubTitle.Text = Info[v.Name].SubTitle
  script.Parent.Shop.SubTitle.TextLabel.Text = script.Parent.Shop.SubTitle.Text
  script.Parent.Shop.Ten.Price.Pokedollars.Cost.Text = "Pokedollars: $" .. Info[v.Name].Ten.Pokedollar
  local TenAsset = game:GetService("MarketplaceService"):GetProductInfo(Info[v.Name].Ten.Product, Enum.InfoType.Product)
  script.Parent.Shop.Ten.Price.Robux.Cost.Text = "Robux: $" .. TenAsset.PriceInRobux
  script.Parent.Shop.Twenty.Price.Pokedollars.Cost.Text = "Pokedollars: $" .. Info[v.Name].Twenty.Pokedollar
  local TwentyAsset = game:GetService("MarketplaceService"):GetProductInfo(Info[v.Name].Twenty.Product, Enum.InfoType.Product)
  script.Parent.Shop.Twenty.Price.Robux.Cost.Text = "Robux: $" .. TwentyAsset.PriceInRobux
  script.Parent.Shop.Sixty.Price.Pokedollars.Cost.Text = "Pokedollars: $" .. Info[v.Name].Sixty.Pokedollar
  local SixtyAsset = game:GetService("MarketplaceService"):GetProductInfo(Info[v.Name].Sixty.Product, Enum.InfoType.Product)
  script.Parent.Shop.Sixty.Price.Robux.Cost.Text = "Robux: $" .. SixtyAsset.PriceInRobux
  if p.PokeBooster:FindFirstChild(current) then
    script.Parent.Shop.TimeLeft.Text = "Time Left: " .. getTime(p.PokeBooster:FindFirstChild(current).Value)
    script.Parent.Shop.TimeLeft.DropShadow.Text = script.Parent.Shop.TimeLeft.Text
    Change = p.PokeBooster:FindFirstChild(stuff).Changed:connect(function(val)
    
    script.Parent.Shop.TimeLeft.Text = "Time Left: " .. getTime(p.PokeBooster:FindFirstChild(stuff).Value)
    script.Parent.Shop.TimeLeft.DropShadow.Text = script.Parent.Shop.TimeLeft.Text
  end
)
  else
    script.Parent.Shop.TimeLeft.Text = "Time Left: " .. getTime(0)
    script.Parent.Shop.TimeLeft.DropShadow.Text = script.Parent.Shop.TimeLeft.Text
  end
  Sound:Play()
  script.Parent.Shop:TweenPosition(UDim2.new(0, 0, 0, 0), "Out", "Quad", 0.5, true)
  script.Parent.Shop.ImageColor3 = v.Title.TextColor3
  v.ImageColor3 = Color3.new(1, 1, 1)
end
)
        -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC73: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_THEN_STMT

        -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC73: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_STMT

      end
    end
  end
end
local Yes, No = nil, nil
hash = function(num)
  
  return (num + 4) * 8
end

dehash = function(num)
  
  return num / 8 - 4
end

local Sound3 = Instance.new("Sound", script.Parent)
Sound3.SoundId = "http://www.roblox.com/asset/?id=142766373"
local Sound4 = Instance.new("Sound", script.Parent)
do
  Sound4.SoundId = "http://www.roblox.com/asset/?id=134732869"
  updateMoney = function()
  
  script.Parent.MoneyAmount.Text = "Pokedollars: $" .. dehash(p.Money.Value)
  script.Parent.MoneyAmount.DropShadow.Text = script.Parent.MoneyAmount.Text
end

  repeat
    wait()
  until game.Players.LocalPlayer
  p = game.Players.LocalPlayer
  local shopbuttons = {[script.Parent.Shop.Ten] = 10, [script.Parent.Shop.Twenty] = 20, [script.Parent.Shop.Sixty] = 60}
  for i,v in pairs(shopbuttons) do
    i.Price.Pokedollars.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
  
  if current ~= nil then
    if Yes then
      Yes:disconnect()
    end
    if No then
      No:disconnect()
    end
    if Change then
      Change:disconnect()
    end
    local cost = Info[current][i.Name].Pokedollar
    do
      script.Parent.Prompt.Yes.Visible = true
      script.Parent.Prompt.No.Visible = true
      script.Parent.Prompt.AQ.Text = "You are about to buy " .. Info[current].String .. " [" .. v .. " Minutes] for $" .. cost .. " Pokedollars."
      script.Parent.Prompt.AQ.DropShadow.Text = script.Parent.Prompt.AQ.Text
      script.Parent.Prompt:TweenPosition(UDim2.new(0, 0, 0, 0), "Out", "Quad", 0.5)
      No = script.Parent.Prompt.No.MouseButton1Click:connect(function()
    
    script.Parent.Prompt:TweenPosition(UDim2.new(0, 0, -2, 0), "Out", "Quad", 0.4)
  end
)
      Yes = script.Parent.Prompt.Yes.MouseButton1Click:connect(function()
    
    if cost <= dehash(p.Money.Value) then
      script.Parent.Prompt.Yes.Visible = false
      script.Parent.Prompt.No.Visible = false
      local done = nil
      do
        Sound2:Play()
        script.Parent.Close.Visible = false
        script.Parent.Loading.Picture.Rotation = 0
        script.Parent.Loading.Question.Text = "Buying " .. Info[current].String .. " [10 Minutes] for  $" .. cost .. " Pokedollars, please wait..."
        script.Parent.Loading:TweenPosition(UDim2.new(0, 0, 0, 0), "Out", "Quad", 0.5, true, function()
      
      script.Parent.Prompt.Position = UDim2.new(0, 0, -2, 0)
    end
)
        spawn(function()
      
      while wait(0.04) and done == nil do
        script.Parent.Loading.Picture.Rotation = script.Parent.Loading.Picture.Rotation + 5
      end
    end
)
        wait(1)
        local check, moneyLeft = Math:BuyBooster(current, i.Name)
        repeat
          wait()
        until check ~= nil
        if check == true then
          local tintin = current
          do
            script.Parent.Shop.TimeLeft.Text = "Time Left: " .. getTime(p.PokeBooster:FindFirstChild(tintin).Value)
            script.Parent.Shop.TimeLeft.DropShadow.Text = script.Parent.Shop.TimeLeft.Text
            updateMoney()
            Sound4:Play()
            Change = p.PokeBooster:FindFirstChild(tintin).Changed:connect(function(val)
      
      script.Parent.Shop.TimeLeft.Text = "Time Left: " .. getTime(p.PokeBooster:FindFirstChild(tintin).Value)
      script.Parent.Shop.TimeLeft.DropShadow.Text = script.Parent.Shop.TimeLeft.Text
      if getfenv()[tintin] then
        getfenv()[tintin]:disconnect()
      end
      if p.PokeBooster:FindFirstChild(tintin) then
        script.Parent[tintin].TimeLeft.Text = getTime(p.PokeBooster:FindFirstChild(tintin).Value)
        getfenv()[tintin] = p.PokeBooster:FindFirstChild(tintin).Changed:connect(function()
        
        script.Parent[tintin].TimeLeft.Text = getTime(p.PokeBooster:FindFirstChild(tintin).Value)
      end
)
      end
    end
)
            script.Parent.Loading:TweenPosition(UDim2.new(0, 0, -2, 0), "Out", "Quad", 0.5, true)
            done = true
            script.Parent.Close.Visible = true
          end
        else
          do
            Sound3:Play()
            script.Parent.Loading:TweenPosition(UDim2.new(0, 0, -2, 0), "Out", "Quad", 0.5, true)
            script.Parent.Close.Visible = true
          end
        end
      end
    end
  end
)
    end
  end
end
)
    i.Price.Robux.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
  
  if current ~= nil then
    game:GetService("MarketplaceService"):PromptProductPurchase(p, Info[current][i.Name].Product)
  end
end
)
  end
  local allow = {script.Parent.EVs, script.Parent.Legendary, script.Parent.Experience, script.Parent.CatchRate}
  _G.PokeBoosters = function()
  
  updateMoney()
  script.Parent.Shop.Position = UDim2.new(0, 0, -1.5, 0)
  current = nil
  script.Parent.Visible = true
  for i,v in ipairs(allow) do
    do
      v.TimeLeft.TextColor3 = v.Title.TextColor3
      if getfenv()[v.Name] then
        getfenv()[v.Name]:disconnect()
      end
      if p.PokeBooster:FindFirstChild(v.Name) then
        do
          getfenv()[v.Name] = p.PokeBooster:FindFirstChild(v.Name).Changed:connect(function()
    
    v.TimeLeft.Text = getTime(p.PokeBooster:FindFirstChild(v.Name).Value)
  end
)
          -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC59: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_THEN_STMT

          -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC59: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_STMT

        end
      end
    end
  end
end

  repeat
    wait()
  until p:FindFirstChild("PokeBooster")
  p.PokeBooster.ChildAdded:connect(function(tintin)
  
  if tintin.Name ~= "Value" then
    if getfenv()[tintin.Name] then
      getfenv()[tintin.Name]:disconnect()
    end
    if p.PokeBooster:FindFirstChild(tintin.Name) then
      script.Parent[tintin.Name].TimeLeft.Text = getTime(p.PokeBooster:FindFirstChild(tintin.Name).Value)
      getfenv()[tintin.Name] = p.PokeBooster:FindFirstChild(tintin.Name).Changed:connect(function()
    
    script.Parent[tintin.Name].TimeLeft.Text = getTime(p.PokeBooster:FindFirstChild(tintin.Name).Value)
  end
)
    end
  end
end
)
end

================================================================================

end

    script.Parent.Rotation = i
  end
end
