================================================================================
-- FILE: StarterGui/Main/Pokedex/Pokedex.local.lua
================================================================================

-- params : ...

repeat
  wait()
until game.Players.LocalPlayer:FindFirstChild("Pokedex")
local orderOfTable = {}
local Pokemon = require(game.ReplicatedStorage.Information.Pokemon)
local currentlyOn = 10
local amountOfPokemon = 420
local p = game.Players.LocalPlayer
for i,v in pairs(Pokemon) do
  if v.Form == nil then
    orderOfTable[v.Pokedex] = i
  end
end
number = function(dex)
  
  local num = tostring(dex)
  if num:len() == 1 then
    return "#00" .. num
  else
    if num:len() == 2 then
      return "#0" .. num
    else
      if num:len() == 3 then
        return "#" .. num
      end
    end
  end
end

local Sound = Instance.new("Sound", script.Parent)
Sound.SoundId = "http://www.roblox.com/asset/?id=287339370"
local Sound2 = Instance.new("Sound", script.Parent)
Sound2.SoundId = "http://www.roblox.com/asset/?id=318763788"
local info = script.Parent.Information
local Sound3 = Instance.new("Sound", script.Parent)
Sound3.SoundId = "rbxassetid://138097048"
local Sound4 = Instance.new("Sound", script.Parent)
do
  Sound4.SoundId = "http://www.roblox.com/asset/?id=290841329"
  Sound4.Name = "Beep"
  getSizeTable = function(tab)
  
  local num = 0
  for i,v in pairs(tab) do
    num = num + 1
  end
  return num
end

  Scroll = function(pokemonTable, currentNumber)
  
  local numberPokemon = currentNumber - 9
  resetButtons()
  for i = 1, 10 do
    buttonSetUp(script.Parent.Background["Item" .. i], pokemonTable, numberPokemon)
    numberPokemon = numberPokemon + 1
  end
end

  moveDown = function(tab)
  
  currentlyOn = currentlyOn + 10
  Scroll(tab, currentlyOn)
end

  findLastNumber = function(tab)
  
  local num = 0
  for i,v in pairs(tab) do
    if num < Pokemon[v].Pokedex and Pokemon[v].Pokedex < 4000 then
      num = Pokemon[v].Pokedex
    end
  end
  return num
end

  moveUp = function(tab)
  
  currentlyOn = currentlyOn - 10
  Scroll(tab, currentlyOn)
end

  ResetTable = function()
  
  currentlyOn = 10
  for i,v in pairs(Pokemon) do
    orderOfTable[v.Pokedex] = i
  end
end

  similarTypes = function(strin)
  
  for i,v in pairs(_G.Tables.TypeColors) do
    if strin:lower() == i:lower() then
      return true
    end
  end
  return false
end

  Search = function(searchString)
  
  local number = 1
  currentlyOn = 10
  orderOfTable = {}
  local PokedexTable = {}
  if similarTypes(searchString) then
    for pokeName,poke in pairs(Pokemon) do
      if poke.Type[1]:lower() == searchString:lower() or poke.Type[2] and poke.Type[2]:lower() == searchString:lower() then
        if pokeName ~= "Giratina-O" and poke.Pokedex ~= amountOfPokemon then
          PokedexTable[pokeName] = poke
        else
          -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC48: Unhandled construct in 'MakeBoolean' P1

          if poke.Pokedex == 380 and pokeName == "Rotom" then
            PokedexTable[pokeName] = poke
          end
        end
      end
      if poke.Pokedex == 402 and pokeName == "Deoxys" then
        PokedexTable[pokeName] = poke
      end
    end
  else
    do
      for pokeName,poke in pairs(Pokemon) do
        if pokeName:lower():find(searchString:lower()) then
          if pokeName ~= "Giratina-O" and poke.Pokedex ~= amountOfPokemon then
            PokedexTable[pokeName] = poke
          else
            -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC84: Unhandled construct in 'MakeBoolean' P1

            if poke.Pokedex == 380 and pokeName == "Rotom" then
              PokedexTable[pokeName] = poke
            end
          end
        end
        if poke.Pokedex == 402 and pokeName == "Deoxys" then
          PokedexTable[pokeName] = poke
        end
      end
      do
        for num = 1, amountOfPokemon do
          for i,v in pairs(PokedexTable) do
            if num == v.Pokedex then
              orderOfTable[number] = i
              number = number + 1
            end
          end
        end
        for i,v in pairs(orderOfTable) do
        end
        setUpGui(currentlyOn, orderOfTable)
      end
    end
  end
end

  buttonSetUp = function(Button, pokemonTable, numberPokemon)
  
  local PokedexNum = nil
  if not Pokemon[pokemonTable[numberPokemon]].Pokedex then
    PokedexNum = not pokemonTable[numberPokemon] or "Not Exist"
  end
  if p.Pokedex:FindFirstChild(PokedexNum) then
    Button.ItemName.Text = pokemonTable[numberPokemon]
    Button.ItemName.DropShadow.Text = pokemonTable[numberPokemon]
    Button.ItemImage.Image = Pokemon[pokemonTable[numberPokemon]].Sprites.Mini
    if p.Pokedex:FindFirstChild(PokedexNum):FindFirstChild("Caught") and p.Pokedex:FindFirstChild(PokedexNum):FindFirstChild("Caught").Value == true then
      Button.Caught.Visible = true
    else
      Button.Caught.Visible = false
    end
  else
    Button.Caught.Visible = false
    Button.ItemName.Text = "?????"
    Button.ItemName.DropShadow.Text = "?????"
    Button.ItemImage.Image = ""
  end
  if pokemonTable[numberPokemon] ~= nil then
    Button.ItemNumber.Text = number(PokedexNum)
    Button.ItemNumber.DropShadow.Text = number(PokedexNum)
  else
    Button.ItemNumber.Text = "#???"
    Button.ItemNumber.DropShadow.Text = "#???"
  end
end

  resetButtons = function()
  
  for i,v in ipairs(script.Parent.Background:GetChildren()) do
    if v:IsA("TextButton") then
      v.Caught.Visible = false
      v.ItemName.Text = "?????"
      v.ItemName.DropShadow.Text = "?????"
      v.ItemImage.Image = ""
      v.ItemNumber.Text = "#???"
      v.ItemNumber.DropShadow.Text = "#???"
    end
  end
end

  setUpGui = function(currentNumber, pokemonTable)
  
  local numberPokemon = currentNumber - 9
  if down then
    down:disconnect()
  end
  if up then
    up:disconnect()
  end
  local Clicks = 0
  resetButtons()
  for i = 1, 10 do
    buttonSetUp(script.Parent.Background["Item" .. i], pokemonTable, numberPokemon)
    numberPokemon = numberPokemon + 1
  end
  local Amount = getSizeTable(pokemonTable)
  if Amount > 10 then
    Clicks = math.ceil(Amount / 10)
    script.Parent.Background.Scroller.Rectangle.Size = UDim2.new(0, 42, 0.25, 0)
    script.Parent.Background.Scroller.Rectangle.Position = UDim2.new(0, 0, 0.15, 0)
  else
    Clicks = 0
    script.Parent.Background.Scroller.Rectangle.Size = UDim2.new(0, 42, 0.25, 0)
    script.Parent.Background.Scroller.Rectangle.Position = UDim2.new(0, 0, 0.15, 0)
  end
  down = script.Parent.Background.Scroller.DownArrow.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
    
    if script.Parent.Background.Item10.ItemNumber.Text ~= "#???" and script.Parent.Background.Item10.ItemNumber.Text ~= number(findLastNumber(pokemonTable)) then
      Sound.Pitch = 1
      Sound:Play()
      moveDown(orderOfTable)
      script.Parent.Background.Scroller.Rectangle.Position = UDim2.new(0, 0, script.Parent.Background.Scroller.Rectangle.Position.Y.Scale + 0.45 / Clicks, script.Parent.Background.Scroller.Rectangle.Position.Y.Offset)
    end
  end
)
  up = script.Parent.Background.Scroller.UpArrow.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
    
    if pokemonTable[1] and script.Parent.Background.Item1.ItemNumber.Text ~= number(Pokemon[pokemonTable[1]].Pokedex) then
      Sound.Pitch = 0.8
      Sound:Play()
      moveUp(orderOfTable)
      script.Parent.Background.Scroller.Rectangle.Position = UDim2.new(0, 0, script.Parent.Background.Scroller.Rectangle.Position.Y.Scale - 0.45 / Clicks, script.Parent.Background.Scroller.Rectangle.Position.Y.Offset)
    end
  end
)
end

  local deb = false
  for i,v in ipairs(script.Parent.Background:GetChildren()) do
    if v:IsA("TextButton") then
      v.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
  
  if deb == false and v.ItemName.Text ~= "?????" then
    deb = true
    info:TweenPosition(UDim2.new(0.5, 0, 0, 0), "Out", "Quad", 0.25, true)
    Sound2:Play()
    wait(0.25)
    info.Type1.Visible = false
    info.Type2.Visible = false
    local pokeSelect = v.ItemName.Text
    info.Picture.PokePic.Image = Pokemon[pokeSelect].Sprites.Front
    info.PokeName.Text = pokeSelect
    info.PokeName.DropShadow.Text = pokeSelect
    info.PokeNumber.Text = number(Pokemon[pokeSelect].Pokedex) .. "     "
    info.PokeNumber.DropShadow.Text = number(Pokemon[pokeSelect].Pokedex) .. "     "
    if Pokemon[pokeSelect].Type[1] then
      info.Type1.ImageColor3 = _G.Tables.TypeColors[Pokemon[pokeSelect].Type[1]]
      info.Type1.Visible = true
      info.Type1.Title.Text = Pokemon[pokeSelect].Type[1]
      info.Type1.Title.DropShadow.Text = Pokemon[pokeSelect].Type[1]
    end
    if Pokemon[pokeSelect].Type[2] then
      info.Type2.ImageColor3 = _G.Tables.TypeColors[Pokemon[pokeSelect].Type[2]]
      info.Type2.Visible = true
      info.Type2.Title.Text = Pokemon[pokeSelect].Type[2]
      info.Type2.Title.DropShadow.Text = Pokemon[pokeSelect].Type[2]
    end
    if v.Caught.Visible == true then
      info.PokeInfo.Height.Text = "Height: " .. Pokemon[pokeSelect].Height
      info.PokeInfo.Height.DropShadow.Text = "Height: " .. Pokemon[pokeSelect].Height
      info.PokeInfo.Weight.Text = "Weight: " .. Pokemon[pokeSelect].Weight
      info.PokeInfo.Weight.DropShadow.Text = "Weight: " .. Pokemon[pokeSelect].Weight
      info.Description.Title.Text = Pokemon[pokeSelect].PokedexDesc
      info.PokeInfo.Species.Text = Pokemon[pokeSelect].Species
      info.PokeInfo.Species.DropShadow.Text = Pokemon[pokeSelect].Species
    else
      info.PokeInfo.Height.Text = "Height: ?????"
      info.PokeInfo.Height.DropShadow.Text = "Height: ?????"
      info.PokeInfo.Weight.Text = "Weight: ?????"
      info.PokeInfo.Weight.DropShadow.Text = "Weight: ?????"
      info.Description.Title.Text = "No Pokedex data acquired for this Pokemon."
      info.PokeInfo.Species.Text = "Species Unknown"
      info.PokeInfo.Species.DropShadow.Text = "Species Unknown"
    end
    Sound3:Play()
    info:TweenPosition(UDim2.new(1, 0, 0, 0), "Out", "Bounce", 0.75, true)
    wait(0.75)
    deb = false
  end
end
)
      v.MouseEnter:connect(function()
  
  if deb == false and v.ItemName.Text ~= "?????" then
    v.ItemName.TextColor3 = Color3.new(0.33333333333333, 0.66666666666667, 1)
  end
end
)
      v.MouseLeave:connect(function()
  
  v.ItemName.TextColor3 = Color3.new(1, 1, 1)
end
)
    end
  end
  script.Parent.Search.SearchBox.FocusLost:connect(function()
  
  Search(script.Parent.Search.SearchBox.Text)
  script.Parent.Search.SearchBox.Text = "Search"
end
)
  script.Parent.Reset.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
  
  Sound4:Play()
  script.Parent.Search.SearchBox.Text = "Search"
  info:TweenPosition(UDim2.new(0.5, 0, 0, 0), "Out", "Quad", 0.25, true)
  ResetTable()
  setUpGui(currentlyOn, orderOfTable)
end
)
  script.Parent.Close.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
  
  script.Parent.Visible = false
  if script.Parent.Parent:FindFirstChild("BlackScreen") then
    script.Parent.Parent:FindFirstChild("BlackScreen").Visible = false
  end
end
)
  setUpGui(currentlyOn, orderOfTable)
  script.Parent.Changed:connect(function(prop)
  
  if prop == "Visible" and script.Parent.Visible == true then
    script.Parent.Search.SearchBox.Text = "Search"
    info.Position = UDim2.new(0, 0, 0, 0)
    ResetTable()
    setUpGui(currentlyOn, orderOfTable)
  end
end
)
  _G.Pokedex = function()
  
  script.Parent.Parent.BlackScreen.Visible = true
  script.Parent.Visible = true
end

end

================================================================================
-- FILE: StarterGui/Main/PokemonShop/BagBG/_G.PokeShop.local.lua
================================================================================

-- params : ...

repeat
  repeat
    repeat
      wait()
    until _G.ItemsReady
  until game.Players.LocalPlayer
until game.Players.LocalPlayer:FindFirstChild("Bag")
p = game.Players.LocalPlayer
local pokemonprices = {Dratini = 15000, Electabuzz = 35000, Magmar = 35000, Snorlax = 70000, Aerodactyl = 90000, Porygon = 150000, Duskull = 200000, Feebas = 300000}
local Math = require(game.ReplicatedStorage.Functions.Math)
hash = function(num)
  
  return (num + 4) * 8
end

dehash = function(num)
  
  return num / 8 - 4
end

Pokedex = require(game.ReplicatedStorage.Functions.Pokedex)
for i,v in pairs(pokemonprices) do
  do
    script.Parent.Pokemon[i].Text = i .. ": $" .. v
  end
end
updatecash = function()
  
  script.Parent.Money.Text = "$" .. dehash(p.Money.Value)
end

local debounce = false
bp = script.Parent
for i,cool in ipairs(script.Parent.Pokemon:GetChildren()) do
  if cool:IsA("TextButton") then
    cool.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
  
  updatecash()
  if buyevent then
    buyevent:disconnect()
  end
  bp.ItemImg.Image = _G.Pokemon[cool.Name].Sprites.Mini
  script.Parent.Parent.BuyButton.Visible = true
  buyevent = script.Parent.Parent.BuyButton.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
    
    local money = p.Money.Value
    local check, moneyLeft = Math:PokeBuy(cool.Name, dehash(p.Money.Value))
    if check == true and debounce == false then
      debounce = true
      repeat
        wait()
      until p.Money.Value ~= money
      updatecash()
      if not Pokedex:Check(cool.Name, p) then
        Pokedex:Create(cool.Name, true)
      else
        Pokedex:Caught(cool.Name)
      end
      _G.Create(cool.Name, p.PokemonParty, 35, true)
      debounce = false
      if #p.PokemonParty:GetChildren() >= 6 then
        script.Parent.Parent.Visible = false
        script.Parent.Parent.Parent.BlackScreen.Visible = false
      end
    end
  end
)
end
)
  end
end
script.Parent.Parent.Close.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
  
  script.Parent.Parent.Visible = false
  script.Parent.Parent.Parent.BlackScreen.Visible = false
  p.Character.Humanoid.WalkSpeed = 16
end
)
_G.PokemonShop = function()
  
  updatecash()
  bp.ItemImg.Image = ""
  script.Parent.Parent.BuyButton.Visible = false
  script.Parent.Parent.Parent.PokemonShop.Visible = true
  script.Parent.Parent.Parent.BlackScreen.Visible = true
  p.Character.Humanoid.WalkSpeed = 0
end


================================================================================
-- FILE: StarterGui/Main/PvPBattle/MuteButton/LocalScript.local.lua
================================================================================

-- params : ...

script.Parent.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
  
  if game.Players.LocalPlayer.PlayerGui:FindFirstChild("BattleSound") then
    local sound = game.Players.LocalPlayer.PlayerGui:FindFirstChild("BattleSound")
    if sound.Volume > 0.2 then
      sound.Volume = 0
      script.Parent.Text = "Unmute"
    else
      if sound.Volume < 0.2 then
        sound.Volume = 0.25
        script.Parent.Text = "Mute"
      end
    end
  end
end
)

================================================================================
-- FILE: StarterGui/Main/PvPBattle/TheirBox/Health/ColorChange.local.lua
================================================================================

-- params : ...

repeat
  wait()
until game.Players.LocalPlayer.PlayerGui
script.Parent.Changed:connect(function(prop)
  
  if prop == "Size" then
    if script.Parent.Size.X.Offset > 54 then
      script.Parent.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.new(0.3921568627451, 0.62745098039216, 0.4078431372549)
    else
      if script.Parent.Size.X.Offset <= 54 and script.Parent.Size.X.Offset >= 40 then
        script.Parent.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.new(0.8, 0.61176470588235, 0.4078431372549)
      else
        if script.Parent.Size.X.Offset < 27 and script.Parent.Size.X.Offset > 0 then
          script.Parent.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.new(0.7843137254902, 0.36078431372549, 0.32941176470588)
        end
      end
    end
  end
end
)

    else
      if script.Parent.Size.X.Offset <= 54 and script.Parent.Size.X.Offset >= 40 then
        script.Parent.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.new(0.8, 0.61176470588235, 0.4078431372549)
      else
        if script.Parent.Size.X.Offset < 27 and script.Parent.Size.X.Offset > 0 then

================================================================================
-- FILE: StarterGui/Main/Request/LocalScript.local.lua
================================================================================

-- params : ...

workspace.Remotes.InitiateTrade.OnClientEvent:connect(function(player, argument2)
  
  if script.Parent.Parent.BlackScreen.Visible == false and script.Parent.Parent.Parent.DialogTalk.TalkB.Talk.Visible == false then
    if argument2 ~= nil then
      script.Parent.Visible = false
      script.Parent.Parent.BlackScreen.Visible = false
    else
      if argument2 == nil then
        if accept then
          accept:disconnect()
        end
        if decline then
          decline:disconnect()
        end
        script.Parent.Parent.InteractBG.Visible = false
        script.Parent.Parent.BlackScreen.Visible = true
        for i,v in ipairs(script.Parent.Parent.BlackScreen:GetChildren()) do
          v.Visible = false
        end
        script.Parent.Parent.Pokedex.Visible = false
        script.Parent.Parent.Backpack.Visible = false
        script.Parent.Parent.Party.Visible = false
        script.Parent.Parent.PCSystem.Visible = false
        script.Parent.Frame.ImageLabel.Image = "http://www.roblox.com/Thumbs/Avatar.ashx?x=100&y=100&username=" .. player.Name
        script.Parent.Message.Text = player.Name .. " sent you a trade request."
        script.Parent.Visible = true
        accept = script.Parent.Accept.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
    
    script.Parent.Visible = false
    if player ~= nil and game.Players:FindFirstChild(player.Name) then
      workspace.Remotes.Action:FireServer("Accept", player)
    else
      script.Parent.Parent.BlackScreen.Visible = false
    end
  end
)
        decline = script.Parent.Decline.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
    
    script.Parent.Visible = false
    script.Parent.Parent.BlackScreen.Visible = game.Players.LocalPlayer.InBattle.Value
    if player ~= nil then
      workspace.Remotes.Action:FireServer("Decline", player)
    end
  end
)
      end
    end
  end
end
)
game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.Internal.CancelTrade.OnClientEvent:connect(function()
  
  script.Parent.Visible = false
  script.Parent.Parent.BlackScreen.Visible = game.Players.LocalPlayer.InBattle.Value
end
)

================================================================================
-- FILE: StarterGui/Main/Roulette/Title/LocalScript.local.lua

-- params : ...

info = {Color3.new(0.81176470588235, 0.94117647058824, 0.61960784313725), Color3.new(0.65882352941176, 0.85882352941176, 0.65882352941176), Color3.new(0.47450980392157, 0.74117647058824, 0.60392156862745), Color3.new(0.23137254901961, 0.52549019607843, 0.52549019607843), Color3.new(0.043137254901961, 0.28235294117647, 0.41960784313725), Color3.new(0.55686274509804, 0.37254901960784, 0.52941176470588)}
local val = "up"
script.Parent.Parent.Changed:connect(function(prop)
  
  while script.Parent.Parent.Visible == true do
    script.Parent.TextColor3 = info[math.random(1, #info)]
    wait(0.25)
  end
end
)

================================================================================
-- FILE: StarterGui/Main/Shop/Background/newShop.local.lua
================================================================================

-- params : ...

p = game.Players.LocalPlayer
bp = script.Parent.Parent
_G.shopon = "Recover"
_G.buyItemSelected = ""
hash = function(num)
  
  return (num + 4) * 8
end

dehash = function(num)
  
  return num / 8 - 4
end

local listOfItems = {
Recover = {"Antidote", "Awakening", "Burn Heal", "Full Restore", "Hyper Potion", "Max Elixir", "Paralyze Heal", "Revive", "Potion", "Ice Heal"}
, 
Pokeball = {"Great Ball", "Premier Ball", "Ultra Ball", "Pokeball", "Repeat Ball", "Nest Ball", "Net Ball"}
, 
Competitive = {"Calcium", "Carbos", "HP Up", "Iron", "Mini Stat Reset", "Nature Stone", "PokeImprove", "Protein", "Stat Reset", "Zinc"}
, 
Evolution = {"Common Candy", "Dragon Scale", "Fire Stone", "Friendship Ribbon", "Leaf Stone", "Link Cable Stone", "Metal Coat", "Moon Stone", "Sinnoh Stone", "Thunder Stone", "Water Stone"}
}
local Math = require(game.ReplicatedStorage.Functions.Math)
local Moves = require(game.ReplicatedStorage.Information.Moves)
local Items = (require(game.ReplicatedStorage.Information.Items))
local up, down = nil, nil
repeat
  wait()
until game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character
alphabetize = function(t)
  
  local leng = 30
  local h = function(n)
    
    return n .. string.rep(" ", leng - #n):gsub(".", function(c)
      
      return c:byte()
    end
)
  end

  table.sort(t, function(a, b)
    
    do return h(a) < h(b) end
    -- DECOMPILER ERROR: 1 unprocessed JMP targets
  end
)
  return t
end

getListOfItems = function(Directory)
  
  local alphabeticalTable = {}
  local num = 1
  for _,strin in pairs(alphabetize(listOfItems[Directory])) do
    if strin ~= "Shinyfier" and strin ~= "Shinifier" then
      alphabeticalTable[num] = strin
      num = num + 1
    end
  end
  return alphabeticalTable
end

moneyUpdate = function(money)
  
  script.Parent.Parent.MoneyAmount.Text = "Money: $" .. dehash(money)
  script.Parent.Parent.MoneyAmount.DropShadow.Text = script.Parent.Parent.MoneyAmount.Text
end

moveUp = function(Table, Number, Directory)
  
  local safety = {}
  for i,v in ipairs(script.Parent:GetChildren()) do
    if v:IsA("TextButton") and v.Name ~= "Item8" then
      safety[string.sub(v.Name, 5, 5) + 1] = {v.ItemName.Text, v.ItemNumber.Text, v.ItemImage.Image, v.ItemImage.ImageColor3}
    end
  end
  for button,v in pairs(safety) do
    script.Parent:FindFirstChild("Item" .. button).ItemName.Text = v[1]
    script.Parent:FindFirstChild("Item" .. button).ItemName.DropShadow.Text = v[1]
    script.Parent:FindFirstChild("Item" .. button).ItemNumber.Text = v[2]
    script.Parent:FindFirstChild("Item" .. button).ItemNumber.DropShadow.Text = v[2]
    script.Parent:FindFirstChild("Item" .. button).ItemImage.Image = v[3]
    script.Parent:FindFirstChild("Item" .. button).ItemImage.ImageColor3 = v[4]
  end
  script.Parent.Item1.ItemName.Text = Table[Number - 1]
  script.Parent.Item1.ItemName.DropShadow.Text = Table[Number - 1]
  script.Parent.Item1.ItemNumber.Text = "$ " .. Items[Table[Number - 1]].Price
  script.Parent.Item1.ItemNumber.DropShadow.Text = script.Parent.Item1.ItemNumber.Text
  if _G.shopon ~= "TM" then
    script.Parent.Item1.ItemImage.Image = Items[script.Parent.Item1.ItemName.Text].Sprite
    script.Parent.Item1.ItemImage.ImageColor3 = Color3.new(1, 1, 1)
  else
    script.Parent.Item1.ItemImage.ImageColor3 = _G.Tables.TypeColors[Moves[script.Parent.Item1.ItemName.Text].Type]
    script.Parent.Item1.ItemImage.Image = "rbxgameasset://Images/Bag_TM_Normal_Sprite"
  end
  script.Parent.Item1.Visible = true
end

moveDown = function(Table, Number, Directory)
  
  local safety = {}
  for i,v in ipairs(script.Parent:GetChildren()) do
    if v:IsA("TextButton") and v.Name ~= "Item1" then
      safety[tonumber(string.sub(v.Name, 5, 5)) - 1] = {v.ItemName.Text, v.ItemNumber.Text, v.ItemImage.Image, v.ItemImage.ImageColor3}
    end
  end
  for button,v in pairs(safety) do
    script.Parent:FindFirstChild("Item" .. button).ItemName.Text = v[1]
    script.Parent:FindFirstChild("Item" .. button).ItemName.DropShadow.Text = v[1]
    script.Parent:FindFirstChild("Item" .. button).ItemNumber.Text = v[2]
    script.Parent:FindFirstChild("Item" .. button).ItemNumber.DropShadow.Text = v[2]
    script.Parent:FindFirstChild("Item" .. button).ItemImage.Image = v[3]
    script.Parent:FindFirstChild("Item" .. button).ItemImage.ImageColor3 = v[4]
  end
  script.Parent.Item8.ItemName.Text = Table[Number + 1]
  script.Parent.Item8.ItemName.DropShadow.Text = Table[Number + 1]
  script.Parent.Item8.ItemNumber.Text = "$ " .. Items[Table[Number + 1]].Price
  script.Parent.Item8.ItemNumber.DropShadow.Text = script.Parent.Item8.ItemNumber.Text
  if _G.shopon ~= "TM" then
    script.Parent.Item8.ItemImage.Image = Items[script.Parent.Item8.ItemName.Text].Sprite
    script.Parent.Item8.ItemImage.ImageColor3 = Color3.new(1, 1, 1)
  else
    script.Parent.Item8.ItemImage.ImageColor3 = _G.Tables.TypeColors[Moves[script.Parent.Item8.ItemName.Text].Type]
    script.Parent.Item8.ItemImage.Image = "rbxgameasset://Images/Bag_TM_Normal_Sprite"
  end
  script.Parent.Item8.Visible = true
end

local Sound = Instance.new("Sound", script.Parent)
Sound.SoundId = "http://www.roblox.com/asset/?id=287339370"
local Sound2 = Instance.new("Sound", script.Parent)
Sound2.SoundId = "http://www.roblox.com/asset/?id=318763788"
local Sound3 = Instance.new("Sound", script.Parent)
Sound3.SoundId = "http://www.roblox.com/asset/?id=142766373"
local Sound4 = Instance.new("Sound", script.Parent)
Sound4.SoundId = "http://www.roblox.com/asset/?id=134732869"
local buyEvent, textInput, yesButton, noButton = nil, nil, nil, nil
inputAmount = 1
local prompt = script.Parent.Parent.Prompt
for i,v in pairs(script.Parent:GetChildren()) do
  do
    if v:IsA("TextButton") then
      do
        v.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
  
  if buyEvent then
    buyEvent:disconnect()
  end
  if textInput then
    buyEvent:disconnect()
  end
  if yesButton then
    yesButton:disconnect()
  end
  if noButton then
    noButton:disconnect()
  end
  inputAmount = 1
  Sound2:Play()
  script.Parent.Parent.Bottom.ItemName.Text = v.ItemName.Text
  script.Parent.Parent.Bottom.ItemName.DropShadow.Text = v.ItemName.Text
  _G.buyItemSelected = v.ItemName.Text
  if _G.shopon ~= "TM" then
    script.Parent.Parent.Bottom.ItemDescription.DropShadow.Text = Items[_G.buyItemSelected].Description
    script.Parent.Parent.Bottom.ItemDescription.Text = Items[_G.buyItemSelected].Description
  else
    script.Parent.Parent.Bottom.ItemDescription.DropShadow.Text = Moves[_G.buyItemSelected].Desc
    script.Parent.Parent.Bottom.ItemDescription.Text = Moves[_G.buyItemSelected].Desc
  end
  script.Parent.Parent.Bottom:TweenPosition(UDim2.new(0, 0, 1, 0), "Out", "Bounce", 0.75, true)
  buyEvent = script.Parent.Parent.Bottom.Buy.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
    
    moneyUpdate(p.Money.Value)
    Sound2:Play()
    script.Parent.Parent.Bottom.Buy.Visible = false
    local itemString = _G.buyItemSelected
    if string.sub(#itemString, #itemString) ~= "s" then
      itemString = itemString .. "s"
    end
    prompt.Question.Text = "How many " .. itemString .. " do you want to purchase?"
    prompt.Question.DropShadow.Text = prompt.Question.Text
    prompt.Input.Text = "1"
    prompt.CurrentCost.Text = "Cost: $" .. Items[_G.buyItemSelected].Price
    prompt.CurrentCost.DropShadow.Text = "Cost: $" .. Items[_G.buyItemSelected].Price
    prompt.Yes.Visible = true
    prompt.No.Visible = true
    prompt.Input.FocusLost:connect(function()
      
      if type(tonumber(prompt.Input.Text)) == "number" and tonumber(prompt.Input.Text) > 0 then
        if string.len(tonumber(prompt.Input.Text)) < 4 then
          inputAmount = math.floor(tonumber(prompt.Input.Text) + 0.5)
          prompt.Input.Text = inputAmount
          prompt.CurrentCost.Text = "Cost: $" .. Items[_G.buyItemSelected].Price * inputAmount
          prompt.CurrentCost.DropShadow.Text = "Cost: $" .. Items[_G.buyItemSelected].Price * inputAmount
        else
          inputAmount = 999
          prompt.Input.Text = inputAmount
          prompt.CurrentCost.Text = "Cost: $" .. Items[_G.buyItemSelected].Price * inputAmount
          prompt.CurrentCost.DropShadow.Text = "Cost: $" .. Items[_G.buyItemSelected].Price * inputAmount
        end
      else
        prompt.Input.Text = inputAmount
      end
    end
)
    yesButton = prompt.Yes.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
      
      if Items[_G.buyItemSelected].Price * inputAmount <= dehash(p.Money.Value) then
        local done = nil
        do
          Sound2:Play()
          script.Parent.Parent.Close.Visible = false
          script.Parent.Parent.Loading.Picture.Rotation = 0
          script.Parent.Parent.Loading.Question.Text = "Buying " .. inputAmount .. " " .. _G.buyItemSelected .. " for $" .. Items[_G.buyItemSelected].Price * inputAmount .. ", please wait..."
          script.Parent.Parent.Loading:TweenPosition(UDim2.new(0, 0, 0, 0), "Out", "Quad", 0.5, true, function()
        
        prompt.Position = UDim2.new(0, 0, -2, 0)
      end
)
          spawn(function()
        
        while wait(0.04) and done == nil do
          script.Parent.Parent.Loading.Picture.Rotation = script.Parent.Parent.Loading.Picture.Rotation + 5
        end
      end
)
          wait(1)
          local check, moneyLeft = Math:ShopBuy(_G.buyItemSelected, inputAmount)
          repeat
            wait()
          until check ~= nil
          if check == true then
            print("Buying success")
            if p.Bag[_G.shopon]:FindFirstChild(_G.buyItemSelected) then
              Sound4:Play()
              local buying = Math:BuyItem(p.Bag[_G.shopon][_G.buyItemSelected], inputAmount)
              script.Parent.Parent.Loading:TweenPosition(UDim2.new(0, 0, -2, 0), "Out", "Quad", 0.5, true)
              done = true
              script.Parent.Parent.Close.Visible = true
              moneyUpdate(p.Money.Value)
            else
              do
                do
                  Sound4:Play()
                  do
                    local buying = Math:FuncAddItem(_G.buyItemSelected, p.Bag[_G.shopon], inputAmount)
                    script.Parent.Parent.Loading:TweenPosition(UDim2.new(0, 0, -2, 0), "Out", "Quad", 0.5, true)
                    script.Parent.Parent.Close.Visible = true
                    done = true
                    moneyUpdate(p.Money.Value)
                    script.Parent.Parent.Loading:TweenPosition(UDim2.new(0, 0, -2, 0), "Out", "Quad", 0.5, true)
                    script.Parent.Parent.Close.Visible = true
                    done = false
                  end
                  Sound3:Play()
                  script.Parent.Parent.Loading:TweenPosition(UDim2.new(0, 0, -2, 0), "Out", "Quad", 0.5, true)
                  script.Parent.Parent.Close.Visible = true
                end
              end
            end
          end
        end
      end
    end
)
    noButton = prompt.No.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
      
      Sound3:Play()
      prompt.Yes.Visible = false
      prompt.No.Visible = false
      prompt:TweenPosition(UDim2.new(0, 0, -2, 0), "Out", "Quad", 1, true, function()
        
        script.Parent.Parent.Bottom.Buy.Visible = true
      end
)
    end
)
    prompt:TweenPosition(UDim2.new(0, 0, 0, 0), "Out", "Bounce", 1, true)
  end
)
  script.Parent.Parent.Bottom.Buy.Visible = true
end
)
        v.MouseEnter:connect(function()
  
  v.ItemName.TextColor3 = Color3.new(1, 0, 0)
end
)
        v.MouseLeave:connect(function()
  
  v.ItemName.TextColor3 = Color3.new(0, 0.33333333333333, 1)
end
)
        -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC182: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_THEN_STMT

        -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC182: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_STMT

      end
    end
  end
end
hash = function(num)
  
  return (num + 4) * 8
end

dehash = function(num)
  
  return (num - 32) / 8
end

setUpGui = function(Directory)
  
  moneyUpdate(p.Money.Value)
  local Table = getListOfItems(Directory)
  local Amount = 0
  local downNumber = 8
  local upNumber = 1
  local Clicks = 0
  script.Parent.Parent.Bottom.Position = UDim2.new(0, 0, 0.75, 0)
  if up then
    up:disconnect()
  end
  if down then
    down:disconnect()
  end
  for i,v in ipairs(script.Parent:GetChildren()) do
    if v:IsA("TextButton") then
      v.Visible = false
    end
  end
  for i,v in pairs(Table) do
    Amount = Amount + 1
  end
  if Amount > 8 then
    Clicks = Amount - 8
    script.Parent.Scroller.Rectangle.Size = UDim2.new(0, 42, 0.25, 0)
    script.Parent.Scroller.Rectangle.Position = UDim2.new(0, 0, 0.15, 0)
  else
    Clicks = 0
    script.Parent.Scroller.Rectangle.Size = UDim2.new(0, 42, 0.25, 0)
    script.Parent.Scroller.Rectangle.Position = UDim2.new(0, 0, 0.15, 0)
  end
  for i,v in pairs(script.Parent:GetChildren()) do
    if v:IsA("TextButton") and Directory ~= "TM" and Table[tonumber(string.sub(v.Name, 5, 5))] ~= nil then
      v.ItemName.Text = Table[tonumber(string.sub(v.Name, 5, 5))]
      v.ItemName.TextColor3 = Color3.new(0, 0.33333333333333, 1)
      v.ItemNumber.Text = "$ " .. Items[Table[tonumber(string.sub(v.Name, 5, 5))]].Price
      v.ItemNumber.DropShadow.Text = v.ItemNumber.Text
      v.ItemName.DropShadow.Text = v.ItemName.Text
      v.ItemImage.ImageColor3 = Color3.new(1, 1, 1)
      v.ItemImage.Image = Items[Table[tonumber(string.sub(v.Name, 5, 5))]] and Items[Table[tonumber(string.sub(v.Name, 5, 5))]].Sprite or "rbxgameasset://Images/Bag_TM_Normal_Sprite"
      if _G.shopon == "TM" then
        v.ItemImage.ImageColor3 = _G.Tables.TypeColors[Moves[Table[tonumber(string.sub(v.Name, 5, 5))].Name].Type]
      end
      v.Visible = true
    end
  end
  down = script.Parent.Scroller.DownArrow.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
    
    if Table[downNumber + 1] ~= nil then
      Sound.Pitch = 1
      Sound:Play()
      moveDown(Table, downNumber, Directory)
      script.Parent.Scroller.Rectangle.Position = UDim2.new(0, 0, script.Parent.Scroller.Rectangle.Position.Y.Scale + 0.45 / Clicks, script.Parent.Scroller.Rectangle.Position.Y.Offset)
      upNumber = upNumber + 1
      downNumber = downNumber + 1
    end
  end
)
  up = script.Parent.Scroller.UpArrow.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
    
    if Table[upNumber - 1] ~= nil then
      Sound.Pitch = 0.8
      Sound:Play()
      moveUp(Table, upNumber, Directory)
      script.Parent.Scroller.Rectangle.Position = UDim2.new(0, 0, script.Parent.Scroller.Rectangle.Position.Y.Scale - 0.45 / Clicks, script.Parent.Scroller.Rectangle.Position.Y.Offset)
      upNumber = upNumber - 1
      downNumber = downNumber - 1
    end
  end
)
end

repeat
  wait()
until game.Players.LocalPlayer:WaitForChild("Bag"):WaitForChild("Recover")
for i,v in ipairs(script.Parent.Parent.Side:GetChildren()) do
  if v:IsA("TextButton") then
    v.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
  
  _G.shopon = v.Name
  script.Parent.Parent.SpecialShop:TweenPosition(UDim2.new(0, 0, -2, 0), "Out", "Quad", 0.5, true)
  script.Parent.Parent.Special.Title.Text = "Open Special Shop"
  script.Parent.Parent.Special.Title.DropShadow.Text = script.Parent.Parent.Special.Title.Text
  prompt:TweenPosition(UDim2.new(0, 0, -2, 0), "Out", "Bounce", 1.25, true)
  script.Parent.Parent.Side.Slider.Beep.Pitch = 1.1
  script.Parent.Parent.Side.Slider.Beep:Play()
  bp.Bottom.Buy.Visible = false
  setUpGui(v.Name)
end
)
  end
end
_G.Shop = function()
  
  moneyUpdate(p.Money.Value)
  setUpGui(_G.shopon)
  script.Parent.Parent.Position = UDim2.new(0.3, 0, -0.5, 0)
  script.Parent.Parent.Bottom.Buy.Visible = false
  script.Parent.Parent.SpecialShop.Position = UDim2.new(0, 0, -2, 0)
  script.Parent.Parent.Special.Title.Text = "Open Special Shop"
  script.Parent.Parent.Special.Title.DropShadow.Text = script.Parent.Parent.Special.Title.Text
  _G.buyItemSelected = ""
  script.Parent.Parent.Visible = true
  script.Parent.Parent.Parent.BlackScreen.Visible = true
  script.Parent.Parent:TweenPosition(UDim2.new(0.3, 0, 0.25, 0), "Out", "Bounce", 1, true)
end

repeat
  wait()
until game.Players.LocalPlayer
local Sound = Instance.new("Sound", script.Parent)
Sound.SoundId = "http://www.roblox.com/asset/?id=290841329"
Sound.Name = "Beep"
script.Parent.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
  
  if script.Parent.Title.Text == "OPEN" then
    Sound:Play()
    Sound.Pitch = 0.75
    script.Parent.Title.Text = "CLOSE"
    script.Parent.Title.Title.Text = "CLOSE"
    script.Parent.ImageColor3 = Color3.new(1, 0, 0)
    script.Parent.Parent:TweenPosition(UDim2.new(-0.2, 0, 0, 0), "Out", "Bounce", 0.75, true)
  else
    if script.Parent.Title.Text == "CLOSE" then
      Sound:Play()
      Sound.Pitch = 1
      script.Parent.Title.Text = "OPEN"
      script.Parent.Title.Title.Text = "OPEN"
      script.Parent.ImageColor3 = Color3.new(0, 0.66666666666667, 0)
      script.Parent.Parent:TweenPosition(UDim2.new(0, 0, 0, 0), "Out", "Bounce", 0.75, true)
    end
  end
end
)

end

repeat
  wait()
until game.Players.LocalPlayer
devproducts = {["15000 Pokedollars"] = 20386209, ["10 Rare Candies"] = 22201202, ["5 Rare Candies"] = 22201153, ["5 Master Ball"] = 22201343, ["50000 Pokedollars"] = 22201268, ["150000 Pokedollars"] = 22201099, ["Rare Candy"] = 20386212, ["Master Ball"] = 20667779}

================================================================================
-- FILE: StarterGui/Main/SpecificNature/_G.SpecificNature.local.lua

-- params : ...

local StatBoosts = {
Atk = {"Hardy", "Adamant", "Lonely", "Naughty", "Brave"}
, 
Def = {"Bold", "Docile", "Impish", "Lax", "Relaxed"}
, 
SpA = {"Modest", "Mild", "Bashful", "Rash", "Quiet"}
, 
SpD = {"Calm", "Gentle", "Careful", "Quirky", "Sassy"}
, 
Speed = {"Timid", "Hasty", "Jolly", "Naive", "Serious"}
}
local StatHinder = {
Atk = {"Hardy", "Bold", "Modest", "Calm", "Timid"}
, 
Def = {"Lonely", "Docile", "Mild", "Gentle", "Hasty"}
, 
SpA = {"Adamant", "Impish", "Bashful", "Careful", "Jolly"}
, 
SpD = {"Naughty", "Lax", "Rash", "Quirky", "Naive"}
, 
Speed = {"Brave", "Relaxed", "Quiet", "Sassy", "Serious"}
}
local fullStatStrings = {Atk = "Attack", Def = "Defense", SpA = "Sp. Attack", SpD = "Sp. Defense", Speed = "Speed"}
repeat
  wait()
until game.Players.LocalPlayer
local Boost = "Atk"
local Hinder = "Atk"
local FinalNature = "Hardy"
local nStats = require(game.ReplicatedStorage.Information.NatureStats)
local pokegui = script.Parent.Parent.NatureChangerSelector
local Math = require(game.ReplicatedStorage.Functions.Math)
local p = game.Players.LocalPlayer
local Close = script.Parent.Close.MouseButton1Click:connect(function()
  
  script.Parent.Visible = false
  script.Parent.Parent.BlackScreen.Visible = false
end
)
gui = script.Parent.Parent
HPcalc = function(poke)
  
  return (poke.IV.HPIV.Value + 2 * _G.Pokemon[poke.Name].Stats.HP + poke.EV.HPEV.Value / 4) * poke.Lvl.Value / 100 + 10 + poke.Lvl.Value
end

otherstatcalc = function(poke, basestat)
  
  return ((poke.IV[basestat .. "IV"].Value + 2 * _G.Pokemon[poke.Name].Stats[basestat] + poke.EV[basestat .. "EV"].Value / 4) * poke.Lvl.Value / 100 + 5) * determinenature(basestat, poke.Nature.Value)
end

determinenature = function(stat, nature)
  
  if nStats[stat .. " Boost"][nature] then
    return 1.1
  else
    if nStats[stat .. " Down"][nature] then
      return 0.9
    else
      return 1
    end
  end
end

hash = function(num)
  
  return (num + 4) * 8
end

dehash = function(num)
  
  return (num - 32) / 8
end

fadeytext = function(text)
  
  gui.MessageThing.Text = text
  for i = 1, 0, -0.05 do
    gui.MessageThing.TextTransparency = i
    gui.MessageThing.TextStrokeTransparency = i
    wait(0.05)
  end
  wait(0.5)
  for i = 0, 1, 0.05 do
    gui.MessageThing.TextTransparency = i
    gui.MessageThing.TextStrokeTransparency = i
    wait(0.05)
  end
  gui.MessageThing.TextTransparency = 1
  gui.MessageThing.TextStrokeTransparency = 1
end

local DropDown = script.Parent.DecreaseShower.MouseButton1Click:connect(function()
  
  if script.Parent.DecreaseHolder.Visible == false and script.Parent.IncreaseHolder.Visible == false then
    script.Parent.DecreaseShower.Text = ""
    script.Parent.DecreaseHolder.Visible = true
  end
end
)
for i,v in ipairs(script.Parent.DecreaseHolder:GetChildren()) do
  do
    v.MouseButton1Click:connect(function()
  
  script.Parent.DecreaseShower.Text = "-" .. fullStatStrings[v.Name]
  v.Parent.Visible = false
  Hinder = v.Name
  FinalNature = findNature()
  script.Parent.FinalNature.Text = FinalNature
end
)
  end
end
local DropUp = script.Parent.IncreaseShower.MouseButton1Click:connect(function()
  
  if script.Parent.DecreaseHolder.Visible == false and script.Parent.IncreaseHolder.Visible == false then
    script.Parent.IncreaseShower.Text = ""
    script.Parent.IncreaseHolder.Visible = true
  end
end
)
for i,v in ipairs(script.Parent.IncreaseHolder:GetChildren()) do
  v.MouseButton1Click:connect(function()
  
  script.Parent.IncreaseShower.Text = "+" .. fullStatStrings[v.Name]
  v.Parent.Visible = false
  Boost = v.Name
  FinalNature = findNature()
  script.Parent.FinalNature.Text = FinalNature
end
)
end
findNature = function()
  
  local allowedNatures = StatBoosts[Boost]
  local allowedNatures2 = StatHinder[Hinder]
  for _,stat1 in ipairs(allowedNatures) do
    for _,stat2 in ipairs(allowedNatures2) do
      if stat1 == stat2 then
        return stat1
      end
    end
  end
end

dc = function(var)
  
  for i = 1, 6 do
    if getfenv()[var .. i] then
      getfenv()[var .. i]:disconnect()
    end
  end
end

setupparty = function()
  
  for i,v in ipairs(pokegui:GetChildren()) do
    do
      if v:IsA("ImageButton") then
        do
          v.Visible = false
          -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC12: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_THEN_STMT

          -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC12: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_STMT

        end
      end
    end
  end
  for i,v in ipairs(p.PokemonParty:GetChildren()) do
    if v.PartyPosition.Value <= 6 then
      local button = pokegui["Pokemon" .. v.PartyPosition.Value]
      button.Level.Text = "Lvl. " .. v.Lvl.Value
      if v.Shiny.Value ~= true or not _G.Pokemon[v.Name].Sprites.SF then
        button.Image = _G.Pokemon[v.Name].Sprites.Front
        if not v:FindFirstChild("Nickname") or not v:FindFirstChild("Nickname").Value then
          do
            button.PokeName.Text = v.Name
            button.Visible = true
            getfenv()["Party" .. v.PartyPosition.Value] = button.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
    
    pokegui.Visible = false
    natureTime(v)
  end
)
            -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC85: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_THEN_STMT

            -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC85: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_STMT

            -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC85: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_THEN_STMT

            -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC85: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_STMT

            -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC85: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_THEN_STMT

            -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC85: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_STMT

          end
        end
      end
    end
  end
  script.Parent.Parent.BlackScreen.Visible = true
  pokegui.Visible = true
end

natureTime = function(pokemon)
  
  script.Parent.DecreaseHolder.Visible = false
  script.Parent.IncreaseHolder.Visible = false
  script.Parent.Confirm.Visible = true
  FinalNature = pokemon.Nature.Value
  script.Parent.FinalNature.Text = FinalNature
  for stat,tab in pairs(StatBoosts) do
    for _,boosts in ipairs(tab) do
      if boosts == FinalNature then
        Boost = stat
        script.Parent.IncreaseShower.Text = "+" .. fullStatStrings[stat]
      end
    end
  end
  for stat,tab in pairs(StatHinder) do
    for _,hindrance in ipairs(tab) do
      if hindrance == FinalNature then
        Hinder = stat
        script.Parent.DecreaseShower.Text = "-" .. fullStatStrings[stat]
      end
    end
  end
  script.Parent.PokemonSprite.Image = _G.Pokemon[pokemon.Name].Sprites.Mini
  script.Parent.Visible = true
  Confirm = script.Parent.Confirm.MouseButton1Click:connect(function()
    
    if pokemon.Nature.Value == FinalNature then
      fadeytext("This Pokemon already has the " .. pokemon.Nature.Value .. " nature!")
    else
      script.Parent.Confirm.Visible = false
      Math:Change(pokemon.Nature, FinalNature)
      fadeytext("This Pokemon\'s nature is now " .. FinalNature .. ".")
      statredo(pokemon)
      Math:Change(p.Money, -100000)
      script.Parent.Visible = false
      script.Parent.Parent.BlackScreen.Visible = false
    end
  end
)
end

local stats = {"HP", "Atk", "Def", "SpA", "SpD", "Speed"}
statredo = function(poke)
  
  local chp = poke.CurrentHP.Value
  for i,v in ipairs(stats) do
    if v == "HP" then
      do
        do
          if poke.Stats.HPStat.Value ~= math.floor(HPcalc(poke) + 0.5) then
            local subtract = poke.Stats.HPStat.Value - chp
            Math:Change(poke.CurrentHP, math.max(1, poke.CurrentHP.Value - subtract))
            Math:Change(poke.Status, "")
          end
          Math:Change(poke.Stats.HPStat, HPcalc(poke))
          Math:Change(poke.Stats[v .. "Stat"], otherstatcalc(poke, v))
          -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC61: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out DO_STMT

          -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC61: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_THEN_STMT

          -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC61: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_STMT

        end
      end
    end
  end
end

_G.NatureScientist = function()
  
  dc("Party")
  if Confirm then
    Confirm:disconnect()
  end
  setupparty()
end

-- params : ...

p = game.Players.LocalPlayer
bp = script.Parent.Parent
shopon = "TM"
buyItemSelected = ""
hash = function(num)
  
  return (num + 4) * 8
end

dehash = function(num)
  
  return num / 8 - 4
end

local listOfItems = {Protect = 30000, ["Thunder Wave"] = 50000, Reflect = 30000, ["Light Screen"] = 30000, ["Double Team"] = 30000, Toxic = 50000, ["Brick Break"] = 50000, ["Fire Blast"] = 160000, Blizzard = 160000, Thunder = 160000, ["Focus Blast"] = 160000, ["Will-O-Wisp"] = 50000, Waterfall = 80000, ["Hidden Power"] = 50000, ["Aerial Ace"] = 50000}
local Math = require(game.ReplicatedStorage.Functions.Math)
local Moves = require(game.ReplicatedStorage.Information.Moves)
local Items = (require(game.ReplicatedStorage.Information.Items))
local up, down = nil, nil
repeat
  wait()
until game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character
alphabetize = function(t)
  
  local leng = 30
  local h = function(n)
    
    return n .. string.rep(" ", leng - #n):gsub(".", function(c)
      
      return c:byte()
    end
)
  end

  table.sort(t, function(a, b)
    
    do return h(a) < h(b) end
    -- DECOMPILER ERROR: 1 unprocessed JMP targets
  end
)
  return t
end

getListOfItems = function(Directory)
  
  local alphabeticalTable = {}
  local num = 1
  local stuff = {}
  for i,v in pairs(listOfItems) do
    table.insert(stuff, i)
  end
  for item,strin in pairs(alphabetize(stuff)) do
    if p.Bag.TMs:FindFirstChild(strin) == nil then
      alphabeticalTable[num] = strin
      num = num + 1
    end
  end
  return alphabeticalTable
end

moneyUpdate = function(money)
  
  script.Parent.Parent.MoneyAmount.Text = "Money: $" .. dehash(money)
  script.Parent.Parent.MoneyAmount.DropShadow.Text = script.Parent.Parent.MoneyAmount.Text
end

moveUp = function(Table, Number, Directory)
  
  local safety = {}
  for i,v in ipairs(script.Parent:GetChildren()) do
    if v:IsA("TextButton") and v.Name ~= "Item8" then
      safety[string.sub(v.Name, 5, 5) + 1] = {v.ItemName.Text, v.ItemNumber.Text, v.ItemImage.Image, v.ItemImage.ImageColor3}
    end
  end
  for button,v in pairs(safety) do
    script.Parent:FindFirstChild("Item" .. button).ItemName.Text = v[1]
    script.Parent:FindFirstChild("Item" .. button).ItemName.DropShadow.Text = v[1]
    script.Parent:FindFirstChild("Item" .. button).ItemNumber.Text = v[2]
    script.Parent:FindFirstChild("Item" .. button).ItemNumber.DropShadow.Text = v[2]
    script.Parent:FindFirstChild("Item" .. button).ItemImage.Image = v[3]
    script.Parent:FindFirstChild("Item" .. button).ItemImage.ImageColor3 = v[4]
  end
  script.Parent.Item1.ItemName.Text = Table[Number - 1]
  script.Parent.Item1.ItemName.DropShadow.Text = Table[Number - 1]
  script.Parent.Item1.ItemNumber.Text = "$ " .. listOfItems[Table[Number - 1]]
  script.Parent.Item1.ItemNumber.DropShadow.Text = script.Parent.Item1.ItemNumber.Text
  if shopon ~= "TM" then
    script.Parent.Item1.ItemImage.Image = Items[script.Parent.Item1.ItemName.Text].Sprite
    script.Parent.Item1.ItemImage.ImageColor3 = Color3.new(1, 1, 1)
  else
    script.Parent.Item1.ItemImage.ImageColor3 = _G.Tables.TypeColors[Moves[script.Parent.Item1.ItemName.Text].Type]
    script.Parent.Item1.ItemImage.Image = "rbxgameasset://Images/Bag_TM_Normal_Sprite"
  end
  script.Parent.Item1.Visible = true
end

moveDown = function(Table, Number, Directory)
  
  local safety = {}
  for i,v in ipairs(script.Parent:GetChildren()) do
    if v:IsA("TextButton") and v.Name ~= "Item1" then
      safety[tonumber(string.sub(v.Name, 5, 5)) - 1] = {v.ItemName.Text, v.ItemNumber.Text, v.ItemImage.Image, v.ItemImage.ImageColor3}
    end
  end
  for button,v in pairs(safety) do
    script.Parent:FindFirstChild("Item" .. button).ItemName.Text = v[1]
    script.Parent:FindFirstChild("Item" .. button).ItemName.DropShadow.Text = v[1]
    script.Parent:FindFirstChild("Item" .. button).ItemNumber.Text = v[2]
    script.Parent:FindFirstChild("Item" .. button).ItemNumber.DropShadow.Text = v[2]
    script.Parent:FindFirstChild("Item" .. button).ItemImage.Image = v[3]
    script.Parent:FindFirstChild("Item" .. button).ItemImage.ImageColor3 = v[4]
  end
  script.Parent.Item8.ItemName.Text = Table[Number + 1]
  script.Parent.Item8.ItemName.DropShadow.Text = Table[Number + 1]
  script.Parent.Item8.ItemNumber.Text = "$ " .. listOfItems[Table[Number + 1]]
  script.Parent.Item8.ItemNumber.DropShadow.Text = script.Parent.Item8.ItemNumber.Text
  if shopon ~= "TM" then
    script.Parent.Item8.ItemImage.Image = Items[script.Parent.Item8.ItemName.Text].Sprite
    script.Parent.Item8.ItemImage.ImageColor3 = Color3.new(1, 1, 1)
  else
    script.Parent.Item8.ItemImage.ImageColor3 = _G.Tables.TypeColors[Moves[script.Parent.Item8.ItemName.Text].Type]
    script.Parent.Item8.ItemImage.Image = "rbxgameasset://Images/Bag_TM_Normal_Sprite"
  end
  script.Parent.Item8.Visible = true
end

local Sound = Instance.new("Sound", script.Parent)
Sound.SoundId = "http://www.roblox.com/asset/?id=287339370"
local Sound2 = Instance.new("Sound", script.Parent)
Sound2.SoundId = "http://www.roblox.com/asset/?id=318763788"
local Sound3 = Instance.new("Sound", script.Parent)
Sound3.SoundId = "http://www.roblox.com/asset/?id=142766373"
local Sound4 = Instance.new("Sound", script.Parent)
Sound4.SoundId = "http://www.roblox.com/asset/?id=134732869"
local buyEvent, textInput, yesButton, noButton = nil, nil, nil, nil
inputAmount = 1
local prompt = script.Parent.Parent.Prompt
for i,v in pairs(script.Parent:GetChildren()) do
  do
    if v:IsA("TextButton") then
      do
        v.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
  
  if buyEvent then
    buyEvent:disconnect()
  end
  if yesButton then
    yesButton:disconnect()
  end
  if noButton then
    noButton:disconnect()
  end
  inputAmount = 1
  Sound2:Play()
  script.Parent.Parent.Bottom.ItemName.Text = v.ItemName.Text
  script.Parent.Parent.Bottom.ItemName.DropShadow.Text = v.ItemName.Text
  buyItemSelected = v.ItemName.Text
  if shopon ~= "TM" then
    script.Parent.Parent.Bottom.ItemDescription.DropShadow.Text = Items[buyItemSelected].Description
    script.Parent.Parent.Bottom.ItemDescription.Text = Items[buyItemSelected].Description
  else
    script.Parent.Parent.Bottom.ItemDescription.DropShadow.Text = Moves[buyItemSelected].Desc
    script.Parent.Parent.Bottom.ItemDescription.Text = Moves[buyItemSelected].Desc
  end
  script.Parent.Parent.Bottom:TweenPosition(UDim2.new(0, 0, 1, 0), "Out", "Quad", 0.15, true)
  buyEvent = script.Parent.Parent.Bottom.Buy.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
    
    moneyUpdate(p.Money.Value)
    Sound2:Play()
    script.Parent.Parent.Bottom.Buy.Visible = false
    local itemString = buyItemSelected
    prompt.Question.Text = "Do you want to buy " .. itemString .. "?"
    prompt.Question.DropShadow.Text = prompt.Question.Text
    prompt.CurrentCost.Text = "Cost: $" .. listOfItems[buyItemSelected]
    prompt.CurrentCost.DropShadow.Text = prompt.CurrentCost.Text
    prompt.Yes.Visible = true
    prompt.No.Visible = true
    yesButton = prompt.Yes.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
      
      if listOfItems[buyItemSelected] * inputAmount <= dehash(p.Money.Value) then
        local done = nil
        do
          Sound2:Play()
          script.Parent.Parent.Close.Visible = false
          script.Parent.Parent.Loading.Picture.Rotation = 0
          script.Parent.Parent.Loading.Question.Text = "Buying " .. inputAmount .. " " .. buyItemSelected .. " for $" .. listOfItems[buyItemSelected] * inputAmount .. " Pokedollars, please wait..."
          script.Parent.Parent.Loading:TweenPosition(UDim2.new(0, 0, 0, 0), "Out", "Quad", 0.5, true, function()
        
        prompt.Position = UDim2.new(0, 0, -2, 0)
      end
)
          spawn(function()
        
        while wait(0.04) and done == nil do
          script.Parent.Parent.Loading.Picture.Rotation = script.Parent.Parent.Loading.Picture.Rotation + 5
        end
      end
)
          wait(1)
          local check, moneyLeft = Math:TMBuy(buyItemSelected, inputAmount)
          repeat
            wait()
          until check ~= nil
          if check == true then
            print("Buying success")
            if p.Bag.TMs:FindFirstChild(buyItemSelected) then
              Sound4:Play()
              local buying = Math:BuyItem(p.Bag.TMs[buyItemSelected], inputAmount)
              script.Parent.Parent.Loading:TweenPosition(UDim2.new(0, 0, -2, 0), "Out", "Quad", 0.5, true)
              done = true
              script.Parent.Parent.Close.Visible = true
              moneyUpdate(p.Money.Value)
            else
              do
                do
                  Sound4:Play()
                  do
                    local buying = Math:FuncAddItem(buyItemSelected, p.Bag.TMs, 1)
                    script.Parent.Parent.Loading:TweenPosition(UDim2.new(0, 0, -2, 0), "Out", "Quad", 0.5, true)
                    script.Parent.Parent.Close.Visible = true
                    done = true
                    moneyUpdate(p.Money.Value)
                    setUpGui(shopon)
                    script.Parent.Parent.Loading:TweenPosition(UDim2.new(0, 0, -2, 0), "Out", "Quad", 0.5, true)
                    script.Parent.Parent.Close.Visible = true
                    done = false
                  end
                  Sound3:Play()
                  script.Parent.Parent.Loading:TweenPosition(UDim2.new(0, 0, -2, 0), "Out", "Quad", 0.5, true)
                  script.Parent.Parent.Close.Visible = true
                end
              end
            end
          end
        end
      end
    end
)
    noButton = prompt.No.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
      
      Sound3:Play()
      prompt.Yes.Visible = false
      prompt.No.Visible = false
      prompt:TweenPosition(UDim2.new(0, 0, -2, 0), "Out", "Quad", 1, true, function()
        
        script.Parent.Parent.Bottom.Buy.Visible = true
      end
)
    end
)
    prompt:TweenPosition(UDim2.new(0, 0, 0, 0), "Out", "Bounce", 1, true)
  end
)
  script.Parent.Parent.Bottom.Buy.Visible = true
end
)
        v.MouseEnter:connect(function()
  
  v.ItemName.TextColor3 = Color3.new(1, 0, 0)
end
)
        v.MouseLeave:connect(function()
  
  v.ItemName.TextColor3 = Color3.new(0, 0.33333333333333, 1)
end
)
        -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC149: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_THEN_STMT

        -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC149: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_STMT

      end
    end
  end
end
hash = function(num)
  
  return (num + 4) * 8
end

dehash = function(num)
  
  return (num - 32) / 8
end

setUpGui = function(Directory)
  
  moneyUpdate(p.Money.Value)
  local Table = getListOfItems()
  local Amount = 0
  local downNumber = 8
  local upNumber = 1
  local Clicks = 0
  script.Parent.Parent.Bottom.Position = UDim2.new(0, 0, 0.75, 0)
  if up then
    up:disconnect()
  end
  if down then
    down:disconnect()
  end
  for i,v in ipairs(script.Parent:GetChildren()) do
    if v:IsA("TextButton") then
      v.Visible = false
    end
  end
  for i,v in pairs(Table) do
    Amount = Amount + 1
  end
  if Amount > 8 then
    Clicks = Amount - 8
    script.Parent.Scroller.Rectangle.Size = UDim2.new(0, 42, 0.25, 0)
    script.Parent.Scroller.Rectangle.Position = UDim2.new(0, 0, 0.15, 0)
  else
    Clicks = 0
    script.Parent.Scroller.Rectangle.Size = UDim2.new(0, 42, 0.25, 0)
    script.Parent.Scroller.Rectangle.Position = UDim2.new(0, 0, 0.15, 0)
  end
  for i,v in pairs(script.Parent:GetChildren()) do
    if v:IsA("TextButton") and Table[tonumber(string.sub(v.Name, 5, 5))] ~= nil then
      v.ItemName.Text = Table[tonumber(string.sub(v.Name, 5, 5))]
      v.ItemName.TextColor3 = Color3.new(0, 0.33333333333333, 1)
      v.ItemNumber.Text = "$ " .. listOfItems[Table[tonumber(string.sub(v.Name, 5, 5))]]
      v.ItemNumber.DropShadow.Text = v.ItemNumber.Text
      v.ItemName.DropShadow.Text = v.ItemName.Text
      v.ItemImage.ImageColor3 = Color3.new(1, 1, 1)
      v.ItemImage.Image = Items[Table[tonumber(string.sub(v.Name, 5, 5))]] and Items[Table[tonumber(string.sub(v.Name, 5, 5))]].Sprite or "rbxgameasset://Images/Bag_TM_Normal_Sprite"
      if shopon == "TM" then
        v.ItemImage.ImageColor3 = _G.Tables.TypeColors[Moves[Table[tonumber(string.sub(v.Name, 5, 5))]].Type]
      end
      v.Visible = true
    end
  end
  down = script.Parent.Scroller.DownArrow.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
    
    if Table[downNumber + 1] ~= nil then
      Sound.Pitch = 1
      Sound:Play()
      moveDown(Table, downNumber, Directory)
      script.Parent.Scroller.Rectangle.Position = UDim2.new(0, 0, script.Parent.Scroller.Rectangle.Position.Y.Scale + 0.45 / Clicks, script.Parent.Scroller.Rectangle.Position.Y.Offset)
      upNumber = upNumber + 1
      downNumber = downNumber + 1
    end
  end
)
  up = script.Parent.Scroller.UpArrow.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
    
    if Table[upNumber - 1] ~= nil then
      Sound.Pitch = 0.8
      Sound:Play()
      moveUp(Table, upNumber, Directory)
      script.Parent.Scroller.Rectangle.Position = UDim2.new(0, 0, script.Parent.Scroller.Rectangle.Position.Y.Scale - 0.45 / Clicks, script.Parent.Scroller.Rectangle.Position.Y.Offset)
      upNumber = upNumber - 1
      downNumber = downNumber - 1
    end
  end
)
end

repeat
  wait()
until game.Players.LocalPlayer:WaitForChild("Bag"):WaitForChild("Recover")
for i,v in ipairs(script.Parent.Parent.Side:GetChildren()) do
  if v:IsA("TextButton") then
    v.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
  
  shopon = v.Name
  prompt:TweenPosition(UDim2.new(0, 0, -2, 0), "Out", "Bounce", 1.25, true)
  script.Parent.Parent.Side.Slider.Beep.Pitch = 1.1
  script.Parent.Parent.Side.Slider.Beep:Play()
  bp.Bottom.Buy.Visible = false
  setUpGui(v.Name)
end
)
  end
end
_G.TMShop = function()
  
  moneyUpdate(p.Money.Value)
  prompt.Position = UDim2.new(0, 0, -2, 0)
  setUpGui(shopon)
  script.Parent.Parent.Position = UDim2.new(0.3, 0, -0.5, 0)

  script.Parent.Parent.Parent.BlackScreen.Visible = true
  script.Parent.Parent:TweenPosition(UDim2.new(0.3, 0, 0.25, 0), "Out", "Bounce", 1, true)
end

repeat
  wait()
until game.Players.LocalPlayer
local Sound = Instance.new("Sound", script.Parent)

Sound.Name = "Beep"
script.Parent.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
  
  if script.Parent.Title.Text == "OPEN" then
    Sound:Play()
    Sound.Pitch = 0.75
    script.Parent.Title.Text = "CLOSE"
    script.Parent.Title.Title.Text = "CLOSE"
    script.Parent.ImageColor3 = Color3.new(1, 0, 0)
    script.Parent.Parent:TweenPosition(UDim2.new(-0.2, 0, 0, 0), "Out", "Bounce", 0.75, true)
  else
    if script.Parent.Title.Text == "CLOSE" then
      Sound:Play()
      Sound.Pitch = 1
      script.Parent.Title.Text = "OPEN"
      script.Parent.Title.Title.Text = "OPEN"
      script.Parent.ImageColor3 = Color3.new(0, 0.66666666666667, 0)
      script.Parent.Parent:TweenPosition(UDim2.new(0, 0, 0, 0), "Out", "Bounce", 0.75, true)
    end
  end
end
)

-- params : ...

repeat
  wait()
until game.Players.LocalPlayer
p = game.Players.LocalPlayer
locations = {["Mom\'s"] = Vector3.new(101.019, 10.774, 201.894), ["Lavender Town"] = Vector3.new(-2492.94, 25.333, 1534.76), ["Route 3"] = Vector3.new(-608.89, 37.338, 1676.244), ["Celadon City"] = Vector3.new(-1803.291, -0.426, 360.16), ["Cerulean City"] = Vector3.new(-1271.003, 39.316, 1378.33), ["Cinnabar Volcano"] = Vector3.new(-5036.606, 289.24, 2358.17), ["Fuchsia City"] = Vector3.new(-3979.309, -19.691, -272.419), ["Pewter City"] = Vector3.new(-41.678, 28.743, 1659.928), ["Saffron City"] = Vector3.new(-4447.652, -16.206, 983.738), ["Vermillion City"] = Vector3.new(-2672.937, 26.103, 780.852), ["Viridian City"] = Vector3.new(-27.37, 10.226, 887.03), Indigo = Vector3.new(9800.5, 194.2, 395), ["Elegant Valley"] = Vector3.new(-9139.74, 82.56, 806.04), ["Mysterious Grotto"] = Vector3.new(-2409.741, 162.98, 4357.479)}

end
