end

evolanim = function(pokecfg, pokeimage, prename)
  
  for i = 0.6, 0.1, -0.1 do
    pokeimage:TweenSizeAndPosition(UDim2.new(0, 0, 0, 0), UDim2.new(0.5, 64, 0.5, 64), "Out", "Quad", i, true)
    wait(i)
    pokeimage:TweenSizeAndPosition(UDim2.new(0, 256, 0, 256), UDim2.new(0.5, -128, 0.5, -128), "Out", "Quad", i, true)
    wait(i)
  end
  pokeimage:TweenSizeAndPosition(UDim2.new(0, 0, 0, 0), UDim2.new(0.5, 64, 0.5, 64), "Out", "Quad", 0.1, true)
  wait(0.25)
  if pokecfg.Shiny.Value == true then
    pokeimage.Image = _G.Pokemon[_G.Pokemon[prename].Evolution[2]].Sprites.SF
  else
    pokeimage.Image = _G.Pokemon[_G.Pokemon[prename].Evolution[2]].Sprites.Front
  end
  pokeimage:TweenSizeAndPosition(UDim2.new(0, 256, 0, 256), UDim2.new(0.5, -128, 0.5, -128))
  return _G.Pokemon[pokecfg.Name].Evolution[2]
end

moveevolve = function(pokecfg)
  
  changevisible(evolvescreen.EvolveDialog.MovesBG, "TextButton", false)
  for _,dero in ipairs(pokecfg.Moves:GetChildren()) do
    for duh,moves in ipairs(evolvescreen.EvolveDialog.MovesBG:GetChildren()) do
      if tonumber(moves.Name:sub(5, 5)) == dero.Value then
        moves.MoveName.Text = dero.Name
        local color = _G.Tables.TypeColors[_G.Moves[dero.Name].Type]
        moves.BackgroundColor3 = color
        moves.Category.Text = _G.Moves[dero.Name].AttackType
        moves.Type.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.new(color.r - 0.16, color.g - 0.16, color.b - 0.16)
        moves.Type.Text = _G.Moves[dero.Name].Type
        moves.PP.Text = pokecfg.Moves:FindFirstChild(dero.Name).PP.Value .. " / " .. _G.Moves[dero.Name].PP
        moves.Visible = true
      end
    end
  end
  evolvescreen.EvolveDialog.MovesBG.Visible = true
end

EvolvingTime = function(pokecfg)
  
  yourpokeout = pokecfg
  battle.Visible = false
  eaction = nil
  local prename = pokecfg.Name
  if pokecfg.Status.Value ~= "Faint" then
    evolvescreen.EvolveDialog.Speak.Text = ""
    evolvescreen.EvolveDialog.Speak.dropshadow.Text = ""
    if pokecfg.Shiny.Value == true then
      evolvescreen.PokeImage.Image = _G.Pokemon[pokecfg.Name].Sprites.SF
    else
      evolvescreen.PokeImage.Image = _G.Pokemon[pokecfg.Name].Sprites.Front
    end
    evolvescreen.Visible = true
    if not pokecfg:FindFirstChild("Nickname") or not pokecfg:FindFirstChild("Nickname").Value then
      scrolltext(evolvescreen.EvolveDialog.Speak, pokecfg.Name .. " is about to evolve. Proceed with this?")
      wait(0.6)
      evolvescreen.YesNoHolder.Yes.Visible = true
      evolvescreen.YesNoHolder.No.Visible = true
      yesevolution = evolvescreen.YesNoHolder.Yes.MouseButton1Click:connect(function()
    
    evolvescreen.YesNoHolder.Yes.Visible = false
    evolvescreen.YesNoHolder.No.Visible = false
    local evolvedPoke = Battle:EvolveCheck(pokecfg, pokecfg.Lvl.Value)
    if evolvedPoke then
      local sound = p.PlayerGui.BattleSound
      sound:Stop()
      sound.SoundId = "http://www.roblox.com/asset/?id=172784223"
      sound:Play()
      scrolltext(evolvescreen.EvolveDialog.Speak, "Congrats! Your " .. (pokecfg:FindFirstChild("Nickname") and pokecfg:FindFirstChild("Nickname").Value or prename) .. " evolved...")
      local evolvedpoke = evolanim(pokecfg, evolvescreen.PokeImage, prename)
      scrolltext(evolvescreen.EvolveDialog.Speak, "...Into " .. evolvedPoke .. "!")
      for i,v in ipairs(stats) do
        do
          if v == "HP" then
            Math:Change(yourpokeout.Stats[v .. "Stat"], HPcalc(yourpokeout.Lvl.Value, yourpokeout.IV[v .. "IV"].Value, yourpokeout.EV[v .. "EV"].Value, yourpokeout))
          else
            do
              Math:Change(yourpokeout.Stats[v .. "Stat"], otherstatcalc(v, yourpokeout.Lvl.Value, yourpokeout.IV[v .. "IV"].Value, yourpokeout.EV[v .. "EV"].Value, determinenature(v, yourpokeout.Nature.Value), yourpokeout))
              -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC134: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_ELSE_STMT

              -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC134: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_STMT

            end
          end
        end
      end
      wait(0.6)
      if not Pokedex:Check(pokecfg.Name, p) then
        Pokedex:Create(pokecfg.Name, true)
      else
        Pokedex:Caught(pokecfg.Name)
      end
      if _G.Pokemon[pokecfg.Name].Moves.LevelUp[pokecfg.Lvl.Value] ~= nil then
        for _,newmove in pairs(_G.Pokemon[pokecfg.Name].Moves.LevelUp[pokecfg.Lvl.Value]) do
          if not pokecfg.Moves:FindFirstChild(newmove) then
            if #pokecfg.Moves:GetChildren() < 4 then
              scrolltext(evolvescreen.EvolveDialog.Speak, pokecfg.Name .. " learned " .. newmove .. "!")
              Battle:NewMove(pokecfg, newmove)
              eaction = true
            else
              if #pokecfg.Moves:GetChildren() == 4 then
                yesevolution:disconnect()
                noevolution:disconnect()
                scrolltext(evolvescreen.EvolveDialog.Speak, pokecfg.Name .. " is trying to learn " .. newmove .. ".")
                wait(0.5)
                scrolltext(evolvescreen.EvolveDialog.Speak, "But " .. pokecfg.Name .. " can\'t learn more than four moves.")
                wait(0.5)
                scrolltext(evolvescreen.EvolveDialog.Speak, "Delete a move to make room for " .. newmove .. "?")
                wait(0.5)
                evolvescreen.YesNoHolder.Yes.Visible = true
                evolvescreen.YesNoHolder.No.Visible = true
                if yesmove then
                  yesmove:disconnect()
                end
                if nomove then
                  nomove:disconnect()
                end
                yesmove = evolvescreen.YesNoHolder.Yes.MouseButton1Click:connect(function()
      
      evolvescreen.YesNoHolder.Yes.Visible = false
      evolvescreen.YesNoHolder.No.Visible = false
      moveevolve(pokecfg)
      for _,v in ipairs(evolvescreen.EvolveDialog.MovesBG:GetChildren()) do
        do
          if v:IsA("TextButton") then
            do
              getfenv()["DeleteDerp" .. v.Name] = v.MouseButton1Click:connect(function()
        
        changevisible(evolvescreen.EvolveDialog.MovesBG, "TextButton", false)
        scrolltext(evolvescreen.EvolveDialog.Speak, pokecfg.Name .. " forgot " .. v.MoveName.Text .. "...")
        scrolltext(evolvescreen.EvolveDialog.Speak, pokecfg.Name .. " learned " .. newmove .. "!")
        Math:PropChange(pokecfg.Moves[v.MoveName.Text], "Name", newmove)
        Math:Change(pokecfg.Moves[newmove].PP, _G.Moves[newmove].PP)
        eaction = true
        for i,v in ipairs(evolvescreen.EvolveDialog.MovesBG:GetChildren()) do
          if getfenv()["DeleteDerp" .. v.Name] then
            getfenv()["DeleteDerp" .. v.Name]:disconnect()
          end
        end
      end
)
              -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC38: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_THEN_STMT

              -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC38: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_STMT

            end
          end
        end
      end
    end
)
                nomove = evolvescreen.YesNoHolder.No.MouseButton1Click:connect(function()
      
      evolvescreen.YesNoHolder.Yes.Visible = false
      evolvescreen.YesNoHolder.No.Visible = false
      scrolltext(evolvescreen.EvolveDialog.Speak, pokecfg.Name .. " did not learn " .. newmove .. ".")
      eaction = true
      evolvescreen.Visible = false
    end
)
              end
            end
          else
            eaction = true
          end
        end
      else
        do
          do
            eaction = true
            evolvescreen.Visible = false
            Evolution[pokecfg] = nil
            eaction = true
            evolvescreen.Visible = false
          end
        end
      end
    end
  end
)
      noevolution = evolvescreen.YesNoHolder.No.MouseButton1Click:connect(function()
    
    evolvescreen.YesNoHolder.Yes.Visible = false
    evolvescreen.YesNoHolder.No.Visible = false
    scrolltext(evolvescreen.EvolveDialog.Speak, pokecfg.Name .. " didn\'t evolve.")
    evolvescreen.Visible = false
    eaction = true
    Evolution[pokecfg] = nil
  end
)
      eaction = false
      repeat
        wait()
      until eaction ~= nil
      if yesevolution then
        yesevolution:disconnect()
      end
      if yesevolution then
        noevolution:disconnect()
      end
      if yesmove then
        yesmove:disconnect()
      end
      if nomove then
        nomove:disconnect()
      end
      evolvescreen.YesNoHolder.Yes.Visible = false
      evolvescreen.YesNoHolder.No.Visible = false
      evolvescreen.Visible = false
    end
  end
end

evolutionchecker = function()
  
  for i,v in ipairs(userteam:GetChildren()) do
    if Evolution[v] then
      EvolvingTime(v)
    end
  end
end

checkfaint = function(poke, foe)
  
  if poke.CurrentHP.Value <= 0 then
    poke.Status.Value = "Faint"
    if foe == true then
      scrolltext(dialog, "The " .. prefix .. " " .. poke.Name .. " fainted!")
      theirpokemon:TweenPosition(UDim2.new(0, 0, 1, 0), "Out", "Quad", 0.75)
      wait(0.45)
      tbox.Visible = false
      theirpokemon.Visible = false
      theirpokefaint = true
      if prefix ~= "wild" then
        partycheck(theirparty)
      end
    else
      if not poke:FindFirstChild("Nickname") or not poke:FindFirstChild("Nickname").Value then
        scrolltext(dialog, poke.Name .. " fainted!")
        yourpokemon:TweenPosition(UDim2.new(0, 0, 1, 0), "Out", "Quad", 0.75)
        wait(1)
        yourpokemon.Visible = false
        yourpokemon.Position = UDim2.new(0, 0, 1, 0)
        yourpokefaint = true
        partycheck(yourparty)
      end
    end
  end
end

animatepoke = function(poke)
  
  unactive = true
  coroutine.resume(coroutine.create(function()
    
    while unactive == true do
      poke.Position = UDim2.new(0, 0, 0.25, 0)
      wait(0.2)
      poke.Position = UDim2.new(0, 0, 0.25, -2)
      wait(0.05)
    end
    poke.Position = UDim2.new(0, 0, 0.25, 0)
  end
))
end

moveappear = function(yourpoke, movelist, thing)
  
  if thing == nil then
    battle.ButtonHolder.Back.Visible = true
    battle.ButtonHolder.Back.MouseButton1Click:connect(function()
    
    battle.ButtonHolder.Back.Visible = false
    movelist.Visible = false
    for happy = 1, 4 do
      if getfenv()["Enter" .. happy] ~= nil then
        getfenv()["Enter" .. happy]:disconnect()
      end
      if getfenv()["blah" .. happy] ~= nil then
        getfenv()["blah" .. happy]:disconnect()
      end
    end
    do
      if not yourpoke:FindFirstChild("Nickname") or not yourpoke:FindFirstChild("Nickname").Value then
        dialog.Text = "What should " .. yourpoke.Name .. " do?"
        dropshadowdialog.Text = dialog.Text
        changevisible(buttonholder, "TextButton", true)
      end
    end
  end
)
  end
  changevisible(movelist, "TextButton", false)
  local moves = yourpoke.Moves:GetChildren()
  fixmoves(yourpoke)
  for i = 1, #moves do
    for index,v in ipairs(moves) do
      if i == v.Value then
        movelist:FindFirstChild("Move" .. i).MoveName.Text = v.Name
        local color = _G.Tables.TypeColors[_G.Moves[v.Name].Type]
        movelist:FindFirstChild("Move" .. i).BackgroundColor3 = color
        movelist:FindFirstChild("Move" .. i).Category.Text = _G.Moves[movelist:FindFirstChild("Move" .. i).MoveName.Text].AttackType
        movelist:FindFirstChild("Move" .. i).Type.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.new(color.r - 0.16, color.g - 0.16, color.b - 0.16)
        movelist:FindFirstChild("Move" .. i).Type.Text = _G.Moves[v.Name].Type
        movelist:FindFirstChild("Move" .. i).PP.Text = yourpoke.Moves:FindFirstChild(v.Name).PP.Value .. " / " .. _G.Moves[v.Name].PP
        movelist:FindFirstChild("Move" .. i).Visible = true
        movelist.Visible = true
      end
    end
  end
end

critfunc = function(critchance)
  
  local critblah = math.random(0, 1000)
  if critblah <= critchance then
    return 2
  else
    return 1
  end
end

accfunc = function(move, attackeracc, defenderevasion)
  
  local accrandom = math.random(1, 100)
  local moveacc = _G.Moves[move].Accuracy
  if moveacc == true then
    return true
  end
  local chance = math.ceil(moveacc * (accstat[attackeracc] * evadestat[defenderevasion]))
  if accrandom <= chance then
    return true
  else
    return false
  end
end

getExperience = function()
  
  for index,buh in pairs(pokemonexpsplit) do
    if buh.Status.Value == "Faint" then
      rawset(pokemonexpsplit, index, nil)
    end
  end
  amountofpokes = #pokemonexpsplit
  if p.Bag.Evolution:FindFirstChild("Exp. Share") and p.Bag.Evolution:FindFirstChild("Exp. Share").Value == true then
    local exptable = {}
    for i,v in ipairs(p.PokemonParty:GetChildren()) do
      if v.Status.Value ~= "Faint" then
        exptable[v.PartyPosition.Value] = v
      end
    end
    for z,pokemonexp in pairs(exptable) do
      expupdate(pokemonexp, nil, pokemonexpsplit)
    end
  else
    do
      for z,pokemonexp in pairs(pokemonexpsplit) do
        expupdate(pokemonexp)
      end
      do
        pokemonexpsplit = {}
      end
    end
  end
end

losehealth = function(percentage, pokecfg, foe, msg)
  
  local dmgtaken = math.ceil(pokecfg.Stats.HPStat.Value * percentage)
  local hpbefore = pokecfg.CurrentHP.Value
  if pokecfg.CurrentHP.Value - dmgtaken <= 0 then
    Math:Change(pokecfg.CurrentHP, 0)
    if foe == true then
      scrolltext(dialog, "The " .. prefix .. " " .. pokecfg.Name .. msg, true)
      theirpokemon.Visible = false
      wait(0.1)
      theirpokemon.Visible = true
      updatehealth(tbox, pokecfg, pokecfg.CurrentHP.Value)
      checkfaint(pokecfg, true)
      getExperience()
    else
      if not pokecfg:FindFirstChild("Nickname") or not pokecfg:FindFirstChild("Nickname").Value then
        scrolltext(dialog, pokecfg.Name .. msg, true)
        yourpokemon.Visible = false
        wait(0.1)
        yourpokemon.Visible = true
        updatehealth(ybox, pokecfg, pokecfg.CurrentHP.Value)
        checkfaint(pokecfg, false)
        if pokecfg.CurrentHP.Value - dmgtaken > 0 then
          Math:Change(pokecfg.CurrentHP, pokecfg.CurrentHP.Value - dmgtaken)
          if foe == true then
            scrolltext(dialog, "The " .. prefix .. " " .. pokecfg.Name .. msg, true)
            theirpokemon.Visible = false
            wait(0.1)
            theirpokemon.Visible = true
            updatehealth(tbox, pokecfg, pokecfg.CurrentHP.Value)
          else
            if not pokecfg:FindFirstChild("Nickname") or not pokecfg:FindFirstChild("Nickname").Value then
              scrolltext(dialog, pokecfg.Name .. msg, true)
              yourpokemon.Visible = false
              wait(0.1)
              yourpokemon.Visible = true
              updatehealth(ybox, pokecfg, pokecfg.CurrentHP.Value)
            end
          end
        end
      end
    end
  end
end

confusedcheck = function(pokemon, foe, variable)
  
  if variable == true and (confusion1 ~= nil or confusion2 ~= nil) and pokemon.Status.Value ~= "Sleep" and pokemon.Status.Value ~= "Freeze" then
    local confusecheck = math.random(1, 100)
    if foe == true then
      if confusion2 == 0 then
        theirconfusion = false
        confusion2 = nil
        scrolltext(dialog, "The " .. prefix .. " " .. pokemon.Name .. " snapped out of confusion!")
      else
        confusion2 = confusion2 - 1
        scrolltext(dialog, "The " .. prefix .. " " .. pokemon.Name .. " is confused!")
        if confusecheck > 50 then
          scrolltext(dialog, "The " .. prefix .. " " .. pokemon.Name .. " hits itself with confusion!")
          dmgconf = dmgcalculate(pokemon, pokemon, "ConfusedAttack", oppmod.Atk, oppmod.Def, 1)
          local hpbefore = pokemon.CurrentHP.Value
          if hpbefore - dmgconf <= 0 then
            Math:Change(pokemon.CurrentHP, 0)
            theirpokemon.Visible = false
            wait(0.1)
            theirpokemon.Visible = true
            updatehealth(tbox, pokemon, pokemon.CurrentHP.Value)
            checkfaint(pokemon, true)
          else
            if hpbefore - dmgconf > 0 then
              Math:Change(pokemon.CurrentHP, pokemon.CurrentHP.Value - dmgconf)
              theirpokemon.Visible = false
              wait(0.1)
              theirpokemon.Visible = true
              updatehealth(tbox, pokemon, pokemon.CurrentHP.Value)
            end
          end
          return true
        else
          do
            do return false end
            if confusion1 == 0 then
              urconfusion = false
              confusion1 = nil
              if not pokemon:FindFirstChild("Nickname") or not pokemon:FindFirstChild("Nickname").Value then
                scrolltext(dialog, pokemon.Name .. " snapped out of confusion!")
                do return false end
                confusion1 = confusion1 - 1
                if not pokemon:FindFirstChild("Nickname") or not pokemon:FindFirstChild("Nickname").Value then
                  scrolltext(dialog, pokemon.Name .. " is confused!")
                  if confusecheck > 50 then
                    if not pokemon:FindFirstChild("Nickname") or not pokemon:FindFirstChild("Nickname").Value then
                      scrolltext(dialog, pokemon.Name .. " hits itself with confusion!")
                      dmgconf = dmgcalculate(pokemon, pokemon, "ConfusedAttack", usermod.Atk, usermod.Def, 1)
                      do
                        do
                          local hpbefore = pokemon.CurrentHP.Value
                          if hpbefore - dmgconf <= 0 then
                            Math:Change(pokemon.CurrentHP, 0)
                            yourpokemon.Visible = false
                            wait(0.1)
                            yourpokemon.Visible = true
                            updatehealth(ybox, pokemon, pokemon.CurrentHP.Value)
                            checkfaint(pokemon, false)
                          else
                            if hpbefore - dmgconf > 0 then
                              Math:Change(pokemon.CurrentHP, pokemon.CurrentHP.Value - dmgconf)
                              yourpokemon.Visible = false
                              wait(0.1)
                              yourpokemon.Visible = true
                              updatehealth(ybox, pokemon, pokemon.CurrentHP.Value)
                            end
                          end
                          do return true end
                          do return false end
                          return false
                        end
                      end
                    end
                  end
                end
              end
            end
          end
        end
      end
    end
  end
end

paralyzecheck = function(pokemon, foe)
  
  local prachec = math.random(1, 100)
  if pokemon.Status.Value == "Paralysis" then
    if prachec <= 25 then
      if foe == true then
        scrolltext(dialog, "The " .. prefix .. " " .. pokemon.Name .. " was fully paralyzed!")
        return true
      else
        if not pokemon:FindFirstChild("Nickname") or not pokemon:FindFirstChild("Nickname").Value then
          scrolltext(dialog, pokemon.Name .. " was fully paralyzed!")
          do return true end
          do return false end
          return false
        end
      end
    end
  end
end

freezecheck = function(pokemon, foe)
  
  local frecheck = math.random(1, 100)
  if pokemon.Status.Value == "Freeze" then
    if frecheck <= 20 then
      if foe == true then
        scrolltext(dialog, "The " .. prefix .. " " .. pokemon.Name .. " thawed out!")
        pokemon.Status.Value = ""
        Math:Change(pokemon.Status, "")
        tbox.Status.Visible = false
        return false
      else
        if not pokemon:FindFirstChild("Nickname") or not pokemon:FindFirstChild("Nickname").Value then
          scrolltext(dialog, pokemon.Name .. " thawed out!")
          Math:Change(pokemon.Status, "")
          ybox.Status.Visible = false
          do return false end
          if foe == true then
            scrolltext(dialog, "The " .. prefix .. " " .. pokemon.Name .. " is frozen solid!")
            return true
          else
            if not pokemon:FindFirstChild("Nickname") or not pokemon:FindFirstChild("Nickname").Value then
              scrolltext(dialog, pokemon.Name .. " is frozen solid!")
              do return true end
              return false
            end
          end
        end
      end
    end
  end
end

sleepcheck = function(pokemon, foe)
  
  if getfenv()["Sleep" .. pokemon.Name .. pokemon.Nature.Value] == nil then
    getfenv()["Sleep" .. pokemon.Name .. pokemon.Nature.Value] = math.random(2, 4)
  end
  if pokemon.Status.Value == "Sleep" then
    if foe == true then
      getfenv()["Sleep" .. pokemon.Name .. pokemon.Nature.Value] = getfenv()["Sleep" .. pokemon.Name .. pokemon.Nature.Value] - 1
      if getfenv()["Sleep" .. pokemon.Name .. pokemon.Nature.Value] == 0 then
        scrolltext(dialog, "The " .. prefix .. " " .. pokemon.Name .. " woke up!")
        Math:Change(pokemon.Status, "")
        tbox.Status.Visible = false
        getfenv()["Sleep" .. pokemon.Name .. pokemon.Nature.Value] = nil
        return false
      else
        scrolltext(dialog, "The " .. prefix .. " " .. pokemon.Name .. " is fast asleep.")
        return true
      end
    else
      getfenv()["Sleep" .. pokemon.Name .. pokemon.Nature.Value] = getfenv()["Sleep" .. pokemon.Name .. pokemon.Nature.Value] - 1
      if getfenv()["Sleep" .. pokemon.Name .. pokemon.Nature.Value] == 0 then
        if not pokemon:FindFirstChild("Nickname") or not pokemon:FindFirstChild("Nickname").Value then
          scrolltext(dialog, pokemon.Name .. " woke up!")
          Math:Change(pokemon.Status, "")
          ybox.Status.Visible = false
          getfenv()["Sleep" .. pokemon.Name .. pokemon.Nature.Value] = nil
          do return false end
          if not pokemon:FindFirstChild("Nickname") or not pokemon:FindFirstChild("Nickname").Value then
            scrolltext(dialog, pokemon.Name .. " is fast asleep.")
            do return true end
            return false
          end
        end
      end
    end
  end
end

speedcalc = function(Poke1, Poke2, Poke1Move, Poke2Move, Poke1Mod, Poke2Mod)
  
  local Para1 = 1
  local Para2 = 1
  local Poke1Prior = 0
  local Poke2Prior = 0
  if Poke1.Status.Value == "Paralysis" then
    Para1 = 0.25
  end
  if Poke2.Status.Value == "Paralysis" then
    Para2 = 0.25
  end
  if _G.Moves[Poke1Move].Priority ~= nil then
    Poke1Prior = _G.Moves[Poke1Move].Priority
  end
  if _G.Moves[Poke2Move].Priority ~= nil then
    Poke2Prior = _G.Moves[Poke2Move].Priority
  end
  local Poke1Speed = Poke1.Stats.SpeedStat.Value * modifierstat[Poke1Mod] * Para1
  local Poke2Speed = Poke2.Stats.SpeedStat.Value * modifierstat[Poke2Mod] * Para2
  if Poke2Prior < Poke1Prior then
    return Poke1, Poke1Move, Poke2, Poke2Move
  else
    if Poke1Prior < Poke2Prior then
      return Poke2, Poke2Move, Poke1, Poke1Move
    else
      if Poke1Prior == Poke2Prior then
        if Poke2Speed < Poke1Speed then
          return Poke1, Poke1Move, Poke2, Poke2Move
        else
          if Poke1Speed < Poke2Speed then
            return Poke2, Poke2Move, Poke1, Poke1Move
          else
            if Poke1Speed == Poke2Speed then
              local rundum = math.random(1, 2)
              if rundum == 1 then
                return Poke1, Poke1Move, Poke2, Poke2Move
              else
                if rundum == 2 then
                  return Poke2, Poke2Move, Poke1, Poke1Move
                end
              end
            end
          end
        end
      end
    end
  end
end

recoil = function(pokecfg, rate, foebool, move)
  
  local dmgtaken = 0
  if rate == "dmgdone" then
    dmgtaken = math.ceil(dmg / move.Effects.Rate)
  else
    dmgtaken = math.ceil(pokecfg.Stats.HPStat.Value / rate)
  end
  local hpbefore = pokecfg.CurrentHP.Value
  if pokecfg.CurrentHP.Value - dmgtaken <= 0 then
    Math:Change(pokecfg.CurrentHP, 0)
    if foebool == true then
      updatehealth(tbox, pokecfg, pokecfg.CurrentHP.Value)
      scrolltext(dialog, "The " .. prefix .. " " .. pokecfg.Name .. " is hit with recoil!")
      checkfaint(pokecfg, true)
    else
      updatehealth(ybox, pokecfg, pokecfg.CurrentHP.Value)
      if not pokecfg:FindFirstChild("Nickname") or not pokecfg:FindFirstChild("Nickname").Value then
        scrolltext(dialog, pokecfg.Name .. " is hit with recoil!")
        checkfaint(pokecfg, false)
        if pokecfg.CurrentHP.Value - dmgtaken >= 0 then
          Math:Change(pokecfg.CurrentHP, pokecfg.CurrentHP.Value - dmgtaken)
          if foebool == true then
            updatehealth(tbox, pokecfg, pokecfg.CurrentHP.Value)
            scrolltext(dialog, "The " .. prefix .. " " .. pokecfg.Name .. " is hit with recoil!")
          else
            updatehealth(ybox, pokecfg, pokecfg.CurrentHP.Value)
            if not pokecfg:FindFirstChild("Nickname") or not pokecfg:FindFirstChild("Nickname").Value then
              scrolltext(dialog, pokecfg.Name .. " is hit with recoil!")
            end
          end
        end
      end
    end
  end
end

gainhealth = function(user, target, value, foe)
  
  local hpbefore = user.CurrentHP.Value
  if hpbefore ~= user.Stats.HPStat.Value then
    if user.Stats.HPStat.Value <= hpbefore + math.ceil(value) then
      Math:Change(user.CurrentHP, user.Stats.HPStat.Value)
      if foe == true then
        if not target:FindFirstChild("Nickname") or not target:FindFirstChild("Nickname").Value then
          scrolltext(dialog, target.Name .. " had its energy drained!")
          updatehealth(tbox, user, user.CurrentHP.Value)
          scrolltext(dialog, "The " .. prefix .. " " .. target.Name .. " had its energy drained!")
          updatehealth(ybox, user, user.CurrentHP.Value)
          if hpbefore + math.ceil(value) < user.Stats.HPStat.Value then
            Math:Change(user.CurrentHP, hpbefore + math.ceil(value))
            if foe == true then
              if not target:FindFirstChild("Nickname") or not target:FindFirstChild("Nickname").Value then
                scrolltext(dialog, target.Name .. " had its energy drained!")
                updatehealth(tbox, user, user.CurrentHP.Value)
                scrolltext(dialog, "The " .. prefix .. " " .. target.Name .. " had its energy drained!")
                updatehealth(ybox, user, user.CurrentHP.Value)
              end
            end
          end
        end
      end
    end
  end
end

nickname = function(pokemon)
  
  if pokemon:FindFirstChild("Nickname") then
    return pokemon:FindFirstChild("Nickname").Value
  else
    return pokemon.Name
  end
end

leechdamage = function(user, target, foe)
  
  local oldHP = target.CurrentHP.Value
  local userBox, targetBox = nil, nil
  local absorbed = 0
  if foe == true then
    userBox = ybox
    targetBox = tbox
  else
    userBox = tbox
    targetBox = ybox
  end
  local amountlost = math.floor(math.min(target.CurrentHP.Value, target.Stats.HPStat.Value / 8))
  target.CurrentHP.Value = math.max(target.CurrentHP.Value - amountlost, 0)
  gainhealth(user, target, amountlost, foe)
  updatehealth(userBox, user, target.CurrentHP.Value)
  updatehealth(targetBox, target, oldHP)
  scrolltext(dialog, nickname(user) .. " regained health!")
  checkfaint(target, foe)
  if foe == true and target.CurrentHP.Value <= 0 then
    getExperience()
  end
end

secondary = function(target, user, targettable, usertable, move, effect, foe, foebool)
  
  local moveassociation = {
Target = {target, targettable}
, 
User = {user, usertable}
}
  if effect == "BreakScreen" then
    if foe ~= user and (oppLightScreen > 0 or oppReflect > 0) then
      oppLightScreen = 0
      oppReflect = 0
      scrolltext(dialog, nickname(user) .. " shattered the barrier!")
    else
      if foe == user and (userLightScreen > 0 or userReflect > 0) then
        userLightScreen = 0
        userReflect = 0
        scrolltext(dialog, nickname(user) .. " shattered the barrier!")
      end
    end
  else
    if effect == "LightScreen" then
      if foe == user then
        scrolltext(dialog, "Light Screen raised the opponent team\'s Sp. Defense!")
        oppLightScreen = 5
      else
        if foe ~= user then
          scrolltext(dialog, "Light Screen raised your team\'s Sp. Defense!")
          userLightScreen = 5
        end
      end
    else
      if effect == "Reflect" then
        if foe == user then
          scrolltext(dialog, "Reflect raised the opponent team\'s Defense!")
          oppReflect = 5
        else
          if foe ~= user then
            scrolltext(dialog, "Reflect raised your team\'s Defense!")
            userReflect = 5
          end
        end
      else
        if effect == "Leech" then
          if not isType(target, "Grass") then
            if foe == user and leechseeduser == false then
              leechseeduser = true
              scrolltext(dialog, nickname(target) .. " was seeded!")
            else
              if foe == user and leechseeduser == true then
                scrolltext(dialog, nickname(target) .. " is already seeded!")
              else
                if foe ~= user and leechseedopp == true then
                  scrolltext(dialog, nickname(target) .. " is already seeded!")
                else
                  if foe ~= user and leechseedopp == false then
                    leechseedopp = true
                    scrolltext(dialog, nickname(target) .. " was seeded!")
                  end
                end
              end
            end
          else
            scrolltext(dialog, "But it failed...!")
          end
        else
          if effect == "ToxicSpikes" then
            if foe == user and TSpikesFoe < 2 then
              TSpikesFoe = TSpikesFoe + 1
              scrolltext(dialog, nickname(user) .. " scattered poison spikes!")
            else
              if foe ~= user and TSpikesUser < 2 then
                TSpikesUser = TSpikesUser + 1
                scrolltext(dialog, nickname(user) .. " scattered poison spikes!")
              else
                scrolltext(dialog, "But it failed!")
              end
            end
          else
            if effect == "DB" then
              scrolltext(dialog, nickname(user) .. " is trying to take the foe with it!")
              if foe == user then
                DBfoe = true
              else
                DBuse = true
              end
            else
              if effect == "LoseFlying" then
                if foe == user then
                  oppRoosting = true
                else
                  userRoosting = true
                end
              else
                if effect == "Protect" then
                  local succeed = 0
                  if foe == user then
                    succeed = math.random(1, oppprotect)
                    if succeed == 1 then
                      oppIsProtected = true
                      oppprotect = oppprotect * 2
                      scrolltext(dialog, nickname(user) .. " is protecting itself!")
                    else
                      oppIsProtected = false
                      oppprotect = 1
                      scrolltext(dialog, "But it failed...")
                    end
                  else
                    succeed = math.random(1, userprotect)
                    if succeed == 1 then
                      userIsProtected = true
                      userprotect = userprotect * 2
                      scrolltext(dialog, nickname(user) .. " is protecting itself!")
                    else
                      userIsProtected = false
                      userprotect = 1
                      scrolltext(dialog, "But it failed...")
                    end
                  end
                else
                  do
                    if effect == "Stats" then
                      for i,v in pairs(move.Effects.Stats) do
                        if moveassociation[v[1]][1].CurrentHP.Value > 0 then
                          local chance = math.random(1, 100)
                          if chance <= v[3] then
                            local current = moveassociation[v[1]][2][i] + v[2]
                            moveassociation[v[1]][2][i] = moveassociation[v[1]][2][i] + v[2]
                            if moveassociation[v[1]][2][i] > 6 and v[2] > 0 then
                              moveassociation[v[1]][2][i] = 6
                            else
                              if moveassociation[v[1]][2][i] < -6 and v[2] < 0 then
                                moveassociation[v[1]][2][i] = -6
                              end
                            end
                            if current < -6 or current > 6 then
                              if (foe == target and target == moveassociation[v[1]][1]) or foe == user and user == moveassociation[v[1]][1] then
                                scrolltext(dialog, "The " .. prefix .. " " .. moveassociation[v[1]][1].Name .. "\'s " .. fullnamestats[i] .. " can\'t go any higher!")
                              else
                                if (foe == target and target == moveassociation[v[1]][1]) or foe == user and user == moveassociation[v[1]][1] then
                                  scrolltext(dialog, "The " .. prefix .. " " .. moveassociation[v[1]][1].Name .. "\'s " .. fullnamestats[i] .. " can\'t go any lower!")
                                else
                                  if current > 6 then
                                    if not moveassociation[v[1]][1]:FindFirstChild("Nickname") or not moveassociation[v[1]][1]:FindFirstChild("Nickname").Value then
                                      scrolltext(dialog, moveassociation[v[1]][1].Name .. "\'s " .. fullnamestats[i] .. " can\'t go any higher!")
                                      if current < -6 then
                                        if not moveassociation[v[1]][1]:FindFirstChild("Nickname") or not moveassociation[v[1]][1]:FindFirstChild("Nickname").Value then
                                          scrolltext(dialog, moveassociation[v[1]][1].Name .. "\'s " .. fullnamestats[i] .. " can\'t go any lower!")
                                          if (foe == target and target == moveassociation[v[1]][1]) or foe == user and user == moveassociation[v[1]][1] then
                                            scrolltext(dialog, "The " .. prefix .. " " .. moveassociation[v[1]][1].Name .. "\'s " .. fullnamestats[i] .. buffstrings[v[2]])
                                          else
                                            if not moveassociation[v[1]][1]:FindFirstChild("Nickname") or not moveassociation[v[1]][1]:FindFirstChild("Nickname").Value then
                                              do
                                                scrolltext(dialog, moveassociation[v[1]][1].Name .. "\'s " .. fullnamestats[i] .. buffstrings[v[2]])
                                                -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC564: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_THEN_STMT

                                                -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC564: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_STMT

                                                -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC564: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_ELSE_STMT

                                                -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC564: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_STMT

                              end

                          end
                        end
                      end
                    else
                      if effect == "Recoil" then
                        recoil(user, move.Effects.Recoil, foebool, move)
                      else
                        if effect == "Status" then
                          local immune = false
                          for i,v in pairs(move.Effects.Status) do
                            for _,blah in pairs(_G.Pokemon[target.Name].Type) do
                              if blah == immunestatus[i] then
                                immune = true
                              end
                            end
                            if target.CurrentHP.Value > 0 and target.Status.Value == "" and not immune then
                              local chance = math.random(1, 100)
                              if chance <= v then
                                target.Status.Value = i
                                if foe == target then
                                  statusupdate(target, true)
                                else
                                  statusupdate(target, false)
                                end
                              end
                            else
                              do
                                if target.CurrentHP.Value > 0 and target.Status.Value ~= "" and move.AttackType == "Status" then
                                  if foe == target then
                                    scrolltext(dialog, "It doesn\'t affect the " .. prefix .. " " .. target.Name .. "!")
                                  else
                                    if not target:FindFirstChild("Nickname") or not target:FindFirstChild("Nickname").Value then
                                      scrolltext(dialog, "It doesn\'t affect " .. target.Name .. "!")
                                      if immune and move.AttackType == "Status" then
                                        if foe == target then
                                          scrolltext(dialog, "It doesn\'t affect the " .. prefix .. " " .. target.Name .. "!")
                                        else
                                          if not target:FindFirstChild("Nickname") or not target:FindFirstChild("Nickname").Value then
                                            do
                                              scrolltext(dialog, "It doesn\'t affect " .. target.Name .. "!")
                                              -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC708: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_THEN_STMT

                                              -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC708: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_STMT

                                              -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC708: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_STMT

                        else

                            if effect == "Flinch" then
                              local flichance = math.random(1, 100)
                              if _G.Pokemon[target.Name].Ability and _G.Pokemon[target.Name].Ability == "Inner Focus" then
                                flinch = false
                              else
                                if flichance <= move.Effects.Flinch then
                                  flinch = true
                                else
                                  flinch = false
                                end
                              end
                            else
                              do
                                if effect == "Heal" then
                                  local chump = nil
                                  local curhp = user.CurrentHP.Value
                                  local valheal = math.ceil(user.Stats.HPStat.Value * move.Effects.Heal)
                                  if curhp == user.Stats.HPStat.Value then
                                    scrolltext(dialog, "It had no effect!")
                                  else
                                    if user.Stats.HPStat.Value <= curhp + valheal then
                                      chump = true
                                      Math:Change(user.CurrentHP, user.Stats.HPStat.Value)
                                    else
                                      chump = true
                                      Math:Change(user.CurrentHP, curhp + valheal)
                                    end
                                  end
                                  if chump ~= nil then
                                    if user == foe then
                                      scrolltext(dialog, "The " .. prefix .. " " .. user.Name .. " regained health!")
                                      updatehealth(tbox, user, user.CurrentHP.Value)
                                    else
                                      if not user:FindFirstChild("Nickname") or not user:FindFirstChild("Nickname").Value then
                                        do
                                          scrolltext(dialog, user.Name .. " regained health!")
                                          updatehealth(ybox, user, user.CurrentHP.Value)
                                          if effect == "PainSplit" then
                                            local curhp = user.CurrentHP.Value
                                            local otherhp = target.CurrentHP.Value
                                            local hpsplit = math.floor((curhp + otherhp) / 2)
                                            scrolltext(dialog, "The battlers shared their pain!")
                                            Math:Change(user.CurrentHP, math.min(hpsplit, user.Stats.HPStat.Value))
                                            Math:Change(target.CurrentHP, math.min(hpsplit, target.Stats.HPStat.Value))
                                            updatehealth(tbox, target, target.CurrentHP.Value)
                                            updatehealth(ybox, user, user.CurrentHP.Value)
                                          else
                                            do
                                              if effect == "Rest" then
                                                local chump = nil
                                                local curhp = user.CurrentHP
                                                local hpstat = user.Stats.HPStat
                                                if hpstat.Value == curhp.Value then
                                                  scrolltext(dialog, "It had no effect!")
                                                else
                                                  Math:Change(curhp, hpstat.Value)
                                                  Math:Change(user.Status, "Sleep")
                                                  chump = true
                                                end
                                                if chump ~= nil then
                                                  if user == foe then
                                                    user.Status.Value = "Sleep"
                                                    scrolltext(dialog, "The " .. prefix .. " " .. user.Name .. " started sleeping!")
                                                    statusupdate(user, true)
                                                    updatehealth(tbox, user, user.CurrentHP.Value)
                                                  else
                                                    if not user:FindFirstChild("Nickname") or not user:FindFirstChild("Nickname").Value then
                                                      do
                                                        scrolltext(dialog, user.Name .. " started sleeping!")
                                                        statusupdate(user, false)
                                                        updatehealth(ybox, user, user.CurrentHP.Value)
                                                        if effect == "Volatile" then
                                                          for i,v in pairs(move.Effects.Volatile) do
                                                            if target.CurrentHP.Value > 0 and i == "Confusion" then
                                                              local volatilecheck = math.random(1, 100)
                                                              if volatilecheck <= v then
                                                                if foe == target then
                                                                  if theirconfusion == true then
                                                                    scrolltext(dialog, "The " .. prefix .. " " .. target.Name .. " is already confused!")
                                                                  else
                                                                    scrolltext(dialog, "The " .. prefix .. " " .. target.Name .. " was confused!")
                                                                    confusion2 = math.random(1, 3)
                                                                    theirconfusion = true
                                                                  end
                                                                else
                                                                  if urconfusion == true then
                                                                    if not target:FindFirstChild("Nickname") or not target:FindFirstChild("Nickname").Value then
                                                                      scrolltext(dialog, target.Name .. " is already confused!")
                                                                      if not target:FindFirstChild("Nickname") or not target:FindFirstChild("Nickname").Value then
                                                                        do
                                                                          scrolltext(dialog, target.Name .. " was confused!")
                                                                          confusion1 = math.random(1, 3)
                                                                          urconfusion = true
                                                                          -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC1063: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_THEN_STMT

                                                                          -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC1063: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_STMT

                                                                          -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC1063: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_THEN_STMT

                                                                          -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC1063: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_STMT

                                                                          -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC1063: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_THEN_STMT

                                                                          -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC1063: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_STMT

                                                                          -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC1063: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_ELSE_STMT

                                                                          -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC1063: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_STMT

                                                                          -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC1063: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_THEN_STMT

                                                                          -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC1063: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_STMT

                                                                          -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC1063: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_THEN_STMT

                                                                          -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC1063: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_STMT

                                                                        end
                                                                      end
                                                                    end
                                                                  end
                                                                end
                                                              end
                                                            end
                                                          end
                                                        else
                                                          if effect == "ClearStats" then
                                                            scrolltext(dialog, "All stat changes were reset!")
                                                            usermod = {Atk = 0, Def = 0, SpA = 0, SpD = 0, Speed = 0, Acc = 0, Evade = 0}
                                                            oppmod = {Atk = 0, Def = 0, SpA = 0, SpD = 0, Speed = 0, Acc = 0, Evade = 0}
                                                          else
                                                            if effect == "Absorb" then
                                                              if foe == target then
                                                                gainhealth(user, target, dmg * move.Effects.Absorb, false)
                                                              else
                                                                gainhealth(user, target, dmg * move.Effects.Absorb, true)
                                                              end
                                                            end
                                                          end
                                                        end
                                                      end
                                                    end
                                                  end
                                                end
                                              end
                                            end
                                          end
                                        end
                                      end
                                    end
                                  end
                                end
                              end
                            end
                          end
                        end
                      end
                    end
                  end
                end
              end
            end
          end
        end
      end
    end
  end
end

passivemove = function(target, user, targettable, usertable, move, foe, foebool)
  
  local Move = _G.Moves[move]
  for i,v in pairs(_G.Moves[move].Effects) do
    secondary(target, user, usertable, targettable, Move, i, foe, foebool)
  end
end

lowkicktable = {
[1] = {20, 0.1, 21.8}
, 
[2] = {40, 21.9, 55}
, 
[3] = {60, 55.1, 110}
, 
[4] = {80, 110.1, 220.2}
, 
[5] = {100, 220.3, 440.7}
}
weightdmg = function(pokemon)
  
  for _,dmg in ipairs(lowkicktable) do
    if dmg[2] <= _G.Pokemon[pokemon.Name].Weight and _G.Pokemon[pokemon.Name].Weight <= dmg[3] then
      return dmg[1]
    end
  end
  return 120
end

dmgcalculate = function(Poke1, Poke2, Move, AtkModi, DefModi, critchance)
  
  moves = _G.Moves
  local newatkmodi = AtkModi
  local newdefmodi = DefModi
  local burn = 1
  if Poke1.Status.Value == "Burn" then
    burn = 0.5
  end
  atkerstats = Poke1.Stats
  deferstats = Poke2.Stats
  crit = false
  local weakness = 1
  local immune = nil
  local typetable = _G.Tables.TypeChart[moves[Move].Type]
  if Move == "Hidden Power" then
    typetable = _G.Tables.TypeChart[getHiddenPower(Poke1)]
  else
    if _G.Moves[Move].RandomType ~= nil then
      local types = {"Fairy", "Flying", "Electric", "Steel", "Ice", "Fire", "Grass", "Dragon", "Psychic", "Dark", "Bug", "Ground", "Ghost", "Poison", "Fighting", "Water", "Normal"}
      typetable = _G.Tables.TypeChart[types[math.random(#types)]]
    end
  end
  do
    local types = _G.Pokemon[Poke2.Name].Type
    if originalstats[Poke2] then
      types = originalstats[Poke2].Type
    end
    for i,v in pairs(types) do
      if ((Poke2.Parent.Name == "PokemonParty" and userRoosting) or Poke2.Parent.Name ~= "OppPokemon" or oppRoosting) and v == "Flying" then
        for _,weak in ipairs(typetable["0x"]) do
          if v == weak then
            weakness = weakness * 0
          end
        end
        if moves[Move].HitsEverything ~= nil and weakness == 0 then
          weakness = 1
        end
        for _,weak in ipairs(typetable[".5x"]) do
          if v == weak then
            weakness = weakness * 0.5
          end
        end
        for _,weak in ipairs(typetable["2x"]) do
          if v == weak then
            weakness = weakness * 2
          end
        end
        do
          -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC138: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_THEN_STMT

          -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC138: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_STMT

        end
      end
    end
    if _G.Pokemon[Poke2.Name].Ability and _G.Pokemon[Poke2.Name].Ability == "Levitate" and moves[Move].Type == "Ground" then
      weakness = 0
      immune = "Levitate"
    end
    local STAB = 1
    if originalstats[Poke1] then
      for i,v in pairs(originalstats[Poke1].Type) do
        if moves[Move].Type == v then
          STAB = 1.5
        end
      end
    else
      do
        for i,v in pairs(_G.Pokemon[Poke1.Name].Type) do
          if moves[Move].Type == v then
            STAB = 1.5
          end
        end
        do
          local power = moves[Move].Power
          if power == false and moves[Move].Effects.PowerWeight ~= nil then
            power = weightdmg(Poke2)
          end
          if power <= 60 and _G.Pokemon[Poke1.Name].Ability and _G.Pokemon[Poke1.Name].Ability == "Technician" then
            print("Technician activate")
            power = power * 1.5
          end
          if moves[Move].AttackType == "Physical" then
            if critchance == 1 then
              dmgcalc = math.ceil(((2 * Poke1.Lvl.Value + 10) / 250 * (atkerstats.AtkStat.Value * modifierstat[AtkModi] * burn / (deferstats.DefStat.Value * modifierstat[DefModi])) * (power) + 2) * critchance * STAB * weakness * math.random(85, 100) / 100)
            else
              if critchance == 2 then
                if AtkModi < 0 then
                  newatkmodi = 0
                end
                if newdefmodi > 0 then
                  newdefmodi = 0
                end
                dmgcalc = math.ceil(((2 * Poke1.Lvl.Value + 10) / 250 * (atkerstats.AtkStat.Value * modifierstat[newatkmodi] / (deferstats.DefStat.Value * modifierstat[newdefmodi])) * (power) + 2) * critchance * STAB * weakness * math.random(85, 100) / 100)
              end
            end
          else
            if moves[Move].AttackType == "Special" then
              if critchance == 1 then
                dmgcalc = math.ceil(((2 * Poke1.Lvl.Value + 10) / 250 * (atkerstats.SpAStat.Value * modifierstat[AtkModi] / (deferstats.SpDStat.Value * modifierstat[DefModi])) * (power) + 2) * critchance * STAB * weakness * math.random(85, 100) / 100)
              else
                if critchance == 2 then
                  if AtkModi < 0 then
                    newatkmodi = 0
                  end
                  if newdefmodi > 0 then
                    newdefmodi = 0
                  end
                  dmgcalc = math.ceil(((2 * Poke1.Lvl.Value + 10) / 250 * (atkerstats.SpAStat.Value * modifierstat[newatkmodi] / (deferstats.SpDStat.Value * modifierstat[newdefmodi])) * (power) + 2) * critchance * STAB * weakness * math.random(85, 100) / 100)
                end
              end
            end
          end
          if _G.Pokemon[Poke2.Name].Ability and _G.Pokemon[Poke2.Name].Ability == "Thick Fat" and (moves[Move].Type == "Fire" or moves[Move].Type == "Ice") then
            dmgcalc = math.floor(dmgcalc / 2)
          end
          if (Poke2.Parent.Name == "PokemonParty" and userReflect > 0) or Poke2.Parent.Name == "OppPokemon" and oppReflect > 0 then
            dmgcalc = math.ceil(dmgcalc / 2)
          end
          if (Poke2.Parent.Name == "PokemonParty" and userLightScreen > 0) or Poke2.Parent.Name == "OppPokemon" and oppLightScreen > 0 then
            dmgcalc = math.ceil(dmgcalc / 2)
          end
          return dmgcalc, weakness, critchance, immune
        end
      end
    end
  end
end

weak = function(w, pokecfg, foe, ability)
  
  if w > 1 then
    wait(0.3)
    scrolltext(dialog, "It\'s super effective!")
  else
    if w < 1 and w ~= 0 then
      wait(0.3)
      scrolltext(dialog, "It\'s not very effective...")
    else
      if w == 0 and ability == nil then
        wait(0.3)
        if foe == true then
          scrolltext(dialog, "It doesn\'t affect the " .. prefix .. " " .. pokecfg.Name .. "...")
        else
          if not pokecfg:FindFirstChild("Nickname") or not pokecfg:FindFirstChild("Nickname").Value then
            scrolltext(dialog, "It doesn\'t affect " .. pokecfg.Name .. "...")
            if ability == "Levitate" then
              if foe == true then
                scrolltext(dialog, "The " .. prefix .. " " .. pokecfg.Name .. " has Levitate!")
                scrolltext(dialog, "The Ground move missed!")
              else
                scrolltext(dialog, pokecfg.Name .. " has Levitate!")
                scrolltext(dialog, "The Ground move missed!")
              end
            end
          end
        end
      end
    end
  end
end

getpokemon = function(theirpoke)
  
  local goal = theirpoke.PartyPosition.Value + 1
  for i,v in ipairs(oppteam:GetChildren()) do
    if v.PartyPosition.Value == goal then
      return v
    end
  end
end

wildmove = function(pokeconfig)
  
  local moves = pokeconfig.Moves:GetChildren()
  if ppchecker(pokeconfig.Moves) then
    return "Struggle"
  else
    while 1 do
      while 1 do
        local determinemove = moves[math.random(1, #moves)]
        if determinemove.PP.Value > 0 then
          do return determinemove.Name end
          -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC23: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_THEN_STMT

          -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC23: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_STMT

        end
      end
      wait()
    end
  end
end

findMove = function(tab, move)
  
  for i,v in ipairs(tab) do
    if v == move then
      return true
    end
  end
  return false
end

trainerMove = function(pokeconfig, userpoke)
  
  local moves = pokeconfig.Moves:GetChildren()
  local availmoves = {}
  local types = _G.Pokemon[userpoke.Name].Type
  for i,v in ipairs(moves) do
    if v.PP.Value > 0 then
      if _G.Moves[v.Name].AttackType == "Status" then
        table.insert(availmoves, v)
      else
      end
    end
    if _G.Moves[v.Name].Type == "Ground" and _G.Pokemon[userpoke.Name].Ability and _G.Pokemon[userpoke.Name].Ability == "Levitate" then
      do
        local typetable = _G.Tables.TypeChart[_G.Moves[v.Name].Type]
        for _,d in pairs(types) do
          local weakness = 1
          for _,weak in ipairs(typetable["0x"]) do
            if d == weak then
              weakness = weakness * 0
            end
          end
          if weakness ~= 0 then
            do
              if findMove(availmoves, v) then
                break
              else
                if weakness ~= 0 then
                  table.insert(availmoves, v)
                end
              end
              -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC92: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_THEN_STMT

              -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC92: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_STMT

            end
          end
        end
        -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC94: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_THEN_STMT

        -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC94: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_STMT

      end
    end
  end
  if #availmoves > 0 then
    local determinemove = availmoves[math.random(1, #availmoves)]
    return determinemove.Name
  else
    do
      do return wildmove(pokeconfig) end
    end
  end
end

pickmove = function(poke1, movelist)
  
  local movechosen = nil
  local num = 0
  changevisible(buttonholder, "TextButton", false)
  for i,v in ipairs(movelist:GetChildren()) do
    do
      if v:IsA("TextButton") then
        do
          num = num + 1
          getfenv()["blah" .. num] = v.MouseButton1Click:connect(function()
    
    battle.ButtonHolder.Back.Visible = false
    if poke1.Moves[v.MoveName.Text].PP.Value > 0 then
      movechosen = v.MoveName.Text
      for happy = 1, 4 do
        if getfenv()["Enter" .. happy] ~= nil then
          getfenv()["Enter" .. happy]:disconnect()
        end
        if getfenv()["blah" .. happy] ~= nil then
          getfenv()["blah" .. happy]:disconnect()
        end
      end
    else
      do
        movelist.Visible = false
        scrolltext(dialog, "You don\'t have enough PP to use " .. v.MoveName.Text .. "!")
        dialog.Text = ""
        dropshadowdialog.Text = ""
        moveappear(poke1, movelist)
      end
    end
  end
)
          -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC31: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_THEN_STMT

          -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC31: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_STMT

        end
      end
    end
  end
  do
    repeat
      wait()
    until movechosen ~= nil
    unactive = false
    movelist.Visible = false
    return "Move", movechosen
  end
end

fixmoves = function(cfg)
  
  local val = false
  for i,v in ipairs(cfg.Moves:GetChildren()) do
    if v.Value > 4 then
      val = true
    end
  end
  if val == true then
    for i,v in ipairs(cfg.Moves:GetChildren()) do
      Math:Change(v, i)
    end
  end
end

weaksounds = function(w)
  
  if w > 1 then
    p.PlayerGui.SoundEffect.SoundId = "http://www.roblox.com/asset/?id=201476487"
    p.PlayerGui.SoundEffect:Play()
  else
    if w < 1 and w ~= 0 then
      p.PlayerGui.SoundEffect.SoundId = "http://www.roblox.com/asset/?id=201476277"
      p.PlayerGui.SoundEffect:Play()
    else
      if w ~= 0 then
        p.PlayerGui.SoundEffect.SoundId = "http://www.roblox.com/asset/?id=201476240"
        p.PlayerGui.SoundEffect:Play()
      end
    end
  end
end

transformed = function(pokemon, defender, foe)
  
  originalstats[pokemon] = {}
  local t = originalstats[pokemon]
  t.Moves = {}
  t.Stats = {}
  t.Type = _G.Pokemon[defender.Name].Type
  for i,v in ipairs(pokemon.Moves:GetChildren()) do
    t.Moves[v.Value] = v.Name
  end
  for i,v in ipairs(pokemon.Stats:GetChildren()) do
    t.Stats[v.Name] = v.Value
  end
  for i,v in ipairs(pokemon.Stats:GetChildren()) do
    if v.Name ~= "HPStat" then
      v:Destroy()
    end
  end
  for i,v in ipairs(pokemon.Moves:GetChildren()) do
    v:Destroy()
  end
  for i,v in ipairs(defender.Moves:GetChildren()) do
    v:Clone().Parent = pokemon.Moves
  end
  for i,v in ipairs(defender.Stats:GetChildren()) do
    if v.Name ~= "HPStat" then
      v:Clone().Parent = pokemon.Stats
    end
  end
  if foe == false then
    yourpokemon:TweenSizeAndPosition(UDim2.new(0, 0, 0, 0), yourpokemon.Position + UDim2.new(1, 0, 1, 0), "Out", "Quad", 0.7)
    wait(0.75)
    yourpokemon:TweenSize(UDim2.new(-1, 0, -1, 0), "Out", "Quad", 0.7)
    wait(0.75)
    yourpokemon:TweenSize(UDim2.new(0, 0, 0, 0), "Out", "Quad", 0.7)
    wait(0.75)
    yourpokemon:TweenSize(UDim2.new(-1, 0, -1, 0), "Out", "Quad", 0.7)
    wait(0.75)
    yourpokemon:TweenSize(UDim2.new(0, 0, 0, 0), "Out", "Quad", 0.7)
    wait(0.75)
    if pokemon.Shiny.Value ~= true or not _G.Pokemon[defender.Name].Sprites.SB then
      yourpokemon.Image = _G.Pokemon[defender.Name].Sprites.Back
      yourpokemon:TweenSizeAndPosition(UDim2.new(1, 0, 1, 0), yourpokemon.Position - UDim2.new(1, 0, 1, 0), "Out", "Quad", 0.7, false, function()
    
    yourpokemon.Position = UDim2.new(0, 0, 0.25, 0)
  end
)
      usermod = oppmod
      theirpokemon:TweenSizeAndPosition(UDim2.new(0, 0, 0, 0), theirpokemon.Position + UDim2.new(1, 0, 1, 0), "Out", "Quad", 0.7)
      wait(0.75)
      theirpokemon:TweenSize(UDim2.new(-1, 0, -1, 0), "Out", "Quad", 0.7)
      wait(0.75)
      theirpokemon:TweenSize(UDim2.new(0, 0, 0, 0), "Out", "Quad", 0.7)
      wait(0.75)
      theirpokemon:TweenSize(UDim2.new(-1, 0, -1, 0), "Out", "Quad", 0.7)
      wait(0.75)
      theirpokemon:TweenSize(UDim2.new(0, 0, 0, 0), "Out", "Quad", 0.7)
      wait(0.75)
      if pokemon.Shiny.Value ~= true or not _G.Pokemon[defender.Name].Sprites.SF then
        theirpokemon.Image = _G.Pokemon[defender.Name].Sprites.Front
        theirpokemon:TweenSizeAndPosition(UDim2.new(1, 0, 1, 0), theirpokemon.Position - UDim2.new(-1, 0, -1, 0), "Out", "Quad", 0.7, false, function()
    
    theirpokemon.Position = UDim2.new(0, 0, 0, 0)
  end
)
        oppmod = usermod
        scrolltext(dialog, pokemon.Name .. " transformed into " .. defender.Name .. "!")
      end
    end
  end
end

returnstats = function()
  
  for pokemon,tabl in pairs(originalstats) do
    if pokemon and pokemon.Parent == p.PokemonParty then
      for i,v in ipairs(pokemon.Moves:GetChildren()) do
        v:Destroy()
      end
      for i,v in ipairs(pokemon.Stats:GetChildren()) do
        v:Destroy()
      end
      for value,movename in pairs(tabl.Moves) do
        local newmove = Instance.new("IntValue", pokemon.Moves)
        local pp = Instance.new("IntValue", newmove)
        pp.Name = "PP"
        pp.Value = _G.Moves[movename].PP
        newmove.Name = movename
        newmove.Value = value
      end
      for statname,value in pairs(tabl.Stats) do
        local newstat = Instance.new("IntValue", pokemon.Stats)
        newstat.Name = statname
        newstat.Value = value
      end
    end
  end
end

findWeakness = function(Move, Poke2)
  
  local weakness = 1
  local typetable = _G.Tables.TypeChart[_G.Moves[Move].Type]
  local types = _G.Pokemon[Poke2.Name].Type
  if originalstats[Poke2] then
    types = originalstats[Poke2].Type
  end
  for i,v in pairs(types) do
    for _,weak in ipairs(typetable["0x"]) do
      if v == weak then
        weakness = weakness * 0
      end
    end
  end
  return weakness
end

superaction = function(dialog, attacker, defender, move, foe)
  
  dmg = 0
  local weakness = 1
  local crit = 1
  local immune = nil
  flinch = false
  local timesused = 1
  local localtimesactuallyused = 0
  local pressure = 1
  if foe then
    DBfoe = false
  else
    DBuse = false
  end
  if _G.Pokemon[defender.Name].Ability and _G.Pokemon[defender.Name].Ability == "Pressure" then
    pressure = 2
  end
  if foe == true and _G.Moves[move].Effects.Protect == nil then
    oppprotect = 1
  end
  if foe == false and _G.Moves[move].Effects.Protect == nil then
    userprotect = 1
  end
  local hpbefore = defender.CurrentHP.Value
  if foe == true then
    atk = {oppmod, theirconfusion, "The " .. prefix .. " ", theirpokeout, theirpokemon, theiranime, tbox}
    def = {usermod, urconfusion, "", yourpokeout, yourpokemon, youranime, ybox}
  else
    atk = {usermod, urconfusion, "", yourpokeout, yourpokemon, youranime, ybox}
    def = {oppmod, theirconfusion, "the " .. prefix .. " ", theirpokeout, theirpokemon, theiranime, tbox}
  end
  if not confusedcheck(attacker, foe, atk[2]) and not paralyzecheck(attacker, foe) and not freezecheck(attacker, foe) and not sleepcheck(attacker, foe) then
    if not attacker:FindFirstChild("Nickname") or not attacker:FindFirstChild("Nickname").Value then
      scrolltext(dialog, atk[3] .. attacker.Name .. " used " .. move .. "!")
      if move ~= "Struggle" then
        Math:Change(attacker.Moves[move].PP, math.max(0, attacker.Moves[move].PP.Value - pressure))
      end
      if _G.Moves[move].Effects.MultiHit ~= nil then
        timesused = math.random(2, _G.Moves[move].Effects.MultiHit)
      end
      if move == "Splash" then
        scrolltext(dialog, "But it does nothing at all...")
      else
        if move == "Transform" then
          transformed(attacker, defender, foe)
        else
          if move == "Dream Eater" and defender.Status.Value ~= "Sleep" then
            scrolltext(dialog, "But " .. defender.Name .. " is awake!")
          else
            if ((foe and userIsProtected) or foe or oppIsProtected) and (type(_G.Moves[move].Accuracy) == "number" or _G.Moves[move].AttackType ~= "Status") then
              if not defender:FindFirstChild("Nickname") or not defender:FindFirstChild("Nickname").Value then
                scrolltext(dialog, defender.Name .. " protected itself!")
                if accfunc(move, atk[1].Acc, def[1].Evade) then
                  for lolz = 1, timesused do
                    if _G.Moves[move].SetDamage ~= nil then
                      if _G.Moves[move].SetDamage == "Level" then
                        dmg = attacker.Lvl.Value
                      else
                        dmg = _G.Moves[move].SetDamage
                      end
                      crit = 1
                      weakness = findWeakness(move, defender)
                      if weakness == 0 then
                        dmg = 0
                      end
                    else
                      if _G.Moves[move].AttackType == "Physical" then
                        dmg = dmgcalculate(attacker, defender, move, atk[1].Atk, def[1].Def, critfunc(_G.Moves[move].CritChance))
                      else
                        -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC355: Overwrote pending register: R7 in 'AssignReg'

                        -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC356: Overwrote pending register: R6 in 'AssignReg'

                        -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC357: Overwrote pending register: R5 in 'AssignReg'

                        if _G.Moves[move].AttackType == "Special" then
                          dmg = dmgcalculate(attacker, defender, move, atk[1].SpA, def[1].SpD, critfunc(_G.Moves[move].CritChance))
                        else
                          if _G.Moves[move].AttackType == "Status" then
                            for i,v in ipairs(_G.Tables.TypeChart[_G.Moves[move].Type]["0x"]) do
                              for i2,v2 in ipairs(_G.Pokemon[defender.Name].Type) do
                                -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC394: Overwrote pending register: R5 in 'AssignReg'

                              end
                            end
                            do
                              if (v == v2 and _G.Moves[move].Accuracy ~= true and weakness ~= 0) or _G.Moves[move].Effects.HitsEverything == true then
                                passivemove(defender, attacker, atk[1], def[1], move, theirpokeout, foe)
                              end
                              local hpbefore = defender.CurrentHP.Value
                              if hpbefore < dmg then
                                dmg = hpbefore
                              end
                              if dmg > 0 and hpbefore > 0 then
                                weaksounds(weakness)
                                defender.CurrentHP.Value = defender.CurrentHP.Value - dmg
                                if move == "False Swipe" and defender.CurrentHP.Value <= 0 then
                                  defender.CurrentHP.Value = 1
                                end
                                def[6].ImageColor3 = _G.Tables.TypeColors[_G.Moves[move].Type]
                                def[6].Visible = true
                                wait(0.1)
                                def[6].Visible = false
                                wait(0.1)
                                def[5].Visible = false
                                wait(0.1)
                                def[5].Visible = true
                                if defender.CurrentHP.Value > 0 then
                                  localtimesactuallyused = localtimesactuallyused + 1
                                  updatehealth(def[7], defender, defender.CurrentHP.Value)
                                  if crit == 2 then
                                    scrolltext(dialog, "It\'s a critical hit!")
                                  end

                                    weak(weakness, defender, foe, immune)
                                  end
                                  passivemove(defender, attacker, atk[1], def[1], move, theirpokeout, foe)
                                else
                                  if defender.CurrentHP.Value <= 0 then
                                    defender.CurrentHP.Value = 0
                                    updatehealth(def[7], defender, defender.CurrentHP.Value)
                                    if crit == 2 then
                                      scrolltext(dialog, "It\'s a critical hit!")
                                    end
                                    if _G.Moves[move].Effects.HitEverything == nil and _G.Moves[move].Effects.MultiHit == nil then
                                      weak(weakness, defender, foe, immune)
                                    end

                                          else

                                            box.HPLabel.Text = 0
                                            box.HPLabel.Shadow.Text = 0
                                          end
                                          attacker.CurrentHP.Value = 0
                                          updatehealth(box, attacker, hpbefore, true)
                                          attacker.Status.Value = "Faint"
                                          scrolltext(dialog, nickname(defender) .. " took down the foe with it!")
                                          checkfaint(attacker, foe)
                                        end
                                        localtimesactuallyused = localtimesactuallyused + 1
                                        do break end

                                          weak(weakness, defender, foe, immune)
                                        end
                                        if type(hpbefore) == "number" and hpbefore == 0 then
                                          scrolltext(dialog, "But there\'s nothing there!")
                                        end
