-- params : ...

local Sprites = {Inactive = "http://www.roblox.com/asset/?id=125060098", Active = "http://www.roblox.com/asset/?id=125060039"}
turninactive = function(party)
  
  for i,v in ipairs(party:GetChildren()) do
    if v:FindFirstChild("active") then
      v:FindFirstChild("active").Image = Sprites.Inactive
      if v.Status.Text ~= "FNT" then
        v.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.new(0.60392156862745, 0.73725490196078, 0.85098039215686)
      else
        v.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.new(0.35294117647059, 0, 0)
      end
    end
  end
end

findhealthbarsize = function(curhealth, maxhealth)
  
  local multi = curhealth / maxhealth
  return 0.8 * multi
end

changevisible = function(thing, isa, bool)
  
  for i,v in ipairs(thing:GetChildren()) do
    if v:IsA(isa) then
      v.Visible = bool
    end
  end
end

dcfenv = function(str)
  
  for i = 1, 6 do
    if getfenv()[str .. i] ~= nil then
      getfenv()[str .. i]:disconnect()
    end
  end
end

bigC = function(bool, partys)
  
  if bool == true then
    partys.Bottom.Line1.Visible = false
    partys.Bottom.Line2.Visible = false
    partys.Bottom.Stats.Visible = false
    partys.Bottom.Switch.Visible = false
    partys.Bottom.Cancel.Visible = false
    partys.Bottom.BigCancel.Visible = true
  else
    if bool == false then
      partys.Bottom.Line1.Visible = true
      partys.Bottom.Line2.Visible = true
      partys.Bottom.Stats.Visible = true
      partys.Bottom.Switch.Visible = true
      partys.Bottom.Cancel.Visible = true
      partys.Bottom.BigCancel.Visible = false
    end
  end
end

local Sound1 = Instance.new("Sound", script.Parent)
Sound1.SoundId = "http://www.roblox.com/asset/?id=290841329"
local Sound2 = Instance.new("Sound", script.Parent)
Sound2.SoundId = "http://www.roblox.com/asset/?id=318763788"
local Math = require(game.ReplicatedStorage.Functions.Math)
boxupdate = function(pokemon, box, Party, pokeout, battle, var)
  
  dcfenv("Stat")
  dcfenv("Switch")
  pokemonderp = pokemon
  local poke = _G.Pokemon[pokemon.Name]
  if pokemon.Status.Value ~= "Faint" then
    box.ImageColor3 = Color3.new(0.60392156862745, 0.73725490196078, 0.85098039215686)
  else
    box.ImageColor3 = Color3.new(0.35294117647059, 0, 0)
  end
  if not pokemon:FindFirstChild("Nickname") or not pokemon:FindFirstChild("Nickname").Value then
    box.PokeName.Text = pokemon.Name
    box.PokeName.DropShadow.Text = box.PokeName.Text
    box.PokemonSprite.Image = poke.Sprites.Mini
    box.Gender.Image = _G.Sprites.Symbols[pokemon.Gender.Value]
    box.Level.Text = "Lv: " .. pokemon.Lvl.Value
    box.Level.DropShadow.Text = box.Level.Text
    box.HPLabel.Text = pokemon.CurrentHP.Value .. "/     " .. pokemon.Stats.HPStat.Value
    box.HPLabel.DropShadow.Text = box.HPLabel.Text
    box.Health.Size = UDim2.new(findhealthbarsize(pokemon.CurrentHP.Value, pokemon.Stats.HPStat.Value), 0, 0.1, 0)
    if box.Health.Size.X.Scale > 0.4 then
      box.Health.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.new(0.66666666666667, 1, 0.49803921568627)
    else
      if box.Health.Size.X.Scale <= 0.4 and box.Health.Size.X.Scale >= 0.2 then
        box.Health.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.new(0.8, 0.8, 0)
      else
        if box.Health.Size.X.Scale < 0.2 and box.Health.Size.X.Scale > 0 then
          box.Health.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.new(0.66666666666667, 0, 0)
          box.active.Image = Sprites.Active
        end
      end
    end
    if pokemon.Status.Value ~= "" then
      box.Status.Text = _G.Tables.Status[pokemon.Status.Value][1]
      box.Status.BackgroundColor3 = _G.Tables.Status[pokemon.Status.Value][2]
      box.Status.Visible = true
    else
      box.Status.Text = ""
      box.Status.Visible = false
    end
    if pokemon.Status.Value == "Faint" then
      box.ImageColor3 = Color3.new(0.35294117647059, 0, 0)
    end
    getfenv()["Event" .. pokemon.PartyPosition.Value] = box.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
    
    Sound1:Play()
    pokemonderp = pokemon
    turninactive(partyscreen)
    if pokemonderp.Status.Value ~= "Faint" then
      box.ImageColor3 = Color3.new(0.41176470588235, 0.50588235294118, 0.58039215686275)
    else
      box.ImageColor3 = Color3.new(0.19607843137255, 0, 0)
    end
    bigC(false, box.Parent)
    if not pokemonderp:FindFirstChild("Nickname") or not pokemonderp:FindFirstChild("Nickname").Value then
      box.Parent.Bottom.dialog.Text = "Currently Selected: " .. pokemonderp.Name
      box.Parent.Bottom.dialog.DropShadow.Text = box.Parent.Bottom.dialog.Text
      if var == "Cancel" then
        box.Parent.Bottom.Cancel.Visible = false
      end
      dcfenv("Stat")
      dcfenv("Switch")
      getfenv()["Stat" .. pokemonderp.PartyPosition.Value] = box.Parent.Bottom.Stats.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
      
      local blah = nil
      Sound2:Play()
      box.Parent.Visible = false
      blah = _G.StatScreen(pokemonderp, true, pokeout, var)
      repeat
        wait()
      until blah ~= nil
      pokemonderp = blah
      if not pokemonderp:FindFirstChild("Nickname") or not pokemonderp:FindFirstChild("Nickname").Value then
        box.Parent.Bottom.dialog.Text = "Currently Selected: " .. pokemonderp.Name
        box.Parent.Bottom.dialog.DropShadow.Text = box.Parent.Bottom.dialog.Text
        turninactive(partyscreen)
        if pokemonderp.Status.Value ~= "Faint" then
          partyscreen["Pokemon" .. pokemonderp.PartyPosition.Value].ImageColor3 = Color3.new(0.41176470588235, 0.50588235294118, 0.58039215686275)
        else
          partyscreen["Pokemon" .. pokemonderp.PartyPosition.Value].ImageColor3 = Color3.new(0.19607843137255, 0, 0)
        end
        partyscreen["Pokemon" .. pokemonderp.PartyPosition.Value].active.Image = Sprites.Active
      end
    end
)
      getfenv()["Switch" .. pokemonderp.PartyPosition.Value] = box.Parent.Bottom.Switch.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
      
      Sound2:Play()
      if pokemonderp == pokeout then
        box.Parent.Bottom.dialog.Text = pokeout.Name .. " is already out!"
        box.Parent.Bottom.dialog.DropShadow.Text = box.Parent.Bottom.dialog.Text
      else
        if pokemonderp.Status.Value == "Faint" or pokemonderp.CurrentHP.Value == 0 then
          box.Parent.Bottom.dialog.Text = "You can\'t send out a fainted Pokemon!"
          box.Parent.Bottom.dialog.DropShadow.Text = box.Parent.Bottom.dialog.Text
        else
          dcfenv("Stat")
          dcfenv("Switch")
          dcfenv("Event")
          pokeout.PartyPosition.Value = pokemonderp.PartyPosition.Value
          pokemonderp.PartyPosition.Value = 1
          pokemonswitch = pokemonderp
        end
      end
    end
)
    end
  end
)
    box.Visible = true
  end
end

_G.PartyBattle = function(pokeout, battle, var)
  
  battle.Visible = false
  derp = true
  dcfenv("Event")
  dcfenv("Stat")
  dcfenv("Switch")
  pokemonswitch = nil
  if bigcancel ~= nil then
    bigcancel:disconnect()
  end
  if smallcancel ~= nil then
    smallcancel:disconnect()
  end
  partyscreen = game.Players.LocalPlayer.PlayerGui.Main.BlackScreen.Party
  party = game.Players.LocalPlayer.PokemonParty
  turninactive(partyscreen)
  for i,v in ipairs(partyscreen:GetChildren()) do
    if v:IsA("ImageButton") then
      v.Visible = false
    end
  end
  for i,v in pairs(party:GetChildren()) do
    boxupdate(v, partyscreen["Pokemon" .. v.PartyPosition.Value], party, pokeout, battle, var)
  end
  if var ~= "Cancel" then
    smallcancel = partyscreen.Bottom.Cancel.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
    
    dcfenv("Event")
    dcfenv("Stat")
    dcfenv("Switch")
    partyscreen.Visible = false
    derp = false
    battle.Visible = true
  end
)
    bigcancel = partyscreen.Bottom.BigCancel.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
    
    dcfenv("Event")
    dcfenv("Stat")
    dcfenv("Switch")
    partyscreen.Visible = false
    derp = false
    battle.Visible = true
  end
)
    bigC(true, partyscreen)
  else
    partyscreen.Bottom.BigCancel.Visible = false
    partyscreen.Bottom.Cancel.Visible = false
  end
  partyscreen.Title.Visible = true
  partyscreen.Bottom.dialog.Text = ""
  partyscreen.Bottom.dialog.DropShadow.Text = partyscreen.Bottom.dialog.Text
  partyscreen.Bottom.Visible = true
  partyscreen.Visible = true
  partyscreen.Bottom.dialog.Text = "Select a Pokemon to switch with " .. pokeout.Name .. "."
  partyscreen.Bottom.dialog.DropShadow.Text = partyscreen.Bottom.dialog.Text
  repeat
    wait()
  until pokemonswitch ~= nil or derp == false
  partyscreen.Visible = false
  battle.Visible = true
  if pokemonswitch ~= nil then
    return "Switch", pokemonswitch
  end
end

-- params : ...

local Sprites = {Inactive = "http://www.roblox.com/asset/?id=125060098", Active = "http://www.roblox.com/asset/?id=125060039"}
Math = require(game.ReplicatedStorage.Functions.Math)
hooligans = flase
notprocess = false
turninactive = function(party)
  
  for i,v in ipairs(party:GetChildren()) do
    if v:FindFirstChild("active") then
      v:FindFirstChild("active").Image = Sprites.Inactive
      if v.Status.Text ~= "FNT" then
        v.ImageColor3 = Color3.new(0.60392156862745, 0.73725490196078, 0.85098039215686)
      else
        v.ImageColor3 = Color3.new(0.35294117647059, 0, 0)
      end
    end
  end
end

findhealthbarsize = function(curhealth, maxhealth)
  
  local multi = curhealth / maxhealth
  return 0.8 * multi
end

changevisible = function(thing, isa, bool)
  
  for i,v in ipairs(thing:GetChildren()) do
    if v:IsA(isa) then
      v.Visible = bool
    end
  end
end

    if getfenv()[str .. i] ~= nil then
      getfenv()[str .. i]:disconnect()
    end
  end
end

    partys.Bottom.Line1.Visible = false
    partys.Bottom.Line2.Visible = false
    partys.Bottom.Stats.Visible = false
    partys.Bottom.Switch.Visible = false
    partys.Bottom.Cancel.Visible = false
    partys.Bottom.BigCancel.Visible = true
  else

      partys.Bottom.Line1.Visible = true
      partys.Bottom.Line2.Visible = true
      partys.Bottom.Stats.Visible = true
      partys.Bottom.Switch.Visible = true
      partys.Bottom.Cancel.Visible = true
      partys.Bottom.BigCancel.Visible = false
    end
  end

local Sound2 = Instance.new("Sound", script.Parent)
Sound2.SoundId = "http://www.roblox.com/asset/?id=318763788"
local Sound3 = Instance.new("Sound", script.Parent)
Sound3.SoundId = "rbxassetid://138097048"
local Math = require(game.ReplicatedStorage.Functions.Math)
boxupdate = function(pokemon, box, Party, pokeout, battle, var)
  
  dcfenv("Stat")
  dcfenv("Switch")
  pokemonderp = pokemon
  local poke = _G.Pokemon[pokemon.Name]

  else

  end

    box.Level.DropShadow.Text = box.Level.Text
    box.HPLabel.Text = pokemon.CurrentHP.Value .. "/     " .. pokemon.Stats.HPStat.Value
    box.HPLabel.DropShadow.Text = box.HPLabel.Text
    box.Health.Size = UDim2.new(findhealthbarsize(pokemon.CurrentHP.Value, pokemon.Stats.HPStat.Value), 0, 0.1, 0)
    if box.Health.Size.X.Scale > 0.4 then
      box.Health.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.new(0.66666666666667, 1, 0.49803921568627)
    else
      if box.Health.Size.X.Scale <= 0.4 and box.Health.Size.X.Scale >= 0.2 then
        box.Health.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.new(0.8, 0.8, 0)
      else
        if box.Health.Size.X.Scale < 0.2 and box.Health.Size.X.Scale > 0 then
          box.Health.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.new(0.66666666666667, 0, 0)
        end
      end
    end
    if pokemon.Status.Value ~= "" then
      box.Status.Text = _G.Tables.Status[pokemon.Status.Value][1]
      box.Status.BackgroundColor3 = _G.Tables.Status[pokemon.Status.Value][2]
      box.Status.Visible = true
    else
      box.Status.Text = ""
      box.Status.Visible = false
    end
    if pokemon.Status.Value == "Faint" then
      box.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.new(0.35294117647059, 0, 0)
    end
    getfenv()["Event" .. pokemon.PartyPosition.Value] = box.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
    
    Sound1:Play()
    pokemonderp = pokemon
    turninactive(partyscreen)
    box.active.Image = Sprites.Active
    if pokemonderp.Status.Value ~= "Faint" then
      box.ImageColor3 = Color3.new(0.41176470588235, 0.50588235294118, 0.58039215686275)
    else
      box.ImageColor3 = Color3.new(0.19607843137255, 0, 0)
    end
    if not pokemonderp:FindFirstChild("Nickname") or not pokemonderp:FindFirstChild("Nickname").Value then
      box.Parent.Bottom.dialog.Text = "Currently Selected: " .. pokemonderp.Name
      box.Parent.Bottom.dialog.DropShadow.Text = box.Parent.Bottom.dialog.Text
      bigC(false, box.Parent)
      dcfenv("Stat")
      dcfenv("Switch")
      getfenv()["Stat" .. pokemonderp.PartyPosition.Value] = box.Parent.Bottom.Stats.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
      
      Sound2:Play()
      local blah = nil
      box.Parent.Visible = false
      blah = _G.StatScreen(pokemonderp, false)
      repeat
        wait()
      until blah ~= nil
      pokemonderp = blah
      if not pokemonderp:FindFirstChild("Nickname") or not pokemonderp:FindFirstChild("Nickname").Value then
        box.Parent.Bottom.dialog.Text = "Currently Selected: " .. pokemonderp.Name
        box.Parent.Bottom.dialog.DropShadow.Text = box.Parent.Bottom.dialog.Text
        turninactive(partyscreen)
        if pokemonderp.Status.Value ~= "Faint" then
          partyscreen["Pokemon" .. pokemonderp.PartyPosition.Value].BackgroundColor3 = Color3.new(0.41176470588235, 0.50588235294118, 0.58039215686275)
        else
          partyscreen["Pokemon" .. pokemonderp.PartyPosition.Value].BackgroundColor3 = Color3.new(0.19607843137255, 0, 0)
        end
        partyscreen["Pokemon" .. pokemonderp.PartyPosition.Value].active.Image = Sprites.Active
      end
    end
)
      getfenv()["Switch" .. pokemonderp.PartyPosition.Value] = box.Parent.Bottom.Switch.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
      
      Sound2:Play()
      box.Parent.Bottom.dialog.Text = "Who should switch with " .. pokemon.Name .. "?"
      box.Parent.Bottom.dialog.DropShadow.Text = box.Parent.Bottom.dialog.Text
      bigC(true, box.Parent)
      dcfenv("Event")
      for i,v in ipairs(box.Parent:GetChildren()) do
        do
          if v == box then
            hooligans = true
          else
            if v ~= box and v:IsA("ImageButton") then
              do
                getfenv()["SwitchBox" .. v.Name] = v.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
        
        if notprocess == false then
          Sound3:Play()
          notprocess = true
          local pos = v.Position
          local tupos = box.Position
          local number = tonumber(string.sub(box.Name, 8))
          local vnumber = (tonumber(string.sub(v.Name, 8)))
          local partypos, vpartypos = nil, nil
          dcfenv("SwitchBox")
          for _,buttons in ipairs(box.Parent:GetChildren()) do
            dcfenv("SwitchBox")
          end
          box:TweenPosition(pos, "Out", "Quad", 0.35)
          v:TweenPosition(tupos, "Out", "Quad", 0.35)
          for _,poke in ipairs(Party:GetChildren()) do
            if poke.PartyPosition.Value == number then
              partypos = poke.PartyPosition
            else
              if poke.PartyPosition.Value == vnumber then
                vpartypos = poke.PartyPosition
              end
            end
          end
          Math:Change(partypos, vnumber)
          Math:Change(vpartypos, number)
          box.Name = "Pokemon" .. vnumber
          v.Name = "Pokemon" .. number
          box.Parent.Bottom.dialog.Text = "Choose a Pokemon."
          box.Parent.Bottom.dialog.DropShadow.Text = box.Parent.Bottom.dialog.Text
          wait(0.4)
          hooligans = false
          notprocess = false
          dcfenv("Stat")
          dcfenv("Switch")
          for i = 1, 6 do
            if getfenv()["SwitchBox" .. "Pokemon" .. i] ~= nil then
              getfenv()["SwitchBox" .. "Pokemon" .. i]:disconnect()
            end
          end
          for i,v in pairs(party:GetChildren()) do
            boxupdate(v, partyscreen["Pokemon" .. v.PartyPosition.Value], party, pokeout, battle)
          end
        end
      end
)
                -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC70: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_THEN_STMT

                -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC70: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_STMT

                -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC70: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_ELSE_STMT

                -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC70: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_STMT

              end
            end
          end
        end
      end
    end
)
    end
  end
)
    box.Visible = true
  end
end

recurring = function(lazytable)
  
  for val = 1, 6 do
    if lazytable[val] == nil and lazytable[val + 1] ~= nil then
      lazytable[val] = lazytable[val + 1]
      lazytable[val + 1] = nil
      Math:Change(lazytable[val].PartyPosition, val)
      recurring(lazytable)
    end
  end
end

fixParty = function()
  
  local glitchCheck = false
  for i,v in ipairs(game.Players.LocalPlayer.PokemonParty:GetChildren()) do
    if v.PartyPosition.Value == 0 or v.PartyPosition.Value > 6 and #game.Players.LocalPlayer.PokemonParty:GetChildren() > 6 then
      glitchCheck = true
    end
  end
  if glitchCheck == true then
    game.ReplicatedStorage.GoogleAnalytics:FireServer("Fixing", game.Players.LocalPlayer.Name, "none", 1)
    for i,v in ipairs(game.Players.LocalPlayer.PokemonParty:GetChildren()) do
      Math:Change(v.PartyPosition, i)
    end
  end
end

local PC = require(game.ReplicatedStorage.Functions.PC)
_G.PartyOverworld = function(pokeout, battle)
  
  local lazytable = {}
  fixParty()
  for i,v in ipairs(game.Players.LocalPlayer.PokemonParty:GetChildren()) do
    if v.PartyPosition.Value == 0 then
      for num,poke in ipairs(game.Players.LocalPlayer.PokemonParty:GetChildren()) do
        PC:Change(poke, num)
      end
    end
  end
  for i,v in ipairs(game.Players.LocalPlayer.PokemonParty:GetChildren()) do
    if v.PartyPosition.Value > 6 then
      PC:Release(v)
    else
      lazytable[v.PartyPosition.Value] = v
    end
  end
  recurring(lazytable)
  for i,v in ipairs(game.Players.LocalPlayer.PokemonParty:GetChildren()) do
    if lazytable[v.PartyPosition.Value] ~= v then
      for val = 1, 6 do
        if lazytable[val] == nil then
          lazytable[val] = v
          Math:Change(v.PartyPosition, val)
          break
        end
      end
    end
  end
  partyscreen = game.Players.LocalPlayer.PlayerGui.Main.Party
  game.Players.LocalPlayer.PlayerGui.Main.Leaderboard.Visible = false
  partyscreen.Bottom.dialog.Text = "Choose a Pokemon."
  partyscreen.Bottom.dialog.DropShadow.Text = partyscreen.Bottom.dialog.Text
  derp = true
  dcfenv("Event")
  dcfenv("Stat")
  dcfenv("Switch")
  pokemonswitch = nil
  if bigcancel ~= nil then
    bigcancel:disconnect()
  end
  if smallcancel ~= nil then
    smallcancel:disconnect()
  end
  blck = game.Players.LocalPlayer.PlayerGui.Main.BlackScreen
  party = game.Players.LocalPlayer.PokemonParty
  turninactive(partyscreen)
  for i,v in ipairs(partyscreen:GetChildren()) do
    if v:IsA("ImageButton") then
      v.Visible = false
    end
  end
  for i,v in pairs(party:GetChildren()) do
    boxupdate(v, partyscreen["Pokemon" .. v.PartyPosition.Value], party, pokeout, battle)
  end
  smallcancel = partyscreen.Bottom.Cancel.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
    
    dcfenv("Event")
    dcfenv("Stat")
    dcfenv("Switch")
    derp = false
    bigC(true, partyscreen)
  end
)
  bigcancel = partyscreen.Bottom.BigCancel.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
    
    dcfenv("Event")
    dcfenv("Stat")
    dcfenv("Switch")
    partyscreen.Visible = false
    derp = false
    blck.Visible = false
    for i = 1, 6 do
      if getfenv()["SwitchBox" .. "Pokemon" .. i] ~= nil then
        getfenv()["SwitchBox" .. "Pokemon" .. i]:disconnect()
      end
    end
    game.Players.LocalPlayer.PlayerGui.Main.Leaderboard.Visible = true
  end
)
  bigC(true, partyscreen)
  partyscreen.Title.Visible = true
  partyscreen.Bottom.dialog.Visible = true
  partyscreen.Visible = true
end

fadeytext = function(text)
  
  gui.MessageThing.Text = text
  for i = 1, 0, -0.05 do
    gui.MessageThing.TextTransparency = i
    gui.MessageThing.TextStrokeTransparency = i
    wait(0.05)
  end
  wait(0.5)
  for i = 0, 1, 0.05 do
    gui.MessageThing.TextTransparency = i
    gui.MessageThing.TextStrokeTransparency = i
    wait(0.05)
  end
  gui.MessageThing.TextTransparency = 1
  gui.MessageThing.TextStrokeTransparency = 1
end

game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.PVP.AnswerRequest.OnClientEvent:connect(function(action1)
  
  if action1 == "Cancel" then
    BattleRGui.Visible = false
    Main.MessageThing.Text = "The other person canceled the battle."
    Main.MessageThing.Transparency = 0
    wait(1)
    Main.MessageThing.Transparency = 1
    Main.BlackScreen.Visible = false
  end
end
)
game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.PVP.BattleRequest.OnClientEvent:connect(function(playerAgainst, argument2, gamemode)
  
  if argument2 ~= nil then
    BattleRGui.Visible = false
    Main.BlackScreen.Visible = false
    Main.Cancel.Visible = false
    Main.PVPCancel.Visible = false
  end
  if Main.BlackScreen.Visible == false and p.PlayerGui.DialogTalk.TalkB.Talk.Visible == false and argument2 == nil then
    if accept then
      accept:disconnect()
    end
    if decline then
      decline:disconnect()
    end
    Main.InteractBG.Visible = false
    Main.BlackScreen.Visible = true
    for i,v in ipairs(Main.BlackScreen:GetChildren()) do
      v.Visible = false
    end
    Main.Pokedex.Visible = false
    Main.Backpack.Visible = false
    Main.Party.Visible = false
    Main.PCSystem.Visible = false
    BattleRGui.Frame.ImageLabel.Image = "http://www.roblox.com/Thumbs/Avatar.ashx?x=100&y=100&username=" .. playerAgainst.Name
    BattleRGui.Message.Text = playerAgainst.Name .. " wants to battle you! Game mode: " .. gamemode
    BattleRGui.Visible = true
    accept = BattleRGui.Accept.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
    
    BattleRGui.Visible = false
    if playerAgainst ~= nil and game.Players:FindFirstChild(playerAgainst.Name) then
      game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.PVP.AnswerRequest:FireServer("Accept", playerAgainst, gamemode)
    else
      Main.BlackScreen.Visible = false
    end
  end
)
    decline = BattleRGui.Decline.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
    
    BattleRGui.Visible = false
    Main.BlackScreen.Visible = p.InBattle.Value
    if playerAgainst ~= nil then
      game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.PVP.AnswerRequest:FireServer("Decline", playerAgainst)
    end
  end
)
  end
end
)

game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.PVP.Showdown.OnClientEvent:connect(function(ticket, canceller, action, opp, folderO)
  
  playerLeft = false
  if action == "Begin" then
    PvP.Visible = false
    local Sound = p.PlayerGui.BattleSound
    Sound.SoundId = "http://www.roblox.com/asset/?id=" .. soundtable[math.random(1, #soundtable)]
    Sound:Play()
    showdown.Player1.Position = UDim2.new(0, 0, -2, 0)
    showdown.Player1.PlayerName.Text = p.Name
    showdown.Player1.PlayerName.DropShadow.Text = p.Name
    showdown.Player1.Image = "http://www.roblox.com/Thumbs/Avatar.ashx?x=200&y=200&Format=Png&username=" .. p.Name
    showdown.Player1.ImageColor3 = Color3.new(1, 1, 1)
    showdown.Player1.Winner.Visible = false
    showdown.Player2.Position = UDim2.new(1, 0, 4, 0)
    showdown.Player2.PlayerName.Text = opp.Name
    showdown.Player2.PlayerName.DropShadow.Text = opp.Name
    showdown.Player2.Image = "http://www.roblox.com/Thumbs/Avatar.ashx?x=200&y=200&Format=Png&username=" .. opp.Name
    showdown.Player2.ImageColor3 = Color3.new(1, 1, 1)
    showdown.Player2.Winner.Visible = false
    showdown.Versus.Visible = false
    showdown.Visible = true
    showdown.Player1:TweenPosition(UDim2.new(0, 0, 0, 0), "Out", "Bounce", 1.5, false, function()
    
    showdown.Versus.Text = ""
    showdown.Versus.Visible = true
    wait(0.5)
    showdown.Versus.Text = "V"
    wait(0.5)
    showdown.Versus.Text = "Vs."
    showdown.Player2:TweenPosition(UDim2.new(1, -250, 0, 0), "Out", "Bounce", 1.5, false, function()
      
      wait(2)
      if playerLeft == true then
        PvP.Visible = false
        fadeytext("Other player left the server.")
        Main.BlackScreen.Visible = false
        showdown.Visible = false
        p.PlayerGui.BattleSound:Stop()
      else
        battleFunc(opp, folderO)
      end
    end
)
  end
)
  else
    do
      PvP.Visible = false
      PvP.Cancel.Visible = false
      if canceller then
        fadeytext("The battle was canceled by " .. canceller.Name .. ".")
      end
      Main.BlackScreen.Visible = false
    end
  end
end
)

  for i = 1, #text, 2 do
    gui.Text = string.sub(text, 1, i)
    wait(0.03)
  end

  wait(0.55)

partyb = {Empty = "http://www.roblox.com/asset/?id=125060330", Status = "http://www.roblox.com/asset/?id=125060479", Faint = "http://www.roblox.com/asset/?id=125060436", Healthy = "http://www.roblox.com/asset/?id=125060370"}

partyBars = function(folder, opp)
  
  for i,v in ipairs(folder:GetChildren()) do
    if v.Name == p.Name then
      local total = 0
      for _,img in ipairs(YourParty:GetChildren()) do
        img.Image = partyb.Empty
      end
      for poke,info in pairs(v:GetChildren()) do
        total = total + 1
        for ballz = 1, total do
          if ballz <= 6 then
            YourParty["Ball" .. ballz].Image = partyb.Healthy
          end
        end
        if total < 6 then
          for ballz = 6, total + 1, -1 do
            YourParty["Ball" .. ballz].Image = partyb.Empty
          end
        end
      end
    else
      do
        if v.Name == opp.Name then
          local total = 0
          for _,img in ipairs(TheirParty:GetChildren()) do
            img.Image = partyb.Empty
          end
          for poke,info in pairs(v:GetChildren()) do
            total = total + 1
          end
          for ballz = 1, total do
            if ballz <= 6 then
              TheirParty["Ball" .. ballz].Image = partyb.Healthy
            end
          end
          if total < 6 then
            for ballz = 6, total + 1, -1 do
              TheirParty["Ball" .. ballz].Image = partyb.Empty
            end
          end
        end
        do
          do
            TheirParty.Visible = true
            YourParty.Visible = true
            -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC119: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out DO_STMT

            -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC119: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out DO_STMT

            -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC119: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_ELSE_STMT

            -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC119: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_STMT

          end
        end
      end
    end
  end
end

findhealthbarsize = function(curhealth, maxhealth)
  
  local multi = 109 / maxhealth
  return math.ceil(curhealth * multi)
end

findPokemon = function(folder)
  
  for i,v in ipairs(folder:GetChildren()) do
    if v:FindFirstChild("PartyPosition") and v:FindFirstChild("PartyPosition").Value == 1 then
      return v
    end
  end
end

checkForStatus = function(turnTable, box, op)
  
  if turnTable ~= nil then
    local starfin = op.Name .. "&UpdateStatus"
    if box.Name == "YourBox" then
      starfin = p.Name .. "&UpdateStatus"
    end
    for i,v in ipairs(turnTable) do
      if v:find(starfin) then
        return false
      end
    end
  end
  do
    return true
  end
end

BoxUpdate = function(pokemon, box, hp, turntable, op)
  
  local curHP = hp
  if curHP == nil then
    curHP = pokemon.CurrentHP.Value
  end
  box.Visible = false
  box.Status.Visible = false
  box.PokemonName.Text = nickname(pokemon)
  box.PokemonName.Shadow.Text = box.PokemonName.Text
  box.Level.Text = pokemon.Lvl.Value
  box.Level.Shadow.Text = box.Level.Text
  box.Gender.Image = _G.Sprites.Symbols[pokemon.Gender.Value]
  if pokemon.Status.Value ~= "Faint" and pokemon.Status.Value ~= "" and (hp == nil or checkForStatus(turntable, box, op)) then
    box.Status.Text = StatusCond[pokemon.Status.Value][1]
    box.Status.BackgroundColor3 = StatusCond[pokemon.Status.Value][2]
    box.Status.Visible = true
  end
  if box.Name == "YourBox" then
    box.HPLabel.Text = curHP
    box.HPLabel.Shadow.Text = box.HPLabel.Text
    box.HPNum.Text = pokemon.Stats.HPStat.Value
    box.HPNum.Shadow.Text = box.HPNum.Text
  end
  box.Health.Size = UDim2.new(0, findhealthbarsize(curHP, pokemon.Stats.HPStat.Value), 0, 4)
  box.Visible = true
end

StatusUpdate = function(pokemon, box)
  
  if pokemon.Status.Value ~= "" then
    box.Status.Text = StatusCond[pokemon.Status.Value][1]
    box.Status.BackgroundColor3 = StatusCond[pokemon.Status.Value][2]
    box.Status.Visible = true
  else
    if pokemon.Status.Value == "" then
      box.Status.Visible = false
    end
  end
end

animateHealth = function(pokemon, HP, box, flashPokemon, before)
  
  if HP < before then
    wait(0.1)
    flashPokemon.Visible = false
    wait(0.1)
    flashPokemon.Visible = true
    wait(0.1)
    flashPokemon.Visible = false
    wait(0.1)
    flashPokemon.Visible = true
    wait(0.2)
  end
  if HP ~= before then
    box.Health:TweenSize(UDim2.new(0, findhealthbarsize(HP, pokemon.Stats.HPStat.Value), 0, 4), "Out", "Quad", 1, true)
    if box.Name == "YourBox" then
      box.HPLabel.Text = HP
      box.HPLabel.Shadow.Text = HP
    end
    wait(1)
  end
end

nickname = function(pokemon)
  
  if pokemon:FindFirstChild("Nickname") then
    return pokemon:FindFirstChild("Nickname").Value
  else
    return pokemon.Name
  end
end

battleFunc = function(opposingPlayer, folder)
  
  if opposingPlayer ~= nil then
    script.Parent.Main.Leaderboard.Visible = false
    battleassociate = {}
    showdown.Visible = false
    Scene.Visible = false
    local oppFold = folder[opposingPlayer.Name]
    local pFold = folder[p.Name]
    Scene.OpponentHolder.Visible = false
    Scene.UserHolder.Visible = false
    for i,v in ipairs(Scene.UserHolder:GetChildren()) do
      v.Visible = false
    end
    for i,v in ipairs(Scene.OpponentHolder:GetChildren()) do
      v.Visible = false
    end
    for i,v in ipairs(pFold:GetChildren()) do
      if not v.Shiny.Value or not _G.Pokemon[v.Name].Sprites.SF then
        do
          Scene.UserHolder["Pokemon" .. v.PartyPosition.Value].Image = _G.Pokemon[v.Name].Sprites.Front
          Scene.UserHolder["Pokemon" .. v.PartyPosition.Value].Visible = true
          battleassociate[v] = Scene.UserHolder["Pokemon" .. v.PartyPosition.Value]
          -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC92: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_THEN_STMT

          -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC92: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_STMT

        end
      end
    end
    for i,v in ipairs(oppFold:GetChildren()) do
      if not v.Shiny.Value or not _G.Pokemon[v.Name].Sprites.SF then
        do
          Scene.OpponentHolder["Pokemon" .. v.PartyPosition.Value].Image = _G.Pokemon[v.Name].Sprites.Front
          Scene.OpponentHolder["Pokemon" .. v.PartyPosition.Value].Visible = true
          battleassociate[v] = Scene.OpponentHolder["Pokemon" .. v.PartyPosition.Value]
          -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC142: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_THEN_STMT

          -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC142: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_STMT

        end
      end
    end
    Scene.OpponentHolder.Visible = true
    Scene.UserHolder.Visible = true
    Scene.Position = UDim2.new(0.5, -280, -2, 0)
    Scene.Visible = true
    Scene.Image = "http://www.roblox.com/asset/?id=124185315"
    TheirBox.Visible = false
    TheirParty.Visible = false
    YourBox.Visible = false
    YourParty.Visible = false
    TheirAnim.Visible = false
    TheirPokeball.Visible = false
    TheirPokemon.Visible = false
    Trainer.Visible = true
    Trainer.Image = "http://www.roblox.com/Thumbs/Avatar.ashx?x=200&y=200&Format=Png&username=" .. opposingPlayer.Name
    YourAnim.Visible = false
    YourPokemon.Visible = false
    YourPokeball.Visible = false
    ActualText.Text = opposingPlayer.Name .. " wants to battle!"
    TextBox.Visible = true
    MovesBG.Visible = false
    togglebuttons(actionbuttons, false)
    togglebuttons(MovesBG:GetChildren(), false)
    partyBars(folder, opposingPlayer)
    Scene:TweenPosition(UDim2.new(0.5, -280, 0.45, -112), "Out", "Quad", 2, false)
    wait(2.7)
    local opplead = findPokemon(oppFold)
    scrolltext(ActualText, opposingPlayer.Name .. " sent out " .. nickname(opplead) .. "!")
    TheirPokeball.Image = _G.Sprites.Pokeball[opplead.Pokeball.Value].Closed
    TheirPokeball.Visible = true
    wait(0.3)
    TheirPokeball.Image = _G.Sprites.Pokeball[opplead.Pokeball.Value].Open
    wait(0.3)
    Flash.Visible = true
    TheirPokeball.Visible = false
    if opplead.Shiny.Value ~= true or not _G.Pokemon[opplead.Name].Sprites.SF then
      TheirPokemon.Image = _G.Pokemon[opplead.Name].Sprites.Front
      TheirPokemon.Visible = true
      Trainer.Visible = false
      TheirParty.Visible = false
      BoxUpdate(opplead, TheirBox)
      wait(0.1)
      Flash.Visible = false
      local yourlead = findPokemon(pFold)
      scrolltext(ActualText, "Go, " .. nickname(yourlead) .. "!")
      YourPokeball.Image = _G.Sprites.Pokeball[yourlead.Pokeball.Value].Closed
      YourPokeball.Visible = true
      wait(0.3)
      YourPokeball.Image = _G.Sprites.Pokeball[yourlead.Pokeball.Value].Open
      wait(0.3)
      Flash.Visible = true
      YourPokeball.Visible = false
      if yourlead.Shiny.Value ~= true or not _G.Pokemon[yourlead.Name].Sprites.SB then
        YourPokemon.Image = _G.Pokemon[yourlead.Name].Sprites.Back
        YourPokemon.Visible = true
        YourParty.Visible = false
        BoxUpdate(yourlead, YourBox)
        wait(0.1)
        Flash.Visible = false
        turn(opposingPlayer, folder, findPokemon(folder[p.Name]))
      end
    end
  end
end

game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.PVP.RepeatTurn.OnClientEvent:connect(function(opposingPlayer, folder)
  
  repeat
    wait()
  until turnGoingOn == false
  turn(opposingPlayer, folder, findPokemon(folder[p.Name]))
end
)
Mover = function(num, poke)
  
  for i,v in ipairs(poke.Moves:GetChildren()) do
    if v.Value == num then
      return v
    end
  end
end

getMoves = function(pokemon)
  
  for i,v in pairs(MovesBG:GetChildren()) do
    if v:IsA("TextButton") then
      v.Visible = false
    end
  end
  for i,v in ipairs(pokemon.Moves:GetChildren()) do
    MovesBG["Move" .. v.Value].Text = v.Name
    MovesBG["Move" .. v.Value].TextColor3 = _G.Tables.TypeColors[_G.Moves[v.Name].Type]
    MovesBG["Move" .. v.Value].Visible = true
  end
end

PPChecker = function(pokemon)
  
  for i,v in ipairs(pokemon.Moves:GetChildren()) do
    if v.PP.Value > 0 then
      return true
    end
  end
  return false
end

TimeChecker = function(val)
  
  local part1 = (math.floor(val / 60))
  local part2 = nil
  if val - 60 == 60 or val - 60 == 0 then
    part2 = "00"
  else
    if string.len(tostring(math.min(val % 60))) == 1 then
      part2 = "0" .. math.min(val % 60)
    else
      if math.min(val % 60) then
        part2 = math.min(val % 60)
      end
    end
  end
  local String = part1 .. ":" .. part2
  return String
end

local choosing = nil
turn = function(opposingPlayer, folder, currentPokemon)
  
  local pFold = folder[p.Name]
  local oppFold = folder[opposingPlayer.Name]
  choosing = true
  local info = nil
  coroutine.resume(coroutine.create(function()
    
    while choosing do
      YourPokemon.Position = UDim2.new(0.25, -60, 0.5, 16)
      wait(0.2)
      YourPokemon.Position = UDim2.new(0.25, -60, 0.5, 18)
      wait(0.2)
    end
  end
))
  scrolltext(ActualText, "What will " .. nickname(currentPokemon) .. " do?")
  local MoveButtons = {}
  if FightAction then
    FightAction:disconnect()
  end
  FightAction = Fight.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
    
    ActualText.Text = ""
    togglebuttons(actionbuttons, false)
    MovesBG.MoveInfo.Category.Text = ""
    MovesBG.MoveInfo.PP.Text = ""
    MovesBG.MoveInfo.Type.Visible = false
    if not PPChecker(currentPokemon) then
      MovesBG.Visible = false
      Back.Visible = false
      scrolltext(ActualText, "No PP left for any move! Using Struggle...")
      game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.PVP.SendAction:FireServer("Move", "Struggle", folder, opposingPlayer)
      scrolltext(ActualText, "Waiting for your opponent...")
    else
      for i,v in ipairs(gui.PvPBattle.MovesBG:GetChildren()) do
        do
          if getfenv()[v] then
            getfenv()[v]:disconnect()
          end
          if getfenv()[v.Name] then
            getfenv()[v.Name]:disconnect()
          end
          if v:IsA("TextButton") then
            do
              getfenv()[v] = v.MouseEnter:connect(function()
      
      local num = tonumber(v.Name:sub(5, 5))
      local actualMove = Mover(num, currentPokemon)
      MovesBG.MoveInfo.Category.Text = "Category: " .. _G.Moves[v.Text].AttackType
      MovesBG.MoveInfo.PP.Text = "PP: " .. actualMove.PP.Value .. " / " .. _G.Moves[v.Text].PP
      MovesBG.MoveInfo.Type.BackgroundColor3 = _G.Tables.TypeColors[_G.Moves[v.Text].Type]
      MovesBG.MoveInfo.Type.Text = _G.Moves[v.Text].Type
      MovesBG.MoveInfo.Type.Visible = true
    end
)
              getfenv()[v.Name] = v.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
      
      if currentPokemon.Moves[v.Text].PP.Value > 0 then
        MovesBG.Visible = false
        Back.Visible = false
        game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.PVP.SendAction:FireServer("Move", v.Text, folder, opposingPlayer)
        scrolltext(ActualText, "Waiting for your opponent...")
      else
        if currentPokemon.Moves[v.Text].PP.Value == 0 then
          togglebuttons(actionbuttons, false)
          MovesBG.Visible = false
          Back.Visible = false
          scrolltext(ActualText, nickname(currentPokemon) .. " has no PP for that move!")
          wait(1)
          scrolltext(ActualText, "What will " .. nickname(currentPokemon) .. " do?")
          togglebuttons(actionbuttons, true)
        end
      end
    end
)
              -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC103: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_THEN_STMT

              -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC103: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_STMT

            end
          end
        end
      end
      MovesBG.MoveInfo.Visible = true
      MovesBG.Visible = true
      Back.Visible = true
    end
  end
)
  getMoves(currentPokemon)
  togglebuttons(actionbuttons, true)
  if bagAction then
    bagAction:disconnect()
  end
  bagAction = Bag.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
    
    togglebuttons(actionbuttons, false)
    scrolltext(ActualText, "That isn\'t the time for that!")
    wait(1)
    scrolltext(ActualText, "What will " .. nickname(currentPokemon) .. " do?")
    togglebuttons(actionbuttons, true)
  end
)
  if BackButton then
    BackButton:disconnect()
  end
  BackButton = Back.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
    
    Back.Visible = false
    MovesBG.Visible = false
    ActualText.Text = ""
    scrolltext(ActualText, "What will " .. nickname(currentPokemon) .. " do?")
    togglebuttons(actionbuttons, true)
  end
)
  if switchAction then
    switchAction:disconnect()
  end
  switchAction = Switch.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
    
    local d = _G.PVPParty(currentPokemon, pFold)
    repeat
      wait()
    until d ~= nil or switchAction == nil
    if d ~= nil then
      game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.PVP.SendAction:FireServer("Switch", d, folder, opposingPlayer)
      MovesBG.Visible = false
      Back.Visible = false
      togglebuttons(actionbuttons, false)
      scrolltext(ActualText, "Waiting for your opponent...")
    end
  end
)
  if runAction then
    runAction:disconnect()
  end
  runAction = Run.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
    
    togglebuttons(actionbuttons, false)
    game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.PVP.SendAction:FireServer("Run", nil, folder, opposingPlayer)
    scrolltext(ActualText, "You forfeit!")
    wait(0.2)
    p.PlayerGui.BattleSound:Stop()
    Scene.Visible = false
    Main.Leaderboard.Visible = true
    Main.BlackScreen.Visible = false
  end
)
end

condense = function(str)
  
  for i = 1, #str do
    if str:sub(i, i) == "&" then
      return i - 1
    end
  end
end

gethp = function(str)
  
  local bfo, after = nil, nil
  for i = 1, #str do
    if str:sub(i, i) == "@" then
      bfo = tonumber(str:sub(1, i - 1))
      after = tonumber(str:sub(i + 1, #str))
    end
  end
  return bfo, after
end

game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.PVP.FaintAction.OnClientInvoke = function(op, party, pokeout)
  
  repeat
    wait()
  until turnGoingOn == false
  wait(1.5)
  local d = _G.PVPParty(pokeout, party, "Cancel")
  repeat
    wait()
  until d
  return d
end

FaintAnim = function(Pokemon)
  
  local pos = Pokemon.Position
  if Pokemon.Name == "YourPokemon" then
    Pokemon:TweenPosition(UDim2.new(0.25, -60, 0.5, 130), "Out", "Quad", 0.75)
    wait(1)
    YourBox.Visible = false
    Pokemon.Visible = false
    Pokemon.Position = pos
  else
    Pokemon:TweenPosition(UDim2.new(0.75, -75, 0.5, 0), "Out", "Quad", 0.75)
    wait(1)
    TheirBox.Visible = false
    Pokemon.Visible = false
    Pokemon.Position = pos
  end
end

returnPokemon = function(Pokemon)
  
  if Pokemon.Name == "TheirPokemon" then
    Flash.Visible = true
    wait(0.1)
    Pokemon.Visible = false
    TheirBox.Visible = false
    Flash.Visible = false
  else
    Flash.Visible = true
    wait(0.1)
    Pokemon.Visible = false
    YourBox.Visible = false
    Flash.Visible = false
  end
end

sendOutPokemon = function(Poke, opposingPlayer, folder, number, turnTable)
  
  if Poke.Name == "TheirPokemon" then
    local Pokemon = findPokemon(folder[opposingPlayer.Name])
    TheirPokeball.Image = _G.Sprites.Pokeball[Pokemon.Pokeball.Value].Closed
    TheirPokeball.Visible = true
    wait(0.3)
    TheirPokeball.Image = _G.Sprites.Pokeball[Pokemon.Pokeball.Value].Open
    wait(0.3)
    Flash.Visible = true
    TheirPokeball.Visible = false
    if Pokemon.Shiny.Value ~= true or not _G.Pokemon[Pokemon.Name].Sprites.SF then
      do
        TheirPokemon.Image = _G.Pokemon[Pokemon.Name].Sprites.Front
        TheirPokemon.Visible = true
        BoxUpdate(Pokemon, TheirBox, number, turnTable, opposingPlayer)
        wait(0.15)
        Flash.Visible = false
        if Poke.Name == "YourPokemon" then
          local Pokemon = findPokemon(folder[p.Name])
          YourPokeball.Image = _G.Sprites.Pokeball[Pokemon.Pokeball.Value].Closed
          YourPokeball.Visible = true
          wait(0.3)
          YourPokeball.Image = _G.Sprites.Pokeball[Pokemon.Pokeball.Value].Open
          wait(0.3)
          Flash.Visible = true
          YourPokeball.Visible = false
          if Pokemon.Shiny.Value ~= true or not _G.Pokemon[Pokemon.Name].Sprites.SB then
            YourPokemon.Image = _G.Pokemon[Pokemon.Name].Sprites.Back
            YourPokemon.Visible = true
            BoxUpdate(Pokemon, YourBox, number, turnTable, opposingPlayer)
            wait(0.15)
            Flash.Visible = false
          end
        end
      end
    end
  end
end

game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.PVP.SwitchoutPokemon.OnClientEvent:connect(function(oppSend, youSend, oPoke, pPoke)
  
  turnGoingOn = true
  if oppSend == true and youSend == true then
    ActualText.Text = ""
    local Pokemon = oPoke
    scrolltext(ActualText, Pokemon.Parent.Name .. " sent out " .. nickname(Pokemon) .. ".")
    TheirPokeball.Image = _G.Sprites.Pokeball[Pokemon.Pokeball.Value].Closed
    TheirPokeball.Visible = true
    wait(0.3)
    TheirPokeball.Image = _G.Sprites.Pokeball[Pokemon.Pokeball.Value].Open
    wait(0.3)
    Flash.Visible = true
    TheirPokeball.Visible = false
    if Pokemon.Shiny.Value ~= true or not _G.Pokemon[Pokemon.Name].Sprites.SF then
      TheirPokemon.Image = _G.Pokemon[Pokemon.Name].Sprites.Front
      TheirPokemon.Visible = true
      BoxUpdate(Pokemon, TheirBox)
      wait(0.2)
      Flash.Visible = false
      local Pokemon = pPoke
      scrolltext(ActualText, "Go, " .. nickname(Pokemon) .. "!")
      YourPokeball.Image = _G.Sprites.Pokeball[Pokemon.Pokeball.Value].Closed
      YourPokeball.Visible = true
      wait(0.3)
      YourPokeball.Image = _G.Sprites.Pokeball[Pokemon.Pokeball.Value].Open
      wait(0.3)
      Flash.Visible = true
      YourPokeball.Visible = false
      if Pokemon.Shiny.Value ~= true or not _G.Pokemon[Pokemon.Name].Sprites.SB then
        do
          YourPokemon.Image = _G.Pokemon[Pokemon.Name].Sprites.Back
          YourPokemon.Visible = true
          BoxUpdate(Pokemon, YourBox)
          wait(0.2)
          Flash.Visible = false
          if oppSend == true and youSend == false then
            local Pokemon = oPoke
            scrolltext(ActualText, Pokemon.Parent.Name .. " sent out " .. nickname(Pokemon) .. ".")
            TheirPokeball.Image = _G.Sprites.Pokeball[Pokemon.Pokeball.Value].Closed
            TheirPokeball.Visible = true
            wait(0.3)
            TheirPokeball.Image = _G.Sprites.Pokeball[Pokemon.Pokeball.Value].Open
            wait(0.3)
            Flash.Visible = true
            TheirPokeball.Visible = false
            if Pokemon.Shiny.Value ~= true or not _G.Pokemon[Pokemon.Name].Sprites.SF then
              do
                TheirPokemon.Image = _G.Pokemon[Pokemon.Name].Sprites.Front
                TheirPokemon.Visible = true
                BoxUpdate(Pokemon, TheirBox)
                wait(0.2)
                Flash.Visible = false
                if oppSend == false and youSend == true then
                  ActualText.Text = ""
                  local Pokemon = pPoke
                  scrolltext(ActualText, "Go, " .. nickname(Pokemon) .. "!")
                  YourPokeball.Image = _G.Sprites.Pokeball[Pokemon.Pokeball.Value].Closed
                  YourPokeball.Visible = true
                  wait(0.3)
                  YourPokeball.Image = _G.Sprites.Pokeball[Pokemon.Pokeball.Value].Open
                  wait(0.3)
                  Flash.Visible = true
                  YourPokeball.Visible = false
                  if Pokemon.Shiny.Value ~= true or not _G.Pokemon[Pokemon.Name].Sprites.SB then
                    do
                      YourPokemon.Image = _G.Pokemon[Pokemon.Name].Sprites.Back
                      YourPokemon.Visible = true
                      BoxUpdate(Pokemon, YourBox)
                      wait(0.2)
                      Flash.Visible = false
                      turnGoingOn = false
                    end
                  end
                end
              end
            end
          end
        end
      end
    end
  end
end
)
game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.PVP.ShowTurn.OnClientEvent:connect(function(opposingPlayer, turnTable, folder)
  
  local lengthofp = #p.Name
  local opposinum = #opposingPlayer.Name
  choosing = false
  local oppfaint = false
  local faint = false
  turnGoingOn = true
  wait(1.5)
  for _,str in ipairs(turnTable) do
    if str:find("&Update") then
      local newstring = str:sub(1, lengthofp)
      local newstring2 = str:sub(1, opposinum)
      if newstring:find(p.Name) or newstring2:find(opposingPlayer.Name) then
        if str:find("&UpdateStatus") then
          if newstring:find(p.Name) then
            local pokemon = findPokemon(folder[p.Name])
            StatusUpdate(pokemon, YourBox)
          else
            do
              do
                if newstring2:find(opposingPlayer.Name) then
                  local pokemon = findPokemon(folder[opposingPlayer.Name])
                  StatusUpdate(pokemon, TheirBox)
                end
                if str:find("&UpdateFaint") then
                  if newstring:find(p.Name) then
                    local pokemon = findPokemon(folder[p.Name])
                    faint = true
                    battleassociate[pokemon].Visible = false
                    FaintAnim(YourPokemon)
                  else
                    do
                      do
                        if newstring2:find(opposingPlayer.Name) then
                          local pokemon = findPokemon(folder[opposingPlayer.Name])
                          oppfaint = true
                          battleassociate[pokemon].Visible = false
                          FaintAnim(TheirPokemon)
                        end
                        if str:find("&UpdateHealthHP") then
                          if newstring:find(p.Name) then
                            local number = str:sub(lengthofp + 1, condense(str))
                            local before, after = gethp(number)
                            local pokemon = findPokemon(folder[p.Name])
                            animateHealth(pokemon, after, YourBox, YourPokemon, before)
                          else
                            do
                              if newstring2:find(opposingPlayer.Name) then
                                local number = str:sub(opposinum + 1, condense(str))
                                local before, after = gethp(number)
                                local pokemon = findPokemon(folder[opposingPlayer.Name])
                                animateHealth(pokemon, after, TheirBox, TheirPokemon, before)
                              end
                              do
                                if str:find("&UpdateReturn") then
                                  if newstring:find(p.Name) then
                                    returnPokemon(YourPokemon)
                                  else
                                    if newstring2:find(opposingPlayer.Name) then
                                      returnPokemon(TheirPokemon)
                                    end
                                  end
                                else
                                  if str:find("&UpdatePokeOut") then
                                    if newstring:find(p.Name) then
                                      local start, finish = str:find("&UpdatePokeOut")
                                      local number = nil
                                      if finish ~= #str then
                                        number = tonumber(str:sub(finish + 1, #str))
                                      end
                                      sendOutPokemon(YourPokemon, opposingPlayer, folder, number, turnTable)
                                    else
                                      do
                                        if newstring2:find(opposingPlayer.Name) then
                                          local start, finish = str:find("&UpdatePokeOut")
                                          local number = nil
                                          if finish ~= #str then
                                            number = tonumber(str:sub(finish + 1, #str))
                                          end
                                          sendOutPokemon(TheirPokemon, opposingPlayer, folder, number, turnTable)
                                        end
                                        do
                                          do
                                            scrolltext(ActualText, str)
                                            -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC265: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out DO_STMT

                                            -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC265: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out DO_STMT

                                            -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC265: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_ELSE_STMT

                                            -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC265: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_STMT

                                            -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC265: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_THEN_STMT

                                            -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC265: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_STMT

                                            -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC265: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_ELSE_STMT

                                            -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC265: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out DO_STMT

                                            -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC265: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_ELSE_STMT

                                            -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC265: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_STMT

                                            -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC265: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_THEN_STMT

                                            -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC265: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_STMT

                                            -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC265: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_STMT

      end
    end
  end
  if oppfaint == true and faint == false then
    scrolltext(ActualText, "Waiting for your opponent...")
  end
  turnGoingOn = false
end
)
wipeOpp = function()
  
  for i,v in ipairs(p.OppPokemon:GetChildren()) do
    v:Destroy()
  end
  _G.InWild = false
end

game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.PVP.BattleResult.OnClientEvent:connect(function(result, op)
  
  local Sound = p.PlayerGui.BattleSound
  repeat
    wait()
  until turnGoingOn == false
  Sound:Stop()
  if result == "Tie" then
    Scene.Visible = false
    showdown.Player1.Winner.Text = "TIE"
    showdown.Player2.Winner.Text = "TIE"
    showdown.Player1.ImageColor3 = Color3.new(0, 0, 0)
    showdown.Player2.ImageColor3 = Color3.new(0, 0, 0)
    showdown.Player1.Winner.Visible = true
    showdown.Player2.Winner.Visible = true
    showdown.Player1.Position = UDim2.new(0, 0, -2, 0)
    showdown.Player2.Position = UDim2.new(1, 0, 4, 0)
    showdown.Visible = true
    showdown.Player1:TweenPosition(UDim2.new(0, 0, 0, 0), "Out", "Bounce", 1.5, false)
    wait(2)
    showdown.Player2:TweenPosition(UDim2.new(1, -250, 0, 0), "Out", "Bounce", 1.5, false)
    wait(4)
    Sound:Stop()
    showdown.Visible = false
    script.Parent.Main.BlackScreen.Visible = false
    showdown.Player1.Winner.Visible = false
    showdown.Player2.Winner.Visible = false
  else
    if result == p.Name then
      Scene.Visible = false
      showdown.Player1.Winner.Text = "WINNER"
      showdown.Player2.ImageColor3 = Color3.new(0, 0, 0)
      showdown.Player1.Winner.Visible = true
      showdown.Player1.Position = UDim2.new(0, 0, -2, 0)
      showdown.Player2.Position = UDim2.new(1, 0, 4, 0)
      showdown.Visible = true
      showdown.Player1:TweenPosition(UDim2.new(0, 0, 0, 0), "Out", "Bounce", 1.5, false)
      wait(2)
      showdown.Player2:TweenPosition(UDim2.new(1, -250, 0, 0), "Out", "Bounce", 1.5, false)
      wait(4)
      Sound:Stop()
      showdown.Visible = false
      script.Parent.Main.BlackScreen.Visible = false
      showdown.Player1.Winner.Visible = false
    else
      if result == op.Name then
        Scene.Visible = false
        showdown.Player2.Winner.Text = "WINNER"
        showdown.Player1.ImageColor3 = Color3.new(0, 0, 0)
        showdown.Player2.Winner.Visible = true
        showdown.Player1.Position = UDim2.new(0, 0, -2, 0)
        showdown.Player2.Position = UDim2.new(1, 0, 4, 0)
        showdown.Visible = true
        showdown.Player1:TweenPosition(UDim2.new(0, 0, 0, 0), "Out", "Bounce", 1.5, false)
        wait(2)
        showdown.Player2:TweenPosition(UDim2.new(1, -250, 0, 0), "Out", "Bounce", 1.5, false)
        wait(4)
        Sound:Stop()
        showdown.Visible = false
        Scene.Visible = false
        showdown.Player2.Winner.Visible = false
        script.Parent.Main.BlackScreen.Visible = false
      end
    end
  end
  wipeOpp()
  script.Parent.Main.Leaderboard.Visible = true
end
)

-- FILE: StarterGui/_G.Roulette.local.lua

-- params : ...

categories = {
Worst = {}
, 
Low = {}
, 
["Lower Average"] = {}
, 
["Upper Average"] = {}
, 
High = {}
, 
Best = {}
, 
OmegaRare = {}
}
info = {
Worst = {150, Color3.new(0.81176470588235, 0.94117647058824, 0.61960784313725), 20}
, 
Low = {100, Color3.new(0.65882352941176, 0.85882352941176, 0.65882352941176), 20}
, 
["Lower Average"] = {50, Color3.new(0.47450980392157, 0.74117647058824, 0.60392156862745), 18}
, 
["Upper Average"] = {38, Color3.new(0.23137254901961, 0.52549019607843, 0.52549019607843), 12}
, 
High = {20, Color3.new(0.043137254901961, 0.28235294117647, 0.41960784313725), 10}
, 
Best = {4, Color3.new(0.55686274509804, 0.37254901960784, 0.52941176470588), 4}
, 
OmegaRare = {1, Color3.new(1, 1, 1), 1}
}
chances = {}
fakechance = {}
pokemonshowing = {}
notAllowed = {Arceus = true, Heatran = true, Druddigon = true}
repeat
  wait()
until _G.PokemonReady == true
p = game.Players.LocalPlayer
calculatestats = function(table)
  
  local num = 0
  for _,stat in pairs(table.Stats) do
    num = num + stat
  end
  return num
end

for i,v in pairs(_G.Pokemon) do
  if i ~= "Mewthree, Swag Prince" and i ~= "MechaMewtwo" and not i:lower():match("zombie") and not i:match("Deoxys") and not i:match("Rotom") and not notAllowed[i] then
    local s = calculatestats(v)
    if s <= 355 then
      table.insert(categories.Worst, i)
    else
      if s > 355 and s < 425 then
        table.insert(categories.Low, i)
      else
        if s >= 425 and s < 455 then
          table.insert(categories["Lower Average"], i)
        else
          if s >= 455 and s < 525 then
            table.insert(categories["Upper Average"], i)
          else
            if s >= 525 and s < 579 then
              table.insert(categories.High, i)
            else
              if s >= 580 and s < 601 then
                table.insert(categories.Best, i)
              else
                table.insert(categories.OmegaRare, i)
              end
            end
          end
        end
      end
    end
  end
end
for i,v in pairs(info) do
  for val = 1, v[3] do
    table.insert(fakechance, i)
  end
end
for i,v in pairs(info) do
  for val = 1, v[1] do
    table.insert(chances, i)
  end
end
for i,v in ipairs(script.Parent.Main.Roulette:GetChildren()) do
  if v:IsA("ImageButton") then
    local sec = fakechance[math.random(1, #fakechance)]
    local pokemon = categories[sec][math.random(1, #categories[sec])]
    v.BackgroundColor3 = info[sec][2]
    v.poke.Text = pokemon
    local shiny = math.random(1, 15)
    if shiny == 6 then
      v.Image = _G.Pokemon[pokemon].Sprites.SF
    else
      v.Image = _G.Pokemon[pokemon].Sprites.Front
    end
  end
end
findbox = function()
  
  local numbers = {}
  for i,v in ipairs(game.Players.LocalPlayer.PC:GetChildren()) do
    if #v:GetChildren() == 0 then
      return v.Name, 1
    else
      if #v:GetChildren() < 60 then
        for _,po in ipairs(v:GetChildren()) do
          numbers[po.PartyPosition.Value] = true
        end
        for swag = 1, 60 do
          if numbers[swag] == nil then
            return v.Name, swag
          end
        end
      end
    end
  end
end

pokieget = function()
  
  local userteam = game.Players.LocalPlayer.PokemonParty
  if #userteam:GetChildren() < 6 then
    return #userteam:GetChildren() + 1, userteam
  else
    local newbox, number = findbox()
    return number, p.PC[newbox]
  end
end

changevals = function()
  
  for i,v in ipairs(script.Parent.Main.Roulette:GetChildren()) do
    if v:IsA("ImageButton") then
      local num = tonumber(v.Name)
      if num == 1 then
        v.Name = 5
      else
        v.Name = num - 1
      end
    end
  end
end

scroll = function(iteration)
  
  for i,v in ipairs(script.Parent.Main.Roulette:GetChildren()) do
    do
      if v:IsA("ImageButton") then
        local num = tonumber(v.Name)
        if num == 1 then
          v:TweenPosition(UDim2.new(0, 1, 0.5, -50), "Out", "Linear", 0.5, false, function()
    
    local sec = fakechance[math.random(1, #fakechance)]
    local pokemon = categories[sec][math.random(1, #categories[sec])]
    v.poke.Text = pokemon
    v.BackgroundColor3 = info[sec][2]
    local shiny = math.random(1, 15)
    if shiny == 6 then
      v.Image = _G.Pokemon[pokemon].Sprites.SF
      shiny = true
    else
      shiny = false
      v.Image = _G.Pokemon[pokemon].Sprites.Front
    end
    pokemonshowing[v] = {pokemon, shiny}
    changevals()
    v.Position = UDim2.new(0, 500, 0.5, -50)
    if script.Parent.Main.Roulette.Visible == false then
      return 
    else
      if selected == true then
        differentscroll()
      else
        scroll()
      end
    end
  end
)
        else
          do
            v:TweenPosition(UDim2.new(0, (num - 1) * 100, 0.5, -50), "Out", "Linear", 0.5)
            -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC48: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_ELSE_STMT

            -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC48: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_STMT

            -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC48: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_THEN_STMT

            -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC48: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_STMT

          end
        end
      end
    end
  end
end

local Math = require(game.ReplicatedStorage.Functions.Math)
local iterations = 0
differentscroll = function()
  
  if iterations <= 8 then
    for i,v in ipairs(script.Parent.Main.Roulette:GetChildren()) do
      do
        if v:IsA("ImageButton") then
          local num = tonumber(v.Name)
          local timetowait = 0.7 + math.min(iterations ^ 1.3 / 10, 0.3)
          if num == 1 then
            v:TweenPosition(UDim2.new(0, 0, 0.5, -50), "Out", "Linear", timetowait, false, function()
    
    local sec = chances[math.random(1, #chances)]
    local pokemon = categories[sec][math.random(1, #categories[sec])]
    v.poke.Text = pokemon
    v.BackgroundColor3 = info[sec][2]
    local shiny = math.random(1, 25)
    if shiny == 6 then
      v.Image = _G.Pokemon[pokemon].Sprites.SF
      shiny = true
    else
      shiny = false
      v.Image = _G.Pokemon[pokemon].Sprites.Front
    end
    pokemonshowing[v] = {pokemon, shiny}
    changevals()
    iterations = iterations + 1
    v.Position = UDim2.new(0, 500, 0.5, -50)
    differentscroll()
  end
)
          else
            do
              v:TweenPosition(UDim2.new(0, (num - 1) * 100, 0.5, -50), "Out", "Linear", timetowait)
              -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC60: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_ELSE_STMT

              -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC60: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_STMT

              -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC60: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_THEN_STMT

              -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC60: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_STMT

            end
          end
        end
      end
    end
  else
    do
      local randomval = math.random(10, 90)
      for i,v in ipairs(script.Parent.Main.Roulette:GetChildren()) do
        if v:IsA("ImageButton") then
          local num = tonumber(v.Name)
          local timetowait = 0.5 + math.min(math.max(iterations / 10, 0.5), 0.3)
          if num == 1 then
            v:TweenPosition(UDim2.new(0, randomval, 0.5, -50), "Out", "Linear", timetowait, false, function()
    
    local sec = chances[math.random(1, #chances)]
    for i,v in pairs(pokemonshowing) do
      if i.Position.X.Offset > 200 and i.Position.X.Offset < 300 then
        local color = i.BackgroundColor3
        local message = p.Name .. " got " .. v[1] .. " from the Pokemon Roulette!"
        game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.Internal.RouletteOpening:FireServer(message, color)
        local party, box = pokieget()
        local newpoke = _G.Create(v[1], box, math.min(80, 5 + 9 * #p.Badges:GetChildren()), true)
        Math:Change(newpoke.Shiny, v[2])
        Math:Change(newpoke.PartyPosition, party)
        if box.Name == "PokemonParty" then
          script.Parent.Main.Roulette.Bottom.Result.Text = "You got " .. v[1] .. "! It\'s been added to your Party."
        else
          script.Parent.Main.Roulette.Bottom.Result.Text = "You got " .. v[1] .. "! It\'s been added to " .. box.Name .. "."
        end
        game.ReplicatedStorage.GoogleAnalytics:FireServer("Roulette", newpoke.Name, p.Name, 1)
        script.Parent.Main.Roulette.Bottom.Result.TextTransparency = 0
        script.Parent.Main.Roulette.Bottom.Result.TextStrokeTransparency = 0
      end
    end
    wait(3)
    _G.Roulette()
  end
)
          else
            v:TweenPosition(UDim2.new(0, (num - 1) * 100 + randomval, 0.5, -50), "Out", "Linear", timetowait)
          end
        end
      end
    end
  end
end

findboxnumber = function()
  
  for i,v in ipairs(p.PC:GetChildren()) do
    if #v:GetChildren() < 60 then
      return true
    end
  end
  return false
end

script.Parent.Main.Roulette.Close.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
  
  script.Parent.Main.BlackScreen.Visible = false
  script.Parent.Main.Roulette.Visible = false
end
)
_G.Roulette = function(val)
  
  if event then
    event:disconnect()
  end
  script.Parent.Main.BlackScreen.Visible = true
  script.Parent.Main.Roulette.Bottom.Roll.Visible = true
  script.Parent.Main.Roulette.Bottom.Result.TextTransparency = 1
  script.Parent.Main.Roulette.Bottom.Result.TextStrokeTransparency = 1
  if not val then
    selected = false
    iterations = 0
    script.Parent.Main.Roulette.Close.Visible = true
    event = script.Parent.Main.Roulette.Bottom.Roll.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
    
    if #p.PokemonParty:GetChildren() < 6 or findboxnumber() == true then
      game:GetService("MarketplaceService"):PromptProductPurchase(p, 22201274)
    end
  end
)
    scroll()
  else
    script.Parent.Main.Roulette.Close.Visible = false
    differentscroll()
  end
  script.Parent.Main.Roulette.Visible = true
end

game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.Pokemon.PokemonRoulette.OnClientEvent:connect(function()
  
  if script.Parent.Main.Roulette.Visible == false then
    _G.Roulette(true)
  end
  if event then
    event:disconnect()
  end
  script.Parent.Main.Roulette.Bottom.Roll.Visible = false
  script.Parent.Main.Roulette.Close.Visible = false
  selected = true
end
)

-- params : ...

repeat
  wait()
until game.Players.LocalPlayer
wait(3)
p = game.Players.LocalPlayer

local stats = p.PlayerGui.Main.BlackScreen.Stats
curpoke = nil
curon = nil
natureStats = require(game.ReplicatedStorage.Information.NatureStats)
ExpTables = require(game.ReplicatedStorage.Information.ExpTables)
hash = function(num)
  
  return (num + 4) * 8
end

dehash = function(num)
  
  return (num - 32) / 8
end

findexpbarsize = function(curlvl, nextlvl)
  
  local multi = 0.45 / nextlvl
  return curlvl * multi
end

local Sound = Instance.new("Sound", script.Parent)
Sound.SoundId = "http://www.roblox.com/asset/?id=287339370"
local Sound2 = Instance.new("Sound", script.Parent)
Sound2.SoundId = "http://www.roblox.com/asset/?id=318763788"
local Sound3 = Instance.new("Sound", script.Parent)
Sound3.SoundId = "rbxassetid://138097048"
local Sound4 = Instance.new("Sound", script.Parent)
Sound4.SoundId = "http://www.roblox.com/asset/?id=290841329"
Sound4.Name = "Beep"
findleft = function(pok)
  
  Sound2.Pitch = 1
  Sound2:Play()
  local oppteam = pok.Parent:GetChildren()
  for i,v in ipairs(oppteam) do
    -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC21: Unhandled construct in 'MakeBoolean' P1

    if pok.PartyPosition.Value == 1 and v.PartyPosition.Value == #oppteam then
      curpoke = v
    end
    if v.PartyPosition.Value == pok.PartyPosition.Value - 1 then
      curpoke = v
    end
  end
  if left then
    left:disconnect()
    left = stats.Left.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
    
    findleft(curpoke)
    genericstats(curpoke)
    if curon == "Moves" then
      movescreen(curpoke)
    else
      if curon == "Stats" then
        statscreen(curpoke)
      else
        if curon == "Info" then
          infostats(curpoke)
        end
      end
    end
  end
)
  end
end

findright = function(pok)
  
  Sound2.Pitch = 0.8
  Sound2:Play()
  local oppteam = pok.Parent:GetChildren()
  for i,v in ipairs(oppteam) do
    -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC21: Unhandled construct in 'MakeBoolean' P1

    if pok.PartyPosition.Value == #oppteam and v.PartyPosition.Value == 1 then
      curpoke = v
    end
    if v.PartyPosition.Value == pok.PartyPosition.Value + 1 then
      curpoke = v
    end
  end
  if right then
    right:disconnect()
    right = stats.Right.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
    
    findright(curpoke)
    genericstats(curpoke)
    if curon == "Moves" then
      movescreen(curpoke)
    else
      if curon == "Stats" then
        statscreen(curpoke)
      else
        if curon == "Info" then
          infostats(curpoke)
        end
      end
    end
  end
)
  end
end

fixmoves = function(cfg)
  
  local val = false
  for i,v in ipairs(cfg.Moves:GetChildren()) do
    if v.Value > 4 then
      val = true
    end
  end
  if val == true then
    for i,v in ipairs(cfg.Moves:GetChildren()) do
      v.Value = i
    end
  end
end

local moveinfo = stats.Moves.MoveInfo
for i,v in ipairs(stats.Moves.MoveHolder:GetChildren()) do
  do
    v.MouseEnter:connect(function()
  
  if _G.Moves[v.MoveName.Text] then
    if _G.Moves[v.MoveName.Text].Accuracy == true then
      moveinfo.Accuracy.Text = "Acc: --"
    else
      moveinfo.Accuracy.Text = "Acc: " .. _G.Moves[v.MoveName.Text].Accuracy
    end
    moveinfo.Parent.Desc.Text = _G.Moves[v.MoveName.Text].Desc
    if _G.Moves[v.MoveName.Text].Power then
      moveinfo.Power.Text = "Power: " .. _G.Moves[v.MoveName.Text].Power
    else
      moveinfo.Power.Text = "Power: --"
    end
    moveinfo.Category.Text = _G.Moves[v.MoveName.Text].AttackType
  end
end
)
  end
end
movescreen = function(cfg)
  
  curon = "Moves"
  stats.Info.Visible = false
  stats.Moves.Visible = false
  stats.Stats.Visible = false
  local moves = stats.Moves
  local moveinfo = moves.MoveInfo
  local movehold = moves.MoveHolder
  moveinfo.Accuracy.Text = ""
  moves.Desc.Text = ""
  moveinfo.Power.Text = ""
  moveinfo.Category.Text = ""
  fixmoves(cfg)
  for i,v in ipairs(movehold:GetChildren()) do
    v.Visible = false
  end
  for i,v in ipairs(cfg.Moves:GetChildren()) do
    movehold["Move" .. v.Value].PP.Text = v.PP.Value .. "/" .. _G.Moves[v.Name].PP
    movehold["Move" .. v.Value].MoveName.Text = v.Name
    movehold["Move" .. v.Value].Type.Title.Text = _G.Moves[v.Name].Type
    movehold["Move" .. v.Value].Type.Title.DropShadow.Text = _G.Moves[v.Name].Type
    movehold["Move" .. v.Value].Type.ImageColor3 = _G.Tables.TypeColors[_G.Moves[v.Name].Type]
    movehold["Move" .. v.Value].Visible = true
  end
  stats.Background.ImageColor3 = Color3.new(0, 0.43137254901961, 0.64705882352941)
  moves.Visible = true
end

determinenature = function(stat, nature)
  
  if natureStats[stat .. " Boost"][nature] then
    return Color3.new(0, 0.66666666666667, 0), 0
  else
    if natureStats[stat .. " Down"][nature] then
      return Color3.new(1, 0, 0), 0
    else
      return Color3.new(1, 1, 1), 1
    end
  end
end

local statnames = {"Atk", "Def", "SpA", "SpD", "Speed"}
statscreen = function(cfg)
  
  curon = "Stats"
  stats.Info.Visible = false
  stats.Moves.Visible = false
  stats.Stats.Visible = false
  local statholder = stats.Stats.StatHolder
  for i,v in ipairs(cfg.Stats:GetChildren()) do
    for _,buttons in ipairs(statholder:GetChildren()) do
      if string.match(v.Name, buttons.Name) and buttons.Name ~= "HP" then
        buttons.Text = v.Value
      end
    end
  end
  local nature = cfg.Nature.Value
  for i,v in ipairs(statnames) do
    local thing = statholder.Parent.TitleHolder[v .. "Title"]
    local textcolor = determinenature(v, nature)
    thing.TextColor3 = textcolor
  end
  statholder.HP.Text = cfg.CurrentHP.Value .. "/" .. cfg.Stats.HPStat.Value
  statholder.Parent.TotalExp.Text = "Exp. Points: " .. dehash(cfg.Experience.Value)
  local value1 = ExpTables[_G.Pokemon[cfg.Name].ExpType .. "Exp"](cfg.Lvl.Value)
  local value2 = ExpTables[_G.Pokemon[cfg.Name].ExpType .. "Exp"](cfg.Lvl.Value + 1)
  local lvlblah = value2 - value1
  local nextlvl = value2 - dehash(cfg.Experience.Value)
  local expbar = lvlblah - nextlvl
  statholder.Parent.NextExp.Text = "Next Lv: " .. nextlvl
  if cfg.Lvl.Value == 100 then
    statholder.Parent.NextExp.Text = "Next Lv: 0"
  end
  statholder.Parent.NextExpBar.Size = UDim2.new(findexpbarsize(expbar, lvlblah), 0, 0, 11)
  stats.Background.ImageColor3 = Color3.new(0, 0.66666666666667, 1)
  statholder.Parent.Visible = true
end

local characStrings = {
HPIV = {"Loves to eat", "Takes plenty of siestas", "Nods off a lot", "Scatters things often", "Likes to relax"}
, 
AtkIV = {"Proud of its power", "Likes to thrash about", "A little quick tempered", "Likes to fight", "Quick tempered"}
, 
DefIV = {"Sturdy body", "Capable of taking hits", "Highly persistent", "Good endurance", "Good perserverance"}
, 
SpAIV = {"Highly curious", "Mischievous", "Thoroughly cunning", "Often lost in thought", "Very finicky"}
, 
SpDIV = {"Strong willed", "Somewhat vain", "Strongly defiant", "Hates to lose", "Somewhat stubborn"}
, 
SpeedIV = {"Likes to run", "Alert to sounds", "Impetuous and silly", "Somewhat of a clown", "Quick to flee"}
}
calcchar = function(cfg)
  
  local stats = {cfg.IV.HPIV, cfg.IV.AtkIV, cfg.IV.DefIV, cfg.IV.SpAIV, cfg.IV.SpDIV, cfg.IV.SpeedIV}
  local high = 0
  local highstat = cfg.IV.HPIV
  for i,v in ipairs(stats) do
    if high < v.Value then
      high = v.Value
      highstat = v
    end
  end
  local str = 1
  return characStrings[highstat.Name][high % 5 + 1]
end

infostats = function(cfg)
  
  curon = "Info"
  stats.Info.Visible = false
  stats.Moves.Visible = false
  stats.Stats.Visible = false
  local infor = stats.Info
  infor.Nature.Text = cfg.Nature.Value
  infor.Nature.DropShadow.Text = cfg.Nature.Value
  infor.OT.Text = cfg.Owner.Value
  infor.OT.DropShadow.Text = cfg.Owner.Value
  infor.LevelMet.Text = cfg.LevelMet.Value
  infor.LevelMet.DropShadow.Text = cfg.LevelMet.Value
  infor.DateMet.Text = cfg.DateMet.Value
  infor.DateMet.DropShadow.Text = cfg.DateMet.Value
  infor.Characteristic.Text = calcchar(cfg)
  infor.Characteristic.DropShadow.Text = calcchar(cfg)
  stats.Background.ImageColor3 = Color3.new(0.65882352941176, 0.84705882352941, 0.84705882352941)
  infor.Visible = true
end

genericstats = function(cfg)
  
  local poke = _G.Pokemon[cfg.Name]
  if not cfg.Shiny.Value or not poke.Sprites.SF then
    stats.PokemonBG.PokemonSprite.Image = poke.Sprites.Front
    stats.PokemonBG.Shiny.Visible = cfg.Shiny.Value
    stats.Type.Visible = false
    stats.Type1.Visible = false
    stats.Type2.Visible = false
    if #poke.Type == 1 then
      stats.Type.Title.Text = poke.Type[1]
      stats.Type.Title.DropShadow.Text = poke.Type[1]
      stats.Type.ImageColor3 = _G.Tables.TypeColors[poke.Type[1]]
      stats.Type.Visible = true
    else
      if #poke.Type == 2 then
        stats.Type1.Title.Text = poke.Type[1]
        stats.Type1.Title.DropShadow.Text = poke.Type[1]
        stats.Type1.ImageColor3 = _G.Tables.TypeColors[poke.Type[1]]
        stats.Type2.Title.Text = poke.Type[2]
        stats.Type2.Title.DropShadow.Text = poke.Type[2]
        stats.Type2.ImageColor3 = _G.Tables.TypeColors[poke.Type[2]]
        stats.Type1.Visible = true
        stats.Type2.Visible = true
      end
    end
    stats.MiniSprite.Image = poke.Sprites.Mini
    stats.PokeballSprite.Image = _G.Sprites.Pokeball[cfg.Pokeball.Value].Closed
    stats.PokemonBG.Level.Text = "Lvl. " .. cfg.Lvl.Value
    stats.PokeName.Gender.Image = _G.Sprites.Symbols[cfg.Gender.Value]
    if not cfg:FindFirstChild("Nickname") or not cfg:FindFirstChild("Nickname").Value then
      stats.PokeName.Title.Text = cfg.Name
      if not cfg:FindFirstChild("Nickname") or not cfg:FindFirstChild("Nickname").Value then
        stats.PokeName.Title.DropShadow.Text = cfg.Name
        if poke.Pokedex < 10 then
          stats.Pokedex.Title.Text = "Pokedex: #00" .. poke.Pokedex
          stats.Pokedex.Title.DropShadow.Text = "Pokedex: #00" .. poke.Pokedex
        else
          if poke.Pokedex >= 10 and poke.Pokedex < 100 then
            stats.Pokedex.Title.Text = "Pokedex: #0" .. poke.Pokedex
            stats.Pokedex.Title.DropShadow.Text = "Pokedex: #0" .. poke.Pokedex
          else
            if poke.Pokedex >= 100 then
              stats.Pokedex.Title.Text = "Pokedex: #" .. poke.Pokedex
              stats.Pokedex.Title.DropShadow.Text = "Pokedex: #" .. poke.Pokedex
            end
          end
        end
        if cfg.Status.Value ~= "" then
          stats.PokemonBG.ImageColor3 = _G.Tables.Status[cfg.Status.Value][2]
        else
          stats.PokemonBG.ImageColor3 = Color3.new(1, 1, 1)
        end
      end
    end
  end
end

stats.Background.Info.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
  
  if curpoke ~= nil then
    Sound4:Play()
    infostats(curpoke)
  end
end
)
stats.Background.Moves.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
  
  if curpoke ~= nil then
    Sound4:Play()
    movescreen(curpoke)
  end
end
)
stats.Background.Stats.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
  
  if curpoke ~= nil then
    Sound4:Play()
    statscreen(curpoke)
  end
end
)
_G.StatScreen = function(cfg, battle)
  
  local close = false
  if battle == "PC" then
    stats.Right.Visible = false
    stats.Left.Visible = false
  else
    stats.Right.Visible = true
    stats.Left.Visible = true
  end
  curpoke = cfg
  genericstats(cfg)
  stats.Info.Visible = false
  stats.Moves.Visible = false
  stats.Stats.Visible = false
  infostats(cfg)
  stats.Visible = true
  if right then
    right:disconnect()
  end
  if left then
    left:disconnect()
  end
  right = stats.Right.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
    
    findright(curpoke)
    genericstats(curpoke)
    if curon == "Moves" then
      movescreen(curpoke)
    else
      if curon == "Stats" then
        statscreen(curpoke)
      else
        if curon == "Info" then
          infostats(curpoke)
        end
      end
    end
  end
)
  left = stats.Left.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
    
    findleft(curpoke)
    genericstats(curpoke)
    if curon == "Moves" then
      movescreen(curpoke)
    else
      if curon == "Stats" then
        statscreen(curpoke)
      else
        if curon == "Info" then
          infostats(curpoke)
        end
      end
    end
  end
)
  derp = stats.Close.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
    
    if left then
      left:disconnect()
    end
    if right then
      right:disconnect()
    end
    stats.Visible = false
    if battle == true then
      stats.Parent.Party.Visible = true
    else
      if battle == "PVP" then
        p.PlayerGui.Main.PVPParty.Visible = true
      else
        if battle == "PC" then
          p.PlayerGui.Main.PCSystem.Visible = true
        else
          stats.Parent.Parent.Party.Visible = true
        end
      end
    end
    close = true
  end
)
  repeat
    wait()
  until close == true
  if derp then
    derp:disconnect()
  end
  stats.Parent.Party.Bottom.dialog.Text = "Currently Selected: " .. curpoke.Name
  stats.Parent.Party.Bottom.dialog.DropShadow.Text = stats.Parent.Party.Bottom.dialog.Text
  return curpoke
end
