hash = function(num)
  
  return (num + 4) * 8
end

dehash = function(num)
  
  return (num - 32) / 8
end

local BP = hash(1)
local Streak = hash(0)
findbox = function()
  
  local numbers = {}
  for i,v in ipairs(p.PC:GetChildren()) do
    if #v:GetChildren() == 0 then
      return v.Name, 1
    else
      if #v:GetChildren() < 60 then
        for _,po in ipairs(v:GetChildren()) do
          numbers[po.PartyPosition.Value] = true
        end
        for swag = 1, 60 do
          if numbers[swag] == nil then
            return v.Name, swag
          end
        end
      end
    end
  end
end

local Math = require(game.ReplicatedStorage.Functions.Math)
local Battle = require(game.ReplicatedStorage.Functions.Battle)
local Pokedex = require(game.ReplicatedStorage.Functions.Pokedex)
HPcalc = function(lvl, iv, ev, poke)
  
  return (iv + 2 * _G.Pokemon[poke].Stats.HP + ev / 4) * lvl / 100 + 10 + lvl
end

otherstatcalc = function(basestat, lvl, iv, ev, nature, poke)
  
  return ((iv + 2 * _G.Pokemon[poke].Stats[basestat] + ev / 4) * lvl / 100 + 5) * nature
end

nickname = function(pokemon)
  
  if pokemon:FindFirstChild("Nickname") then
    return pokemon:FindFirstChild("Nickname").Value
  else
    return pokemon.Name
  end
end

local stats = {"HP", "Atk", "Def", "SpA", "SpD", "Speed"}
local nStats = require(game.ReplicatedStorage.Information.NatureStats)
determinenature = function(stat, nature)
  
  if nStats[stat .. " Boost"][nature] then
    return 1.1
  else
    if nStats[stat .. " Down"][nature] then
      return 0.9
    else
      return 1
    end
  end
end

empty = function()
  
end

sound = function(create)
  
  if create == true then
    s = Instance.new("Sound", gui)
    s.SoundId = "rbxassetid://172784223"
    s:Play()
  else
    s:Stop()
    s:Destroy()
  end
end

scrolling = function()
  
  local effect = Instance.new("Sound", script)
  effect.SoundId = "rbxassetid://325182533"
  effect.Pitch = math.random(75, 85) / 100
  effect:Play()
  effect:Destroy()
end

scanMoves = function(tab)
  
  for i,v in ipairs(p.PokemonParty:GetChildren()) do
    for _,move in ipairs(v.Moves:GetChildren()) do
      if tab[move.Name] == true then
        return false
      end
    end
  end
  return true
end

fadeytext = function(text)
  
  main.MessageThing.Text = text
  script.Parent.Main.BlackScreen.Visible = true
  for i = 1, 0, -0.05 do
    main.MessageThing.TextTransparency = i
    main.MessageThing.TextStrokeTransparency = i
    wait(0.05)
  end
  wait(0.5)
  for i = 0, 1, 0.05 do
    main.MessageThing.TextTransparency = i
    main.MessageThing.TextStrokeTransparency = i
    wait(0.05)
  end
  main.MessageThing.TextTransparency = 1
  main.MessageThing.TextStrokeTransparency = 1
end

createpokedex = function(pokemon)
  
  local value = Instance.new("StringValue")
  value.Name = _G.Pokemon[pokemon].Pokedex
  value.Value = pokemon
  local caught = Instance.new("BoolValue", value)
  caught.Name = "Caught"
  caught.Value = true
  value.Parent = p.Pokedex
end

local nxtButton = nil
scrolltext = function(text, choice)
  
  speech.Text = " "
  if nxtButton then
    nxtButton:disconnect()
  end
  local skip = false
  nxtButton = speech.Parent.Next.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
    
    if skip == false then
      skip = true
    end
  end
)
  local pressedq = game:GetService("UserInputService").InputBegan:connect(function(inputObj)
    
    if inputObj.KeyCode == Enum.KeyCode.Q and skip == false then
      skip = true
    end
  end
)
  p.PlayerGui.DialogTalk.info.Visible = false
  menu.Visible = false
  speech.Parent.Visible = true
  speech.Visible = true
  local l_0_13_4 = false
  speech.Parent.popup.Yes.Visible = false
  speech.Parent.popup.Visible = false
  speech.Parent.popup.No.Visible = false
  if sayyes then
    sayyes:disconnect()
  end
  if sayno then
    sayno:disconnect()
  end
  if choice then
    speech.Parent.Next.Visible = false
    speech.Parent.popup.Yes.Visible = true
    speech.Parent.popup.Visible = true
    speech.Parent.popup.No.Visible = true
  end
  for i = 1, #text do
    scrolling()
    speech.Text = string.sub(text, 1, i)
    speech.DropShadow.Text = speech.Text
    wait(0.04)
    if skip == true then
      speech.Text = text
      speech.DropShadow.Text = text
      break
    end
  end
  do
    if pressedq then
      pressedq:disconnect()
    end
    if nxtButton then
      nxtButton:disconnect()
    end
    nxtButton = speech.Parent.Next.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
    
    l_0_13_4 = true
    if pressedq then
      pressedq:disconnect()
    end
  end
)
    local pressedq = game:GetService("UserInputService").InputBegan:connect(function(inputObj)
    
    if inputObj.KeyCode == Enum.KeyCode.Q then
      l_0_13_4 = true
      if pressedq then
        pressedq:disconnect()
      end
    end
  end
)
    repeat
      wait()
    until l_0_13_4 == true or choice == true
    if choice == nil then
      speech.Parent.Visible = false
      speech.Visible = false
      menu.Visible = true
    end
  end
end

local cheerAnim = Instance.new("Animation", script)
cheerAnim.AnimationId = "http://www.roblox.com/asset/?id=129423030"
cheer = function(model)
  
  local anim = model.Humanoid:LoadAnimation(cheerAnim)
  anim:Play()
end

local laughAnim = Instance.new("Animation", script)
laughAnim.AnimationId = "http://www.roblox.com/asset/?id=129423131"
laugh = function(model)
  
  local anim = model.Humanoid:LoadAnimation(laughAnim)
  anim:Play()
end

local nodAnim = Instance.new("Animation", script)
nodAnim.AnimationId = "http://www.roblox.com/asset/?id=428704872"
nod = function(model)
  
  local anim = model.Humanoid:LoadAnimation(nodAnim)
  anim:Play()
end

local pointAnim = Instance.new("Animation", script)
do
  pointAnim.AnimationId = "http://www.roblox.com/asset/?id=128853357"
  point = function(model)
  
  local anim = model.Humanoid:LoadAnimation(pointAnim)
  anim:Play()
end

  local bowAnim = Instance.new("Animation", script)
  bowAnim.AnimationId = "http://www.roblox.com/asset/?id=429578642"
  bow = function(model)
  
  local Anim = model.Humanoid:LoadAnimation(bowAnim)
  Anim:Play()
end

  turnModel = function(model)
  
  local cframetab = {}
  local position = model.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame
  for i = 1, 8 do
    cframetab[i] = model.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame:lerp(CFrame.new(model.HumanoidRootPart.Position, Vector3.new(p.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Position.X, model.HumanoidRootPart.Position.Y, p.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Position.Z)), i / 8)
  end
  for i,v in ipairs(cframetab) do
    model.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = v
    wait(0.03)
  end
  model.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = CFrame.new(model.HumanoidRootPart.Position, Vector3.new(p.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Position.X, model.HumanoidRootPart.Position.Y, p.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Position.Z))
  return position
end

  returnModel = function(model, position)
  
  for i = 1, 8 do
    model.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = model.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame:lerp(position, 0.125)
    wait(0.03)
  end
  model.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = position
end

  numberpokemon = function(name)
  
  local thepolicearecoming = 0
  for i,v in ipairs(p.PokemonParty:GetChildren()) do
    if v.Name == name then
      thepolicearecoming = thepolicearecoming + 1
    end
  end
  return thepolicearecoming
end

  healafterbattle = function()
  
  Battle:Heal()
end

  healopp = function()
  
  if p:FindFirstChild("OppPokemon") then
    for i,v in ipairs(p.OppPokemon:GetChildren()) do
      v.CurrentHP.Value = v.Stats.HPStat.Value
      v.Status.Value = ""
      for _,move in ipairs(v.Moves:GetChildren()) do
        if move.Name ~= "Transform" then
          move.PP.Value = _G.Moves[move.Name].PP
        else
          move.Name = "Double-Edge"
        end
      end
    end
  end
end

  findhighestlevel = function()
  
  local highestlevel = 0
  for i,v in ipairs(p.PokemonParty:GetChildren()) do
    if highestlevel < v.Lvl.Value then
      highestlevel = v.Lvl.Value
    end
  end
  return highestlevel
end

  findaveragelevel = function()
  
  local totallvl = 0
  local party = p.PokemonParty:GetChildren()
  for i,v in ipairs(party) do
    totallvl = totallvl + v.Lvl.Value
  end
  return math.ceil((totallvl) / #party)
end

  creategui = function(move, position)
  
  local button = Instance.new("TextButton")
  button.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 0, 25)
  button.Position = position
  button.Text = move
  button.Font = "ArialBold"
  button.FontSize = "Size24"
  button.Parent = script.Parent.Main.MoveRelearner
end

  findlead = function()
  
  for i,v in ipairs(p.PokemonParty:GetChildren()) do
    if v.PartyPosition.Value == 1 then
      return v
    end
  end
  return false
end

  events = {
Oak = {1; 
Events = {[1] = function()
  
  p.Character.Humanoid.WalkSpeed = 0
  if #p.PokemonParty:GetChildren() == 0 then
    scrolltext("Oak: Welcome to my lab, " .. p.Name .. ". Prepare to begin your Pokemon journey!")
    local oldpos = turnModel(workspace.Gary1)
    scrolltext("Gary: What took you so long?! I have been waiting forever!")
    scrolltext("Oak: Since Gary has been here for so long, I think he deserves to pick first.")
    scrolltext("Gary: Nah. I know I\'m better than " .. p.Name .. ", so they can pick first.")
    scrolltext("Oak: Okay, then, " .. p.Name .. ", pick your starter Pokemon!")
    game.Lighting.SelectStarters:Clone().Parent = p.PlayerGui
    repeat
      wait()
    until _G.SelectStarter ~= nil
    scrolltext("Gary: So you picked " .. _G.SelectStarter:reverse() .. "? Then I pick " .. garypokemon[_G.Pokemon[_G.SelectStarter:reverse()].Type[1]] .. "!")
    scrolltext("Gary: Before you go, " .. p.Name .. "...")
    point(workspace.Gary1)
    scrolltext("Gary: Let\'s battle! You\'re going to lose!")
    _G.Create(_G.SelectStarter:reverse(), p.PokemonParty, 5, true)
    Pokedex:Create(_G.SelectStarter:reverse(), true)
    if game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.Pokemon.StarterCheck:InvokeServer(_G.SelectStarter:reverse()) == false then
      game.ReplicatedStorage.GoogleAnalytics:FireServer("Hack", "StarterHack", "Name: " .. p.Name .. " Pokemon " .. _G.SelectStarter:reverse(), 1)
      p:Kick()
    end
    game.ReplicatedStorage.GoogleAnalytics:FireServer("Pick Starter", _G.SelectStarter:reverse(), p.Name, 1)
    _G.Create(garypokemon[_G.Pokemon[_G.SelectStarter:reverse()].Type[1]], p.OppPokemon, 5, true)
    repeat
      wait()
    until #p.OppPokemon:GetChildren() > 0
    local blah = _G.BattleInitiate("Trainer", "Gary", "I picked the wrong Pokemon!", "I knew I made the right choice!", "Inside")
    repeat
      wait()
    until blah ~= nil
    if blah == "Win" then
      scrolltext("Gary: You just got lucky. Smell ya later!")
    else
      if blah == "Lose" then
        laugh(workspace.Gary1)
        scrolltext("Gary: I knew I\'d win! Smell ya later, loser!")
        wait(0.05)
      end
    end
    returnModel(workspace.Gary1, oldpos)
    healafterbattle()
    p.Character.Humanoid.WalkSpeed = 0
    scrolltext("Oak: That was an amazing battle! Both of you have potential!")
    scrolltext("Oak: Anyway, " .. p.Name .. ", can you do me a favor? I ordered a special parcel.")
    scrolltext("Oak: It arrived today at the Pokemart at Viridian City.")
    scrolltext("Oak: I\'ll give you something if you deliver this to me.")
    scrolltext("Oak: And here, have 3 Pokeballs.")
    scrolltext("In a wild Pokemon battle, you can go into your bag and go to the Pokeball tab.")
    scrolltext("Afterwards, you can use the Pokeball on the Wild Pokemon.")
    scrolltext("You should lower the HP of the Pokemon and inflict it with a status.")
    scrolltext("Those increases the chances of catching it.")
    if p.Bag.Pokeball:FindFirstChild("Pokeball") then
      Math:Change(p.Bag.Pokeball.Pokeball, p.Bag.Pokeball.Pokeball.Value + 3)
    else
      Math:AddItem("Pokeball", p.Bag.Pokeball)
      repeat
        wait()
      until p.Bag.Pokeball:FindFirstChild("Pokeball")
      Math:Change(p.Bag.Pokeball.Pokeball, p.Bag.Pokeball.Pokeball.Value + 2)
    end
  else
    do
      scrolltext("Oak: You already have a Pokemon! Get my parcel in Viridian City!")
      p.Character.Humanoid.WalkSpeed = 16
      _G.progress.ShopkeeperOak = 2
      _G.progress.Mom = 3
      _G.progress.Oak = 2
    end
  end
end

  scrolltext("Looks like you don\'t have it! Go to Viridian City!")
end

Brock = {1; 
Events = {[1] = function(model)
  
  p.Character.Humanoid.WalkSpeed = 0
  scrolltext("I\'m Brock, Pewter City\'s gym leader.")
  scrolltext("I am the best rock type trainer in the world.")
  scrolltext("Years of training have made my Pokemon rock-hard with determinination.")
  point(model)
  scrolltext("Prepare to get crushed!")
  for _,pokemon in ipairs(workspace.Brock.Pokemon:GetChildren()) do
    pokemon:Clone().Parent = p.OppPokemon
  end
  local blah = _G.BattleInitiate("1st Leader", "Brock", "I underestimated you!", "Good try.", "Inside")
  repeat
    wait()
  until blah ~= nil
  if blah == "Win" then
    p.Character.Humanoid.WalkSpeed = 0
    nod(model)
    scrolltext("That was an amazing battle.")
    scrolltext("You are no doubt worthy of my gym badge.")
    game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.Internal.RouletteOpening:FireServer(p.Name .. " has beaten Brock and earned the Boulder Badge!", Color3.new(1, 1, 1))
    scrolltext("<" .. p.Name .. " has earned the Boulder Badge!>")
    scrolltext("Take this Rock Tomb TM!")
    Math:FuncAddItem("Rock Tomb", p.Bag.TMs, 1)
    scrolltext("<You got TM Rock Tomb>")
    scrolltext("Rock Tomb  is a Rock attack that slows the enemy down. Perfect for Rock types!")
    scrolltext("What\'s next for you? I would suggest traveling east to Cerulean City.")
    scrolltext("Oh yeah, I also have something for you. Silph Co. wants me to give these Exp. Shares to up and coming trainers.")
    scrolltext("You fit the bill, so here you go!")
    scrolltext("<You got the Exp. Share!>")
    scrolltext("To use the Exp. Share, you must turn it on. To do that, go into the Evolve Tab in your bag and turn on your Exp. Share!")
    scrolltext("Once it\'s on, every non-Fainted Pokemon in your party gets experience in battle!")
    Math:AddBoolItem("Exp. Share", p.Bag.Evolution)
    Math:AwardBadge(1)
    p.Character.Humanoid.WalkSpeed = 16
    _G.progress.Brock = 2
  else
    if blah == "Lose" then
      healafterbattle()
      script.Parent.Main.TeleportScreen.Visible = true
      p.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Anchored = true
      local area = "Pewter City"
      game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.Internal.movePlayer:FireServer(locations[area] + Vector3.new(0, 5, 0))
      local hit, pos = nil, nil
      repeat
        repeat
          local ray = Ray.new(p.Character.Torso.Position, Vector3.new(0, -1, 0).unit * 10)
          local hit, pos = workspace:FindPartOnRay(ray, p.Character)
          wait(0.25)
        until hit
      until game.Workspace.WhitedOut:FindFirstChild(area)
      p.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Anchored = false
      script.Parent.Main.TeleportScreen.Visible = false
      wait(0.05)
    end
  end
end
, [2] = function()
  
  if not p.Bag.Evolution:FindFirstChild("Exp. Share") then
    scrolltext("Oh, hey, " .. p.Name .. ", welcome back.")
    scrolltext("Silph Co. gave me these Exp. Shares to give to experienced trainers.")
    scrolltext("You\'re pretty experienced, since you beat me!")
    scrolltext("<You got the Exp. Share!>")
    scrolltext("To use the Exp. Share, you must turn it on. To do that, go into the Evolve Tab in your bag and turn on your Exp. Share!")
    scrolltext("Once it\'s on, every non-Fainted Pokemon in your party gets experience in battle!")
    Math:AddBoolItem("Exp. Share", p.Bag.Evolution)
  else
    scrolltext("Go forth, " .. p.Name .. "! I\'m rooting for you!")
  end
end
}
}

    scrolltext("What\'s next for you? I would suggest going to Route 5 and traveling to Vermillion City.")
    Math:AwardBadge(2)
    p.Character.Humanoid.WalkSpeed = 16
    _G.progress.Misty = 2
  else
    do
      if blah == "Lose" then
        healafterbattle()
        script.Parent.Main.TeleportScreen.Visible = true
        p.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Anchored = true
        local area = "Cerulean City"
        game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.Internal.movePlayer:FireServer(locations[area] + Vector3.new(0, 5, 0))
        local hit, pos = nil, nil
        repeat
          repeat
            local ray = Ray.new(p.Character.Torso.Position, Vector3.new(0, -1, 0).unit * 10)
            local hit, pos = workspace:FindPartOnRay(ray, p.Character)
            wait(0.25)
          until hit
        until game.Workspace.WhitedOut:FindFirstChild(area)
        p.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Anchored = false
        script.Parent.Main.TeleportScreen.Visible = false
        wait(0.05)
      end
    end
  end
end
, [2] = function()
  
  scrolltext("You beat me, do you want a free Togepi?")
  if #p.PokemonParty:GetChildren() < 6 then
    scrolltext("It\'s so cute... but it\'s not a water type.")
    scrolltext("<You got a Togepi!>")
    _G.Create(string.reverse("ipegoT"), p.PokemonParty, 10, true)
    Pokedex:Create("Togepi", true)
    _G.progress.Misty = 3
  else
    scrolltext("You have a full party! Come back when you don\'t have a full party!")
  end
end
, [3] = function()
  
  scrolltext("Go forth. I\'m rooting for you!")
end
}

Taxi = {1; 
Events = {[1] = function()
  
  local t = 1
  local order = {p.PlayerGui.Main.Taxi["Pewter City"], p.PlayerGui.Main.Taxi["Cerulean City"], p.PlayerGui.Main.Taxi["Vermillion City"], p.PlayerGui.Main.Taxi["Celadon City"], p.PlayerGui.Main.Taxi["Fuchsia City"], p.PlayerGui.Main.Taxi["Saffron City"], p.PlayerGui.Main.Taxi["Cinnabar Volcano"], p.PlayerGui.Main.Taxi.Indigo, p.PlayerGui.Main.Taxi["Elegant Valley"], p.PlayerGui.Main.Taxi["Mysterious Grotto"]}
  scrolltext("Hello, and welcome to Kanto\'s very own taxi service!")
  scrolltext("We can teleport you to cities where you have obtained a Gym badge.")
  p.PlayerGui.Main.Taxi["Viridian City"].Visible = true
  for i,v in ipairs(order) do
    if p.Badges:FindFirstChild(taxi[v.Name]) then
      v.Position = UDim2.new(0, 0, 0, 25 * (t + 1))
      t = t + 1
      v.Visible = true
    else
      v.Visible = false
    end
  end
  p.PlayerGui.Main.Taxi.Close.Position = UDim2.new(0, 0, 0, 25 * (t + 1))
  p.PlayerGui.Main.Taxi.Visible = true
end
}
}
,

    scrolltext("The last gym leader - if you have 7 gym badges - is waiting for you at Viridian City.")
    Math:AwardBadge(7)
    p.Character.Humanoid.WalkSpeed = 16
    _G.progress.Blaine = 2
  else
    if blah == "Lose" then
      healafterbattle()
      script.Parent.Main.TeleportScreen.Visible = true
      p.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Anchored = true
      local area = "Cinnabar Volcano"
      game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.Internal.movePlayer:FireServer(locations[area] + Vector3.new(0, 5, 0))
      local hit, pos = nil, nil
      repeat
        repeat
          local ray = Ray.new(p.Character.Torso.Position, Vector3.new(0, -1, 0).unit * 10)
          local hit, pos = workspace:FindPartOnRay(ray, p.Character)
          wait(0.25)
        until hit
      until game.Workspace.WhitedOut:FindFirstChild(area)
      p.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Anchored = false
      script.Parent.Main.TeleportScreen.Visible = false
      wait(0.05)
    end
  end
end

LugiaGuy = {1; 
Events = {[1] = function(model)
  
  scrolltext("Lazy bear. Dragonfly. Doctor. Fire bird. Magnets..")
  scrolltext("I had a dream about those things once...")
  scrolltext("I would love to see those things again, but... I don\'t know where to find them.")
  local pokemonneeded = {Snorlax = false, Vibrava = false, Chansey = false, Moltres = false, Magneton = false}
  for i,v in ipairs(p.PokemonParty:GetChildren()) do
    if pokemonneeded[v.Name] == false then
      pokemonneeded[v.Name] = true
    end
  end
  local tablecheck = function(table)
    
    for i,v in pairs(table) do
      if v == false then
        return false
      end
    end
    return true
  end

  if tablecheck(pokemonneeded) then
    cheer(model)
    scrolltext("Oh wow! You actually have all of those!")
    scrolltext("Just like my dream...")
    scrolltext("...Do you want a Lugia? Talk to me again...")
    _G.progress.LugiaGuy = 2
  end
end

  local badgeneeded = {["1"] = false, ["2"] = false, ["3"] = false, ["4"] = false, ["5"] = false, ["6"] = false, ["7"] = false}
  for i,v in ipairs(p.Badges:GetChildren()) do
    if badgeneeded[v.Name] == false then
      badgeneeded[v.Name] = true
    end
  end
  local tablecheck = function(table)
    
    for i,v in pairs(table) do
      if v == false then
        return false
      end
    end
    return true
  end

  if tablecheck(badgeneeded) then
    scrolltext("You have enough badges.")
    scrolltext("You shall suffice for master...")
    scrolltext("Talk to me again if you want to enter the 8th gym.")
    _G.progress["8thGymPerson"] = 2

GiovanniBoss = {1; 
Events = {[1] = function()
  
  for _,pokemon in ipairs(workspace.GiovanniBoss.Pokemon:GetChildren()) do
    pokemon:Clone().Parent = p.OppPokemon
  end
  p.Character.Humanoid.WalkSpeed = 0
  scrolltext("Oh -- I remember you. You foiled my plans at Lavender Tower.")
  scrolltext("I bet you didn\'t expect me to be the 8th gym leader! ")
  scrolltext("It\'s the perfect front...")
  scrolltext("I\'ll put an end to your adventure!")
  local blah = _G.BattleInitiate("Boss", "Giovanni", findhighestlevel() >= 95 and "I refuse to lose!" or "...", "As expected.", "PurpleInside")
  p.Character.Humanoid.WalkSpeed = 0
  repeat
    wait()
  until blah ~= nil
  if blah == "Win" then
    if findhighestlevel() >= 95 then
      scrolltext("Hurray! I have gathered enough data on you!")
      scrolltext("Prepare for this! I\'ve copied your team!")
      for i,v in ipairs(p.PokemonParty:GetChildren()) do
        v:Clone().Parent = p.OppPokemon
      end
      healopp()
      local blah = _G.BattleInitiate("Boss", "Giovanni", "But I used your Pokemon...", "Hah. Your team is really good!", "PurpleInside")
      p.Character.Humanoid.WalkSpeed = 16
      repeat
        wait()
      until blah ~= nil
      if blah == "Win" then
        scrolltext("...You\'re just better than me.")
        scrolltext("Having lost, I cannot face my followers. I have betrayed their trust. I\'m disbanding Team Rocket.")
        scrolltext("And... here. The Earth Badge!")
        game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.Internal.RouletteOpening:FireServer(p.Name .. " earned the Earth Badge!", Color3.new(1, 1, 1))
        scrolltext("<" .. p.Name .. " has earned the Earth Badge! You\'re ready for the Elite Four!>")

        scrolltext("There is a cave called Victory Road west of here... that\'s your next destination.")
        Math:AwardBadge(8)
        _G.progress.GiovanniBoss = 2
      else
        if blah == "Lose" then
          healafterbattle()
          script.Parent.Main.TeleportScreen.Visible = true
          p.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Anchored = true
          local area = "Viridian City"
          game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.Internal.movePlayer:FireServer(locations[area] + Vector3.new(0, 5, 0))
          local hit, pos = nil, nil

            repeat

          until game.Workspace.WhitedOut:FindFirstChild(area)
          p.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Anchored = false
          script.Parent.Main.TeleportScreen.Visible = false
          p.Character.Humanoid.WalkSpeed = 16
          wait(0.05)
        end
      end
    else
      do
        scrolltext("...You\'re just better than me.")
        scrolltext("Having lost, I cannot face my followers. I have betrayed their trust. I\'m disbanding Team Rocket.")
        scrolltext("And... here. The Earth Badge!")
        game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.Internal.RouletteOpening:FireServer(p.Name .. " earned the Earth Badge!", Color3.new(1, 1, 1))
        scrolltext("<" .. p.Name .. " has earned the Earth Badge! You\'re ready for the Elite Four!>")
        scrolltext("There is a cave called Victory Road west of here... that\'s your next destination.")
        Math:AwardBadge(8)
        _G.progress.GiovanniBoss = 2
        p.Character.Humanoid.WalkSpeed = 16
        if blah == "Lose" then
          healafterbattle()

          p.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Anchored = true

LucarioEvent = {1; 
Events = {[1] = function()
  
  scrolltext("I have so many Riolu... they can evolve into Lucario.")
  scrolltext("I would love to have " .. wantedpokemon .. ".")
  if p.PokemonParty:FindFirstChild(wantedpokemon) then
    scrolltext("Wow! You have " .. wantedpokemon .. "!")
    if numberpokemon(wantedpokemon) == 1 then
      scrolltext("Do you want to trade your " .. wantedpokemon .. " for my Riolu?", true)
      sayyes = speech.Parent.popup.Yes.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
    
    speech.Parent.popup.Yes.Visible = false
    speech.Parent.popup.Visible = false
    speech.Parent.popup.No.Visible = false
    scrolltext("Okay, let\'s trade! Don\'t worry, you\'ll be able to name this Riolu!")
    main.BlackScreen.Visible = true
    sound(true)
    local rip = p.PokemonParty:FindFirstChild(wantedpokemon)
    if rip.Shiny.Value ~= true or not _G.Pokemon[rip.Name].Sprites.SF then
      main.Pokemon.Image = _G.Pokemon[rip.Name].Sprites.Front
      main.Pokemon.Visible = true
      local riolu = _G.Create("Riolu", workspace, rip.Lvl.Value, true)
      main.Pokemon:TweenPosition(UDim2.new(0.5, -50, 0, -150), "InOut", "Quint", 5, true, function()
      
      if not riolu.Shiny.Value or not _G.Pokemon.Riolu.Sprites.SF then
        main.Pokemon.Image = _G.Pokemon.Riolu.Sprites.Front
        main.Pokemon:TweenPosition(UDim2.new(0.5, -50, 0.5, -50), "InOut", "Quint", 5, true, function()
        
        fadeytext("You received Riolu!")
        Math:ParentChange(riolu, p.PokemonParty)
        Math:Change(riolu.PartyPosition, rip.PartyPosition.Value)
        PC:Release(rip)
        local valget = 50000
        Math:Change(p.Money, valget)
        wait(0.7)
        main.BlackScreen.Visible = false
        main.Pokemon.Visible = false
        sound(false)
        scrolltext("Now I want " .. wantedpokemon .. "!")
      end
)
      end
    end
)
      wantedpokemon = pokemontable[math.random(#pokemontable)]
    end
  end
)
      sayno = speech.Parent.popup.No.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
    
    speech.Parent.popup.Yes.Visible = false
    speech.Parent.popup.Visible = false
    speech.Parent.popup.No.Visible = false
    scrolltext("Well, I\'m still looking for " .. wantedpokemon .. "...")
  end
)
    else
      scrolltext("You have multiple " .. wantedpokemon .. " in your party... I only need one!")
    end
  else
    scrolltext("If someone brings me " .. wantedpokemon .. ", I\'ll trade them a Riolu...")
  end
end
}

Lorelei = {1; 
Events = {[1] = function(model)
  
  p.Character.Humanoid.WalkSpeed = 0
  scrolltext("Welcome to the Pokemon League. I am Lorelei of the Elite Four.")
  scrolltext("No one can best me when it comes to icy Pokemon. Your Pokemon will be at my mercy!")
  laugh(model)
  scrolltext("Haha, the Pokemon league really allows anyone in nowadays, don\'t they?")
  scrolltext("Let\'s begin the battle!")
  for _,pokemon in ipairs(workspace.Lorelei.Pokemon:GetChildren()) do
    pokemon:Clone().Parent = p.OppPokemon
  end

  repeat
    wait()
  until blah ~= nil
  if blah == "Win" then
    p.Character.Humanoid.WalkSpeed = 0
    local valget = 10000
    if p:IsInGroup(1161496) then
      valget = math.floor(valget * 1.15)
    end
    if p.MoreneyVIP.Value == true and p.Badges:FindFirstChild("Champ") then
      valget = valget * 3
    else
      if p.MoreneyVIP.Value == true then
        valget = valget * 2
      end
    end
    Math:Change(p.Money, valget)
    scrolltext("You have gained $" .. valget .. " for winning!")
    scrolltext("Wow, you\'re pretty strong!")
    bow(model)
    scrolltext("I apologize for underestimating you.")
    scrolltext("However, I am only the first test.")
    scrolltext("Say hello to Bruno for me!")
    script.Parent.Main.TeleportScreen.Visible = true
    p.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Anchored = true

    game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.Internal.movePlayer:FireServer(area + Vector3.new(0, 5, 0))
    local hit, pos = nil, nil
    repeat
      local ray = Ray.new(p.Character.Torso.Position, Vector3.new(0, -1, 0).unit * 10)
      local hit, pos = workspace:FindPartOnRay(ray, p.Character)
      wait(0.25)
    until hit
    p.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Anchored = false
    script.Parent.Main.TeleportScreen.Visible = false
  else
    do
      if blah == "Lose" then
        healafterbattle()
        script.Parent.Main.TeleportScreen.Visible = true
        p.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Anchored = true
        local area = "Indigo"

Bruno = {1; 
Events = {[1] = function(model)
  
  p.Character.Humanoid.WalkSpeed = 0
  scrolltext("I am Bruno of the Elite Four.")
  scrolltext("Through rigorous training, people and Pokemon can become stronger!")
  scrolltext("I\'ve weight trained with my Pokemon!")

  for _,pokemon in ipairs(workspace.Bruno.Pokemon:GetChildren()) do
    pokemon:Clone().Parent = p.OppPokemon
  end
  local blah = _G.BattleInitiate("Elite Four", "Bruno", "...", "...", "Inside")
  repeat
    wait()
  until blah ~= nil
  if blah == "Win" then
    p.Character.Humanoid.WalkSpeed = 0
    local valget = 10000
    if p:IsInGroup(1161496) then
      valget = math.floor(valget * 1.15)
    end
    if p.MoreneyVIP.Value == true and p.Badges:FindFirstChild("Champ") then
      valget = valget * 3
    else
      if p.MoreneyVIP.Value == true then
        valget = valget * 2
      end
    end
    Math:Change(p.Money, valget)
    scrolltext("You have gained $" .. valget .. " for winning!")
    scrolltext("What? How could I lose?")
    scrolltext("My job is done here!")
    scrolltext("...you have to fight that witch... good luck! ")
    script.Parent.Main.TeleportScreen.Visible = true
    p.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Anchored = true
    local area = Vector3.new(3737.491, 21.945, 1024.863)
    game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.Internal.movePlayer:FireServer(area + Vector3.new(0, 5, 0))
    local hit, pos = nil, nil
    repeat
      local ray = Ray.new(p.Character.Torso.Position, Vector3.new(0, -1, 0).unit * 10)
      local hit, pos = workspace:FindPartOnRay(ray, p.Character)
      wait(0.25)
    until hit
    p.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Anchored = false
    script.Parent.Main.TeleportScreen.Visible = false
  else
    do
      if blah == "Lose" then
        healafterbattle()
        script.Parent.Main.TeleportScreen.Visible = true
        p.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Anchored = true
        local area = "Indigo"
        game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.Internal.movePlayer:FireServer(locations[area] + Vector3.new(0, 5, 0))
        local hit, pos = nil, nil
        repeat
          repeat
            local ray = Ray.new(p.Character.Torso.Position, Vector3.new(0, -1, 0).unit * 10)
            local hit, pos = workspace:FindPartOnRay(ray, p.Character)
            wait(0.25)
          until hit
        until game.Workspace.WhitedOut:FindFirstChild(area)
        p.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Anchored = false
        script.Parent.Main.TeleportScreen.Visible = false
        wait(0.05)
      end
    end
  end
end
}
}

ChampionGary = {1; 
Events = {[1] = function(model)
  
  p.Character.Humanoid.WalkSpeed = 0
  point(model)
  scrolltext("Hey, I was looking forward to seeing you, " .. p.Name .. "!")
  scrolltext("While working on my Pokedex, I looked all over for powerful Pokemon!")
  scrolltext("Not only that, I constructed teams that would beat any Pokemon type!")
  scrolltext("And now, I, Gary, am the Pokemon Champion! You know what that means, " .. p.Name .. "?")
  cheer(model)
  scrolltext("I\'m the most powerful trainer in the world!")
  for _,pokemon in ipairs(workspace.ChampionGary.Pokemon:GetChildren()) do
    pokemon:Clone().Parent = p.OppPokemon
  end
  local blah = _G.BattleInitiate("Champion", "Gary", "...", "...", "Inside")
  repeat
    wait()
  until blah ~= nil
  if blah == "Win" then
    p.Character.Humanoid.WalkSpeed = 0
    local valget = 20000
    if p.MoreneyVIP.Value == true and p.Badges:FindFirstChild("Champ") then
      valget = valget * 3
    else
      if p.MoreneyVIP.Value == true then
        valget = valget * 2
      end
    end
    if p:IsInGroup(1161496) then
      valget = math.floor(valget * 1.15)
    end
    Math:Change(p.Money, valget)
    scrolltext("You have gained $" .. valget .. " for winning!")
    scrolltext("No! That can\'t be... you beat my best...")
    scrolltext("After all that work to get here... my reign is over? It\'s not fair!")
    scrolltext("Why? Why did I lose? I never made any mistakes raising my Pokemon...")
    scrolltext("I hate to admit it, but you\'re the new Pokemon Champion!")
    if p.userId > 0 and game:GetService("MarketplaceService"):PlayerOwnsAsset(p, 241156907) then
      scrolltext("You beat me again... wow... I am really pathetic.")
    else
      scrolltext("I guess I\'ll be doing the honors.")
      point(model)
      scrolltext("Since you beat me, you get a cool memorial plaque.")
      scrolltext("Gary: The game isn\'t over! New Pokemon love that plaque! You\'ll be able to find more Pokemon with that!")
      game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.Internal.RouletteOpening:FireServer(p.Name .. " has beaten the Champion!", Color3.new(1, 1, 1))
      Math:AwardBadge("Champ")
      p.Character.Humanoid.WalkSpeed = 16
    end
    script.Parent.Main.TeleportScreen.Visible = true
    p.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Anchored = true
    local area = "Indigo"

    local hit, pos = nil, nil

      repeat

      until hit
    until game.Workspace.WhitedOut:FindFirstChild(area)
    p.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Anchored = false
    script.Parent.Main.TeleportScreen.Visible = false
  else
    do
      if blah == "Lose" then
        healafterbattle()
        script.Parent.Main.TeleportScreen.Visible = true
        p.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Anchored = true
        local area = "Indigo"
        game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.Internal.movePlayer:FireServer(locations[area] + Vector3.new(0, 5, 0))
        local hit, pos = nil, nil

          repeat

E4Enterer = {1; 
Events = {[1] = function()
  
  scrolltext("Oh, you\'re new here!")
  scrolltext("Let\'s see if you have all 8 badges...")
  local badgeneeded = {["1"] = false, ["2"] = false, ["3"] = false, ["4"] = false, ["5"] = false, ["6"] = false, ["7"] = false, ["8"] = false}
  for i,v in ipairs(p.Badges:GetChildren()) do
    if badgeneeded[v.Name] == false then
      badgeneeded[v.Name] = true
    end
  end
  local tablecheck = function(table)
    
    for i,v in pairs(table) do
      if v == false then
        return false
      end
    end
    return true
  end

  if tablecheck(badgeneeded) then
    scrolltext("Alright! You have all 8 badges!")
    scrolltext("You can now use the Taxi to teleport to the Indigo Plateau!")
    scrolltext("If you want, you can do the Elite Four challenge by talking to me again!")
    Math:AwardBadge("Indigo")
    _G.progress.E4Enterer = 2
  else
    scrolltext("You don\'t have all 8 badges. Come back when you do.")
  end
end
, [2] = function()
  
  scrolltext("Hope you\'re ready for this!")
  scrolltext("You have to defeat the Elite Four. And you won\'t get access to a PokeCenter.")
  scrolltext("Lastly, you have to beat the Elite Four in one sitting.")
  scrolltext("I wish you good luck!")
  healafterbattle()
  script.Parent.Main.TeleportScreen.Visible = true
  p.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Anchored = true
  local area = Vector3.new(2385.401, 5.5, -6344.3)
  game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.Internal.movePlayer:FireServer(area + Vector3.new(0, 5, 0))
  local hit, pos = nil, nil
  repeat
    local ray = Ray.new(p.Character.Torso.Position, Vector3.new(0, -1, 0).unit * 10)
    local hit, pos = workspace:FindPartOnRay(ray, p.Character)
    wait(0.25)
  until hit
  p.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Anchored = false
  script.Parent.Main.TeleportScreen.Visible = false
end
}
}

Spiritomb = {1; 
Events = {[1] = function()
  
  if p.Badges:FindFirstChild("Champ") then
    scrolltext("Wow, you\'re the Pokemon League Champion.")
    scrolltext("Fight this wild Spiritomb for me.")
    _G.progress.Spiritomb = 2
    _G.InWild = true
    _G.Create("Spiritomb", p.OppPokemon, 80, false)
    local blah = _G.BattleInitiate(nil, nil, "You have won the battle!", p.Name .. " has no Pokemon! " .. p.Name .. " blacked out!", "PurpleInside")
    repeat
      wait()
    until blah ~= nil
    _G.InWild = false
    if blah == "Win" then
      wait(1.4)
      deb = false
      return 
    else
      if blah == "Lose" then
        healafterbattle()
        game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.Internal.movePlayer:FireServer(Workspace.WhitedOut["Lavender Town"].Position + Vector3.new(0, 5, 0))
        deb = false
      end
    end
  else
    do
      scrolltext("Come back when you\'re the best trainer in the world.")
    end
  end
end
, [2] = function()
  
  scrolltext("Nice, I guess.")
end
}
}

StatsJudge = {1; 
Events = {[1] = function()
  
  scrolltext("You can call me the Judge.  That\'s actually not my real name, but it\'s what everyone calls me.")
  scrolltext("It\'s because of this weird power I have. It\'s a gift, really.")
  scrolltext("I can discern--or judge, you might say--the overall potential of individual pokemon.")
  scrolltext("How about it? Let me judge the potential of your Pokemon!")
  _G.progress.StatsJudge = 2
end
, [2] = function()
  
  if p.Badges:FindFirstChild("Champ") and not game:GetService("MarketplaceService"):PlayerOwnsAsset(p, 241156907) then
    Math:AwardBadge("Champ")
  else
    if not p.Badges:FindFirstChild("Champ") and game:GetService("MarketplaceService"):PlayerOwnsAsset(p, 241156907) then
      Math:AwardBadge("Champ")
    end
  end
  scrolltext("I\'m going to judge the first Pokemon in your Party...")
  local judgedpokemon = findlead()
  scrolltext("Hmm, it\'s a " .. judgedpokemon.Name .. "?")
  local ivs = 0
  local higheststat = 0
  local statstring = nil
  for i,v in ipairs(judgedpokemon.IV:GetChildren()) do
    ivs = ivs + v.Value
    if higheststat < v.Value then
      higheststat = v.Value
      statstring = v.Name
    end
  end
  local str = nil
  if ivs <= 90 then
    str = "average"
  else
    if ivs > 90 and ivs <= 120 then
      str = "above average"
    else
      if ivs > 120 and ivs <= 150 then
        str = "relatively superior"
      else
        str = "outstanding"
      end
    end
  end
  scrolltext("This Pokemon\'s potential is " .. str .. " overall.")
  if statstring == nil then
    scrolltext("This Pokemon has no potential whatsoever!")
  else
    local stat = {HPIV = "HP", AtkIV = "Attack", DefIV = "Defense", SpeedIV = "Speed", SpDIV = "Special Defense", SpAIV = "Special Attack"}
    scrolltext("Incidentally, I would say its greatest potential lies in its " .. stat[statstring] .. ".")
    for i,v in ipairs(judgedpokemon.IV:GetChildren()) do
      if v.Name ~= statstring and v.Value == higheststat then
        scrolltext("But its " .. stat[v.Name] .. " is equally as good.")
      end
    end
    if higheststat <= 10 then
      scrolltext("To be honest, it has pretty bad stats. That\'s how I judge it.")
    else
      if higheststat > 10 and higheststat <= 15 then
        scrolltext("Its stats are so-so. I\'ve seen better, but I\'ve seen worse. That\'s how I judge it.")
      else
        if higheststat > 15 and higheststat <= 25 then
          scrolltext("Its definitely got some good stats. That\'s how I judge it.")
        else
          if higheststat > 25 and higheststat <= 30 then
            scrolltext("This Pokemon has some fantastic stats. That\'s how I judge it.")
          else
            scrolltext("These stats...! Stats like those, they cannot be beat. That\'s how I judge it.")
          end
        end
      end
    end
  end
end
}
}
,

      scrolltext("You have a full party...")
    end

  end

OakHeatran = {1; 
Events = {[1] = function(model)
  
  scrolltext("Oh, hey, " .. p.Name .. ", didn\'t expect to see you here!")
  scrolltext("I was just searching for rare Pokemon in my spare time.")
  scrolltext("Standing still in Pallet Town is really boring, if you know what I mean.")
  scrolltext("In fact, if you have 300 or more Pokedex entries, I\'ll give you a cool Pokemon.")
  local t = 0
  for i,v in ipairs(p.Pokedex:GetChildren()) do
    if v.Caught.Value == true then
      t = t + 1
    end
  end
  if t >= 300 then
    if #p.PokemonParty:GetChildren() < 6 then
      cheer(model)
      scrolltext("Wow! " .. t .. " Pokedex entries!?")
      scrolltext("You deserve this EXTREMELY rare Heatran. You can only get this from me!")
      _G.Create(string.reverse("nartaeH"), p.PokemonParty, 80, true)
      _G.progress.OakHeatran = 2
    else
      scrolltext("You have a full party...")
    end
  else
    scrolltext("Eh, " .. t .. " Pokemon is sort of close to 300.")
    scrolltext("See me again when you have 300 Pokedex entries.")
  end
end
, [2] = function()
  
  scrolltext("...")
end
}
}

ElegantValleyTP = {1; 
Events = {[1] = function(model)
  
  local choice = nil
  if not p:FindFirstChild("Elegant Valley") then
    Math:AwardBadge("EV")
  end
  scrolltext("I created this cool place called Elegant Valley, do you want to go to it?", true)
  sayyes = speech.Parent.popup.Yes.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
    
    speech.Parent.popup.Yes.Visible = false
    speech.Parent.popup.Visible = false
    speech.Parent.popup.No.Visible = false
    speech.Parent.Next.Visible = true
    cheer(model)
    scrolltext("Hurray! Taking you there now.")
    p.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Anchored = true
    game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.Internal.movePlayer:FireServer(locations["Elegant Valley"] + Vector3.new(0, 5, 0))
    local area = Vector3.new(locations["Elegant Valley"])
    game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.Internal.movePlayer:FireServer(Vector3.new(-9139.74, 82.56, 806.04) + Vector3.new(0, 5, 0))
    local hit, pos = nil, nil
    repeat
      local ray = Ray.new(p.Character.Torso.Position, Vector3.new(0, -1, 0).unit * 10)
      local hit, pos = workspace:FindPartOnRay(ray, p.Character)
      wait(0.25)
    until hit
    script.Parent.Main.TeleportScreen.Visible = false
    p.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Anchored = false
    choice = true
  end
)
  sayno = speech.Parent.popup.No.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
    
    speech.Parent.popup.Yes.Visible = false
    speech.Parent.popup.Visible = false
    speech.Parent.popup.No.Visible = false
    speech.Parent.Next.Visible = true
    scrolltext("Well, okay then. It will always be available to you.")
    choice = true
  end
)
  p.Character.Humanoid.WalkSpeed = 0
  speech.Parent.popup.Yes.Visible = true
  speech.Parent.popup.Visible = true
  speech.Parent.popup.No.Visible = true
  menu.Visible = false
  repeat
    wait()
  until choice
end
}
}

Fridge = {1; 
Events = {[1] = function()
  
  local rotomfound = false
  local newmove = "Blizzard"
  for _,yourpokeout in ipairs(p.PokemonParty:GetChildren()) do
    if yourpokeout.Name:find(string.reverse("motoR")) and game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.Pokemon.rotomCheck:InvokeServer(yourpokeout) then
      rotomfound = true
      Math:PropChange(yourpokeout, "Name", string.reverse("tsorF-motoR"))
      game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.Pokemon.rotomCheck:InvokeServer(yourpokeout)
      Math:Change(yourpokeout.Reverse, yourpokeout.Name:reverse())
      for _,moves in ipairs(yourpokeout:FindFirstChild("Moves"):GetChildren()) do
        if rotommoves[moves.Name] then
          Math:PropChange(yourpokeout.Moves[moves.Name], "Name", newmove)
          Math:Change(yourpokeout.Moves[newmove].PP, _G.Moves[newmove].PP)
        end
      end
      for _,v in ipairs(stats) do
        -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC99: Overwrote pending register: R15 in 'AssignReg'

        -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC108: Overwrote pending register: R18 in 'AssignReg'

        -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC112: Overwrote pending register: R18 in 'AssignReg'

        -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC113: Overwrote pending register: R18 in 'AssignReg'

        -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC114: Overwrote pending register: R19 in 'AssignReg'

        if v == "HP" then
          Math:Change(yourpokeout.Stats[R15_PC97], R15_PC97(yourpokeout.Lvl.Value, yourpokeout.IV[R18_PC105].Value, R18_PC105, R19_PC111))
        else
          -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC125: Overwrote pending register: R15 in 'AssignReg'

          -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC129: Overwrote pending register: R18 in 'AssignReg'

          -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC130: Overwrote pending register: R19 in 'AssignReg'

          -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC132: Overwrote pending register: R19 in 'AssignReg'

          -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC133: Overwrote pending register: R18 in 'AssignReg'

          -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC134: Overwrote pending register: R18 in 'AssignReg'

          -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC135: Overwrote pending register: R19 in 'AssignReg'

          -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC139: Overwrote pending register: R19 in 'AssignReg'

          -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC140: Overwrote pending register: R19 in 'AssignReg'

          -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC141: Overwrote pending register: R20 in 'AssignReg'

          Math:Change(yourpokeout.Stats[R15_PC123], R15_PC123(R16_PC147, yourpokeout.Lvl.Value, R18_PC105, R19_PC111, R20_PC138, R21_PC145))
        end
        Math:Change(yourpokeout.CurrentHP, yourpokeout.Stats.HPStat.Value)
      end
    end
  end
  if rotomfound == true then
    scrolltext("All your Rotom have been converted into Rotom-Frost.")
  else
    scrolltext("This is a nice fridge.")
  end
end
}
}
, 
LawnMower = {1; 
Events = {[1] = function()
  
  local rotomfound = false
  local newmove = "Leaf Storm"
  for _,yourpokeout in ipairs(p.PokemonParty:GetChildren()) do
    if yourpokeout.Name:find(string.reverse("motoR")) and game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.Pokemon.rotomCheck:InvokeServer(yourpokeout) then
      rotomfound = true
      Math:PropChange(yourpokeout, "Name", string.reverse("woM-motoR"))
      game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.Pokemon.rotomCheck:InvokeServer(yourpokeout)
      Math:Change(yourpokeout.Reverse, yourpokeout.Name:reverse())
      for _,moves in ipairs(yourpokeout:FindFirstChild("Moves"):GetChildren()) do
        if rotommoves[moves.Name] then
          Math:PropChange(yourpokeout.Moves[moves.Name], "Name", newmove)
          Math:Change(yourpokeout.Moves[newmove].PP, _G.Moves[newmove].PP)
        end
      end
      for _,v in ipairs(stats) do
        -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC99: Overwrote pending register: R15 in 'AssignReg'

        -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC108: Overwrote pending register: R18 in 'AssignReg'

        -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC112: Overwrote pending register: R18 in 'AssignReg'

        -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC113: Overwrote pending register: R18 in 'AssignReg'

        -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC114: Overwrote pending register: R19 in 'AssignReg'

        if v == "HP" then
          Math:Change(yourpokeout.Stats[R15_PC97], R15_PC97(yourpokeout.Lvl.Value, yourpokeout.IV[R18_PC105].Value, R18_PC105, R19_PC111))
        else
          -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC125: Overwrote pending register: R15 in 'AssignReg'

          -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC129: Overwrote pending register: R18 in 'AssignReg'

          -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC130: Overwrote pending register: R19 in 'AssignReg'

          -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC132: Overwrote pending register: R19 in 'AssignReg'

          -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC133: Overwrote pending register: R18 in 'AssignReg'

          -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC134: Overwrote pending register: R18 in 'AssignReg'

          -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC135: Overwrote pending register: R19 in 'AssignReg'

          -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC139: Overwrote pending register: R19 in 'AssignReg'

          -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC140: Overwrote pending register: R19 in 'AssignReg'

          -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC141: Overwrote pending register: R20 in 'AssignReg'

          Math:Change(yourpokeout.Stats[R15_PC123], R15_PC123(R16_PC147, yourpokeout.Lvl.Value, R18_PC105, R19_PC111, R20_PC138, R21_PC145))
        end
        Math:Change(yourpokeout.CurrentHP, yourpokeout.Stats.HPStat.Value)
      end
    end
  end
  if rotomfound == true then
    scrolltext("All your Rotom have been converted into Rotom-Mow.")
  else
    scrolltext("This is an environment friendly lawn mower.")
  end
end
}
}

Radio = {1; 
Events = {[1] = function()
  
  local rotomfound = false
  local newmove = "ThunderShock"
  for _,yourpokeout in ipairs(p.PokemonParty:GetChildren()) do
    if yourpokeout.Name:find(string.reverse("motoR")) and game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.Pokemon.rotomCheck:InvokeServer(yourpokeout) then
      rotomfound = true
      Math:PropChange(yourpokeout, "Name", string.reverse("motoR"))
      game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.Pokemon.rotomCheck:InvokeServer(yourpokeout)
      Math:Change(yourpokeout.Reverse, yourpokeout.Name:reverse())
      for _,moves in ipairs(yourpokeout:FindFirstChild("Moves"):GetChildren()) do
        if rotommoves[moves.Name] then
          Math:PropChange(yourpokeout.Moves[moves.Name], "Name", newmove)
          Math:Change(yourpokeout.Moves[newmove].PP, _G.Moves[newmove].PP)
        end
      end
      for _,v in ipairs(stats) do
        -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC99: Overwrote pending register: R15 in 'AssignReg'

        -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC108: Overwrote pending register: R18 in 'AssignReg'

        -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC112: Overwrote pending register: R18 in 'AssignReg'

        -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC113: Overwrote pending register: R18 in 'AssignReg'

        -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC114: Overwrote pending register: R19 in 'AssignReg'

        if v == "HP" then
          Math:Change(yourpokeout.Stats[R15_PC97], R15_PC97(yourpokeout.Lvl.Value, yourpokeout.IV[R18_PC105].Value, R18_PC105, R19_PC111))
        else
          -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC125: Overwrote pending register: R15 in 'AssignReg'

          -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC129: Overwrote pending register: R18 in 'AssignReg'

          -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC130: Overwrote pending register: R19 in 'AssignReg'

          -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC132: Overwrote pending register: R19 in 'AssignReg'

          -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC133: Overwrote pending register: R18 in 'AssignReg'

          -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC134: Overwrote pending register: R18 in 'AssignReg'

          -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC135: Overwrote pending register: R19 in 'AssignReg'

          -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC139: Overwrote pending register: R19 in 'AssignReg'

      end
    end
  end
  if rotomfound == true then
    scrolltext("All your Rotom have left their appliances, becoming regular Rotom.")
  else
    scrolltext("This is a radio. It is pretty useless to possess.")
  end
end
}
}

GiratinaOrigin = {1; 
Events = {[1] = function()
  
  local newpokename, choice = nil, nil
  scrolltext("Bring me either the lord of time or the lord of space and the lord of antimatter...")
  if (p.PokemonParty:FindFirstChild(string.reverse("aglaiD")) or p.PokemonParty:FindFirstChild(string.reverse("aiklaP"))) and (p.PokemonParty:FindFirstChild(string.reverse("anitariG")) or p.PokemonParty:FindFirstChild(string.reverse("O-anitariG"))) then
    scrolltext("You have the necessary Pokemon... I can change your Giratina\'s form... ", true)
    sayyes = speech.Parent.popup.Yes.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
    
    speech.Parent.popup.Yes.Visible = false
    speech.Parent.popup.Visible = false
    speech.Parent.popup.No.Visible = false
    speech.Parent.Next.Visible = true
    scrolltext("Okay... I have changed your Giratina(s)...")
    for _,yourpokeout in ipairs(p.PokemonParty:GetChildren()) do
      if yourpokeout.Name:find(string.reverse("anitariG")) then
        if yourpokeout.Name == string.reverse("anitariG") and game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.Pokemon.giratinaCheck:InvokeServer(yourpokeout) then
          newpokename = string.reverse("O-anitariG")
        else
          if yourpokeout.Name == string.reverse("O-anitariG") and game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.Pokemon.giratinaCheck:InvokeServer(yourpokeout) then
            newpokename = string.reverse("anitariG")
          end
        end
        Math:PropChange(yourpokeout, "Name", newpokename)
        Math:Change(yourpokeout.Reverse, yourpokeout.Name:reverse())
        game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.Pokemon.giratinaCheck:InvokeServer(yourpokeout)
        for _,v in ipairs(stats) do
          -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC116: Overwrote pending register: R13 in 'AssignReg'

          -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC125: Overwrote pending register: R16 in 'AssignReg'

          -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC129: Overwrote pending register: R16 in 'AssignReg'

          -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC130: Overwrote pending register: R16 in 'AssignReg'

          -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC131: Overwrote pending register: R17 in 'AssignReg'

          if v == "HP" then
            Math:Change(yourpokeout.Stats[R13_PC114], R13_PC114(yourpokeout.Lvl.Value, yourpokeout.IV[R16_PC122].Value, R16_PC122, R17_PC128))
          else
            -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC142: Overwrote pending register: R13 in 'AssignReg'

            -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC146: Overwrote pending register: R16 in 'AssignReg'

            -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC147: Overwrote pending register: R17 in 'AssignReg'

            -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC149: Overwrote pending register: R17 in 'AssignReg'

            -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC150: Overwrote pending register: R16 in 'AssignReg'

            -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC151: Overwrote pending register: R16 in 'AssignReg'

            -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC152: Overwrote pending register: R17 in 'AssignReg'

            -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC156: Overwrote pending register: R17 in 'AssignReg'

            -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC157: Overwrote pending register: R17 in 'AssignReg'

            -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC158: Overwrote pending register: R18 in 'AssignReg'

            Math:Change(yourpokeout.Stats[R13_PC140], R13_PC140(R14_PC164, yourpokeout.Lvl.Value, R16_PC122, R17_PC128, R18_PC155, R19_PC162))
          end
          Math:Change(yourpokeout.CurrentHP, yourpokeout.Stats.HPStat.Value)
        end
      end
    end
    choice = true
  end
)
    sayno = speech.Parent.popup.No.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
    
    speech.Parent.Next.Visible = true
    speech.Parent.popup.Yes.Visible = false
    speech.Parent.popup.Visible = false
    speech.Parent.popup.No.Visible = false
    scrolltext("Okay...")
    choice = true
  end
)
    p.Character.Humanoid.WalkSpeed = 0
    speech.Parent.popup.Yes.Visible = true
    speech.Parent.popup.Visible = true
    speech.Parent.popup.No.Visible = true
    menu.Visible = false
    repeat
      wait()
    until choice
  else
    scrolltext("Do not have the necessary Pokemon...")
  end
end
}
}
, 
Meteor4 = {1; 
Events = {[1] = function()
  
  local newpokename = string.reverse("syxoeD")
  scrolltext("This meteorite looks very normal.")
  if p.PokemonParty:FindFirstChild(string.reverse("syxoeD")) or p.PokemonParty:FindFirstChild(string.reverse("A-syxoeD")) or p.PokemonParty:FindFirstChild(string.reverse("D-syxoeD")) or p.PokemonParty:FindFirstChild(string.reverse("S-syxoeD")) then
    scrolltext("Do you want to change all your Deoxys into normal Deoxys?", true)
    sayyes = speech.Parent.popup.Yes.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
    
    speech.Parent.popup.Yes.Visible = false
    speech.Parent.popup.Visible = false
    speech.Parent.popup.No.Visible = false
    speech.Parent.Next.Visible = true
    scrolltext("<Your Deoxys has been changed!>")
    for _,yourpokeout in ipairs(p.PokemonParty:GetChildren()) do
      if yourpokeout.Name:find(string.reverse("syxoeD")) and game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.Pokemon.deoxysCheck:InvokeServer(yourpokeout) then
        Math:PropChange(yourpokeout, "Name", newpokename)
        game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.Pokemon.deoxysCheck:InvokeServer(yourpokeout)
        Math:Change(yourpokeout.Reverse, yourpokeout.Name:reverse())
        for _,v in ipairs(stats) do
          -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC81: Overwrote pending register: R13 in 'AssignReg'

          -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC90: Overwrote pending register: R16 in 'AssignReg'

          -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC94: Overwrote pending register: R16 in 'AssignReg'

          -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC95: Overwrote pending register: R16 in 'AssignReg'

          -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC96: Overwrote pending register: R17 in 'AssignReg'

          if v == "HP" then
            Math:Change(yourpokeout.Stats[R13_PC79], R13_PC79(yourpokeout.Lvl.Value, yourpokeout.IV[R16_PC87].Value, R16_PC87, R17_PC93))
          else
            -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC107: Overwrote pending register: R13 in 'AssignReg'

            -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC111: Overwrote pending register: R16 in 'AssignReg'

            -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC112: Overwrote pending register: R17 in 'AssignReg'

            -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC114: Overwrote pending register: R17 in 'AssignReg'

            -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC115: Overwrote pending register: R16 in 'AssignReg'

            -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC116: Overwrote pending register: R16 in 'AssignReg'

            -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC117: Overwrote pending register: R17 in 'AssignReg'

            -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC121: Overwrote pending register: R17 in 'AssignReg'

            -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC122: Overwrote pending register: R17 in 'AssignReg'

            -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC123: Overwrote pending register: R18 in 'AssignReg'

            Math:Change(yourpokeout.Stats[R13_PC105], R13_PC105(R14_PC129, yourpokeout.Lvl.Value, R16_PC87, R17_PC93, R18_PC120, R19_PC127))
          end
          Math:Change(yourpokeout.CurrentHP, yourpokeout.Stats.HPStat.Value)
        end
      end
    end
  end
)

Events = {[1] = function()
  
  local newpokename = string.reverse("A-syxoeD")
  scrolltext("This meteorite looks like it destroyed something.")
  if p.PokemonParty:FindFirstChild(string.reverse("syxoeD")) or p.PokemonParty:FindFirstChild(string.reverse("A-syxoeD")) or p.PokemonParty:FindFirstChild(string.reverse("D-syxoeD")) or p.PokemonParty:FindFirstChild(string.reverse("S-syxoeD")) then
    scrolltext("Do you want to change all your Deoxys into Attack forme Deoxys?", true)
    sayyes = speech.Parent.popup.Yes.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
    
    speech.Parent.popup.Yes.Visible = false
    speech.Parent.popup.Visible = false
    speech.Parent.popup.No.Visible = false
    speech.Parent.Next.Visible = true
    scrolltext("<Your Deoxys has been changed!>")
    for _,yourpokeout in ipairs(p.PokemonParty:GetChildren()) do
      if yourpokeout.Name:find(string.reverse("syxoeD")) and game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.Pokemon.deoxysCheck:InvokeServer(yourpokeout) then
        Math:PropChange(yourpokeout, "Name", newpokename)
        game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.Pokemon.deoxysCheck:InvokeServer(yourpokeout)
        Math:Change(yourpokeout.Reverse, yourpokeout.Name:reverse())
        for _,v in ipairs(stats) do
          -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC81: Overwrote pending register: R13 in 'AssignReg'

          -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC90: Overwrote pending register: R16 in 'AssignReg'

          -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC94: Overwrote pending register: R16 in 'AssignReg'

          -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC95: Overwrote pending register: R16 in 'AssignReg'

          -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC96: Overwrote pending register: R17 in 'AssignReg'

          if v == "HP" then
            Math:Change(yourpokeout.Stats[R13_PC79], R13_PC79(yourpokeout.Lvl.Value, yourpokeout.IV[R16_PC87].Value, R16_PC87, R17_PC93))
          else
            -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC107: Overwrote pending register: R13 in 'AssignReg'

            -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC111: Overwrote pending register: R16 in 'AssignReg'

            -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC112: Overwrote pending register: R17 in 'AssignReg'

            -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC114: Overwrote pending register: R17 in 'AssignReg'

            -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC115: Overwrote pending register: R16 in 'AssignReg'

            -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC116: Overwrote pending register: R16 in 'AssignReg'

            -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC117: Overwrote pending register: R17 in 'AssignReg'

            -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC121: Overwrote pending register: R17 in 'AssignReg'

            -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC122: Overwrote pending register: R17 in 'AssignReg'

            -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC123: Overwrote pending register: R18 in 'AssignReg'

          Math:Change(yourpokeout.CurrentHP, yourpokeout.Stats.HPStat.Value)
        end
      end
    end
  end
)

MysteriousGrottoTP = {1; 
Events = {[1] = function()
  
  if not p:FindFirstChild("Mysterious Grotto") then
    Math:AwardBadge("Mysterious Grotto")
  end
  scrolltext("A new place has just been discovered... it\'s called Mysterious Grotto.")
  scrolltext("I\'m setting up an expedition, do you want to join?", true)
  local choice = nil
  sayyes = speech.Parent.popup.Yes.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
    
    speech.Parent.popup.Yes.Visible = false
    speech.Parent.popup.Visible = false
    speech.Parent.popup.No.Visible = false
    speech.Parent.Next.Visible = true
    scrolltext("Alright!")
    main.TeleportScreen.BackgroundTransparency = 1
    main.TeleportScreen.Visible = true
    for i = 1, 20 do
      main.TeleportScreen.BackgroundTransparency = main.TeleportScreen.BackgroundTransparency - 0.05
      wait()
    end
    p.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Anchored = true
    local area = locations["Mysterious Grotto"]
    game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.Internal.movePlayer:FireServer(area + Vector3.new(0, 5, 0))
    local hit, pos = nil, nil
    repeat
      repeat
        local ray = Ray.new(p.Character.Torso.Position, Vector3.new(0, -1, 0).unit * 10)
        local hit, pos = workspace:FindPartOnRay(ray, p.Character)
        wait(0.25)
      until hit
    until game.Workspace.WhitedOut:FindFirstChild("Mysterious Grotto")
    main.TeleportScreen.Visible = false
    p.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Anchored = false
    for i = 1, 20 do
      main.TeleportScreen.BackgroundTransparency = main.TeleportScreen.BackgroundTransparency + 0.05
      wait()
    end
    main.TeleportScreen.Visible = false
    main.TeleportScreen.BackgroundTransparency = 0
    choice = true
  end
)
  sayno = speech.Parent.popup.No.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
    
    speech.Parent.popup.Yes.Visible = false
    speech.Parent.popup.Visible = false
    speech.Parent.popup.No.Visible = false
    speech.Parent.Next.Visible = true
    scrolltext("You can always join the expedition!")
    choice = true
  end
)
  p.Character.Humanoid.WalkSpeed = 0
  speech.Parent.popup.Yes.Visible = true
  speech.Parent.popup.Visible = true
  speech.Parent.popup.No.Visible = true
  menu.Visible = false
  repeat
    wait()
  until choice
end
}
}

HardFight = {1; 
Events = {[1] = function()
  
  if not p.Badges:FindFirstChild("8") then
    scrolltext("[This strange man doesn\'t seem to notice your presence.]")
  else
    scrolltext("Jg zpv bsfou qsfqbsfe zpv ejf!")
    scrolltext("[This strange man attacks!]")
    local pokelist = game.Workspace.HardFight.PossiblePokemon:GetChildren()
    for i = 1, 6 do
      local selected = math.random(#pokelist)
      local selecpoke = pokelist[selected]
      local pokeclone = selecpoke:Clone()
      pokeclone.PartyPosition.Value = i
      pokeclone.Parent = p.OppPokemon
      table.remove(pokelist, selected)
    end
    local blah = _G.BattleInitiate("?????", "", "Vomvdlz", "Opu tuspoh fopvhi", "Inside")
    repeat
      wait()
    until blah ~= nil
    if blah == "Win" then
      scrolltext("[The strange man says some gibberish, and gives you a bag of Pokedollars.]")
      p.Character.Humanoid.WalkSpeed = 0
      local valget = 20000
      if p.MoreneyVIP.Value == true and p.Badges:FindFirstChild("Champ") then
        valget = valget * 3
      else
        if p.MoreneyVIP.Value == true then
          valget = valget * 2
        end
      end
      if p:IsInGroup(1161496) then
        valget = math.floor(valget * 1.15)
      end
      Math:Change(p.Money, valget)
      scrolltext("You have gained $" .. valget .. " for winning!")
    else
      do
        if blah == "Lose" then
          healafterbattle()
          script.Parent.Main.TeleportScreen.Visible = true
          p.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Anchored = true
          local area = "Celadon City"
          game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.Internal.movePlayer:FireServer(locations[area] + Vector3.new(0, 5, 0))
          local hit, pos = nil, nil
          repeat
            repeat
              local ray = Ray.new(p.Character.Torso.Position, Vector3.new(0, -1, 0).unit * 10)
              local hit, pos = workspace:FindPartOnRay(ray, p.Character)
              wait(0.25)
            until hit
          until game.Workspace.WhitedOut:FindFirstChild(area)
          p.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Anchored = false
          script.Parent.Main.TeleportScreen.Visible = false
          wait(0.05)
        end
      end
    end
  end
end
}
}
,

HardFight3 = {1; 
Events = {[1] = function()
  
  if sayyes then
    sayyes:disconnect()
  end
  if sayno then
    sayno:disconnect()
  end
  if not p.Badges:FindFirstChild("8") then
    scrolltext("Zpv ibwf qpufoujbm.")
    scrolltext("[You didn\'t understand what the stranger said.]")
  else
    if not scanMoves({["Calm Mind"] = true, ["Nasty Plot"] = true, ["Quiver Dance"] = true, ["Swords Dance"] = true, ["Bulk Up"] = true, ["Dragon Dance"] = true}) then
      scrolltext("[The stranger takes a look at you.]")
      scrolltext("Ml Calm Mind, Quiver Dance, Swords Dance, Bulk Up, Nasty Plot, Dragon Dance.")
      scrolltext("[You deduce that the stranger won\'t battle you if you have those moves.]")
    else
      scrolltext("Zpv nbz ibwf efgfbufe nz cspuifst, cvu J xpo\'u mptf!")
      scrolltext("Zpv nbz bcvtf uif evnc AI, cvu hppe mvdl!")
      scrolltext("[The stranger attacks!]")
      local pokelist = game.Workspace.HardFight3.PossiblePokemon:GetChildren()
      for i = 1, 6 do
        local selected = math.random(#pokelist)
        local selecpoke = pokelist[selected]
        local pokeclone = selecpoke:Clone()
        pokeclone.PartyPosition.Value = i
        pokeclone.Parent = p.OppPokemon
        table.remove(pokelist, selected)
      end
      local blah = _G.BattleInitiate("/_/", "", "Vomvdlz", "Opu tuspoh fopvhi", "Inside")
      repeat
        wait()
      until blah ~= nil
      if blah == "Win" then
        scrolltext("J\'n hjwjoh zpv b Pachirisu.")
        scrolltext("[Even though it\'s still gibberish, you can tell that it wants to give you a Pachirisu.]")
        scrolltext("[Accept the Pachirisu?]", true)
        sayyes = speech.Parent.popup.Yes.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
    
    speech.Parent.popup.Yes.Visible = false
    speech.Parent.popup.Visible = false
    speech.Parent.popup.No.Visible = false
    speech.Parent.Next.Visible = true
    local prisoner = _G.Create(string.reverse("usirihcaP"), game.Lighting, 30, true)
    if #p.PokemonParty:GetChildren() < 6 then
      Math:Change(prisoner.PartyPosition, #p.PokemonParty:GetChildren() + 1)
      Math:ParentChange(prisoner, p.PokemonParty)
      scrolltext(prisoner.Name .. " was added to the Party.")
    else
      local newbox, number = findbox()
      if newbox ~= false then
        scrolltext(prisoner.Name .. " was sent to " .. newbox .. ".")
        Math:Change(prisoner.PartyPosition, number)
        Math:ParentChange(prisoner, p.PC[newbox])
      else
        scrolltext("You have no room for more Pokemon.")
      end
    end
  end
)
        sayno = speech.Parent.popup.No.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
    
    speech.Parent.Next.Visible = true
    speech.Parent.popup.Yes.Visible = false
    speech.Parent.popup.Visible = false
    speech.Parent.popup.No.Visible = false
    scrolltext("[You can rebattle this entity.]")
  end
)
        p.Character.Humanoid.WalkSpeed = 0
        speech.Parent.popup.Yes.Visible = true
        speech.Parent.popup.Visible = true
        speech.Parent.popup.No.Visible = true
        menu.Visible = false
      else
        if blah == "Lose" then
          healafterbattle()
          script.Parent.Main.TeleportScreen.Visible = true
          p.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Anchored = true
          local area = "Viridian City"
          game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.Internal.movePlayer:FireServer(locations[area] + Vector3.new(0, 5, 0))
          local hit, pos = nil, nil
          repeat
            repeat
              local ray = Ray.new(p.Character.Torso.Position, Vector3.new(0, -1, 0).unit * 10)
              local hit, pos = workspace:FindPartOnRay(ray, p.Character)
              wait(0.25)
            until hit
          until game.Workspace.WhitedOut:FindFirstChild(area)
          p.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Anchored = false
          script.Parent.Main.TeleportScreen.Visible = false
          wait(0.05)
        end
      end
    end
  end
end
}

BattleTower = {1; 
Events = {[1] = function(model)
  
  bow(model)
  scrolltext("Welcome to the Battle Tower, where you do 3v3 battles!")
  scrolltext("You\'ll pick 3 Pokemon from your party, and then you will battle 5 random trainers in a row.")
  scrolltext("If you win, you get Battle Points, or BP, which can be be used to buy a variety of prizes!")
  scrolltext("Last but not least, you cannot use certain Pokemon in the Battle Tower, nor can you use items.")
  scrolltext("Talk to me again if you want to participate!")
  _G.progress.BattleTower = 2
end
, [2] = function(model)
  
  bow(model)
  scrolltext("Do you want to participate in the Battle Tower? Your current streak is " .. dehash(Streak) .. ".", true)
  local OriginalParty = p.PokemonParty
  sayyes = speech.Parent.popup.Yes.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
    
    speech.Parent.popup.Yes.Visible = false
    speech.Parent.popup.Visible = false
    speech.Parent.popup.No.Visible = false
    speech.Parent.Next.Visible = true
    if #p.PokemonParty:GetChildren() >= 3 then
      scrolltext("Pick 3 Pokemon that you will use at the Battle Tower.")
      scrolltext("The Pokemon that you battle will match the highest level of the Pokemon you select.")
      local Done, Poke1, Poke2, Poke3 = _G.BattleTowerSelectPoke()
      repeat
        wait()
      until Done
      if Done == "Close" then
        scrolltext("We hope to see you again.")
      else
        OriginalParty.Name = "PokemonParty2"
        local lose = false
        local newFolder = Instance.new("Folder", p)
        newFolder.Name = "PokemonParty"
        local Pokemon1 = Poke1:Clone()
        local Pokemon2 = Poke2:Clone()
        local Pokemon3 = Poke3:Clone()
        Pokemon1.PartyPosition.Value = 1
        Pokemon1.Parent = newFolder
        Pokemon2.PartyPosition.Value = 2
        Pokemon2.Parent = newFolder
        Pokemon3.PartyPosition.Value = 3
        Pokemon3.Parent = newFolder
        scrolltext("The Pokemon you selected are " .. nickname(Poke1) .. ", " .. nickname(Poke2) .. ", and " .. nickname(Poke3) .. "!")
        scrolltext("Let\'s start! :3")
        for num = 1, 5 do
          local randtrainer = trainers[math.random(1, #trainers)]
          local randname = names[math.random(1, #names)]
          local Poke1, Poke2, Poke3 = _G.GetBattleTowerTeam(dehash(Streak))
          _G.Create(Poke1, p.OppPokemon, findhighestlevel(), true, true)
          _G.Create(Poke2, p.OppPokemon, findhighestlevel(), true, true)
          _G.Create(Poke3, p.OppPokemon, findhighestlevel(), true, true)
          local blah = _G.BattleInitiate(randtrainer, randname, "I am Trainer " .. num .. ".", "You beat " .. num - 1 .. " Trainers.", BattleGrounds[math.random(#BattleGrounds)], "Wow.")
          repeat
            wait()
          until blah ~= nil
          p.Character.Humanoid.WalkSpeed = 0
          healafterbattle()
          if blah == "Win" then
            blah = nil
            scrolltext("Nice!")
          else
            if blah == "Lose" then
              blah = nil
              lose = true
              break
            end
          end
        end
        do
          newFolder:Destroy()
          OriginalParty.Name = "PokemonParty"
          if lose == true then
            scrolltext("You lost. Better luck next time.")
            scrolltext("Streak reset to 0.")
            local Streak = hash(0)
            lose = true
          else
            do
              do
                do
                  local OS = dehash(Streak)
                  Streak = hash(dehash(Streak) + 1)
                  scrolltext("Good job on winning! You\'re now on a " .. dehash(Streak) .. " Streak !")
                  scrolltext("For winning, you get " .. OS + 2 .. " BP!")
                  Math:Change(p.BP, hash(dehash(p.BP.Value) + OS + 2))
                  p.Character.Humanoid.WalkSpeed = 16
                  scrolltext("Sorry, you need 3 Pokemon in your party to partake in the Battle Tower.")
                end
              end
            end
          end
        end
      end
    end
  end
)
  sayno = speech.Parent.popup.No.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
    
    speech.Parent.Next.Visible = true
    speech.Parent.popup.Yes.Visible = false
    speech.Parent.popup.Visible = false
    speech.Parent.popup.No.Visible = false
    scrolltext("We hope to see you again.")
  end
)
  p.Character.Humanoid.WalkSpeed = 0
  speech.Parent.popup.Yes.Visible = true
  speech.Parent.popup.Visible = true
  speech.Parent.popup.No.Visible = true
  menu.Visible = false
end
}
}
,

HardFight4 = {1; 
Events = {[1] = function()
  
  if not p.Badges:FindFirstChild("8") then
    scrolltext("Zpv ibwf qpufoujbm.")
    scrolltext("[You didn\'t understand what the stranger said.]")
  else
    scrolltext("Zpv... gpvoe nf... Op jufnt bmmpxfe.")
    scrolltext("Jg zpv\'sf sfbmmz tuspoh, zpv dbo cfbu nf xjuipvu vtjoh jufnt.")
    scrolltext("[You have a feeling you can\'t use items against this stranger.]")
    scrolltext("[The stranger attacks!]")
    local pokelist = game.Workspace.HardFight4.PossiblePokemon:GetChildren()
    for i = 1, 6 do
      local selected = math.random(#pokelist)
      local selecpoke = pokelist[selected]
      local pokeclone = selecpoke:Clone()
      pokeclone.PartyPosition.Value = i
      pokeclone.Parent = p.OppPokemon
      table.remove(pokelist, selected)
    end
    local blah = _G.BattleInitiate("Dzuifvs", "", "Vomvdlz", "Opu tuspoh fopvhi", "Inside", "Wow")
    repeat
      wait()
    until blah ~= nil
    if blah == "Win" then
      scrolltext("J xjmm hjwf zpv Dark Pulse TM.")
      scrolltext("[Even though it\'s still gibberish, you can tell that it\'s going to give you the TM Dark Pulse.")
      scrolltext("<You Got TM Dark Pulse!>")
      Math:FuncAddItem("Dark Pulse", p.Bag.TMs, 1)
      scrolltext("[The entity tries its hardest to speak the next few words...]")
      scrolltext("Me battle no more.")
      _G.progress.HardFight4 = 2
    else
      if blah == "Lose" then
        healafterbattle()
        script.Parent.Main.TeleportScreen.Visible = true
        p.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Anchored = true
        local area = "Mysterious Grotto"
        game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.Internal.movePlayer:FireServer(locations[area] + Vector3.new(0, 5, 0))
        local hit, pos = nil, nil
        repeat
          repeat
            local ray = Ray.new(p.Character.Torso.Position, Vector3.new(0, -1, 0).unit * 10)
            local hit, pos = workspace:FindPartOnRay(ray, p.Character)
            wait(0.25)
          until hit
        until game.Workspace.WhitedOut:FindFirstChild(area)
        p.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Anchored = false
        script.Parent.Main.TeleportScreen.Visible = false
        wait(0.05)
      end
    end
  end
end
, [2] = function()
  
  scrolltext("[Silence.]")
end
}
}
, 
RestTM = {1; 
Events = {[1] = function()
  
  scrolltext("Zzzz... huh?")

  scrolltext("Rest is a move, that when used, heals your Pokemon. But it causes your Pokemon to sleep.")

  _G.progress.RestTM = 2
end

BrockCave = {1; 
Events = {[1] = function()
  
  local TMaward = "Rock Slide"
  local trainer = "Brock"
  local modal = "BrockCave"
  for _,pokemon in ipairs(workspace[modal].Pokemon:GetChildren()) do
    pokemon:Clone().Parent = p.OppPokemon
  end
  scrolltext("I am " .. trainer .. "!")
  scrolltext("I have been training to rebattle you...")
  scrolltext("I won\'t lose this time! Good luck!")
  local blah = _G.BattleInitiate(trainer, "", "...", "...", "Cave")
  repeat
    wait()
  until blah ~= nil
  if blah == "Win" then
    scrolltext("You are really too strong...")
    if not p.Bag.TMs:FindFirstChild(TMaward) then
      scrolltext("I will give you TM " .. TMaward .. ".")
      Math:FuncAddItem(TMaward, p.Bag.TMs, 1)
      scrolltext("<You got TM " .. TMaward .. "!>")
      scrolltext("I\'ll battle you again, or you can wait tomorrow... another person will be here.")
    end
  else
    if blah == "Lose" then
      healafterbattle()
      script.Parent.Main.TeleportScreen.Visible = true
      p.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Anchored = true
      local area = "Elegant Valley"
      game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.Internal.movePlayer:FireServer(locations[area] + Vector3.new(0, 5, 0))
      local hit, pos = nil, nil
      repeat
        repeat
          local ray = Ray.new(p.Character.Torso.Position, Vector3.new(0, -1, 0).unit * 10)
          local hit, pos = workspace:FindPartOnRay(ray, p.Character)
          wait(0.25)
        until hit
      until game.Workspace.WhitedOut:FindFirstChild(area)
      p.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Anchored = false
      script.Parent.Main.TeleportScreen.Visible = false
      wait(0.05)
    end
  end
end
}
}
,

Events = {[1] = function()
  
  local TMaward = "Swords Dance"
  local trainer = "Whitney"
  for _,pokemon in ipairs(workspace[trainer].Pokemon:GetChildren()) do
    pokemon:Clone().Parent = p.OppPokemon
  end
  scrolltext("I am " .. trainer .. "!")
  scrolltext("I come from Johto, looking to battle strong trainers!")
  scrolltext("Are you strong? Let\'s see!")
  local blah = _G.BattleInitiate(trainer, "", "...", "...", "Cave")
  repeat
    wait()
  until blah ~= nil
  if blah == "Win" then
    scrolltext("You are really strong...")
    if not p.Bag.TMs:FindFirstChild(TMaward) then
      scrolltext("I will give you TM " .. TMaward .. ".")
      Math:FuncAddItem(TMaward, p.Bag.TMs, 1)
      scrolltext("<You got TM " .. TMaward .. "!>")
      scrolltext("I\'ll battle you again, or you can wait tomorrow... another person will be here.")
    end
  else
    if blah == "Lose" then
      healafterbattle()
      script.Parent.Main.TeleportScreen.Visible = true
      p.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Anchored = true
      local area = "Elegant Valley"
      game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.Internal.movePlayer:FireServer(locations[area] + Vector3.new(0, 5, 0))
      local hit, pos = nil, nil
      repeat
        repeat
          local ray = Ray.new(p.Character.Torso.Position, Vector3.new(0, -1, 0).unit * 10)
          local hit, pos = workspace:FindPartOnRay(ray, p.Character)
          wait(0.25)
        until hit
      until game.Workspace.WhitedOut:FindFirstChild(area)
      p.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Anchored = false
      script.Parent.Main.TeleportScreen.Visible = false
      wait(0.05)
    end
  end
end
}
}
,
