NatureChanger = {1; 
Events = {[1] = function(model)
  
  laugh(model)
  scrolltext("Hey, person. I am mad scientist! It\'s so cool! Haha.")
  scrolltext("I am working on something revolutionary... I can change a Pokemon\'s personality.")
  scrolltext("With this experiment, you can change one of your Pokemon\'s nature to whatever you want.")
  scrolltext("If you didn\'t know, a Pokemon\'s nature affects the inherent stats of a Pokemon.")
  if dehash(p.Money.Value) >= 100000 then
    scrolltext("Since the material for this experiment is kind of expensive, it costs $100000 Pokedollars.", true)
    sayyes = speech.Parent.popup.Yes.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
    
    speech.Parent.popup.Yes.Visible = false
    speech.Parent.popup.Visible = false
    speech.Parent.popup.No.Visible = false
    speech.Parent.Next.Visible = true
    scrolltext("Please pick a Pokemon to undergo experimentation.")
    _G.NatureScientist()
  end
)
    sayno = speech.Parent.popup.No.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
    
    speech.Parent.Next.Visible = true
    speech.Parent.popup.Yes.Visible = false
    speech.Parent.popup.Visible = false
    speech.Parent.popup.No.Visible = false
    scrolltext("Don\'t worry, I\'ll be here forever, as I invented a food that makes you immortal!")
  end
)
    p.Character.Humanoid.WalkSpeed = 0
    speech.Parent.popup.Yes.Visible = true
    speech.Parent.popup.Visible = true
    speech.Parent.popup.No.Visible = true
    speech.Parent.Next.Visible = false
    menu.Visible = false
  else
    scrolltext("You don\'t have enough Pokedollars. You need at least $100000 Pokedollars.")
    speech.Parent.Next.Visible = true
  end
end
}
}
, 
DruddigonEvent = {1; 
Events = {[1] = function(model)
  
  cheer(model)
  scrolltext("We\'ve hit 100,000 members in the Project: Pokemon Community group!")
  scrolltext("Do you want a free Shiny Druddigon?!")
  if #p.PokemonParty:GetChildren() < 6 then
    scrolltext("Get a free Shiny Druddigon?", true)
    sayyes = speech.Parent.popup.Yes.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
    
    speech.Parent.popup.Yes.Visible = false
    speech.Parent.popup.Visible = false
    speech.Parent.popup.No.Visible = false
    speech.Parent.Next.Visible = true
    local judgedrudd = _G.Create("Druddigon", p.PokemonParty, 20, true)
    game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.Pokemon.DruddigonHack:InvokeServer(judgedrudd)
    scrolltext("<You got a free Lvl. 20 Shiny Druddigon!>")
    Pokedex:Create("Druddigon", true)
    _G.progress.DruddigonEvent = 2
    choice = true
  end
)
    sayno = speech.Parent.popup.No.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
    
    speech.Parent.Next.Visible = true
    speech.Parent.popup.Yes.Visible = false
    speech.Parent.popup.Visible = false
    speech.Parent.popup.No.Visible = false
    point(model)
    scrolltext("This will be the only time to get Druddigon, so you better get it!")
    choice = true
  end
)
    p.Character.Humanoid.WalkSpeed = 0
    speech.Parent.popup.Yes.Visible = true
    speech.Parent.popup.Visible = true
    speech.Parent.popup.No.Visible = true
    speech.Parent.Next.Visible = false
    menu.Visible = false
    repeat
      wait()
    until choice
  else
    scrolltext("Nevermind, you have a full party! Come back when you don\'t have a full party!")
  end
end
, [2] = function()
  
  scrolltext("Thanks for your support.")
end
}
}

MagikarpSeller = {1; 
Events = {[1] = function()
  
  scrolltext("Hey, kid, want a rare Pokemon?")
  scrolltext("Only 500 Pokedollars... it\'s a steal.")
  local choice = nil
  if #p.PokemonParty:GetChildren() < 6 and dehash(p.Money.Value) >= 500 then
    scrolltext("Buy rare Pokemon for 500 Pokedollars?", true)
    sayyes = speech.Parent.popup.Yes.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
    
    speech.Parent.popup.Yes.Visible = false
    speech.Parent.popup.Visible = false
    speech.Parent.popup.No.Visible = false
    speech.Parent.Next.Visible = true
    local judgedrudd = _G.Create("Magikarp", p.PokemonParty, 5, true)
    game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.Pokemon.MagikarpHack:InvokeServer(judgedrudd)
    scrolltext("<You got a lvl 5. Magikarp!>")
    Pokedex:Create("Magikarp", true)
    _G.progress.MagikarpSeller = 2
    choice = true
  end
)
    sayno = speech.Parent.popup.No.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
    
    speech.Parent.Next.Visible = true
    speech.Parent.popup.Yes.Visible = false
    speech.Parent.popup.Visible = false
    speech.Parent.popup.No.Visible = false
    scrolltext("Eh... your loss.")
    choice = true
  end
)
    p.Character.Humanoid.WalkSpeed = 0
    speech.Parent.popup.Yes.Visible = true
    speech.Parent.popup.Visible = true
    speech.Parent.popup.No.Visible = true
    speech.Parent.Next.Visible = false
    menu.Visible = false
    repeat
      wait()
    until choice
  else
    scrolltext("You either have a full party or you cannot afford this rare Pokemon.")
  end
end
, [2] = function()
  
  scrolltext("Sorry, no refunds.")
end
}
}
}
  clearopp = function()
  
  for i,v in ipairs(p.OppPokemon:GetChildren()) do
    v:Destroy()
  end
end

  deb = false
  game:GetService("RunService").Stepped:connect(function()
  
  local Targeto = mouse.Target
  if deb == false then
    if Targeto and Targeto.Parent and (Targeto.Parent:FindFirstChild("Line1") or Targeto.Parent:FindFirstChild("Event")) and Targeto.Position - p.Character.Torso.Position.magnitude <= 10 and battle.Visible == false then
      talkinfo.Position = UDim2.new(0, mouse.X + 10, 0, mouse.Y - 26)
      talkinfo.Visible = true
    else
      talkinfo.Visible = false
    end
  end
end
)
  mouse.Button1Down:connect(function()
  
  local Targeto = mouse.Target
  if Targeto ~= nil and deb == false and menu.Scroll.Title.Text ~= "Menu <" and (not main:FindFirstChild("ContinueScreen") or not main:FindFirstChild("ContinueScreen") or main:FindFirstChild("ContinueScreen").Visible == false) then
    if Targeto.Name == "DetectArea" then
      mouse.TargetFilter = Targeto
    end
    deb = true
    if Targeto.Position - p.Character.Torso.Position.magnitude <= 10 and p.PlayerGui.DialogTalk.TalkB.Visible == false and p.PlayerGui.DialogTalk.Cancel.Visible == false and trial == false and p.PlayerGui.Main.Taxi.Visible == false and p.PlayerGui.Main.BlackScreen.Visible == false then
      local talkblah = Targeto
      local model = talkblah.Parent
      if model:FindFirstChild("Event") then
        p.Character.Humanoid.WalkSpeed = 0
        local oldpos = nil
        if model:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
          oldpos = turnModel(model)
        end
        if _G.progress[model.Name] ~= nil then
          events[model.Name].Events[_G.progress[model.Name]](model)
        else
          if _G.progress[model.Name] == nil then
            _G.progress[model.Name] = 1
            events[model.Name].Events[1](model)
          else
            if _G.progress == nil then
              _G.progress = {}
              _G.progress[model.Name] = 1
              events[model.Name].Events[1](model)
            end
          end
        end
        if oldpos then
          returnModel(model, oldpos)
        end
      else
        do
          if model:FindFirstChild("Line1") then
            local amount = 0
            local oldposition = nil
            if model:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
              p.Character.Humanoid.WalkSpeed = 0
              oldposition = turnModel(model)
            end
            for _,lines in ipairs(model:GetChildren()) do
              if lines.Name:match("Line") then
                amount = amount + 1
              end
            end
            for i = 1, amount do
              local ster = model["Line" .. i].Value
              scrolltext(ster)
            end
            if oldposition then
              returnModel(model, oldposition)
            end
            p.Character.Humanoid.WalkSpeed = 16
          end
          do
            deb = false
          end
        end
      end
    end
  end
end
)
  swagger = false
  for i,v in ipairs(game.Workspace.Trainers:GetChildren()) do
    if v:FindFirstChild("DetectArea") then
      getfenv()["Trainer" .. i] = v.DetectArea.Touched:connect(function(part)
  
  local model = v
  -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC37: Unhandled construct in 'MakeBoolean' P1

  if part.Parent ~= nil and menu.Scroll.Title.Text ~= "Menu <" and part.Parent == p.Character and swagger == false and defeated[model.Trainer.Value] ~= true and p.InBattle.Value == false and #p.PokemonParty:GetChildren() > 0 then
    swagger = true
    p.InBattle.Value = true
    if not model.Name:match("Zombie") then
      for num,stuff in ipairs(model.Pokemon:GetChildren()) do
        stuff:Clone().Parent = p.OppPokemon
      end
    else
      do
        for num,stuff in ipairs(model.Pokemon:GetChildren()) do
          _G.Create(stuff.Name, p.OppPokemon, math.min(100, findhighestlevel() + math.random(1, 3)), true)
        end
        do
          scrolltext(model.TalkLine.Value)
          menu.Visible = false
          local blah = _G.BattleInitiate(model.Name, model.Trainer.Value, model.LoseLine.Value, model.WinLine.Value, model.Environment.Value)
          repeat
            wait()
          until blah ~= nil
          if blah == "Win" then
            defeated[model.Trainer.Value] = true
            local moneyGained = game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.Internal.trainerGetMoney:InvokeServer(model)
            scrolltext("You have gained $" .. moneyGained .. " for winning!")
            swagger = false
            getfenv()["Trainer" .. i]:disconnect()
          else
            do
              if blah == "Lose" then
                healafterbattle()
                script.Parent.Main.TeleportScreen.Visible = true
                p.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Anchored = true
                local area = p.LastCenter.Value
                game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.Internal.movePlayer:FireServer(locations[area] + Vector3.new(0, 5, 0))
                local hit, pos = nil, nil
                repeat
                  repeat
                    local ray = Ray.new(p.Character.Torso.Position, Vector3.new(0, -1, 0).unit * 10)
                    local hit, pos = workspace:FindPartOnRay(ray, p.Character)
                    wait(0.25)
                  until hit
                until game.Workspace.WhitedOut:FindFirstChild(area)
                p.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Anchored = false
                script.Parent.Main.TeleportScreen.Visible = false
                swagger = false
              end
              do
                if swagger ~= true or p.InBattle.Value ~= false or defeated[model.Trainer.Value] == true then
                end
              end
            end
          end
        end
      end
    end
  end
end
)
    else
      if not v:FindFirstChild("DetectArea") then
        v.ChildAdded:connect(function(obj)
  
  if obj.Name == "DetectArea" then
    getfenv()["Trainer" .. i] = v.DetectArea.Touched:connect(function(part)
    
    local model = v
    -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC37: Unhandled construct in 'MakeBoolean' P1

    if part.Parent ~= nil and menu.Scroll.Title.Text ~= "Menu <" and part.Parent == p.Character and swagger == false and defeated[model.Trainer.Value] ~= true and p.InBattle.Value == false and #p.PokemonParty:GetChildren() > 0 then
      swagger = true
      p.InBattle.Value = true
      if not model.Name:match("Zombie") then
        for num,stuff in ipairs(model.Pokemon:GetChildren()) do
          stuff:Clone().Parent = p.OppPokemon
        end
      else
        do
          for num,stuff in ipairs(model.Pokemon:GetChildren()) do
            _G.Create(stuff.Name, p.OppPokemon, math.min(100, findhighestlevel() + math.random(1, 3)), true)
          end
          do
            scrolltext(model.TalkLine.Value)
            menu.Visible = false
            local blah = _G.BattleInitiate(model.Name, model.Trainer.Value, model.LoseLine.Value, model.WinLine.Value, model.Environment.Value)
            repeat
              wait()
            until blah ~= nil
            if blah == "Win" then
              defeated[model.Trainer.Value] = true
              local valget = model.Money.Value
              if p:IsInGroup(1161496) then
                valget = math.floor(valget * 1.15)
              end
              if p.MoreneyVIP.Value == true and p.Badges:FindFirstChild("Champ") then
                valget = valget * 3
              else
                if p.MoreneyVIP.Value == true then
                  valget = valget * 2
                end
              end
              Math:Change(p.Money, valget)
              scrolltext("You have gained $" .. valget .. " for winning!")
              swagger = false
              getfenv()["Trainer" .. i]:disconnect()
            else
              do
                if blah == "Lose" then
                  healafterbattle()
                  script.Parent.Main.TeleportScreen.Visible = true
                  p.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Anchored = true
                  local area = p.LastCenter.Value
                  game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.Internal.movePlayer:FireServer(locations[area] + Vector3.new(0, 5, 0))
                  local hit, pos = nil, nil
                  repeat
                    repeat
                      local ray = Ray.new(p.Character.Torso.Position, Vector3.new(0, -1, 0).unit * 10)
                      local hit, pos = workspace:FindPartOnRay(ray, p.Character)
                      wait(0.25)
                    until hit
                  until game.Workspace.WhitedOut:FindFirstChild(area)
                  p.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Anchored = false
                  script.Parent.Main.TeleportScreen.Visible = false
                  swagger = false
                end
                do
                  if swagger ~= true or p.InBattle.Value ~= false or defeated[model.Trainer.Value] == true then
                  end
                end
              end
            end
          end
        end
      end
    end
  end
)
  end
end
)
      end
    end
  end
end

================================================================================
-- FILE: StarterGui/_G.Trade.local.lua
================================================================================

-- params : ...

repeat
  wait()
until game.Players.LocalPlayer
p = game.Players.LocalPlayer
gui = script.Parent.Main
selected = false
deb = false
createpokedex = function(pokemon, nd)
  
  local value = Instance.new("StringValue")
  value.Name = _G.Pokemon[pokemon].Pokedex
  value.Value = pokemon
  local caught = Instance.new("BoolValue", value)
  caught.Name = "Caught"
  if nd ~= nil then
    caught.Value = true
  end
  value.Parent = p.Pokedex
end

alreadypokedex = function(pokemon)
  
  if p.Pokedex:FindFirstChild(_G.Pokemon[pokemon].Pokedex) then
    return true
  else
    return false
  end
end

local Pokedex = require(game.ReplicatedStorage.Functions.Pokedex)
createnewvalues = function(boolvalue)
  
  if boolvalue == false and script.Parent.Main.BattleScene.Visible == false then
    script.Parent.Main.BlackScreen.Visible = false
  end
end

invisibleguis = function(thing)
  
  for i = 1, 6 do
    thing["Pokemon" .. i].Visible = false
  end
end

sound = function(create)
  
  if create == true then
    s = Instance.new("Sound", gui)
    s.SoundId = "rbxassetid://172784223"
    s:Play()
  else
    s:Stop()
    s:Destroy()
  end
end

disconnecteverything = function()
  
  for i = 1, 6 do
    if getfenv()["Switch" .. i] then
      getfenv()["Switch" .. i]:disconnect()
    end
    if getfenv()["Select" .. i] then
      getfenv()["Select" .. i]:disconnect()
    end
  end
  if receiving then
    receiving:disconnect()
  end
  if cancel then
    cancel:disconnect()
  end
  if trade then
    trade:disconnect()
  end
end

fadeytext = function(text)
  
  gui.MessageThing.Text = text
  script.Parent.Main.BlackScreen.Visible = true
  for i = 1, 0, -0.05 do
    gui.MessageThing.TextTransparency = i
    gui.MessageThing.TextStrokeTransparency = i
    wait(0.05)
  end
  wait(0.5)
  for i = 0, 1, 0.05 do
    gui.MessageThing.TextTransparency = i
    gui.MessageThing.TextStrokeTransparency = i
    wait(0.05)
  end
  gui.MessageThing.TextTransparency = 1
  gui.MessageThing.TextStrokeTransparency = 1
end

-- FILE: StarterGui/_G.TrainerCard.local.lua

-- params : ...

repeat
  wait()
until game.Players.LocalPlayer
wait(3)
p = game.Players.LocalPlayer
hash = function(num)
  
  return (num + 4) * 8
end

dehash = function(num)
  
  return (num - 32) / 8
end

pokeinfo = function(player)
  
  local num = 0
  for i,v in ipairs(player.Pokedex:GetChildren()) do
    if v.Caught.Value == true then
      num = num + 1
    end
  end
  return num
end

_G.TrainerCard = function(player)
  
  player:WaitForChild("Badges")
  p.PlayerGui.Main.BlackScreen.TrainerCard.MiddlePart.TrainerTitle.Text = "         Name: " .. player.Name
  p.PlayerGui.Main.BlackScreen.TrainerCard.MiddlePart.MoneyTitle.Text = "         Money: $" .. dehash(player.Money.Value)
  p.PlayerGui.Main.BlackScreen.TrainerCard.MiddlePart.PokedexTitle.Text = "         Pokedex: " .. pokeinfo(player)
  p.PlayerGui.Main.BlackScreen.TrainerCard.MiddlePart.RatedTitle.Text = "         Rated: " .. game.ReplicatedStorage.RatedRankings:InvokeServer(player.userId)
  p.PlayerGui.Main.BlackScreen.TrainerCard.MiddlePart.RankTitle.Text = "         Rank: " .. (player:GetRoleInGroup(1161496) ~= "Guest" and type(player:GetRoleInGroup(1161496)) ~= "boolean" and player:GetRoleInGroup(1161496) or "No Rank")
  if string.sub(string.lower(player.Name), 1, 6) == "guest " or player.Name == "Player1" then
    p.PlayerGui.Main.BlackScreen.TrainerCard.MiddlePart.TImage.Image = "http://www.roblox.com/Thumbs/Avatar.ashx?x=200&y=200&Format=Png&username=ROBLOX"
  else
    p.PlayerGui.Main.BlackScreen.TrainerCard.MiddlePart.TImage.Image = "http://www.roblox.com/Thumbs/Avatar.ashx?x=200&y=200&Format=Png&username=" .. player.Name
  end
  for i,v in ipairs(p.PlayerGui.Main.BlackScreen.TrainerCard.Badges:GetChildren()) do
    v.Visible = false
  end
  for i,v in ipairs(player.Badges:GetChildren()) do
    if p.PlayerGui.Main.BlackScreen.TrainerCard.Badges:FindFirstChild("Badge" .. v.Name) then
      p.PlayerGui.Main.BlackScreen.TrainerCard.Badges["Badge" .. v.Name].Image = _G.Sprites.Badges[v.Name]
      p.PlayerGui.Main.BlackScreen.TrainerCard.Badges["Badge" .. v.Name].Visible = true
    end
  end
  for i,v in ipairs(p.PlayerGui.Main.BlackScreen.TrainerCard.BotBlue:GetChildren()) do
    v.Visible = false
  end
  for i,v in ipairs(player.PokemonParty:GetChildren()) do
    if v.PartyPosition.Value <= 6 then
      if v.Shiny.Value ~= true or not _G.Pokemon[v.Name].Sprites.SF then
        do
          p.PlayerGui.Main.BlackScreen.TrainerCard.BotBlue["Pokemon" .. v.PartyPosition.Value].Image = _G.Pokemon[v.Name].Sprites.Front
          p.PlayerGui.Main.BlackScreen.TrainerCard.BotBlue["Pokemon" .. v.PartyPosition.Value].Visible = true
          -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC247: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_THEN_STMT

          -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC247: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_STMT

          -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC247: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_THEN_STMT

          -- DECOMPILER ERROR at PC247: LeaveBlock: unexpected jumping out IF_STMT

        end
      end
    end
  end
  p.PlayerGui.Main.BlackScreen.TrainerCard.Visible = true
  p.PlayerGui.Main.BlackScreen.Visible = true
  close = p.PlayerGui.Main.BlackScreen.TrainerCard.Close.MouseButton1Down:connect(function()
    
    p.PlayerGui.Main.BlackScreen.TrainerCard.Visible = false
    p.PlayerGui.Main.BlackScreen.Visible = p.InBattle.Value
    close:disconnect()
  end
)
end

yieldfor = function(obj, name)
  
  if obj:FindFirstChild(name) then
    return obj[name]
  end
  repeat
    obj.ChildAdded:wait()
  until obj:FindFirstChild(name)
  return obj[name]
end

repeat
  wait()
until game.Players.LocalPlayer
local p = game.Players.LocalPlayer
if not p.Character then
  local c = p.CharacterAdded:wait()
end
local h = yieldfor(c, "Humanoid")
hash = function(num)
  
  return (num + 4) * 8
end

dehash = function(num)
  
  return (num - 32) / 8
end

healafterbattle = function()
  
  Battle:Heal()
end

findaveragelevel = function()
  
  local totallvl = 0
  local party = p.PokemonParty:GetChildren()
  for i,v in ipairs(party) do
    totallvl = totallvl + v.Lvl.Value
  end
  return math.floor((totallvl) / #party)
end

lowestlevel = function()
  
  local lowestlvl = 100
  local party = p.PokemonParty:GetChildren()
  for i,v in ipairs(party) do
    if v.Lvl.Value < lowestlvl then
      lowestlvl = v.Lvl.Value
    end
  end
  return lowestlvl
end

local main = script.Parent:WaitForChild("Main")
fadeytext = function(text)
  
  main.MessageThing.Text = text
  for i = 1, 0, -0.05 do
    main.MessageThing.TextTransparency = i
    main.MessageThing.TextStrokeTransparency = i
    wait(0.05)
  end
  wait(0.5)
  for i = 0, 1, 0.05 do
    main.MessageThing.TextTransparency = i
    main.MessageThing.TextStrokeTransparency = i
    wait(0.05)
  end
  main.MessageThing.TextTransparency = 1
  main.MessageThing.TextStrokeTransparency = 1
end

checkParty = function(Pokemon)
  
  for i,v in ipairs(p.PokemonParty:GetChildren()) do
    if v.Name == Pokemon then
      return true
    end
  end
  return false
end

victiniallowed = {Chansey = true, Blissey = true, Exeggcute = true, Buneary = true, Exeggutor = true, Lopunny = true, Togepi = true, Togetic = true, Togekiss = true}
checkPokemon = function(t)
  
  for i,v in ipairs(p.PokemonParty:GetChildren()) do
    if victiniallowed[v.Name] then
      return true
    end
  end
  return false
end

local victiniareas = {["Route 1"] = true, ["Seafoam Cave"] = true, ["Route 5"] = true}
local rotomareas = {["Viridian Forest"] = true, ["Mount Cinnabar"] = true, ["Route 11"] = true}
rotomtype = function()
  
  local ele = false
  local gost = false
  for i,v in ipairs(p.PokemonParty:GetChildren()) do
    for _,typez in pairs(_G.Pokemon[v.Name].Type) do
      if typez == "Electric" then
        ele = true
      else
        if typez == "Ghost" then
          gost = true
        end
      end
    end
  end
  print(ele, gost)
  if ele and gost then
    return true
  else
    return false
  end
end

findpokemon = function(area)
  
  Instance.new("Folder", script.Parent.Main.animHold)
  local PowerEnabled = false
  if p.PokeBooster:FindFirstChild("Legendary") and p.PokeBooster:FindFirstChild("Legendary").Value > 0 then
    PowerEnabled = true
  end
  local legend = 800
  if PowerEnabled == true then
    legend = 400
  end
  if p.LegendaryVIP.Value == true then
    legend = 80
    if PowerEnabled == true then
      legend = 40
    end
  end
  legendchance = math.random(1, legend)
  local calc = math.random(1, 7)
  local whichstarter = math.random(1, 3)
  local mewchance = math.random(1, 130)
  local mewtwoevent = math.random(1, 1300)
  local gerbilchance = math.random(1, 800)
  local coollegendaries = math.random(1, 1800)
  if p.OtherLegendary.Value == true then
    coollegendaries = math.random(1, 200)
    gerbilchance = math.random(1, 80)
  end
  local latitwins = math.random(1, 1800)
  if p.OtherLegendary.Value == true then
    latitwins = math.random(1, 130)
  end
  local dayt = math.random(1, 2000)
  if p.OtherLegendary.Value == true then
    dayt = math.random(1, 200)
  end
  if p.LegendaryVIP.Value == true then
    mewtwoevent = math.random(1, 130)
  end
  local ponies = math.random(1, 1800)
  if p.LegendaryVIP.Value == true then
    ponies = math.random(1, 130)
  end
  if PowerEnabled then
    print("POWER ENABLED!")
    mewchance = math.random(1, 65)
    mewtwoevent = math.random(1, 650)
    gerbilchance = math.random(1, 400)
    coollegendaries = math.random(1, 900)
    if p.OtherLegendary.Value == true then
      coollegendaries = math.random(1, 100)
      gerbilchance = math.random(1, 50)
    end
    latitwins = math.random(1, 900)
    if p.OtherLegendary.Value == true then
      latitwins = math.random(1, 65)
    end
    dayt = math.random(1, 1000)
    if p.OtherLegendary.Value == true then
      dayt = math.random(1, 100)
    end
    if p.LegendaryVIP.Value == true then
      mewtwoevent = math.random(1, 65)
    end
    ponies = math.random(1, 450)
    if p.LegendaryVIP.Value == true then
      ponies = math.random(1, 65)
    end
  end
  local victini = math.random(1, 150)
  local newrare = math.random(1, game.ReplicatedStorage.Chance.Value)
  if p.LegendaryVIP.Value == true then
    newrare = math.random(1, math.ceil(game.ReplicatedStorage.Chance.Value / 3))
  end
  local swarm = math.random(1, 5)
  if area.Parent.Name == game.ReplicatedStorage.Mesprit.Value then
    local genechan = (math.random(1, 50))
    local pokemonget = nil
    if genechan == 20 then
      game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.Internal.RouletteOpening:FireServer(p.Name .. " has found a very rare Pokemon...", Color3.new(0.58039215686275, 0, 0.82745098039216))
      pokemonget = "initciV"
    else
      local chance = math.random(1, 3)
      local eventtab = {[1] = "ailesserC", [2] = "yhpanaM", [3] = "nimyahS"}
      pokemonget = eventtab[chance]
      game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.Internal.RouletteOpening:FireServer(p.Name .. " found the rare Pokemon!", Color3.new(1, 0, 0))
    end
    do
      game.ReplicatedStorage.GoogleAnalytics:FireServer("Found Legendary", pokemonget:reverse(), p.Name, 1)
      _G.Create(string.reverse(pokemonget), p.OppPokemon, findaveragelevel(), false)
      _G.InWild = true
      Math:Change(game.ReplicatedStorage.Mesprit, "")
      local blah = _G.BattleInitiate(nil, nil, "You have won the battle!", p.Name .. " has no Pokemon! " .. p.Name .. " whited out!", area.Name, nil, true)
      repeat
        wait()
      until blah ~= nil
      _G.InWild = false
      if blah == "Win" then
        wait(1.4)
        deb = false
        return 
      else
        if blah == "Lose" then
          healafterbattle()
          script.Parent.Main.TeleportScreen.Visible = true
          p.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Anchored = true
          local area = p.LastCenter.Value
          game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.Internal.movePlayer:FireServer(locations[area] + Vector3.new(0, 5, 0))
          local hit, pos = nil, nil
          repeat
            repeat
              local ray = Ray.new(p.Character.Torso.Position, Vector3.new(0, -1, 0).unit * 10)
              local hit, pos = workspace:FindPartOnRay(ray, p.Character)
              wait(0.25)
            until hit
          until game.Workspace.WhitedOut:FindFirstChild(area)
          p.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Anchored = false
          script.Parent.Main.TeleportScreen.Visible = false
          deb = false
        end
      end
      do
        if victini == 1 and area.Parent.Name == "DeoxysPatch" and checkParty("Lunatone") and checkParty("Solrock") and _G.InWild == false then
          _G.Create("Deoxys", p.OppPokemon, findaveragelevel(), false)
          _G.InWild = true
          Math:Change(game.ReplicatedStorage.Chance, math.min(game.ReplicatedStorage.Chance.Value + 100, 2000))
          fadeytext("Your Solrock and Lunatone were noticed by something!")
          fadeytext("Deoxys attacked!")
          game.ReplicatedStorage.GoogleAnalytics:FireServer("Found Legendary", "Deoxys", p.Name, 1)
          local blah = _G.BattleInitiate(nil, nil, "You have won the battle!", p.Name .. " has no Pokemon! " .. p.Name .. " whited out!", area.Name, nil, true)
          repeat
            wait()
          until blah ~= nil
          _G.InWild = false
          if blah == "Win" then
            wait(1.4)
            deb = false
            return 
          else
            if blah == "Lose" then
              healafterbattle()
              script.Parent.Main.TeleportScreen.Visible = true
              p.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Anchored = true
              local area = p.LastCenter.Value
              game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.Internal.movePlayer:FireServer(locations[area] + Vector3.new(0, 5, 0))
              local hit, pos = nil, nil
              repeat
                repeat
                  local ray = Ray.new(p.Character.Torso.Position, Vector3.new(0, -1, 0).unit * 10)
                  local hit, pos = workspace:FindPartOnRay(ray, p.Character)
                  wait(0.25)
                until hit
              until game.Workspace.WhitedOut:FindFirstChild(area)
              p.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Anchored = false
              script.Parent.Main.TeleportScreen.Visible = false
              deb = false
            end
          end
        else
          do
            if victini == 0 and rotomtype() and rotomareas[area.Parent.Name] then
              _G.Create("Rotom", p.OppPokemon, findaveragelevel(), false)
              _G.InWild = true
              Math:Change(game.ReplicatedStorage.Chance, math.min(game.ReplicatedStorage.Chance.Value + 50, 2000))
              fadeytext("Something is attracted by the electricity and spookiness of your Pokemon!")
              fadeytext("A wild Rotom appeared!")
              game.ReplicatedStorage.GoogleAnalytics:FireServer("Found Legendary", "Rotom", p.Name, 1)
              local blah = _G.BattleInitiate(nil, nil, "You have won the battle!", p.Name .. " has no Pokemon! " .. p.Name .. " whited out!", area.Name, nil, true)
              repeat

                      local hit, pos = workspace:FindPartOnRay(ray, p.Character)
                      wait(0.25)
                    until hit
                  until game.Workspace.WhitedOut:FindFirstChild(area)
                  p.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Anchored = false
                  script.Parent.Main.TeleportScreen.Visible = false
                  deb = false
                end
              end
            else
              do
                if swarm == 1 and area.Parent.Name == game.ReplicatedStorage.SwarmLocation.Value then
                  game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.Pokemon.swarmCheck:InvokeServer(game.ReplicatedStorage.SwarmPokemon.Value:reverse())
                  _G.Create(game.ReplicatedStorage.SwarmPokemon.Value:reverse(), p.OppPokemon, findaveragelevel(), false)
                  _G.InWild = true
                  local blah = _G.BattleInitiate(nil, nil, "You have won the battle!", p.Name .. " has no Pokemon! " .. p.Name .. " whited out!", area.Name, nil, true)
                  repeat
                    wait()
                  until blah ~= nil
                  _G.InWild = false
                  if blah == "Win" then
                    wait(1.4)
                    deb = false
                    return 
                  else
                    if blah == "Lose" then
                      healafterbattle()
                      script.Parent.Main.TeleportScreen.Visible = true
                      p.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Anchored = true
                      local area = p.LastCenter.Value

                      local hit, pos = nil, nil
                      repeat
                        repeat
                          local ray = Ray.new(p.Character.Torso.Position, Vector3.new(0, -1, 0).unit * 10)
                          local hit, pos = workspace:FindPartOnRay(ray, p.Character)
                          wait(0.25)
                        until hit
                      until game.Workspace.WhitedOut:FindFirstChild(area)
                      p.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Anchored = false
                      script.Parent.Main.TeleportScreen.Visible = false
                      deb = false
                    end
                  end
                else

local i = 0
local speed = 0
h.Running:connect(function(s)
  
  speed = math.floor(s)
end
)
while 1 do
  if wait(0.33) and speed > 6 then
    local ray = Ray.new(c.Torso.Position, Vector3.new(0, -1, 0).unit * 5)
    local hit, pos = workspace:FindPartOnRay(ray, c)
    if not hit or speed <= 6 or hit.Parent.Parent ~= game.Workspace.WildAreas or not game.Players.LocalPlayer:FindFirstChild("PokemonParty") or #p.PokemonParty:GetChildren() <= 0 or script.Parent.Main.BlackScreen.Visible ~= false or script.Parent.Main.Menu.Scroll.Title.Text ~= "Menu >" or #p.OppPokemon:GetChildren() ~= 0 or math.random(1, 1300) >= 1200 then
      findpokemon(hit)
    end
  end
end

================================================================================
-- FILE: ReplicatedStorageScripts/Battle.module.lua
================================================================================

-- params : ...

local REvents = game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents
local Battle = {}
local Pokemon = require(game.ReplicatedStorage.Information.Pokemon)
local Moves = require(game.ReplicatedStorage.Information.Moves)
repeat
  wait()
until game.Players.LocalPlayer
client = game.Players.LocalPlayer
Battle.Nickname = function(self, instance, newName)
  
  game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.Pokemon.nicknamePokemon:FireServer(instance, newName)
end

Battle.EvolveCheck = function(self, Pokemon, newPokemon, part2)
  
  local result = game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.Pokemon.evolveCheck:InvokeServer(Pokemon, newPokemon, part2)
  return result
end

Battle.NewMove = function(self, Pokemon, NewMove)
  
  game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.Pokemon.createMove:FireServer(Pokemon, NewMove)
end

Battle.Heal = function(self)
  
  if client:FindFirstChild("PokemonParty") then
    for i,v in ipairs(client.PokemonParty:GetChildren()) do
      v.CurrentHP.Value = v.Stats.HPStat.Value
      v.Status.Value = ""
      for _,move in ipairs(v.Moves:GetChildren()) do
        move.PP.Value = Moves[move.Name].PP
      end
    end
  end
  do
    local d = game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.Pokemon.healPokemon:FireServer()
  end
end

return Battle

================================================================================
-- FILE: ReplicatedStorageScripts/ExpTables.module.lua
================================================================================

-- params : ...

ExpTables = {FastExp = function(lvl)
  
  return math.floor(4 * lvl ^ 3 / 5)
end
, MedFastExp = function(lvl)
  
  return math.floor(lvl ^ 3)
end
, MedSlowExp = function(lvl)
  
  return math.floor(1.2 * lvl ^ 3 - 15 * lvl ^ 2 + 100 * lvl - 140)
end
, SlowExp = function(lvl)
  
  return math.floor(5 * lvl ^ 3 / 4)
end
}
return ExpTables

================================================================================
-- FILE: ReplicatedStorageScripts/Math.module.lua
================================================================================

-- params : ...

local REvents = game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents
local Math = {}
local Pokemon = require(game.ReplicatedStorage.Information.Pokemon)
local Moves = require(game.ReplicatedStorage.Information.Pokemon)
Math.Change = function(self, instance, newvalue, type)
  
  if instance.Name ~= "Money" then
    game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.Internal.changeValue:FireServer(instance, newvalue, type)
  else
    game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.Internal.changeMoney:FireServer(instance, newvalue)
  end
  instance.Value = newvalue
end

Math.BuyItem = function(self, instance, newvalue, type)
  
  local buying = game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.Internal.funcItem:InvokeServer(instance, newvalue)
  return buying
end

Math.ShopBuy = function(self, Item, Amount)
  
  local outcome, moneyLeft = game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.Internal.Compare:InvokeServer(Item, Amount)
  return outcome, moneyLeft
end

Math.AddItem = function(self, item, itemParent, number)
  
  local d = game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.Battle.getItem:FireServer(item, itemParent, number)
end

Math.AddBoolItem = function(self, item, itemParent)
  
  local d = game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.Battle.AddBoolItem:InvokeServer(item, itemParent)
end

Math.FuncAddItem = function(self, item, itemParent, number)
  
  local d = game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.Internal.ItemGet:InvokeServer(item, itemParent, number)
  return d
end

Math.PokeBuy = function(self, item, money)
  
  local outcome, moneyLeft = game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.Internal.PokeBuy:InvokeServer(item, money)
  return outcome, moneyLeft
end

Math.TMBuy = function(self, Item, Amount)
  
  local outcome, moneyLeft = game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.Internal.TMBuy:InvokeServer(Item, Amount)
  return outcome, moneyLeft
end

Math.Check = function(self, Instance, hash)
  
  if hash == nil or hash == false then
    Instance.Value = Instance.Value - 1
  else
    Instance.Value = Instance.Value - 8
  end
  game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.Internal.mathCheck:FireServer(Instance, hash)
end

Math.PropChange = function(self, instance, prop, nVal)
  
  instance.Name = nVal
  local d = game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.Internal.changeProp:FireServer(instance, prop, nVal)
end

Math.ParentChange = function(self, instance, newParent)
  
  local d = game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.Internal.changeParent:FireServer(instance, newParent)
  instance.Parent = newParent
end

Math.AwardBadge = function(self, number)
  
  game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.Internal.AwardBadge:FireServer(tostring(number))
end

Math.BuyBooster = function(self, typeo, minutes)
  
  local outcome, moneyLeft = game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.Internal.BuyBooster:InvokeServer(typeo, minutes)
  return outcome, moneyLeft
end

Math.BPCheck = function(self, Item, Amount)
  
  local outcome, moneyLeft = game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.Internal.BPCheck:InvokeServer(Item, Amount)
  return outcome, moneyLeft
end

Math.BPTM = function(self, Item, Amount)
  
  local outcome, moneyLeft = game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.Internal.BPTM:InvokeServer(Item, Amount)
  return outcome, moneyLeft
end

return Math

================================================================================
-- FILE: ReplicatedStorageScripts/PC.module.lua
================================================================================

-- params : ...

local REvents = game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents
local PC = {}
local Pokemon = require(game.ReplicatedStorage.Information.Pokemon)
local Moves = require(game.ReplicatedStorage.Information.Pokemon)
PC.Release = function(self, pokemon)
  
  REvents.PC.Release:FireServer(pokemon)
  pokemon:Destroy()
end

PC.Update = function(self, pokemon, value, parent)
  
  game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.PC.Update:FireServer(pokemon, value, parent)
end

PC.Change = function(self, instance, newvalue, type)
  
  game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.PC.ChangePos:InvokeServer(instance, newvalue)
end

PC.ParentChange = function(self, instance, newParent)
  
  local d = game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.PC.ParentChange:InvokeServer(instance, newParent)
  if d == false then
    game.Players.LocalPlayer:Kick()
  end
end

return PC

================================================================================
-- FILE: ReplicatedStorageScripts/Pokedex.module.lua
================================================================================

-- params : ...

local REvents = game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents
local Pokedex = {}
local PokemonData = require(game.ReplicatedStorage.Information.Pokemon)
Pokedex.Create = function(self, pokemon, nd, zol)
  
  if zol == nil then
    REvents.Pokemon.createPokedex:FireServer(pokemon, nd)
  end
end

Pokedex.Check = function(self, pokemon, client, zol)
  
  if client.Pokedex:FindFirstChild(PokemonData[pokemon].Pokedex) and zol == nil then
    return true
  else
    return false
  end
end

Pokedex.Caught = function(self, pokemon)
  
  REvents.Pokemon.caughtPokedex:FireServer(pokemon)
end

return Pokedex

================================================================================
-- FILE: ReplicatedStorage/Functions/Battle.module.lua
================================================================================

-- params : ...

local REvents = game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents
local Battle = {}
local Pokemon = require(game.ReplicatedStorage.Information.Pokemon)
local Moves = require(game.ReplicatedStorage.Information.Moves)
repeat
  wait()
until game.Players.LocalPlayer
client = game.Players.LocalPlayer
Battle.Nickname = function(self, instance, newName)
  
  game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.Pokemon.nicknamePokemon:FireServer(instance, newName)
end

Battle.EvolveCheck = function(self, Pokemon, newPokemon, part2)
  
  local result = game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.Pokemon.evolveCheck:InvokeServer(Pokemon, newPokemon, part2)
  return result
end

Battle.NewMove = function(self, Pokemon, NewMove)
  
  game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.Pokemon.createMove:FireServer(Pokemon, NewMove)
end

Battle.Heal = function(self)
  
  if client:FindFirstChild("PokemonParty") then
    for i,v in ipairs(client.PokemonParty:GetChildren()) do
      v.CurrentHP.Value = v.Stats.HPStat.Value
      v.Status.Value = ""
      for _,move in ipairs(v.Moves:GetChildren()) do
        move.PP.Value = Moves[move.Name].PP
      end
    end
  end
  do
    local d = game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.Pokemon.healPokemon:FireServer()
  end
end

return Battle

================================================================================
-- FILE: ReplicatedStorage/Functions/Math.module.lua
================================================================================

-- params : ...

local REvents = game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents
local Math = {}
local Pokemon = require(game.ReplicatedStorage.Information.Pokemon)
local Moves = require(game.ReplicatedStorage.Information.Pokemon)
Math.Change = function(self, instance, newvalue, type)
  
  if instance.Name ~= "Money" then
    game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.Internal.changeValue:FireServer(instance, newvalue, type)
  else
    game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.Internal.changeMoney:FireServer(instance, newvalue)
  end
  instance.Value = newvalue
end

Math.BuyItem = function(self, instance, newvalue, type)
  
  local buying = game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.Internal.funcItem:InvokeServer(instance, newvalue)
  return buying
end

Math.ShopBuy = function(self, Item, Amount)
  
  local outcome, moneyLeft = game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.Internal.Compare:InvokeServer(Item, Amount)
  return outcome, moneyLeft
end

Math.AddItem = function(self, item, itemParent, number)
  
  local d = game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.Battle.getItem:FireServer(item, itemParent, number)
end

Math.AddBoolItem = function(self, item, itemParent)
  
  local d = game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.Battle.AddBoolItem:InvokeServer(item, itemParent)
end

Math.FuncAddItem = function(self, item, itemParent, number)
  
  local d = game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.Internal.ItemGet:InvokeServer(item, itemParent, number)
  return d
end

Math.PokeBuy = function(self, item, money)
  
  local outcome, moneyLeft = game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.Internal.PokeBuy:InvokeServer(item, money)
  return outcome, moneyLeft
end

Math.TMBuy = function(self, Item, Amount)
  
  local outcome, moneyLeft = game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.Internal.TMBuy:InvokeServer(Item, Amount)
  return outcome, moneyLeft
end

Math.Check = function(self, Instance, hash)
  
  if hash == nil or hash == false then
    Instance.Value = Instance.Value - 1
  else
    Instance.Value = Instance.Value - 8
  end
  game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.Internal.mathCheck:FireServer(Instance, hash)
end

Math.PropChange = function(self, instance, prop, nVal)
  
  instance.Name = nVal
  local d = game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.Internal.changeProp:FireServer(instance, prop, nVal)
end

Math.ParentChange = function(self, instance, newParent)
  
  local d = game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.Internal.changeParent:FireServer(instance, newParent)
  instance.Parent = newParent
end

Math.AwardBadge = function(self, number)
  
  game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.Internal.AwardBadge:FireServer(tostring(number))
end

Math.BuyBooster = function(self, typeo, minutes)
  
  local outcome, moneyLeft = game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.Internal.BuyBooster:InvokeServer(typeo, minutes)
  return outcome, moneyLeft
end

Math.BPCheck = function(self, Item, Amount)
  
  local outcome, moneyLeft = game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.Internal.BPCheck:InvokeServer(Item, Amount)
  return outcome, moneyLeft
end

Math.BPTM = function(self, Item, Amount)
  
  local outcome, moneyLeft = game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.Internal.BPTM:InvokeServer(Item, Amount)
  return outcome, moneyLeft
end

return Math

================================================================================
-- FILE: ReplicatedStorage/Functions/PC.module.lua
================================================================================

-- params : ...

local REvents = game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents
local PC = {}
local Pokemon = require(game.ReplicatedStorage.Information.Pokemon)
local Moves = require(game.ReplicatedStorage.Information.Pokemon)
PC.Release = function(self, pokemon)
  
  REvents.PC.Release:FireServer(pokemon)
  pokemon:Destroy()
end

PC.Update = function(self, pokemon, value, parent)
  
  game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.PC.Update:FireServer(pokemon, value, parent)
end

PC.Change = function(self, instance, newvalue, type)
  
  game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.PC.ChangePos:InvokeServer(instance, newvalue)
end

PC.ParentChange = function(self, instance, newParent)
  
  local d = game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents.PC.ParentChange:InvokeServer(instance, newParent)
  if d == false then
    game.Players.LocalPlayer:Kick()
  end
end

return PC

================================================================================
-- FILE: ReplicatedStorage/Functions/Pokedex.module.lua
================================================================================

-- params : ...

local REvents = game.ReplicatedStorage.REvents
local Pokedex = {}
local PokemonData = require(game.ReplicatedStorage.Information.Pokemon)
Pokedex.Create = function(self, pokemon, nd, zol)
  
  if zol == nil then
    REvents.Pokemon.createPokedex:FireServer(pokemon, nd)
  end
end

Pokedex.Check = function(self, pokemon, client, zol)
  
  if client.Pokedex:FindFirstChild(PokemonData[pokemon].Pokedex) and zol == nil then
    return true
  else
    return false
  end
end

Pokedex.Caught = function(self, pokemon)
  
  REvents.Pokemon.caughtPokedex:FireServer(pokemon)
end

return Pokedex

================================================================================
-- FILE: ReplicatedStorage/Information/ExpTables.module.lua
================================================================================

-- params : ...

ExpTables = {FastExp = function(lvl)
  
  return math.floor(4 * lvl ^ 3 / 5)
end
, MedFastExp = function(lvl)
  
  return math.floor(lvl ^ 3)
end
, MedSlowExp = function(lvl)
  
  return math.floor(1.2 * lvl ^ 3 - 15 * lvl ^ 2 + 100 * lvl - 140)
end
, SlowExp = function(lvl)
  
  return math.floor(5 * lvl ^ 3 / 4)
end
}
return ExpTables
